authors_text: Justin Cui,Ruochen Wang,Si Si,Cho-Jui Hsieh
title: DC-BENCH: Dataset Condensation Benchmark
title_zh: DC-BENCH：数据集压缩基准
abstract: Dataset Condensation is a newly emerging technique aiming at learning a tiny dataset that captures the rich information encoded in the original dataset. As the size of datasets contemporary machine learning models rely on becomes increasingly large, condensation methods become a prominent direction for accelerating network training and reducing data storage. Despite numerous methods have been proposed in this rapidly growing field, evaluating and comparing different condensation methods is non-trivial and still remains an open issue. The quality of condensed dataset are often shadowed by many critical contributing factors to the end performance, such as data augmentation and model architectures. The lack of a systematic way to evaluate and compare condensation methods not only hinders our understanding of existing techniques, but also discourages practical usage of the synthesized datasets. This work provides the first large-scale standardized benchmark on Dataset Condensation. It consists of a suite of evaluations to comprehensively reflect the generability and effectiveness of condensation methods through the lens of their generated dataset. Leveraging this benchmark, we conduct a large-scale study of current condensation methods, and report many insightful findings that open up new possibilities for future development. The benchmark library, including evaluators, baseline methods, and generated datasets, is open-sourced to facilitate future research and application.

abstract_zh: 数据集压缩是一种新兴技术，旨在学习一个微小的数据集，捕获原始数据集中编码的丰富信息。随着当代机器学习模型所依赖的数据集规模越来越大，压缩方法成为加速网络训练和减少数据存储的一个突出方向。尽管在这个快速发展的领域已经提出了许多方法，但评估和比较不同的冷凝方法并非易事，并且仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。压缩数据集的质量通常受到许多影响最终性能的关键因素的影响，例如数据增强和模型架构。缺乏评估和比较压缩方法的系统方法不仅阻碍了我们对现有技术的理解，而且阻碍了合成数据集的实际使用。这项工作提供了第一个关于数据集压缩的大规模标准化基准。它由一系列评估组成，通过生成的数据集来全面反映凝结方法的可生成性和有效性。利用这一基准，我们对当前的冷凝方法进行了大规模研究，并报告了许多富有洞察力的发现，为未来的发展开辟了新的可能性。基准库，包括评估器、基线方法和生成的数据集，都是开源的，以方便未来的研究和应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DC-BENCH基准，用于系统评估和比较数据集压缩方法的效果与生成能力。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集压缩方法缺乏统一的评估标准，导致难以比较不同方法性能，阻碍了技术发展和实际应用。
AI.method: 构建包含多维度评估指标的标准化基准，通过生成数据集的性能、泛化能力等指标全面分析压缩方法，并开源基准库。
AI.result: 发现当前方法在数据增强和模型架构依赖性上的显著差异，揭示了压缩效果的关键影响因素。
AI.conclusion: DC-BENCH为数据集压缩研究提供了系统评估框架，推动了该领域方法的优化与实际应用落地。

authors_text: Meiqi Hu,Chen Wu,Liangpei Zhang
title: HyperNet: Self-Supervised Hyperspectral Spatial-Spectral Feature Understanding Network for Hyperspectral Change Detection
title_zh: HyperNet：用于高光谱变化检测的自监督高光谱空间光谱特征理解网络
abstract: The fast development of self-supervised learning lowers the bar learning feature representation from massive unlabeled data and has triggered a series of research on change detection of remote sensing images. Challenges in adapting self-supervised learning from natural images classification to remote sensing images change detection arise from difference between the two tasks. The learned patch-level feature representations are not satisfying for the pixel-level precise change detection. In this paper, we proposed a novel pixel-level self-supervised hyperspectral spatial-spectral understanding network (HyperNet) to accomplish pixel-wise feature representation for effective hyperspectral change detection. Concretely, not patches but the whole images are fed into the network and the multi-temporal spatial-spectral features are compared pixel by pixel. Instead of processing the two-dimensional imaging space and spectral response dimension in hybrid style, a powerful spatial-spectral attention module is put forward to explore the spatial correlation and discriminative spectral features of multi-temporal hyperspectral images (HSIs), separately. Only the positive samples at the same location of bi-temporal HSIs are created and forced to be aligned, aiming at learning the spectral difference-invariant features. Moreover, a new similarity loss function named focal cosine is proposed to solve the problem of imbalanced easy and hard positive samples comparison, where the weights of those hard samples are enlarged and highlighted to promote the network training. Six hyperspectral datasets have been adopted to test the validity and generalization of proposed HyperNet. The extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of HyperNet over the state-of-the-art algorithms on downstream hyperspectral change detection tasks.

Challenges in adapting self-supervised learning from natural images classification to remote sensing images change detection arise from difference between the two tasks. In this paper, we proposed a novel pixel-level self-supervised hyperspectral spatial-spectral understanding network (HyperNet) to accomplish pixel-wise feature representation for effective hyperspectral change detection. Concretely, not patches but the whole images are fed into the network and the multi-temporal spatial-spectral features are compared pixel by pixel. Instead of processing the two-dimensional imaging space and spectral response dimension in hybrid style, a powerful spatial-spectral attention module is put forward to explore the spatial correlation and discriminative spectral features of multi-temporal hyperspectral images (HSIs), separately. Only the positive samples at the same location of bi-temporal HSIs are created and forced to be aligned, aiming at learning the spectral difference-invariant features. Moreover, a new similarity loss function named focal cosine is proposed to solve the problem of imbalanced easy and hard positive samples comparison, where the weights of those hard samples are enlarged and highlighted to promote the network training. Six hyperspectral datasets have been adopted to test the validity and generalization of proposed HyperNet. The extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of HyperNet over the state-of-the-art algorithms on downstream hyperspectral change detection tasks.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习的快速发展降低了海量未标记数据的学习特征表示的门槛，引发了一系列遥感图像变化检测的研究。将自监督学习从自然图像分类适应遥感图像变化检测的挑战源于两个任务之间的差异。学习到的块级特征表示不能满足像素级精确变化检测。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的像素级自监督高光谱空间光谱理解网络（HyperNet）来完成像素级特征表示，以实现有效的高光谱变化检测。具体来说，不是将图像块而是整个图像输入网络，并逐像素比较多时空光谱特征。提出了一种强大的空间光谱注意力模块来分别探索多时相高光谱图像（HSIs）的空间相关性和判别性光谱特征，而不是混合方式处理二维成像空间和光谱响应维数。仅创建双时态 HSI 同一位置的正样本并强制对齐，旨在学习光谱差异不变特征。此外，提出了一种新的相似性损失函数——焦点余弦来解决易难正样本比较不平衡的问题，其中难样本的权重被放大和突出以促进网络训练。采用六个高光谱数据集来测试所提出的 HyperNet 的有效性和泛化性。大量实验证明了 HyperNet 在下游高光谱变化检测任务上相对于最先进算法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的高光谱变化检测网络HyperNet，通过像素级特征表示提升高光谱图像变化检测效果。
AI.motivation: 传统自监督学习在自然图像分类中效果显著，但直接应用于高光谱遥感图像变化检测时面临像素级精度不足、时空特征融合困难等挑战。
AI.method: 采用全图输入替代补丁处理，设计时空光谱注意力模块分离提取空间关联与判别光谱特征，并通过位置对齐的正样本和聚焦余弦损失函数优化特征学习。
AI.result: 在六个高光谱数据集上验证，HyperNet在变化检测任务中优于现有最先进算法，展现出良好的泛化能力与检测精度。
AI.conclusion: HyperNet通过像素级自监督学习与新型损失函数设计，有效解决了高光谱变化检测中的特征对齐与样本不平衡问题。

authors_text: Guangcheng Chen,Li He,Yisheng Guan,Hong Zhang
title: Perspective Phase Angle Model for Polarimetric 3D Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于偏振 3D 重建的透视相位角模型
abstract: Current polarimetric 3D reconstruction methods, including those in the well-established shape from polarization literature, are all developed under the orthographic projection assumption. In the case of a large field of view, however, this assumption does not hold and may result in significant reconstruction errors in methods that make this assumption. To address this problem, we present the perspective phase angle (PPA) model that is applicable to perspective cameras. Compared with the orthographic model, the proposed PPA model accurately describes the relationship between polarization phase angle and surface normal under perspective projection. In addition, the PPA model makes it possible to estimate surface normals from only one single-view phase angle map and does not suffer from the so-called $π$-ambiguity problem. Experiments on real data show that the PPA model is more accurate for surface normal estimation with a perspective camera than the orthographic model.
summary: Current polarimetric 3D reconstruction methods, including those in the well-established shape from polarization literature, are all developed under the orthographic projection assumption. In the case of a large field of view, however, this assumption does not hold and may result in significant reconstruction errors in methods that make this assumption. To address this problem, we present the perspective phase angle (PPA) model that is applicable to perspective cameras. Compared with the orthographic model, the proposed PPA model accurately describes the relationship between polarization phase angle and surface normal under perspective projection. In addition, the PPA model makes it possible to estimate surface normals from only one single-view phase angle map and does not suffer from the so-called $π$-ambiguity problem. Experiments on real data show that the PPA model is more accurate for surface normal estimation with a perspective camera than the orthographic model.
abstract_zh: 当前的偏振 3D 重建方法，包括偏振文献中已确立的形状的方法，都是在正交投影假设下开发的。然而，在大视场的情况下，该假设不成立，并且可能导致做出该假设的方法中出现显着的重建误差。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了适用于透视相机的透视相位角（PPA）模型。与正交模型相比，所提出的PPA模型准确地描述了透视投影下偏振相位角与表面法线之间的关系。此外，PPA 模型可以仅根据一个单视图相位角图来估计表面法线，并且不会遇到所谓的 $π$ 模糊问题。真实数据实验表明，PPA模型对于透视相机的表面法线估计比正交模型更准确。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于透视相机的视角相位角（PPA）模型，用于改进偏振3D重建方法。
AI.motivation: 现有偏振3D重建方法基于正交投影假设，在大视场情况下会导致显著重建误差，需开发适用于透视投影的新模型。
AI.method: 提出PPA模型，准确描述透视投影下偏振相位角与表面法线的关系，并通过单视角相位角图估计法线，避免π-模糊问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，PPA模型在透视相机下的表面法线估计精度优于正交投影模型。
AI.conclusion: PPA模型通过消除正交投影假设的局限性，提升了偏振3D重建的准确性，适用于实际透视相机场景。

search_text: Perspective Phase Angle Model for Polarimetric 3D Reconstruction 用于偏振 3D 重建的透视相位角模型 Current polarimetric 3D reconstruction methods, including those in the well-established shape from polarization literature, are all developed under the orthographic projection assumption. In the case of a large field of view, however, this assumption does not hold and may result in significant reconstruction errors in methods that make this assumption. To address this problem, we present the perspective phase angle (PPA) model that is applicable to perspective cameras. Compared with the orthographic model, the proposed PPA model accurately describes the relationship between polarization phase angle and surface normal under perspective projection. In addition, the PPA model makes it possible to estimate surface normals from only one single-view phase angle map and does not suffer from the so-called $π$-ambiguity problem. Experiments on real data show that the PPA model is more accurate for surface normal estimation with a perspective camera than the orthographic model. 当前的偏振 3D 重建方法，包括偏振文献中已确立的形状的方法，都是在正交投影假设下开发的。然而，在大视场的情况下，该假设不成立，并且可能导致做出该假设的方法中出现显着的重建误差。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了适用于透视相机的透视相位角（PPA）模型。与正交模型相比，所提出的PPA模型准确地描述了透视投影下偏振相位角与表面法线之间的关系。此外，PPA 模型可以仅根据一个单视图相位角图来估计表面法线，并且不会遇到所谓的 $π$ 模糊问题。真实数据实验表明，PPA模型对于透视相机的表面法线估计比正交模型更准确。 本文提出了一种适用于透视相机的视角相位角（PPA）模型，用于改进偏振3D重建方法。 Guangcheng Chen,Li He,Yisheng Guan,Hong Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Md Mahfuz Al Hasan,Mohammad Tahsin Mostafiz,Thomas An Le,Jake Julia,Nidish Vashistha,Shayan Taheri,Navid Asadizanjani
title: EVHA: Explainable Vision System for Hardware Testing and Assurance -- An Overview
title_zh: EVHA：用于硬件测试和保证的可解释视觉系统——概述
comment: Please contact Dr. Shayan Taheri for any questions and/or comments regarding the paper arXiv submission at: "www.shayan-taheri.com". The Paper Initial Submission: The ACM Journal on Emerging Technologies in Computing Systems (JETC)
comments: Please contact Dr. Shayan Taheri for any questions and/or comments regarding the paper arXiv submission at: "www.shayan-taheri.com". The Paper Initial Submission: The ACM Journal on Emerging Technologies in Computing Systems (JETC)
abstract: Due to the ever-growing demands for electronic chips in different sectors the semiconductor companies have been mandated to offshore their manufacturing processes. This unwanted matter has made security and trustworthiness of their fabricated chips concerning and caused creation of hardware attacks. In this condition, different entities in the semiconductor supply chain can act maliciously and execute an attack on the design computing layers, from devices to systems. Our attack is a hardware Trojan that is inserted during mask generation/fabrication in an untrusted foundry. The Trojan leaves a footprint in the fabricated through addition, deletion, or change of design cells. In order to tackle this problem, we propose Explainable Vision System for Hardware Testing and Assurance (EVHA) in this work that can detect the smallest possible change to a design in a low-cost, accurate, and fast manner. The inputs to this system are Scanning Electron Microscopy (SEM) images acquired from the Integrated Circuits (ICs) under examination. The system output is determination of IC status in terms of having any defect and/or hardware Trojan through addition, deletion, or change in the design cells at the cell-level. This article provides an overview on the design, development, implementation, and analysis of our defense system.

In order to tackle this problem, we propose Explainable Vision System for Hardware Testing and Assurance (EVHA) in this work that can detect the smallest possible change to a design in a low-cost, accurate, and fast manner. The inputs to this system are Scanning Electron Microscopy (SEM) images acquired from the Integrated Circuits (ICs) under examination. The system output is determination of IC status in terms of having any defect and/or hardware Trojan through addition, deletion, or change in the design cells at the cell-level. This article provides an overview on the design, development, implementation, and analysis of our defense system.
abstract_zh: 由于不同行业对电子芯片的需求不断增长，半导体公司被迫将其制造流程外包。这种不必要的问题使他们制造的芯片的安全性和可信性受到关注，并导致了硬件攻击的发生。在这种情况下，半导体供应链中的不同实体可以恶意行动并对从设备到系统的设计计算层执行攻击。我们的攻击是在不受信任的代工厂中的掩模生成/制造过程中插入的硬件木马。该特洛伊木马通过添加、删除或更改设计单元在制造中留下足迹。为了解决这个问题，我们在这项工作中提出了用于硬件测试和保证的可解释视觉系统（EVHA），它可以以低成本、准确和快速的方式检测设计的最小可能变化。该系统的输入是从受检查的集成电路 (IC) 获取的扫描电子显微镜 (SEM) 图像。系统输出是通过在单元级的设计单元中添加、删除或更改来确定IC状态是否存在任何缺陷和/或硬件木马。本文概述了我们的防御系统的设计、开发、实施和分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可解释的视觉系统EVHA，用于通过扫描电子显微镜图像检测集成电路中的硬件木马和缺陷。
AI.motivation: 由于半导体制造外包导致供应链安全风险增加，恶意实体可能在芯片设计中植入硬件木马，需开发低成本高效的检测方法。
AI.method: 基于扫描电子显微镜（SEM）图像，利用可解释视觉系统在单元层级检测设计单元的增删改变化特征以识别缺陷或木马。
AI.result: EVHA系统能够以低成本、高精度和快速度检测芯片设计中最小尺度的异常变化。
AI.conclusion: EVHA为硬件测试与保障提供了有效的解决方案，可提升集成电路供应链的安全性与可信度。

authors_text: Zhen Wang,Long Chen,Wenbo Ma,Guangxing Han,Yulei Niu,Jian Shao,Jun Xiao
title: Explicit Image Caption Editing
title_zh: 显式图像标题编辑
comment: ECCV 2022, dataset and code are available at https://github.com/baaaad/ECE
comments: ECCV 2022, dataset and code are available at https://github.com/baaaad/ECE
abstract: Given an image and a reference caption, the image caption editing task aims to correct the misalignment errors and generate a refined caption. However, all existing caption editing works are implicit models, ie, they directly produce the refined captions without explicit connections to the reference captions. In this paper, we introduce a new task: Explicit Caption Editing (ECE). ECE models explicitly generate a sequence of edit operations, and this edit operation sequence can translate the reference caption into a refined one. Compared to the implicit editing, ECE has multiple advantages: 1) Explainable: it can trace the whole editing path. 2) Editing Efficient: it only needs to modify a few words. 3) Human-like: it resembles the way that humans perform caption editing, and tries to keep original sentence structures. To solve this new task, we propose the first ECE model: TIger. TIger is a non-autoregressive transformer-based model, consisting of three modules: Tagger_del, Tagger_add, and Inserter. Specifically, Tagger_del decides whether each word should be preserved or not, Tagger_add decides where to add new words, and Inserter predicts the specific word for adding. To further facilitate ECE research, we propose two new ECE benchmarks by re-organizing two existing datasets, dubbed COCO-EE and Flickr30K-EE, respectively. Extensive ablations on both two benchmarks have demonstrated the effectiveness of TIger.
summary: Given an image and a reference caption, the image caption editing task aims to correct the misalignment errors and generate a refined caption. However, all existing caption editing works are implicit models, ie, they directly produce the refined captions without explicit connections to the reference captions. In this paper, we introduce a new task: Explicit Caption Editing (ECE). ECE models explicitly generate a sequence of edit operations, and this edit operation sequence can translate the reference caption into a refined one. Compared to the implicit editing, ECE has multiple advantages: 1) Explainable: it can trace the whole editing path. 2) Editing Efficient: it only needs to modify a few words. 3) Human-like: it resembles the way that humans perform caption editing, and tries to keep original sentence structures. To solve this new task, we propose the first ECE model: TIger. TIger is a non-autoregressive transformer-based model, consisting of three modules: Tagger_del, Tagger_add, and Inserter. Specifically, Tagger_del decides whether each word should be preserved or not, Tagger_add decides where to add new words, and Inserter predicts the specific word for adding. To further facilitate ECE research, we propose two new ECE benchmarks by re-organizing two existing datasets, dubbed COCO-EE and Flickr30K-EE, respectively. Extensive ablations on both two benchmarks have demonstrated the effectiveness of TIger.
abstract_zh: 给定图像和参考标题，图像标题编辑任务旨在纠正未对齐错误并生成精致的标题。然而，所有现有的字幕编辑工作都是隐式模型，即它们直接产生精炼字幕，而没有与参考字幕的显式连接。在本文中，我们介绍了一项新任务：显式字幕编辑（ECE）。 ECE模型显式地生成一系列编辑操作，并且该编辑操作序列可以将参考字幕翻译成精炼的字幕。与隐式编辑相比，ECE 有多个优点： 1）可解释：它可以跟踪整个编辑路径。 2）编辑高效：只需修改几个字即可。 3）类人：类似于人类进行字幕编辑的方式，并尽量保持原始的句子结构。为了解决这个新任务，我们提出了第一个 ECE 模型：TIger。 TIger 是一个基于 Transformer 的非自回归模型，由三个模块组成：Tagger_del、Tagger_add 和 Inserter。具体来说，Tagger_del决定是否保留每个单词，Tagger_add决定在哪里添加新单词，Inserter预测添加的具体单词。为了进一步促进 ECE 研究，我们通过重新组织两个现有数据集（分别称为 COCO-EE 和 Flickr30K-EE）提出了两个新的 ECE 基准。两个基准测试的广泛消融证明了 TIger 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出显式图像标题编辑任务（ECE），通过生成明确的编辑操作序列来修正图像标题中的错误，使其更接近参考标题。
AI.motivation: 现有标题编辑方法均为隐式模型，无法解释编辑路径、效率低且不符合人类编辑方式，需开发更透明高效的编辑框架。
AI.method: 设计首个非自回归Transformer模型TIger，包含三个模块：Tagger_del（删除判定）、Tagger_add（添加位置预测）、Inserter（新增词预测），并构建COCO-EE和Flickr30K-EE基准数据集。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上通过大量消融实验验证了TIger的有效性，证明其在可解释性、编辑效率和人类相似性方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: 显式标题编辑方法（ECE）相比隐式方法更具解释性、高效性和人类编辑特性，为未来研究提供了新方向和基准。

search_text: Explicit Image Caption Editing 显式图像标题编辑 Given an image and a reference caption, the image caption editing task aims to correct the misalignment errors and generate a refined caption. However, all existing caption editing works are implicit models, ie, they directly produce the refined captions without explicit connections to the reference captions. In this paper, we introduce a new task: Explicit Caption Editing (ECE). ECE models explicitly generate a sequence of edit operations, and this edit operation sequence can translate the reference caption into a refined one. Compared to the implicit editing, ECE has multiple advantages: 1) Explainable: it can trace the whole editing path. 2) Editing Efficient: it only needs to modify a few words. 3) Human-like: it resembles the way that humans perform caption editing, and tries to keep original sentence structures. To solve this new task, we propose the first ECE model: TIger. TIger is a non-autoregressive transformer-based model, consisting of three modules: Tagger_del, Tagger_add, and Inserter. Specifically, Tagger_del decides whether each word should be preserved or not, Tagger_add decides where to add new words, and Inserter predicts the specific word for adding. To further facilitate ECE research, we propose two new ECE benchmarks by re-organizing two existing datasets, dubbed COCO-EE and Flickr30K-EE, respectively. Extensive ablations on both two benchmarks have demonstrated the effectiveness of TIger. 给定图像和参考标题，图像标题编辑任务旨在纠正未对齐错误并生成精致的标题。然而，所有现有的字幕编辑工作都是隐式模型，即它们直接产生精炼字幕，而没有与参考字幕的显式连接。在本文中，我们介绍了一项新任务：显式字幕编辑（ECE）。 ECE模型显式地生成一系列编辑操作，并且该编辑操作序列可以将参考字幕翻译成精炼的字幕。与隐式编辑相比，ECE 有多个优点： 1）可解释：它可以跟踪整个编辑路径。 2）编辑高效：只需修改几个字即可。 3）类人：类似于人类进行字幕编辑的方式，并尽量保持原始的句子结构。为了解决这个新任务，我们提出了第一个 ECE 模型：TIger。 TIger 是一个基于 Transformer 的非自回归模型，由三个模块组成：Tagger_del、Tagger_add 和 Inserter。具体来说，Tagger_del决定是否保留每个单词，Tagger_add决定在哪里添加新单词，Inserter预测添加的具体单词。为了进一步促进 ECE 研究，我们通过重新组织两个现有数据集（分别称为 COCO-EE 和 Flickr30K-EE）提出了两个新的 ECE 基准。两个基准测试的广泛消融证明了 TIger 的有效性。 本文提出显式图像标题编辑任务（ECE），通过生成明确的编辑操作序列来修正图像标题中的错误，使其更接近参考标题。 Zhen Wang,Long Chen,Wenbo Ma,Guangxing Han,Yulei Niu,Jian Shao,Jun Xiao cs.CV

authors_text: Aaron Berk,Gulcenur Ozturan,Parsa Delavari,David Maberley,Özgür Yılmaz,Ipek Oruc
title: Learning from few examples: Classifying sex from retinal images via deep learning
title_zh: 从几个例子中学习：通过深度学习从视网膜图像中分类性别
abstract: Deep learning has seen tremendous interest in medical imaging, particularly in the use of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for developing automated diagnostic tools. The facility of its non-invasive acquisition makes retinal fundus imaging amenable to such automated approaches. Recent work in analyzing fundus images using CNNs relies on access to massive data for training and validation - hundreds of thousands of images. However, data residency and data privacy restrictions stymie the applicability of this approach in medical settings where patient confidentiality is a mandate. Here, we showcase results for the performance of DL on small datasets to classify patient sex from fundus images - a trait thought not to be present or quantifiable in fundus images until recently. We fine-tune a Resnet-152 model whose last layer has been modified for binary classification. In several experiments, we assess performance in the small dataset context using one private (DOVS) and one public (ODIR) data source. Our models, developed using approximately 2500 fundus images, achieved test AUC scores of up to 0.72 (95% CI: [0.67, 0.77]). This corresponds to a mere 25% decrease in performance despite a nearly 1000-fold decrease in the dataset size compared to prior work in the literature. Even with a hard task like sex categorization from retinal images, we find that classification is possible with very small datasets. Additionally, we perform domain adaptation experiments between DOVS and ODIR; explore the effect of data curation on training and generalizability; and investigate model ensembling to maximize CNN classifier performance in the context of small development datasets.
summary: Deep learning has seen tremendous interest in medical imaging, particularly in the use of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for developing automated diagnostic tools. The facility of its non-invasive acquisition makes retinal fundus imaging amenable to such automated approaches. Recent work in analyzing fundus images using CNNs relies on access to massive data for training and validation - hundreds of thousands of images. However, data residency and data privacy restrictions stymie the applicability of this approach in medical settings where patient confidentiality is a mandate. Here, we showcase results for the performance of DL on small datasets to classify patient sex from fundus images - a trait thought not to be present or quantifiable in fundus images until recently. We fine-tune a Resnet-152 model whose last layer has been modified for binary classification. In several experiments, we assess performance in the small dataset context using one private (DOVS) and one public (ODIR) data source. Our models, developed using approximately 2500 fundus images, achieved test AUC scores of up to 0.72 (95% CI: [0.67, 0.77]). This corresponds to a mere 25% decrease in performance despite a nearly 1000-fold decrease in the dataset size compared to prior work in the literature. Even with a hard task like sex categorization from retinal images, we find that classification is possible with very small datasets. Additionally, we perform domain adaptation experiments between DOVS and ODIR; explore the effect of data curation on training and generalizability; and investigate model ensembling to maximize CNN classifier performance in the context of small development datasets.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在医学成像领域引起了极大的兴趣，特别是在使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 开发自动化诊断工具方面。其非侵入性采集的便利性使得视网膜眼底成像适合这种自动化方法。最近使用 CNN 分析眼底图像的工作依赖于获取大量数据（数十万张图像）进行训练和验证。然而，数据驻留和数据隐私限制阻碍了这种方法在强制要求患者保密的医疗环境中的适用性。在这里，我们展示了深度学习在小型数据集上的性能结果，以根据眼底图像对患者性别进行分类——这一特征直到最近才被认为在眼底图像中存在或无法量化。我们微调 Resnet-152 模型，其最后一层已针对二元分类进行了修改。在多项实验中，我们使用一种私有 (DOVS) 和一种公共 (ODIR) 数据源评估小数据集环境中的性能。我们的模型使用大约 2500 张眼底图像开发，测试 AUC 分数高达 0.72（95% CI：[0.67，0.77]）。尽管数据集大小与文献中的先前工作相比减少了近 1000 倍，但这相当于性能仅下降了 25%。即使是像从视网膜图像中进行性别分类这样的艰巨任务，我们发现用非常小的数据集也可以进行分类。此外，我们还进行了 DOVS 和 ODIR 之间的域适应实验；探索数据管理对训练和推广的影响；并研究模型集成，以在小型开发数据集的背景下最大化 CNN 分类器的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用深度学习从少量视网膜图像中分类患者性别，解决医疗数据隐私限制下的小数据集应用问题。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法依赖大规模数据集，但医疗数据隐私法规限制了数据共享，需探索在小数据集上实现有效诊断的可能性。
AI.method: 基于ResNet-152模型进行微调，修改最后一层为二分类结构，使用DOVS（私有）和ODIR（公开）两个数据集进行实验，并探索领域适应、数据清洗及模型集成技术。
AI.result: 使用约2500张视网膜图像训练的模型在测试集上达到AUC 0.72（95% CI: [0.67, 0.77]），相比传统方法数据量减少1000倍仅损失25%性能。
AI.conclusion: 即使在小数据集和复杂任务下，通过模型优化与数据策略调整仍可实现视网膜图像性别分类，为隐私敏感场景提供可行方案。

authors_text: Jonathan A. DeCastro,Deepak Gopinath,Guy Rosman,Emily Sumner,Shabnam Hakimi,Simon Stent
title: Learning Latent Traits for Simulated Cooperative Driving Tasks
title_zh: 学习模拟合作驾驶任务的潜在特征
abstract: To construct effective teaming strategies between humans and AI systems in complex, risky situations requires an understanding of individual preferences and behaviors of humans. Previously this problem has been treated in case-specific or data-agnostic ways. In this paper, we build a framework capable of capturing a compact latent representation of the human in terms of their behavior and preferences based on data from a simulated population of drivers. Our framework leverages, to the extent available, knowledge of individual preferences and types from samples within the population to deploy interaction policies appropriate for specific drivers. We then build a lightweight simulation environment, HMIway-env, for modelling one form of distracted driving behavior, and use it to generate data for different driver types and train intervention policies. We finally use this environment to quantify both the ability to discriminate drivers and the effectiveness of intervention policies.
summary: To construct effective teaming strategies between humans and AI systems in complex, risky situations requires an understanding of individual preferences and behaviors of humans. Previously this problem has been treated in case-specific or data-agnostic ways. In this paper, we build a framework capable of capturing a compact latent representation of the human in terms of their behavior and preferences based on data from a simulated population of drivers. Our framework leverages, to the extent available, knowledge of individual preferences and types from samples within the population to deploy interaction policies appropriate for specific drivers. We then build a lightweight simulation environment, HMIway-env, for modelling one form of distracted driving behavior, and use it to generate data for different driver types and train intervention policies. We finally use this environment to quantify both the ability to discriminate drivers and the effectiveness of intervention policies.
abstract_zh: 为了在复杂、危险的情况下构建人类和人工智能系统之间的有效团队策略，需要了解人类的个人偏好和行为。以前，这个问题是通过特定情况或与数据无关的方式来处理的。在本文中，我们构建了一个框架，能够根据模拟驾驶员群体的数据捕获人类行为和偏好的紧凑潜在表示。我们的框架在可用的范围内利用人口样本中的个人偏好和类型知识来部署适合特定驱动因素的交互策略。然后，我们构建了一个轻量级仿真环境 HMIway-env，用于对一种形式的分心驾驶行为进行建模，并使用它来生成不同驾驶员类型和列车干预政策的数据。我们最终利用这种环境来量化区分司机的能力和干预政策的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种框架，通过模拟驾驶数据学习人类驾驶员的潜在行为特征，并训练针对性的干预策略以提升人机协作效果。
AI.motivation: 在复杂风险场景中，现有方法难以有效捕捉人类个体差异，导致人机协作策略不够精准，需建立更细致的个体行为建模方法。
AI.method: 构建基于模拟驾驶人群数据的潜在特征学习框架，结合HMIway-env仿真环境生成不同驾驶类型数据，并训练针对性干预策略。
AI.result: 实现了对驾驶员类型的区分能力评估，验证了干预策略在不同驾驶特征下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过潜在特征建模可提升人机协作策略的个性化水平，为复杂场景下的智能干预提供了可行框架。

tldr: 本文提出了一种框架，通过模拟驾驶数据学习人类驾驶员的潜在行为特征，并训练针对性的干预策略以提升人机协作效果。
motivation: 在复杂风险场景中，现有方法难以有效捕捉人类个体差异，导致人机协作策略不够精准，需建立更细致的个体行为建模方法。
method: 构建基于模拟驾驶人群数据的潜在特征学习框架，结合HMIway-env仿真环境生成不同驾驶类型数据，并训练针对性干预策略。
result: 实现了对驾驶员类型的区分能力评估，验证了干预策略在不同驾驶特征下的有效性。
conclusion: 通过潜在特征建模可提升人机协作策略的个性化水平，为复杂场景下的智能干预提供了可行框架。
search_text: Learning Latent Traits for Simulated Cooperative Driving Tasks 学习模拟合作驾驶任务的潜在特征 To construct effective teaming strategies between humans and AI systems in complex, risky situations requires an understanding of individual preferences and behaviors of humans. Previously this problem has been treated in case-specific or data-agnostic ways. In this paper, we build a framework capable of capturing a compact latent representation of the human in terms of their behavior and preferences based on data from a simulated population of drivers. Our framework leverages, to the extent available, knowledge of individual preferences and types from samples within the population to deploy interaction policies appropriate for specific drivers. We then build a lightweight simulation environment, HMIway-env, for modelling one form of distracted driving behavior, and use it to generate data for different driver types and train intervention policies. We finally use this environment to quantify both the ability to discriminate drivers and the effectiveness of intervention policies. 为了在复杂、危险的情况下构建人类和人工智能系统之间的有效团队策略，需要了解人类的个人偏好和行为。以前，这个问题是通过特定情况或与数据无关的方式来处理的。在本文中，我们构建了一个框架，能够根据模拟驾驶员群体的数据捕获人类行为和偏好的紧凑潜在表示。我们的框架在可用的范围内利用人口样本中的个人偏好和类型知识来部署适合特定驱动因素的交互策略。然后，我们构建了一个轻量级仿真环境 HMIway-env，用于对一种形式的分心驾驶行为进行建模，并使用它来生成不同驾驶员类型和列车干预政策的数据。我们最终利用这种环境来量化区分司机的能力和干预政策的有效性。 本文提出了一种框架，通过模拟驾驶数据学习人类驾驶员的潜在行为特征，并训练针对性的干预策略以提升人机协作效果。 Jonathan A. DeCastro,Deepak Gopinath,Guy Rosman,Emily Sumner,Shabnam Hakimi,Simon Stent cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Vikram V. Ramaswamy,Sunnie S. Y. Kim,Ruth Fong,Olga Russakovsky
title: Overlooked factors in concept-based explanations: Dataset choice, concept learnability, and human capability
title_zh: 基于概念的解释中被忽视的因素：数据集选择、概念可学习性和人类能力
abstract: Concept-based interpretability methods aim to explain deep neural network model predictions using a predefined set of semantic concepts. These methods evaluate a trained model on a new, "probe" dataset and correlate model predictions with the visual concepts labeled in that dataset. Despite their popularity, they suffer from limitations that are not well-understood and articulated by the literature. In this work, we analyze three commonly overlooked factors in concept-based explanations. First, the choice of the probe dataset has a profound impact on the generated explanations. Our analysis reveals that different probe datasets may lead to very different explanations, and suggests that the explanations are not generalizable outside the probe dataset. Second, we find that concepts in the probe dataset are often less salient and harder to learn than the classes they claim to explain, calling into question the correctness of the explanations. We argue that only visually salient concepts should be used in concept-based explanations. Finally, while existing methods use hundreds or even thousands of concepts, our human studies reveal a much stricter upper bound of 32 concepts or less, beyond which the explanations are much less practically useful. We make suggestions for future development and analysis of concept-based interpretability methods. Code for our analysis and user interface can be found at \url{https://github.com/princetonvisualai/OverlookedFactors}
summary: Concept-based interpretability methods aim to explain deep neural network model predictions using a predefined set of semantic concepts. These methods evaluate a trained model on a new, "probe" dataset and correlate model predictions with the visual concepts labeled in that dataset. Despite their popularity, they suffer from limitations that are not well-understood and articulated by the literature. In this work, we analyze three commonly overlooked factors in concept-based explanations. First, the choice of the probe dataset has a profound impact on the generated explanations. Our analysis reveals that different probe datasets may lead to very different explanations, and suggests that the explanations are not generalizable outside the probe dataset. Second, we find that concepts in the probe dataset are often less salient and harder to learn than the classes they claim to explain, calling into question the correctness of the explanations. We argue that only visually salient concepts should be used in concept-based explanations. Finally, while existing methods use hundreds or even thousands of concepts, our human studies reveal a much stricter upper bound of 32 concepts or less, beyond which the explanations are much less practically useful. We make suggestions for future development and analysis of concept-based interpretability methods. Code for our analysis and user interface can be found at \url{https://github.com/princetonvisualai/OverlookedFactors}
abstract_zh: 基于概念的可解释性方法旨在使用一组预定义的语义概念来解释深度神经网络模型预测。这些方法在新的“探测”数据集上评估经过训练的模型，并将模型预测与该数据集中标记的视觉概念相关联。尽管它们很受欢迎，但它们仍存在文献中未充分理解和阐明的局限性。在这项工作中，我们分析了基于概念的解释中三个常被忽视的因素。首先，探测数据集的选择对生成的解释有深远的影响。我们的分析表明，不同的探测数据集可能会导致非常不同的解释，并表明这些解释在探测数据集之外是不可推广的。其次，我们发现探测数据集中的概念通常比它们声称要解释的类更不显着且更难学习，这使得解释的正确性受到质疑。我们认为，在基于概念的解释中只应使用视觉上显着的概念。最后，虽然现有方法使用数百甚至数千个概念，但我们的人类研究揭示了更严格的上限，即 32 个或更少的概念，超出这个上限，解释的实际用处就小得多。我们为基于概念的可解释性方法的未来发展和分析提出建议。我们的分析和用户界面的代码可以在 \url{https://github.com/princetonvisualai/OverlookedFactors} 找到

AI.tldr: 本文分析了概念解释方法中被忽视的三个关键因素：数据集选择、概念可学习性及人类认知能力。
AI.motivation: 现有概念解释方法存在局限性，但其成因未被充分探讨，需通过系统分析揭示影响解释效果的核心因素。
AI.method: 通过实验对比不同探针数据集的影响，评估概念可学习性，并开展人类用户研究验证认知上限。
AI.result: 探针数据集选择显著影响解释结果；数据集中的概念较难学习且不够显著；人类有效认知概念数量不超过32个。
AI.conclusion: 未来概念解释方法需优化数据集选择、筛选显著概念，并考虑人类认知瓶颈以提升实用性。

authors_text: Mirae Do,Seogkyu Jeon,Pilhyeon Lee,Kibeom Hong,Yu-seung Ma,Hyeran Byun
title: Exploiting Domain Transferability for Collaborative Inter-level Domain Adaptive Object Detection
title_zh: 利用域可转移性进行协作级间域自适应对象检测
comment: Accepted to Expert Systems with Applications. The first three authors contributed equally
comments: Accepted to Expert Systems with Applications. The first three authors contributed equally
abstract: Domain adaptation for object detection (DAOD) has recently drawn much attention owing to its capability of detecting target objects without any annotations. To tackle the problem, previous works focus on aligning features extracted from partial levels (e.g., image-level, instance-level, RPN-level) in a two-stage detector via adversarial training. However, individual levels in the object detection pipeline are closely related to each other and this inter-level relation is unconsidered yet. To this end, we introduce a novel framework for DAOD with three proposed components: Multi-scale-aware Uncertainty Attention (MUA), Transferable Region Proposal Network (TRPN), and Dynamic Instance Sampling (DIS). With these modules, we seek to reduce the negative transfer effect during training while maximizing transferability as well as discriminability in both domains. Finally, our framework implicitly learns domain invariant regions for object detection via exploiting the transferable information and enhances the complementarity between different detection levels by collaboratively utilizing their domain information. Through ablation studies and experiments, we show that the proposed modules contribute to the performance improvement in a synergic way, demonstrating the effectiveness of our method. Moreover, our model achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on various benchmarks.
summary: Domain adaptation for object detection (DAOD) has recently drawn much attention owing to its capability of detecting target objects without any annotations. To tackle the problem, previous works focus on aligning features extracted from partial levels (e.g., image-level, instance-level, RPN-level) in a two-stage detector via adversarial training. However, individual levels in the object detection pipeline are closely related to each other and this inter-level relation is unconsidered yet. To this end, we introduce a novel framework for DAOD with three proposed components: Multi-scale-aware Uncertainty Attention (MUA), Transferable Region Proposal Network (TRPN), and Dynamic Instance Sampling (DIS). With these modules, we seek to reduce the negative transfer effect during training while maximizing transferability as well as discriminability in both domains. Finally, our framework implicitly learns domain invariant regions for object detection via exploiting the transferable information and enhances the complementarity between different detection levels by collaboratively utilizing their domain information. Through ablation studies and experiments, we show that the proposed modules contribute to the performance improvement in a synergic way, demonstrating the effectiveness of our method. Moreover, our model achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on various benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 对象检测领域适应（DAOD）由于其无需任何注释即可检测目标对象的能力，最近引起了广泛关注。为了解决这个问题，之前的工作重点是通过对抗训练来对齐从两级检测器中的部分级别（例如图像级别、实例级别、RPN 级别）提取的特征。然而，对象检测管道中的各个级别彼此密切相关，并且这种级别间关系尚未被考虑。为此，我们引入了一种新颖的 DAOD 框架，其中包含三个建议组件：多尺度感知不确定性注意（MUA）、可转移区域提议网络（TRPN）和动态实例采样（DIS）。通过这些模块，我们寻求减少训练期间的负迁移效应，同时最大化两个领域的可迁移性和可区分性。最后，我们的框架通过利用可转移信息隐式学习用于对象检测的域不变区域，并通过协作利用其域信息来增强不同检测级别之间的互补性。通过消融研究和实验，我们表明所提出的模块有助于以协同方式提高性能，证明了我们方法的有效性。此外，我们的模型在各种基准测试中实现了新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨层次协作的领域自适应目标检测框架，通过利用领域可迁移性提升无标注目标域的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应目标检测方法仅对齐部分层次特征，忽视了检测流程中各层次间的内在关联性，导致负迁移效应和性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计包含多尺度感知不确定性注意力（MUA）、可迁移区域建议网络（TRPN）和动态实例采样（DIS）的三组件框架，通过跨层次协作学习领域不变特征并增强层次间互补性。
AI.result: 消融实验验证各模块协同增效，模型在多个基准数据集上达到新的最先进性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模跨层次领域关系，本文方法有效解决了领域自适应目标检测中的负迁移问题，为跨域检测研究提供了新思路。

Moreover, our model achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on various benchmarks. 对象检测领域适应（DAOD）由于其无需任何注释即可检测目标对象的能力，最近引起了广泛关注。为了解决这个问题，之前的工作重点是通过对抗训练来对齐从两级检测器中的部分级别（例如图像级别、实例级别、RPN 级别）提取的特征。然而，对象检测管道中的各个级别彼此密切相关，并且这种级别间关系尚未被考虑。为此，我们引入了一种新颖的 DAOD 框架，其中包含三个建议组件：多尺度感知不确定性注意（MUA）、可转移区域提议网络（TRPN）和动态实例采样（DIS）。通过这些模块，我们寻求减少训练期间的负迁移效应，同时最大化两个领域的可迁移性和可区分性。最后，我们的框架通过利用可转移信息隐式学习用于对象检测的域不变区域，并通过协作利用其域信息来增强不同检测级别之间的互补性。通过消融研究和实验，我们表明所提出的模块有助于以协同方式提高性能，证明了我们方法的有效性。此外，我们的模型在各种基准测试中实现了新的最先进的性能。 本文提出一种跨层次协作的领域自适应目标检测框架，通过利用领域可迁移性提升无标注目标域的检测性能。 Mirae Do,Seogkyu Jeon,Pilhyeon Lee,Kibeom Hong,Yu-seung Ma,Hyeran Byun cs.CV

authors_text: Dongliang Cao,Florian Bernard
title: Unsupervised Deep Multi-Shape Matching
title_zh: 无监督深度多形状匹配
abstract: 3D shape matching is a long-standing problem in computer vision and computer graphics. While deep neural networks were shown to lead to state-of-the-art results in shape matching, existing learning-based approaches are limited in the context of multi-shape matching: (i) either they focus on matching pairs of shapes only and thus suffer from cycle-inconsistent multi-matchings, or (ii) they require an explicit template shape to address the matching of a collection of shapes. In this paper, we present a novel approach for deep multi-shape matching that ensures cycle-consistent multi-matchings while not depending on an explicit template shape. To this end, we utilise a shape-to-universe multi-matching representation that we combine with powerful functional map regularisation, so that our multi-shape matching neural network can be trained in a fully unsupervised manner. While the functional map regularisation is only considered during training time, functional maps are not computed for predicting correspondences, thereby allowing for fast inference. We demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art results on several challenging benchmark datasets, and, most remarkably, that our unsupervised method even outperforms recent supervised methods.
summary: 3D shape matching is a long-standing problem in computer vision and computer graphics. While deep neural networks were shown to lead to state-of-the-art results in shape matching, existing learning-based approaches are limited in the context of multi-shape matching: (i) either they focus on matching pairs of shapes only and thus suffer from cycle-inconsistent multi-matchings, or (ii) they require an explicit template shape to address the matching of a collection of shapes. In this paper, we present a novel approach for deep multi-shape matching that ensures cycle-consistent multi-matchings while not depending on an explicit template shape. To this end, we utilise a shape-to-universe multi-matching representation that we combine with powerful functional map regularisation, so that our multi-shape matching neural network can be trained in a fully unsupervised manner. While the functional map regularisation is only considered during training time, functional maps are not computed for predicting correspondences, thereby allowing for fast inference. We demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art results on several challenging benchmark datasets, and, most remarkably, that our unsupervised method even outperforms recent supervised methods.
abstract_zh: 3D 形状匹配是计算机视觉和计算机图形学中长期存在的问题。虽然深度神经网络被证明可以在形状匹配方面带来最先进的结果，但现有的基于学习的方法在多形状匹配的情况下受到限制：（i）它们要么只专注于匹配形状对，从而遭受循环不一致的多重匹配，要么（ii）它们需要一个显式的模板形状来解决形状集合的匹配。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于深度多形状匹配的新方法，该方法确保循环一致的多重匹配，同时不依赖于显式模板形状。为此，我们利用形状到宇宙的多重匹配表示，并将其与强大的功能图正则化相结合，以便我们的多形状匹配神经网络可以以完全无监督的方式进行训练。虽然仅在训练期间考虑功能图正则化，但不会计算功能图来预测对应关系，从而允许快速推理。我们证明，我们的方法在几个具有挑战性的基准数据集上取得了最先进的结果，最引人注目的是，我们的无监督方法甚至优于最近的监督方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无监督的深度多形状匹配方法，解决循环一致性和无需显式模板的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多形状匹配时存在循环不一致或依赖显式模板的局限性，需开发无需模板且保证循环一致性的方法。
AI.method: 结合形状到宇宙的多匹配表示与功能映射正则化，在无监督框架下训练网络，推理时无需计算功能映射以加速过程。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上达到最先进水平，且无监督方法性能超越近期监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了多形状匹配的循环一致性问题，无需依赖模板且保持高效推理。

authors_text: Hongjiang Li,Huanyi Shui,Alemayehu Admasu,Praveen Narayanan,Devesh Upadhyay
title: Towards Accurate and Robust Classification in Continuously Transitioning Industrial Sprays with Mixup
title_zh: 在连续过渡的混合工业喷雾中实现准确和稳健的分类
abstract: Image classification with deep neural networks has seen a surge of technological breakthroughs with promising applications in areas such as face recognition, medical imaging, and autonomous driving. In engineering problems, however, such as high-speed imaging of engine fuel injector sprays or body paint sprays, deep neural networks face a fundamental challenge related to the availability of adequate and diverse data. Typically, only thousands or sometimes even hundreds of samples are available for training. In addition, the transition between different spray classes is a continuum and requires a high level of domain expertise to label the images accurately. In this work, we used Mixup as an approach to systematically deal with the data scarcity and ambiguous class boundaries found in industrial spray applications. We show that data augmentation can mitigate the over-fitting problem of large neural networks on small data sets, to a certain level, but cannot fundamentally resolve the issue. We discuss how a convex linear interpolation of different classes naturally aligns with the continuous transition between different classes in our application. Our experiments demonstrate Mixup as a simple yet effective method to train an accurate and robust deep neural network classifier with only a few hundred samples.
summary: Image classification with deep neural networks has seen a surge of technological breakthroughs with promising applications in areas such as face recognition, medical imaging, and autonomous driving. In engineering problems, however, such as high-speed imaging of engine fuel injector sprays or body paint sprays, deep neural networks face a fundamental challenge related to the availability of adequate and diverse data. Typically, only thousands or sometimes even hundreds of samples are available for training. In addition, the transition between different spray classes is a continuum and requires a high level of domain expertise to label the images accurately. In this work, we used Mixup as an approach to systematically deal with the data scarcity and ambiguous class boundaries found in industrial spray applications. We show that data augmentation can mitigate the over-fitting problem of large neural networks on small data sets, to a certain level, but cannot fundamentally resolve the issue. We discuss how a convex linear interpolation of different classes naturally aligns with the continuous transition between different classes in our application. Our experiments demonstrate Mixup as a simple yet effective method to train an accurate and robust deep neural network classifier with only a few hundred samples.
abstract_zh: 利用深度神经网络进行图像分类已经取得了大量的技术突破，在人脸识别、医学成像和自动驾驶等领域具有广阔的应用前景。然而，在工程问题中，例如发动机喷油器喷雾或车身油漆喷雾的高速成像，深度神经网络面临着与充足且多样化的数据可用性相关的根本挑战。通常，只有数千个甚至有时甚至数百个样本可用于训练。此外，不同喷雾类别之间的过渡是一个连续体，需要高水平的领域专业知识才能准确标记图像。在这项工作中，我们使用 Mixup 作为一种方法来系统地处理工业喷涂应用中发现的数据稀缺和模糊的类别边界。我们表明，数据增强可以在一定程度上缓解大型神经网络在小数据集上的过拟合问题，但不能从根本上解决问题。我们讨论不同类的凸线性插值如何自然地与应用程序中不同类之间的连续过渡对齐。我们的实验证明 Mixup 是一种简单而有效的方法，只需几百个样本即可训练准确且鲁棒的深度神经网络分类器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用Mixup方法解决工业喷雾分类中数据稀缺和类别边界模糊的问题。
AI.motivation: 工业喷雾分类面临样本数量少、类别过渡连续且标注依赖领域专业知识的挑战，传统方法难以有效处理。
AI.method: 采用Mixup数据增强技术，通过凸线性插值生成合成样本，缓解小数据集下的过拟合问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，Mixup能在仅数百样本的情况下训练出准确且鲁棒的分类器，但无法根本解决类别边界模糊问题。
AI.conclusion: Mixup是应对工业喷雾分类数据挑战的有效方法，但需结合其他策略进一步优化分类性能。

authors_text: Noëlle Rakotondravony,Yiren Ding,Lane Harrison
title: Probablement, Wahrscheinlich, Likely ? A Cross-Language Study of How People Verbalize Probabilities in Icon Array Visualizations
title_zh: 概率，Wahrscheinlich，可能？关于人们如何在图标数组可视化中表达概率的跨语言研究
abstract: Visualizations today are used across a wide range of languages and cultures. Yet the extent to which language impacts how we reason about data and visualizations remains unclear. In this paper, we explore the intersection of visualization and language through a cross-language study on estimative probability tasks with icon-array visualizations. Across Arabic, English, French, German, and Mandarin, n = 50 participants per language both chose probability expressions - e.g. likely, probable - to describe icon-array visualizations (Vis-to-Expression), and drew icon-array visualizations to match a given expression (Expression-to-Vis). Results suggest that there is no clear one-to-one mapping of probability expressions and associated visual ranges between languages. Several translated expressions fell significantly above or below the range of the corresponding English expressions. Compared to other languages, French and German respondents appear to exhibit high levels of consistency between the visualizations they drew and the words they chose. Participants across languages used similar words when describing scenarios above 80% chance, with more variance in expressions targeting mid-range and lower values. We discuss how these results suggest potential differences in the expressiveness of language as it relates to visualization interpretation and design goals, as well as practical implications for translation efforts and future studies at the intersection of languages, culture, and visualization. Experiment data, source code, and analysis scripts are available at the following repository: https://osf.io/g5d4r/.

We discuss how these results suggest potential differences in the expressiveness of language as it relates to visualization interpretation and design goals, as well as practical implications for translation efforts and future studies at the intersection of languages, culture, and visualization. Experiment data, source code, and analysis scripts are available at the following repository: https://osf.io/g5d4r/.
abstract_zh: 如今，可视化已在多种语言和文化中使用。然而，语言在多大程度上影响我们对数据和可视化的推理仍不清楚。在本文中，我们通过对带有图标阵列可视化的估计概率任务的跨语言研究来探索可视化和语言的交叉点。在阿拉伯语、英语、法语、德语和普通话中，每种语言有 n = 50 名参与者都选择了概率表达式 - 例如可能，可能 - 描述图标数组可视化（Vis-to-Expression），并绘制图标数组可视化以匹配给定表达式（Expression-to-Vis）。结果表明，语言之间的概率表达式和相关视觉范围不存在清晰的一对一映射。一些翻译表达明显高于或低于相应英语表达的范围。与其他语言相比，法语和德语受访者似乎在他们绘制的可视化和他们选择的词语之间表现出高度的一致性。不同语言的参与者在描述场景时使用相似的词语的可能性超过 80%，而针对中值和较低值的表达方式则有更多差异。我们讨论这些结果如何表明与可视化解释和设计目标相关的语言表达力的潜在差异，以及对语言、文化和可视化交叉领域的翻译工作和未来研究的实际影响。实验数据、源代码和分析脚本可在以下存储库中获取：https://osf.io/g5d4r/。

AI.tldr: 本文通过跨语言研究，探讨人们如何用不同语言描述图标数组可视化中的概率，并分析语言与可视化之间的映射关系。
AI.motivation: 可视化在多语言和文化环境中广泛应用，但语言对数据理解和可视化推理的影响尚不明确，需研究语言差异对概率表达和可视化设计的影响。
AI.method: 选取阿拉伯语、英语、法语、德语和汉语各50名参与者，进行两项任务：根据图标数组选择概率表达（Vis-to-Expression）和根据表达绘制图标数组（Expression-to-Vis），分析语言间的映射关系及一致性。
AI.result: 不同语言间概率表达与可视化范围无明确一一对应关系，部分翻译表达显著偏离英语范围；法语和德语参与者在可视化与表达间一致性较高；高概率场景（>80%）使用相似词汇，中低概率场景表达差异较大。
AI.conclusion: 语言差异影响概率表达与可视化解读，提示翻译和可视化设计需考虑语言特性，未来需进一步研究语言、文化与可视化的交互影响。

search_text: Probablement, Wahrscheinlich, Likely ? A Cross-Language Study of How People Verbalize Probabilities in Icon Array Visualizations 概率，Wahrscheinlich，可能？关于人们如何在图标数组可视化中表达概率的跨语言研究 Visualizations today are used across a wide range of languages and cultures. Yet the extent to which language impacts how we reason about data and visualizations remains unclear. In this paper, we explore the intersection of visualization and language through a cross-language study on estimative probability tasks with icon-array visualizations. Across Arabic, English, French, German, and Mandarin, n = 50 participants per language both chose probability expressions - e.g. likely, probable - to describe icon-array visualizations (Vis-to-Expression), and drew icon-array visualizations to match a given expression (Expression-to-Vis). Results suggest that there is no clear one-to-one mapping of probability expressions and associated visual ranges between languages. Several translated expressions fell significantly above or below the range of the corresponding English expressions. Compared to other languages, French and German respondents appear to exhibit high levels of consistency between the visualizations they drew and the words they chose. Participants across languages used similar words when describing scenarios above 80% chance, with more variance in expressions targeting mid-range and lower values. We discuss how these results suggest potential differences in the expressiveness of language as it relates to visualization interpretation and design goals, as well as practical implications for translation efforts and future studies at the intersection of languages, culture, and visualization. Experiment data, source code, and analysis scripts are available at the following repository: https://osf.io/g5d4r/. 如今，可视化已在多种语言和文化中使用。然而，语言在多大程度上影响我们对数据和可视化的推理仍不清楚。在本文中，我们通过对带有图标阵列可视化的估计概率任务的跨语言研究来探索可视化和语言的交叉点。在阿拉伯语、英语、法语、德语和普通话中，每种语言有 n = 50 名参与者都选择了概率表达式 - 例如可能，可能 - 描述图标数组可视化（Vis-to-Expression），并绘制图标数组可视化以匹配给定表达式（Expression-to-Vis）。结果表明，语言之间的概率表达式和相关视觉范围不存在清晰的一对一映射。一些翻译表达明显高于或低于相应英语表达的范围。与其他语言相比，法语和德语受访者似乎在他们绘制的可视化和他们选择的词语之间表现出高度的一致性。不同语言的参与者在描述场景时使用相似的词语的可能性超过 80%，而针对中值和较低值的表达方式则有更多差异。我们讨论这些结果如何表明与可视化解释和设计目标相关的语言表达力的潜在差异，以及对语言、文化和可视化交叉领域的翻译工作和未来研究的实际影响。实验数据、源代码和分析脚本可在以下存储库中获取：https://osf.io/g5d4r/。 本文通过跨语言研究，探讨人们如何用不同语言描述图标数组可视化中的概率，并分析语言与可视化之间的映射关系。 Noëlle Rakotondravony,Yiren Ding,Lane Harrison cs.HC

authors_text: Shenyuan Gao,Chunluan Zhou,Chao Ma,Xinggang Wang,Junsong Yuan
title: AiATrack: Attention in Attention for Transformer Visual Tracking
title_zh: AiATrack：Transformer视觉跟踪的Attention中的Attention
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2022. Code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/Little-Podi/AiATrack
comments: Accepted by ECCV 2022. Code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/Little-Podi/AiATrack
abstract: Transformer trackers have achieved impressive advancements recently, where the attention mechanism plays an important role. However, the independent correlation computation in the attention mechanism could result in noisy and ambiguous attention weights, which inhibits further performance improvement. To address this issue, we propose an attention in attention (AiA) module, which enhances appropriate correlations and suppresses erroneous ones by seeking consensus among all correlation vectors. Our AiA module can be readily applied to both self-attention blocks and cross-attention blocks to facilitate feature aggregation and information propagation for visual tracking. Moreover, we propose a streamlined Transformer tracking framework, dubbed AiATrack, by introducing efficient feature reuse and target-background embeddings to make full use of temporal references. Experiments show that our tracker achieves state-of-the-art performance on six tracking benchmarks while running at a real-time speed.
summary: Transformer trackers have achieved impressive advancements recently, where the attention mechanism plays an important role. However, the independent correlation computation in the attention mechanism could result in noisy and ambiguous attention weights, which inhibits further performance improvement. To address this issue, we propose an attention in attention (AiA) module, which enhances appropriate correlations and suppresses erroneous ones by seeking consensus among all correlation vectors. Our AiA module can be readily applied to both self-attention blocks and cross-attention blocks to facilitate feature aggregation and information propagation for visual tracking. Moreover, we propose a streamlined Transformer tracking framework, dubbed AiATrack, by introducing efficient feature reuse and target-background embeddings to make full use of temporal references. Experiments show that our tracker achieves state-of-the-art performance on six tracking benchmarks while running at a real-time speed.
abstract_zh: Transformer 跟踪器最近取得了令人瞩目的进步，其中注意力机制发挥了重要作用。然而，注意力机制中的独立相关性计算可能会导致噪声和模糊的注意力权重，从而抑制性能的进一步提高。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了注意力中的注意力（AiA）模块，该模块通过在所有相关向量之间寻求共识来增强适当的相关性并抑制错误的相关性。我们的 AiA 模块可以轻松应用于自注意力块和交叉注意力块，以促进视觉跟踪的特征聚合和信息传播。此外，我们提出了一个简化的 Transformer 跟踪框架，称为 AiATrack，通过引入有效的特征重用和目标背景嵌入来充分利用时间参考。实验表明，我们的跟踪器在以实时速度运行的同时，在六个跟踪基准上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的视觉跟踪方法AiATrack，通过引入注意力中的注意力（AiA）模块改进特征聚合与信息传播。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer视觉跟踪器的注意力机制存在相关性计算噪声大、注意力权重模糊的问题，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 设计AiA模块通过跨相关向量共识增强有效相关性并抑制错误关联，结合高效特征重用与目标-背景嵌入构建轻量级跟踪框架AiATrack。
AI.result: 在六个跟踪基准测试中达到最先进水平，且保持实时运行速度。
AI.conclusion: AiA模块有效提升了Transformer视觉跟踪的准确性与鲁棒性，证明了其在特征交互优化方面的有效性。

authors_text: JB Lanier,Stephen McAleer,Pierre Baldi,Roy Fox
title: Feasible Adversarial Robust Reinforcement Learning for Underspecified Environments
title_zh: 针对未指定环境的可行的对抗性鲁棒强化学习
comment: Added new theory sections. Added comparison to self-play. Added adversary mixed-strategy analysis
comments: Added new theory sections. Added comparison to self-play. Added adversary mixed-strategy analysis
abstract: Robust reinforcement learning (RL) considers the problem of learning policies that perform well in the worst case among a set of possible environment parameter values. In real-world environments, choosing the set of possible values for robust RL can be a difficult task. When that set is specified too narrowly, the agent will be left vulnerable to reasonable parameter values unaccounted for. When specified too broadly, the agent will be too cautious. In this paper, we propose Feasible Adversarial Robust RL (FARR), a novel problem formulation and objective for automatically determining the set of environment parameter values over which to be robust. FARR implicitly defines the set of feasible parameter values as those on which an agent could achieve a benchmark reward given enough training resources. By formulating this problem as a two-player zero-sum game, optimizing the FARR objective jointly produces an adversarial distribution over parameter values with feasible support and a policy robust over this feasible parameter set. We demonstrate that approximate Nash equilibria for this objective can be found using a variation of the PSRO algorithm. Furthermore, we show that an optimal agent trained with FARR is more robust to feasible adversarial parameter selection than with existing minimax, domain-randomization, and regret objectives in a parameterized gridworld and three MuJoCo control environments.
summary: Robust reinforcement learning (RL) considers the problem of learning policies that perform well in the worst case among a set of possible environment parameter values. In real-world environments, choosing the set of possible values for robust RL can be a difficult task. When that set is specified too narrowly, the agent will be left vulnerable to reasonable parameter values unaccounted for. When specified too broadly, the agent will be too cautious. In this paper, we propose Feasible Adversarial Robust RL (FARR), a novel problem formulation and objective for automatically determining the set of environment parameter values over which to be robust. FARR implicitly defines the set of feasible parameter values as those on which an agent could achieve a benchmark reward given enough training resources. By formulating this problem as a two-player zero-sum game, optimizing the FARR objective jointly produces an adversarial distribution over parameter values with feasible support and a policy robust over this feasible parameter set. We demonstrate that approximate Nash equilibria for this objective can be found using a variation of the PSRO algorithm. Furthermore, we show that an optimal agent trained with FARR is more robust to feasible adversarial parameter selection than with existing minimax, domain-randomization, and regret objectives in a parameterized gridworld and three MuJoCo control environments.
abstract_zh: 鲁棒强化学习（RL）考虑在一组可能的环境参数值中最坏情况下表现良好的学习策略问题。在现实环境中，为稳健的强化学习选择一组可能的值可能是一项艰巨的任务。当该集合指定得太窄时，代理将容易受到未考虑到的合理参数值的影响。如果指定得太宽泛，代理就会过于谨慎。在本文中，我们提出了可行的对抗性鲁棒强化学习（FARR），这是一种新颖的问题表述和目标，用于自动确定鲁棒性的环境参数值集。 FARR 隐式地将可行参数值集定义为在给定足够训练资源的情况下代理可以实现基准奖励的参数值。通过将此问题表述为两人零和博弈，优化 FARR 目标共同产生参数值上的对抗性分布，并具有可行的支持和对此可行参数集的稳健策略。我们证明可以使用 PSRO 算法的变体找到该目标的近似纳什均衡。此外，我们表明，与参数化网格世界和三个 MuJoCo 控制环境中现有的极小极大、域随机化和后悔目标相比，使用 FARR 训练的最优代理对于可行的对抗性参数选择更加稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FARR的新方法，用于在未明确指定的环境中实现对抗性鲁棒强化学习。
AI.motivation: 在现实世界中，为鲁棒强化学习选择环境参数值的集合非常困难，如果集合太窄，智能体会对未考虑到的参数值脆弱；如果太宽，智能体会过于谨慎。
AI.method: FARR通过将问题建模为两人零和博弈，自动确定环境参数值的可行集合，并使用改进的PSRO算法寻找近似纳什均衡。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用FARR训练的智能体在参数化网格世界和三个MuJoCo控制环境中比现有方法更鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: FARR提供了一种自动确定鲁棒环境参数集合的新方法，并在多个环境中表现出更优的鲁棒性。

search_text: Feasible Adversarial Robust Reinforcement Learning for Underspecified Environments 针对未指定环境的可行的对抗性鲁棒强化学习 Robust reinforcement learning (RL) considers the problem of learning policies that perform well in the worst case among a set of possible environment parameter values. In real-world environments, choosing the set of possible values for robust RL can be a difficult task. When that set is specified too narrowly, the agent will be left vulnerable to reasonable parameter values unaccounted for. When specified too broadly, the agent will be too cautious. In this paper, we propose Feasible Adversarial Robust RL (FARR), a novel problem formulation and objective for automatically determining the set of environment parameter values over which to be robust. FARR implicitly defines the set of feasible parameter values as those on which an agent could achieve a benchmark reward given enough training resources. By formulating this problem as a two-player zero-sum game, optimizing the FARR objective jointly produces an adversarial distribution over parameter values with feasible support and a policy robust over this feasible parameter set. We demonstrate that approximate Nash equilibria for this objective can be found using a variation of the PSRO algorithm. Furthermore, we show that an optimal agent trained with FARR is more robust to feasible adversarial parameter selection than with existing minimax, domain-randomization, and regret objectives in a parameterized gridworld and three MuJoCo control environments. 鲁棒强化学习（RL）考虑在一组可能的环境参数值中最坏情况下表现良好的学习策略问题。在现实环境中，为稳健的强化学习选择一组可能的值可能是一项艰巨的任务。当该集合指定得太窄时，代理将容易受到未考虑到的合理参数值的影响。如果指定得太宽泛，代理就会过于谨慎。在本文中，我们提出了可行的对抗性鲁棒强化学习（FARR），这是一种新颖的问题表述和目标，用于自动确定鲁棒性的环境参数值集。 FARR 隐式地将可行参数值集定义为在给定足够训练资源的情况下代理可以实现基准奖励的参数值。通过将此问题表述为两人零和博弈，优化 FARR 目标共同产生参数值上的对抗性分布，并具有可行的支持和对此可行参数集的稳健策略。我们证明可以使用 PSRO 算法的变体找到该目标的近似纳什均衡。此外，我们表明，与参数化网格世界和三个 MuJoCo 控制环境中现有的极小极大、域随机化和后悔目标相比，使用 FARR 训练的最优代理对于可行的对抗性参数选择更加稳健。 本文提出了一种名为FARR的新方法，用于在未明确指定的环境中实现对抗性鲁棒强化学习。 JB Lanier,Stephen McAleer,Pierre Baldi,Roy Fox cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.GT

authors_text: Honggui Li,Maria Trocan,Dimitri Galayko,Mohamad Sawan
title: ICRICS: Iterative Compensation Recovery for Image Compressive Sensing
title_zh: ICRICS：图像压缩感知的迭代补偿恢复
abstract: Closed-loop architecture is widely utilized in automatic control systems and attain distinguished performance. However, classical compressive sensing systems employ open-loop architecture with separated sampling and reconstruction units. Therefore, a method of iterative compensation recovery for image compressive sensing (ICRICS) is proposed by introducing closed-loop framework into traditional compresses sensing systems. The proposed method depends on any existing approaches and upgrades their reconstruction performance by adding negative feedback structure. Theory analysis on negative feedback of compressive sensing systems is performed. An approximate mathematical proof of the effectiveness of the proposed method is also provided. Simulation experiments on more than 3 image datasets show that the proposed method is superior to 10 competition approaches in reconstruction performance. The maximum increment of average peak signal-to-noise ratio is 4.36 dB and the maximum increment of average structural similarity is 0.034 on one dataset. The proposed method based on negative feedback mechanism can efficiently correct the recovery error in the existing systems of image compressive sensing.
summary: Closed-loop architecture is widely utilized in automatic control systems and attain distinguished performance. However, classical compressive sensing systems employ open-loop architecture with separated sampling and reconstruction units. Therefore, a method of iterative compensation recovery for image compressive sensing (ICRICS) is proposed by introducing closed-loop framework into traditional compresses sensing systems. The proposed method depends on any existing approaches and upgrades their reconstruction performance by adding negative feedback structure. Theory analysis on negative feedback of compressive sensing systems is performed. An approximate mathematical proof of the effectiveness of the proposed method is also provided. Simulation experiments on more than 3 image datasets show that the proposed method is superior to 10 competition approaches in reconstruction performance. The maximum increment of average peak signal-to-noise ratio is 4.36 dB and the maximum increment of average structural similarity is 0.034 on one dataset. The proposed method based on negative feedback mechanism can efficiently correct the recovery error in the existing systems of image compressive sensing.
abstract_zh: 闭环结构在自动控制系统中得到广泛应用，并取得了卓越的性能。然而，经典的压缩传感系统采用具有独立采样和重建单元的开环架构。因此，通过将闭环框架引入传统压缩感知系统，提出了一种图像压缩感知迭代补偿恢复方法（ICRICS）。所提出的方法依赖于任何现有的方法，并通过添加负反馈结构来升级其重建性能。对压缩传感系统的负反馈进行了理论分析。还提供了所提出方法有效性的近似数学证明。对超过 3 个图像数据集的仿真实验表明，该方法在重建性能上优于 10 种竞争方法。在一组数据上，平均峰值信噪比最大增量为4.36 dB，平均结构相似度最大增量为0.034。所提出的基于负反馈机制的方法可以有效地纠正现有图像压缩感知系统中的恢复误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于闭环框架的图像压缩感知迭代补偿恢复方法（ICRICS）。
AI.motivation: 传统压缩感知系统采用开环架构，采样与重建单元分离，性能受限。本文旨在通过引入闭环框架提升图像压缩感知的重建性能。
AI.method: 通过引入负反馈结构，升级现有压缩感知方法的重建性能，并进行理论分析与数学证明。
AI.result: 在三个图像数据集上的仿真实验表明，该方法在重建性能上优于10种竞争方法，平均峰值信噪比最大提升4.36 dB，结构相似性最大提升0.034。
AI.conclusion: 基于负反馈机制的ICRICS方法能有效修正现有图像压缩感知系统的恢复误差，显著提升重建性能。

authors_text: Dimitri Bertsekas
title: New Auction Algorithms for Path Planning, Network Transport, and Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 用于路径规划、网络传输和强化学习的新拍卖算法
abstract: We consider some classical optimization problems in path planning and network transport, and we introduce new auction-based algorithms for their optimal and suboptimal solution. The algorithms are based on mathematical ideas that are related to competitive bidding by persons for objects and the attendant market equilibrium, which underlie auction processes. However, the starting point of our algorithms is different, namely weighted and unweighted path construction in directed graphs, rather than assignment of persons to objects. The new algorithms have several potential advantages over existing methods: they are empirically faster in some important contexts, such as max-flow, they are well-suited for on-line replanning, and they can be adapted to distributed asynchronous operation. Moreover, they allow arbitrary initial prices, without complementary slackness restrictions, and thus are better-suited to take advantage of reinforcement learning methods that use off-line training with data, as well as on-line training during real-time operation. The new algorithms may also find use in reinforcement learning contexts involving approximation, such as multistep lookahead and tree search schemes, and/or rollout algorithms.
summary: We consider some classical optimization problems in path planning and network transport, and we introduce new auction-based algorithms for their optimal and suboptimal solution. The algorithms are based on mathematical ideas that are related to competitive bidding by persons for objects and the attendant market equilibrium, which underlie auction processes. However, the starting point of our algorithms is different, namely weighted and unweighted path construction in directed graphs, rather than assignment of persons to objects. The new algorithms have several potential advantages over existing methods: they are empirically faster in some important contexts, such as max-flow, they are well-suited for on-line replanning, and they can be adapted to distributed asynchronous operation. Moreover, they allow arbitrary initial prices, without complementary slackness restrictions, and thus are better-suited to take advantage of reinforcement learning methods that use off-line training with data, as well as on-line training during real-time operation. The new algorithms may also find use in reinforcement learning contexts involving approximation, such as multistep lookahead and tree search schemes, and/or rollout algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑路径规划和网络传输中的一些经典优化问题，并为其最优和次优解决方案引入新的基于拍卖的算法。这些算法基于数学思想，这些数学思想与人们对物品的竞争性投标以及随之而来的市场均衡有关，这是拍卖过程的基础。然而，我们算法的出发点是不同的，即有向图中的加权和非加权路径构建，而不是将人分配给对象。与现有方法相比，新算法有几个潜在的优势：在一些重要的上下文中，它们在经验上更快，例如最大流，它们非常适合在线重新规划，并且它们可以适应分布式异步操作。此外，它们允许任意初始价格，没有补充松弛限制，因此更适合利用使用数据离线训练以及实时操作期间在线训练的强化学习方法。新算法还可以在涉及近似的强化学习环境中找到用途，例如多步前瞻和树搜索方案和/或推出算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出用于路径规划、网络传输和强化学习的新拍卖算法，以解决最优和次优解问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理动态环境、分布式操作及强化学习集成时存在效率或适应性不足的问题，需开发更高效的算法。
AI.method: 基于拍卖机制的数学原理，将竞争性定价与市场均衡思想应用于有向图中的加权/无权路径构建，允许任意初始价格且无需互补松弛条件。
AI.result: 算法在最大流等场景中表现更快，支持在线重规划和分布式异步操作，并能有效结合强化学习的离线训练与实时学习。
AI.conclusion: 新算法在速度、适应性及强化学习集成方面优于现有方法，适用于需近似求解的多步预测和滚动规划场景。

conclusion: 新算法在速度、适应性及强化学习集成方面优于现有方法，适用于需近似求解的多步预测和滚动规划场景。
search_text: New Auction Algorithms for Path Planning, Network Transport, and Reinforcement Learning 用于路径规划、网络传输和强化学习的新拍卖算法 We consider some classical optimization problems in path planning and network transport, and we introduce new auction-based algorithms for their optimal and suboptimal solution. The algorithms are based on mathematical ideas that are related to competitive bidding by persons for objects and the attendant market equilibrium, which underlie auction processes. However, the starting point of our algorithms is different, namely weighted and unweighted path construction in directed graphs, rather than assignment of persons to objects. The new algorithms have several potential advantages over existing methods: they are empirically faster in some important contexts, such as max-flow, they are well-suited for on-line replanning, and they can be adapted to distributed asynchronous operation. Moreover, they allow arbitrary initial prices, without complementary slackness restrictions, and thus are better-suited to take advantage of reinforcement learning methods that use off-line training with data, as well as on-line training during real-time operation. The new algorithms may also find use in reinforcement learning contexts involving approximation, such as multistep lookahead and tree search schemes, and/or rollout algorithms. 我们考虑路径规划和网络传输中的一些经典优化问题，并为其最优和次优解决方案引入新的基于拍卖的算法。这些算法基于数学思想，这些数学思想与人们对物品的竞争性投标以及随之而来的市场均衡有关，这是拍卖过程的基础。然而，我们算法的出发点是不同的，即有向图中的加权和非加权路径构建，而不是将人分配给对象。与现有方法相比，新算法有几个潜在的优势：在一些重要的上下文中，它们在经验上更快，例如最大流，它们非常适合在线重新规划，并且它们可以适应分布式异步操作。此外，它们允许任意初始价格，没有补充松弛限制，因此更适合利用使用数据离线训练以及实时操作期间在线训练的强化学习方法。新算法还可以在涉及近似的强化学习环境中找到用途，例如多步前瞻和树搜索方案和/或推出算法。 本文提出用于路径规划、网络传输和强化学习的新拍卖算法，以解决最优和次优解问题。 Dimitri Bertsekas math.OC,cs.AI,cs.DS,cs.GT

authors_text: Mohammad-Amin Charusaie,Hussein Mozannar,David Sontag,Samira Samadi
title: Sample Efficient Learning of Predictors that Complement Humans
title_zh: 补充人类的预测因子的样本有效学习
abstract: One of the goals of learning algorithms is to complement and reduce the burden on human decision makers. The expert deferral setting wherein an algorithm can either predict on its own or defer the decision to a downstream expert helps accomplish this goal. A fundamental aspect of this setting is the need to learn complementary predictors that improve on the human's weaknesses rather than learning predictors optimized for average error. In this work, we provide the first theoretical analysis of the benefit of learning complementary predictors in expert deferral. To enable efficiently learning such predictors, we consider a family of consistent surrogate loss functions for expert deferral and analyze their theoretical properties. Finally, we design active learning schemes that require minimal amount of data of human expert predictions in order to learn accurate deferral systems.
summary: One of the goals of learning algorithms is to complement and reduce the burden on human decision makers. The expert deferral setting wherein an algorithm can either predict on its own or defer the decision to a downstream expert helps accomplish this goal. A fundamental aspect of this setting is the need to learn complementary predictors that improve on the human's weaknesses rather than learning predictors optimized for average error. In this work, we provide the first theoretical analysis of the benefit of learning complementary predictors in expert deferral. To enable efficiently learning such predictors, we consider a family of consistent surrogate loss functions for expert deferral and analyze their theoretical properties. Finally, we design active learning schemes that require minimal amount of data of human expert predictions in order to learn accurate deferral systems.
abstract_zh: 学习算法的目标之一是补充和减轻人类决策者的负担。专家延迟设置（其中算法可以自行预测或将决策延迟给下游专家）有助于实现此目标。这种设置的一个基本方面是需要学习能够改善人类弱点的互补预测变量，而不是学习针对平均误差优化的预测变量。在这项工作中，我们首次对专家延迟中学习互补预测变量的好处进行了理论分析。为了能够有效地学习此类预测变量，我们考虑了一系列用于专家延迟的一致代理损失函数，并分析了它们的理论特性。最后，我们设计了主动学习方案，需要最少数量的人类专家预测数据来学习准确的延迟系统。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何高效学习能够补充人类决策者的预测模型，以减少人类在决策中的负担。
AI.motivation: 传统预测模型追求平均误差最小化，而人类决策者存在特定弱点。本文旨在学习能针对性弥补人类弱点的互补性预测模型，提升专家委托（expert deferral）系统的有效性。
AI.method: 提出一致的替代损失函数族用于专家委托任务，分析其理论性质，并设计主动学习方案以最小化对人类专家预测数据的需求。
AI.result: 首次从理论上分析了互补预测器的收益，证明所提损失函数族的理论有效性，并通过主动学习方案实现了数据高效的模型学习。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析与主动学习方法，本文为构建数据高效的互补性预测系统提供了新思路，能够有效提升人类专家与算法的协同决策效果。

authors_text: Omar Boudraa
title: Segmentation of 3D Dental Images Using Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习分割 3D 牙科图像
abstract: 3D image segmentation is a recent and crucial step in many medical analysis and recognition schemes. In fact, it represents a relevant research subject and a fundamental challenge due to its importance and influence. This paper provides a multi-phase Deep Learning-based system that hybridizes various efficient methods in order to get the best 3D segmentation output. First, to reduce the amount of data and accelerate the processing time, the application of Decimate compression technique is suggested and justified. We then use a CNN model to segment dental images into fifteen separated classes. In the end, a special KNN-based transformation is applied for the purpose of removing isolated meshes and of correcting dental forms. Experimentations demonstrate the precision and the robustness of the selected framework applied to 3D dental images within a private clinical benchmark.
summary: 3D image segmentation is a recent and crucial step in many medical analysis and recognition schemes. In fact, it represents a relevant research subject and a fundamental challenge due to its importance and influence. This paper provides a multi-phase Deep Learning-based system that hybridizes various efficient methods in order to get the best 3D segmentation output. First, to reduce the amount of data and accelerate the processing time, the application of Decimate compression technique is suggested and justified. We then use a CNN model to segment dental images into fifteen separated classes. In the end, a special KNN-based transformation is applied for the purpose of removing isolated meshes and of correcting dental forms. Experimentations demonstrate the precision and the robustness of the selected framework applied to 3D dental images within a private clinical benchmark.
abstract_zh: 3D 图像分割是许多医学分析和识别方案中最新且关键的一步。事实上，由于其重要性和影响力，它代表了一个相关的研究课题和一个根本性的挑战。本文提供了一种基于多阶段深度学习的系统，该系统混合了各种有效的方法以获得最佳的 3D 分割输出。首先，为了减少数据量并加快处理时间，建议并论证了采用抽取压缩技术。然后，我们使用 CNN 模型将牙科图像分割为 15 个不同的类别。最后，应用一种特殊的基于 KNN 的变换来去除孤立的网格并校正牙齿形状。实验证明了所选框架在私人临床基准内应用于 3D 牙科图像的精度和稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的多阶段系统，用于3D牙科图像分割，结合数据压缩、卷积神经网络和KNN优化技术。
AI.motivation: 3D图像分割在医疗分析中至关重要，但面临数据复杂度高、处理效率低和分割精度不足等挑战，需开发更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用Decimate压缩技术降低数据量，使用CNN对牙科图像进行15类分割，最后通过KNN算法优化分割结果以去除噪声和修正牙齿形态。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在私有临床基准数据集上实现了高精度和鲁棒性的3D牙科图像分割效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合深度学习框架有效解决了3D牙科图像分割的复杂性问题，具有临床应用价值。

authors_text: Harsha Kokel,Mayukh Das,Rakibul Islam,Julia Bonn,Jon Cai,Soham Dan,Anjali Narayan-Chen,Prashant Jayannavar,Janardhan Rao Doppa,Julia Hockenmaier,Sriraam Natarajan,Martha Palmer,Dan Roth
title: Human-guided Collaborative Problem Solving: A Natural Language based Framework
title_zh: 人类引导的协作问题解决：基于自然语言的框架
abstract: We consider the problem of human-machine collaborative problem solving as a planning task coupled with natural language communication. Our framework consists of three components -- a natural language engine that parses the language utterances to a formal representation and vice-versa, a concept learner that induces generalized concepts for plans based on limited interactions with the user, and an HTN planner that solves the task based on human interaction. We illustrate the ability of this framework to address the key challenges of collaborative problem solving by demonstrating it on a collaborative building task in a Minecraft-based blocksworld domain. The accompanied demo video is available at https://youtu.be/q1pWe4aahF0.
summary: We consider the problem of human-machine collaborative problem solving as a planning task coupled with natural language communication. Our framework consists of three components -- a natural language engine that parses the language utterances to a formal representation and vice-versa, a concept learner that induces generalized concepts for plans based on limited interactions with the user, and an HTN planner that solves the task based on human interaction. We illustrate the ability of this framework to address the key challenges of collaborative problem solving by demonstrating it on a collaborative building task in a Minecraft-based blocksworld domain. The accompanied demo video is available at https://youtu.be/q1pWe4aahF0.
abstract_zh: 我们将人机协作问题解决问题视为与自然语言通信相结合的规划任务。我们的框架由三个组件组成：一个自然语言引擎，将语言话语解析为形式表示，反之亦然；一个概念学习器，根据与用户的有限交互归纳出计划的通用概念；以及一个 HTN 规划器，根据人类交互解决任务。我们通过在基于 Minecraft 的区块世界域中的协作构建任务上进行演示，说明了该框架解决协作问题解决的关键挑战的能力。随附的演示视频可在 https://youtu.be/q1pWe4aahF0 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自然语言的人机协作问题解决框架，通过解析语言、概念学习和HTN规划器实现协作任务解决。
AI.motivation: 现有系统在人机协作中面临自然语言交互效率低、概念理解不足等挑战，需构建支持复杂任务规划的智能框架。
AI.method: 设计包含自然语言引擎（双向语言解析）、概念学习器（基于有限交互生成计划概念）和HTN规划器（结合人类反馈执行任务）的三组件框架。
AI.result: 在Minecraft块世界构建任务中验证框架有效性，实验表明系统能通过自然语言交互完成协作规划，视频演示展示其实际应用效果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架证明了自然语言驱动的人机协作规划可行性，为复杂任务场景下智能体与人类的高效协作提供了新方法论。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自然语言的人机协作问题解决框架，通过解析语言、概念学习和HTN规划器实现协作任务解决。
ai_content.motivation: 现有系统在人机协作中面临自然语言交互效率低、概念理解不足等挑战，需构建支持复杂任务规划的智能框架。
ai_content.method: 设计包含自然语言引擎（双向语言解析）、概念学习器（基于有限交互生成计划概念）和HTN规划器（结合人类反馈执行任务）的三组件框架。
ai_content.result: 在Minecraft块世界构建任务中验证框架有效性，实验表明系统能通过自然语言交互完成协作规划，视频演示展示其实际应用效果。
ai_content.conclusion: 该框架证明了自然语言驱动的人机协作规划可行性，为复杂任务场景下智能体与人类的高效协作提供了新方法论。
