search_text: Invariant Feature Learning for Generalized Long-Tailed Classification 广义长尾分类的不变特征学习 Existing long-tailed classification (LT) methods only focus on tackling the class-wise imbalance that head classes have more samples than tail classes, but overlook the attribute-wise imbalance. In fact, even if the class is balanced, samples within each class may still be long-tailed due to the varying attributes. Note that the latter is fundamentally more ubiquitous and challenging than the former because attributes are not just implicit for most datasets, but also combinatorially complex, thus prohibitively expensive to be balanced. Therefore, we introduce a novel research problem: Generalized Long-Tailed classification (GLT), to jointly consider both kinds of imbalances. By "generalized", we mean that a GLT method should naturally solve the traditional LT, but not vice versa. Not surprisingly, we find that most class-wise LT methods degenerate in our proposed two benchmarks: ImageNet-GLT and MSCOCO-GLT. We argue that it is because they over-emphasize the adjustment of class distribution while neglecting to learn attribute-invariant features. To this end, we propose an Invariant Feature Learning (IFL) method as the first strong baseline for GLT. IFL first discovers environments with divergent intra-class distributions from the imperfect predictions and then learns invariant features across them. Promisingly, as an improved feature backbone, IFL boosts all the LT line-up: one/two-stage re-balance, augmentation, and ensemble. Codes and benchmarks are available on Github: https://github.com/KaihuaTang/Generalized-Long-Tailed-Benchmarks.pytorch 现有的长尾分类（LT）方法仅专注于解决头类样本多于尾类的类不平衡问题，而忽略了属性不平衡问题。事实上，即使类别是平衡的，由于属性的不同，每个类别内的样本仍然可能是长尾的。请注意，后者从根本上来说比前者更加普遍和更具挑战性，因为属性不仅对于大多数数据集来说是隐式的，而且组合起来也很复杂，因此平衡起来成本高昂。因此，我们引入了一个新的研究问题：广义长尾分类（GLT），以共同考虑这两种不平衡。我们所说的“广义”是指 GLT 方法应该自然地解决传统 LT 问题，但反之则不然。毫不奇怪，我们发现大多数分类 LT 方法在我们提出的两个基准中退化：ImageNet-GLT 和 MSCOCO-GLT。我们认为这是因为他们过分强调类分布的调整而忽略了学习属性不变特征。为此，我们提出了一种不变特征学习（IFL）方法作为 GLT 的第一个强基线。 IFL 首先从不完美的预测中发现具有不同类内分布的环境，然后学习它们之间的不变特征。令人鼓舞的是，作为改进的功能主干，IFL 增强了所有 LT 系列：一阶段/两阶段重新平衡、增强和集成。代码和基准可在 Github 上找到：https://github.com/KaihuaTang/Generalized-Long-Tailed-Benchmarks.pytorch 本文提出了一种名为广义长尾分类（GLT）的新研究问题，旨在同时解决类别不平衡和属性不平衡问题，并提出了一种不变特征学习（IFL）方法作为GLT的首个强基线。 Kaihua Tang,Mingyuan Tao,Jiaxin Qi,Zhenguang Liu,Hanwang Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Chandranath Adak,Soumi Chattopadhyay,Muhammad Saqib
title: Deep Analysis of Visual Product Reviews
title_zh: 视觉产品评论深度分析
abstract: With the proliferation of the e-commerce industry, analyzing customer feedback is becoming indispensable to a service provider. In recent days, it can be noticed that customers upload the purchased product images with their review scores. In this paper, we undertake the task of analyzing such visual reviews, which is very new of its kind. In the past, the researchers worked on analyzing language feedback, but here we do not take any assistance from linguistic reviews that may be absent, since a recent trend can be observed where customers prefer to quickly upload the visual feedback instead of typing language feedback. We propose a hierarchical architecture, where the higher-level model engages in product categorization, and the lower-level model pays attention to predicting the review score from a customer-provided product image. We generated a database by procuring real visual product reviews, which was quite challenging. Our architecture obtained some promising results by performing extensive experiments on the employed database. The proposed hierarchical architecture attained a 57.48% performance improvement over the single-level best comparable architecture.
summary: With the proliferation of the e-commerce industry, analyzing customer feedback is becoming indispensable to a service provider. In recent days, it can be noticed that customers upload the purchased product images with their review scores. In this paper, we undertake the task of analyzing such visual reviews, which is very new of its kind. In the past, the researchers worked on analyzing language feedback, but here we do not take any assistance from linguistic reviews that may be absent, since a recent trend can be observed where customers prefer to quickly upload the visual feedback instead of typing language feedback. We propose a hierarchical architecture, where the higher-level model engages in product categorization, and the lower-level model pays attention to predicting the review score from a customer-provided product image. We generated a database by procuring real visual product reviews, which was quite challenging. Our architecture obtained some promising results by performing extensive experiments on the employed database. The proposed hierarchical architecture attained a 57.48% performance improvement over the single-level best comparable architecture.
abstract_zh: 随着电子商务行业的蓬勃发展，分析客户反馈对于服务提供商来说变得不可或缺。最近几天，可以注意到客户上传了购买的产品图片及其评论分数。在本文中，我们承担了分析此类视觉评论的任务，这在同类中是非常新颖的。过去，研究人员致力于分析语言反馈，但在这里我们不会从可能缺少的语言评论中获得任何帮助，因为可以观察到最近的趋势，即客户更喜欢快速上传视觉反馈而不是键入语言反馈。我们提出了一种分层架构，其中较高级别的模型负责产品分类，较低级别的模型负责根据客户提供的产品图像预测评论分数。我们通过获取真实的视觉产品评论来生成数据库，这是相当具有挑战性的。我们的架构通过对所使用的数据库进行广泛的实验获得了一些有希望的结果。所提出的分层架构比单层最佳可比架构提高了 57.48% 的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层架构分析带有产品图片的视觉评论，通过图像预测用户评分。
AI.motivation: 随着电商发展，用户更倾向上传产品图片代替文本评论，而现有研究主要依赖文本分析，缺乏对视觉评论的有效处理方法。
AI.method: 构建分层神经网络模型，高层进行产品分类，底层基于图像预测评分，并建立真实视觉评论数据库进行实验验证。
AI.result: 在自建数据集上，分层架构相比单层模型实现57.48%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 分层架构能有效融合产品类别信息与图像特征，显著提升视觉评论分析准确率。

authors_text: Pablo Cesar Quihui-Rubio,Gilberto Ochoa-Ruiz,Miguel Gonzalez-Mendoza,Gerardo Rodriguez-Hernandez,Christian Mata
title: Comparison of automatic prostate zones segmentation models in MRI images using U-net-like architectures
title_zh: 使用类 U 网架构的 MRI 图像自动前列腺区域分割模型的比较
abstract: Prostate cancer is the second-most frequently diagnosed cancer and the sixth leading cause of cancer death in males worldwide. The main problem that specialists face during the diagnosis of prostate cancer is the localization of Regions of Interest (ROI) containing a tumor tissue. Currently, the segmentation of this ROI in most cases is carried out manually by expert doctors, but the procedure is plagued with low detection rates (of about 27-44%) or overdiagnosis in some patients. Therefore, several research works have tackled the challenge of automatically segmenting and extracting features of the ROI from magnetic resonance images, as this process can greatly facilitate many diagnostic and therapeutic applications. However, the lack of clear prostate boundaries, the heterogeneity inherent to the prostate tissue, and the variety of prostate shapes makes this process very difficult to automate.In this work, six deep learning models were trained and analyzed with a dataset of MRI images obtained from the Centre Hospitalaire de Dijon and Universitat Politecnica de Catalunya. We carried out a comparison of multiple deep learning models (i.e. U-Net, Attention U-Net, Dense-UNet, Attention Dense-UNet, R2U-Net, and Attention R2U-Net) using categorical cross-entropy loss function. The analysis was performed using three metrics commonly used for image segmentation: Dice score, Jaccard index, and mean squared error. The model that give us the best result segmenting all the zones was R2U-Net, which achieved 0.869, 0.782, and 0.00013 for Dice, Jaccard and mean squared error, respectively.
summary: Prostate cancer is the second-most frequently diagnosed cancer and the sixth leading cause of cancer death in males worldwide. The main problem that specialists face during the diagnosis of prostate cancer is the localization of Regions of Interest (ROI) containing a tumor tissue. Currently, the segmentation of this ROI in most cases is carried out manually by expert doctors, but the procedure is plagued with low detection rates (of about 27-44%) or overdiagnosis in some patients. Therefore, several research works have tackled the challenge of automatically segmenting and extracting features of the ROI from magnetic resonance images, as this process can greatly facilitate many diagnostic and therapeutic applications. However, the lack of clear prostate boundaries, the heterogeneity inherent to the prostate tissue, and the variety of prostate shapes makes this process very difficult to automate.In this work, six deep learning models were trained and analyzed with a dataset of MRI images obtained from the Centre Hospitalaire de Dijon and Universitat Politecnica de Catalunya. We carried out a comparison of multiple deep learning models (i.e. U-Net, Attention U-Net, Dense-UNet, Attention Dense-UNet, R2U-Net, and Attention R2U-Net) using categorical cross-entropy loss function. The analysis was performed using three metrics commonly used for image segmentation: Dice score, Jaccard index, and mean squared error. The model that give us the best result segmenting all the zones was R2U-Net, which achieved 0.869, 0.782, and 0.00013 for Dice, Jaccard and mean squared error, respectively.
abstract_zh: 前列腺癌是全球第二大最常诊断的癌症，也是全球男性癌症死亡的第六大原因。专家在前列腺癌诊断过程中面临的主要问题是包含肿瘤组织的感兴趣区域 (ROI) 的定位。目前，大多数情况下，这种 ROI 的分割是由专家医生手动进行的，但该过程存在检出率低（约 27-44%）或对某些患者过度诊断的问题。因此，一些研究工作已经解决了从磁共振图像中自动分割和提取 ROI 特征的挑战，因为这个过程可以极大地促进许多诊断和治疗应用。然而，缺乏清晰的前列腺边界、前列腺组织固有的异质性以及前列腺形状的多样性，使得这一过程非常难以自动化。在这项工作中，使用从第戎中心医院和加泰罗尼亚理工大学获得的 MRI 图像数据集训练和分析了六个深度学习模型。我们使用分类交叉熵损失函数对多个深度学习模型（即 U-Net、Attention U-Net、Dense-UNet、Attention Dense-UNet、R2U-Net 和 Attention R2U-Net）进行了比较。使用图像分割常用的三个指标进行分析：Dice 得分、Jaccard 指数和均方误差。为我们提供分割所有区域的最佳结果的模型是 R2U-Net，它的 Dice、Jaccard 和均方误差分别达到 0.869、0.782 和 0.00013。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了六种基于U-Net架构的深度学习模型在MRI图像中自动分割前列腺区域的效果。
AI.motivation: 前列腺癌诊断中手动分割ROI存在低检出率和过度诊断问题，需开发自动化分割方法以提高诊断效率和准确性。
AI.method: 使用来自两家机构的MRI数据集，训练并比较U-Net及其改进模型（如Attention U-Net、R2U-Net等），采用交叉熵损失函数和Dice系数、Jaccard指数、均方误差作为评估指标。
AI.result: R2U-Net模型在Dice系数（0.869）、Jaccard指数（0.782）和均方误差（0.00013）三项指标上表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: R2U-Net在前列腺MRI区域分割任务中优于其他U-Net变体，可为临床诊断提供更可靠的自动化工具。

search_text: Comparison of automatic prostate zones segmentation models in MRI images using U-net-like architectures 使用类 U 网架构的 MRI 图像自动前列腺区域分割模型的比较 Prostate cancer is the second-most frequently diagnosed cancer and the sixth leading cause of cancer death in males worldwide. The main problem that specialists face during the diagnosis of prostate cancer is the localization of Regions of Interest (ROI) containing a tumor tissue. Currently, the segmentation of this ROI in most cases is carried out manually by expert doctors, but the procedure is plagued with low detection rates (of about 27-44%) or overdiagnosis in some patients. Therefore, several research works have tackled the challenge of automatically segmenting and extracting features of the ROI from magnetic resonance images, as this process can greatly facilitate many diagnostic and therapeutic applications. However, the lack of clear prostate boundaries, the heterogeneity inherent to the prostate tissue, and the variety of prostate shapes makes this process very difficult to automate.In this work, six deep learning models were trained and analyzed with a dataset of MRI images obtained from the Centre Hospitalaire de Dijon and Universitat Politecnica de Catalunya. We carried out a comparison of multiple deep learning models (i.e. U-Net, Attention U-Net, Dense-UNet, Attention Dense-UNet, R2U-Net, and Attention R2U-Net) using categorical cross-entropy loss function. The analysis was performed using three metrics commonly used for image segmentation: Dice score, Jaccard index, and mean squared error. The model that give us the best result segmenting all the zones was R2U-Net, which achieved 0.869, 0.782, and 0.00013 for Dice, Jaccard and mean squared error, respectively. 前列腺癌是全球第二大最常诊断的癌症，也是全球男性癌症死亡的第六大原因。专家在前列腺癌诊断过程中面临的主要问题是包含肿瘤组织的感兴趣区域 (ROI) 的定位。目前，大多数情况下，这种 ROI 的分割是由专家医生手动进行的，但该过程存在检出率低（约 27-44%）或对某些患者过度诊断的问题。因此，一些研究工作已经解决了从磁共振图像中自动分割和提取 ROI 特征的挑战，因为这个过程可以极大地促进许多诊断和治疗应用。然而，缺乏清晰的前列腺边界、前列腺组织固有的异质性以及前列腺形状的多样性，使得这一过程非常难以自动化。在这项工作中，使用从第戎中心医院和加泰罗尼亚理工大学获得的 MRI 图像数据集训练和分析了六个深度学习模型。我们使用分类交叉熵损失函数对多个深度学习模型（即 U-Net、Attention U-Net、Dense-UNet、Attention Dense-UNet、R2U-Net 和 Attention R2U-Net）进行了比较。使用图像分割常用的三个指标进行分析：Dice 得分、Jaccard 指数和均方误差。为我们提供分割所有区域的最佳结果的模型是 R2U-Net，它的 Dice、Jaccard 和均方误差分别达到 0.869、0.782 和 0.00013。 本文比较了六种基于U-Net架构的深度学习模型在MRI图像中自动分割前列腺区域的效果。 Pablo Cesar Quihui-Rubio,Gilberto Ochoa-Ruiz,Miguel Gonzalez-Mendoza,Gerardo Rodriguez-Hernandez,Christian Mata eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Daniele Secci,Laura Molino,Andrea Zanini
title: Contaminant source identification in groundwater by means of artificial neural network
title_zh: 利用人工神经网络识别地下水污染源
abstract: In a desired environmental protection system, groundwater may not be excluded. In addition to the problem of over-exploitation, in total disagreement with the concept of sustainable development, another not negligible issue concerns the groundwater contamination. Mainly, this aspect is due to intensive agricultural activities or industrialized areas. In literature, several papers have dealt with transport problem, especially for inverse problems in which the release history or the source location are identified. The innovative aim of the paper is to develop a data-driven model that is able to analyze multiple scenarios, even strongly non-linear, in order to solve forward and inverse transport problems, preserving the reliability of the results and reducing the uncertainty. Furthermore, this tool has the characteristic of providing extremely fast responses, essential to identify remediation strategies immediately. The advantages produced by the model were compared with literature studies. In this regard, a feedforward artificial neural network, which has been trained to handle different cases, represents the data-driven model. Firstly, to identify the concentration of the pollutant at specific observation points in the study area (forward problem); secondly, to deal with inverse problems identifying the release history at known source location; then, in case of one contaminant source, identifying the release history and, at the same time, the location of the source in a specific sub-domain of the investigated area. At last, the observation error is investigated and estimated. The results are satisfactorily achieved, highlighting the capability of the ANN to deal with multiple scenarios by approximating nonlinear functions without the physical point of view that describes the phenomenon, providing reliable results, with very low computational burden and uncertainty.

Firstly, to identify the concentration of the pollutant at specific observation points in the study area (forward problem); secondly, to deal with inverse problems identifying the release history at known source location; then, in case of one contaminant source, identifying the release history and, at the same time, the location of the source in a specific sub-domain of the investigated area. At last, the observation error is investigated and estimated. abstract_zh: 在理想的环境保护系统中，不能排除地下水。除了过度开采的问题之外，与可持续发展理念完全不符的另一个不可忽视的问题是地下水污染。这主要是由于农业活动密集或工业化地区造成的。在文献中，有几篇论文讨论了传输问题，特别是对于确定释放历史或源位置的逆问题。本文的创新目标是开发一种数据驱动模型，能够分析多种场景，甚至是强非线性场景，以解决正向和逆向传输问题，保持结果的可靠性并减少不确定性。此外，该工具还具有提供极快响应的特点，这对于立即确定补救策略至关重要。该模型产生的优点与文献研究进行了比较。在这方面，经过训练可以处理不同情况的前馈人工神经网络代表了数据驱动模型。首先，确定研究区域内特定观测点的污染物浓度（正向问题）；其次，处理识别已知源位置的发布历史的逆问题；然后，如果是一个污染物源，则确定释放历史，同时确定污染源在调查区域的特定子域中的位置。最后对观测误差进行了调查和估计。结果令人满意，凸显了人工神经网络通过逼近非线性函数而无需描述现象的物理观点来处理多种场景的能力，提供可靠的结果，计算负担和不确定性非常低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人工神经网络（ANN）的数据驱动模型，用于解决地下水污染源识别的正向和逆向传输问题。
AI.motivation: 地下水污染是可持续发展的重要问题，传统方法在处理非线性场景时存在可靠性低和计算成本高的缺陷，亟需高效解决方案。
AI.method: 采用前馈神经网络，通过训练模型处理多种污染场景，分别解决污染物浓度预测（正向问题）、已知污染源释放历史识别及未知污染源定位（逆向问题）。
AI.result: 模型在多场景下表现出高可靠性，能快速逼近非线性函数，显著降低计算负担和不确定性，验证结果优于文献方法。
AI.conclusion: ANN模型为地下水污染源识别提供了高效工具，可快速支持修复策略制定，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Connor Walker,Callum Rothon,Koorosh Aslansefat,Yiannis Papadopoulos,Nina Dethlefs
title: A Deep Learning Framework for Wind Turbine Repair Action Prediction Using Alarm Sequences and Long Short Term Memory Algorithms
title_zh: 使用警报序列和长短期记忆算法预测风力涡轮机维修行动的深度学习框架
abstract: With an increasing emphasis on driving down the costs of Operations and Maintenance (O&M) in the Offshore Wind (OSW) sector, comes the requirement to explore new methodology and applications of Deep Learning (DL) to the domain. Condition-based monitoring (CBM) has been at the forefront of recent research developing alarm-based systems and data-driven decision making. This paper provides a brief insight into the research being conducted in this area, with a specific focus on alarm sequence modelling and the associated challenges faced in its implementation. The paper proposes a novel idea to predict a set of relevant repair actions from an input sequence of alarm sequences, comparing Long Short-term Memory (LSTM) and Bidirectional LSTM (biLSTM) models. Achieving training accuracy results of up to 80.23%, and test accuracy results of up to 76.01% with biLSTM gives a strong indication to the potential benefits of the proposed approach that can be furthered in future research. The paper introduces a framework that integrates the proposed approach into O$\&$M procedures and discusses the potential benefits which include the reduction of a confusing plethora of alarms, as well as unnecessary vessel transfers to the turbines for fault diagnosis and correction.
summary: With an increasing emphasis on driving down the costs of Operations and Maintenance (O&M) in the Offshore Wind (OSW) sector, comes the requirement to explore new methodology and applications of Deep Learning (DL) to the domain. Condition-based monitoring (CBM) has been at the forefront of recent research developing alarm-based systems and data-driven decision making. This paper provides a brief insight into the research being conducted in this area, with a specific focus on alarm sequence modelling and the associated challenges faced in its implementation. The paper proposes a novel idea to predict a set of relevant repair actions from an input sequence of alarm sequences, comparing Long Short-term Memory (LSTM) and Bidirectional LSTM (biLSTM) models. Achieving training accuracy results of up to 80.23%, and test accuracy results of up to 76.01% with biLSTM gives a strong indication to the potential benefits of the proposed approach that can be furthered in future research. The paper introduces a framework that integrates the proposed approach into O$\&$M procedures and discusses the potential benefits which include the reduction of a confusing plethora of alarms, as well as unnecessary vessel transfers to the turbines for fault diagnosis and correction.
abstract_zh: 随着人们越来越重视降低海上风电 (OSW) 领域的运营和维护 (O&M) 成本，需要探索深度学习 (DL) 在该领域的新方法和应用。基于状态的监测 (CBM) 一直处于开发基于警报的系统和数据驱动决策的最新研究的前沿。本文简要介绍了该领域正在进行的研究，特别关注警报序列建模及其实施中面临的相关挑战。该论文提出了一种新颖的想法，通过比较长短期记忆 (LSTM) 和双向 LSTM (biLSTM) 模型，从警报序列的输入序列中预测一组相关的修复操作。 biLSTM 实现高达 80.23% 的训练准确率结果和高达 76.01% 的测试准确率结果，有力地表明了所提出的方法的潜在好处，可以在未来的研究中进一步发展。本文介绍了一个框架，该框架将所提出的方法集成到 O$\&$M 程序中，并讨论了潜在的好处，包括减少令人困惑的过多警报，以及不必要的船舶转移到涡轮机进行故障诊断和纠正。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于LSTM算法的深度学习框架，利用报警序列预测风力涡轮机维修动作。
AI.motivation: 海上风电行业需降低运维成本，传统方法难以高效处理大量报警信息，亟需数据驱动的智能决策方案。
AI.method: 采用LSTM和双向LSTM模型对报警序列进行建模，比较两种模型在维修动作预测任务中的性能差异。
AI.result: 双向LSTM模型在训练集达到80.23%准确率，测试集达76.01%，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可有效减少报警信息混乱和不必要的运维作业，为智能运维系统提供可行方案。

search_text: A Deep Learning Framework for Wind Turbine Repair Action Prediction Using Alarm Sequences and Long Short Term Memory Algorithms 使用警报序列和长短期记忆算法预测风力涡轮机维修行动的深度学习框架 With an increasing emphasis on driving down the costs of Operations and Maintenance (O&M) in the Offshore Wind (OSW) sector, comes the requirement to explore new methodology and applications of Deep Learning (DL) to the domain. Condition-based monitoring (CBM) has been at the forefront of recent research developing alarm-based systems and data-driven decision making. This paper provides a brief insight into the research being conducted in this area, with a specific focus on alarm sequence modelling and the associated challenges faced in its implementation. The paper proposes a novel idea to predict a set of relevant repair actions from an input sequence of alarm sequences, comparing Long Short-term Memory (LSTM) and Bidirectional LSTM (biLSTM) models. Achieving training accuracy results of up to 80.23%, and test accuracy results of up to 76.01% with biLSTM gives a strong indication to the potential benefits of the proposed approach that can be furthered in future research. The paper introduces a framework that integrates the proposed approach into O$\&$M procedures and discusses the potential benefits which include the reduction of a confusing plethora of alarms, as well as unnecessary vessel transfers to the turbines for fault diagnosis and correction. 随着人们越来越重视降低海上风电 (OSW) 领域的运营和维护 (O&M) 成本，需要探索深度学习 (DL) 在该领域的新方法和应用。基于状态的监测 (CBM) 一直处于开发基于警报的系统和数据驱动决策的最新研究的前沿。本文简要介绍了该领域正在进行的研究，特别关注警报序列建模及其实施中面临的相关挑战。该论文提出了一种新颖的想法，通过比较长短期记忆 (LSTM) 和双向 LSTM (biLSTM) 模型，从警报序列的输入序列中预测一组相关的修复操作。 biLSTM 实现高达 80.23% 的训练准确率结果和高达 76.01% 的测试准确率结果，有力地表明了所提出的方法的潜在好处，可以在未来的研究中进一步发展。本文介绍了一个框架，该框架将所提出的方法集成到 O$\&$M 程序中，并讨论了潜在的好处，包括减少令人困惑的过多警报，以及不必要的船舶转移到涡轮机进行故障诊断和纠正。 本文提出一种基于LSTM算法的深度学习框架，利用报警序列预测风力涡轮机维修动作。 Connor Walker,Callum Rothon,Koorosh Aslansefat,Yiannis Papadopoulos,Nina Dethlefs cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Andrea Bragagnolo,Enzo Tartaglione,Marco Grangetto
title: To update or not to update? Neurons at equilibrium in deep models
title_zh: 更新还是不更新？深度模型中处于平衡状态的神经元
abstract: Recent advances in deep learning optimization showed that, with some a-posteriori information on fully-trained models, it is possible to match the same performance by simply training a subset of their parameters. Such a discovery has a broad impact from theory to applications, driving the research towards methods to identify the minimum subset of parameters to train without look-ahead information exploitation. However, the methods proposed do not match the state-of-the-art performance, and rely on unstructured sparsely connected models. In this work we shift our focus from the single parameters to the behavior of the whole neuron, exploiting the concept of neuronal equilibrium (NEq). When a neuron is in a configuration at equilibrium (meaning that it has learned a specific input-output relationship), we can halt its update; on the contrary, when a neuron is at non-equilibrium, we let its state evolve towards an equilibrium state, updating its parameters. The proposed approach has been tested on different state-of-the-art learning strategies and tasks, validating NEq and observing that the neuronal equilibrium depends on the specific learning setup.
summary: Recent advances in deep learning optimization showed that, with some a-posteriori information on fully-trained models, it is possible to match the same performance by simply training a subset of their parameters. Such a discovery has a broad impact from theory to applications, driving the research towards methods to identify the minimum subset of parameters to train without look-ahead information exploitation. However, the methods proposed do not match the state-of-the-art performance, and rely on unstructured sparsely connected models. In this work we shift our focus from the single parameters to the behavior of the whole neuron, exploiting the concept of neuronal equilibrium (NEq). When a neuron is in a configuration at equilibrium (meaning that it has learned a specific input-output relationship), we can halt its update; on the contrary, when a neuron is at non-equilibrium, we let its state evolve towards an equilibrium state, updating its parameters. The proposed approach has been tested on different state-of-the-art learning strategies and tasks, validating NEq and observing that the neuronal equilibrium depends on the specific learning setup.
abstract_zh: 深度学习优化的最新进展表明，利用经过充分训练的模型的一些后验信息，可以通过简单地训练其参数的子集来匹配相同的性能。这一发现从理论到应用都产生了广泛的影响，推动了研究方向的研究，以识别无需利用前瞻信息即可进行训练的最小参数子集的方法。然而，所提出的方法与最先进的性能不符，并且依赖于非结构化稀疏连接模型。在这项工作中，我们利用神经元平衡（NEq）的概念，将注意力从单个参数转移到整个神经元的行为。当神经元处于平衡配置时（意味着它已经学习了特定的输入输出关系），我们可以停止其更新；相反，当神经元处于非平衡状态时，我们让其状态向平衡状态演化，从而更新其参数。所提出的方法已经在不同的最先进的学习策略和任务上进行了测试，验证了 NEq 并观察到神经元平衡取决于特定的学习设置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经元平衡状态（NEq）的深度模型参数更新策略，通过判断神经元是否达到输入输出关系的平衡状态来决定是否停止其参数更新。
AI.motivation: 现有参数子集训练方法依赖稀疏连接模型且性能不足，需探索更高效的参数更新机制以减少计算资源消耗并保持模型性能。
AI.method: 引入神经元平衡（NEq）概念，当神经元达到特定输入输出映射的平衡状态时停止更新，否则持续调整参数以趋向平衡状态。
AI.result: 在多种先进学习策略和任务中验证了NEq的有效性，发现神经元平衡状态的判定与具体学习设置密切相关。
AI.conclusion: NEq方法为参数高效训练提供了新思路，但其效果依赖于学习策略设计，未来需进一步探索不同场景下的平衡状态判定机制。

authors_text: Mario Geiger,Tess Smidt
title: e3nn: Euclidean Neural Networks
title_zh: e3nn：欧几里得神经网络
abstract: We present e3nn, a generalized framework for creating E(3) equivariant trainable functions, also known as Euclidean neural networks. e3nn naturally operates on geometry and geometric tensors that describe systems in 3D and transform predictably under a change of coordinate system. The core of e3nn are equivariant operations such as the TensorProduct class or the spherical harmonics functions that can be composed to create more complex modules such as convolutions and attention mechanisms. These core operations of e3nn can be used to efficiently articulate Tensor Field Networks, 3D Steerable CNNs, Clebsch-Gordan Networks, SE(3) Transformers and other E(3) equivariant networks.
summary: We present e3nn, a generalized framework for creating E(3) equivariant trainable functions, also known as Euclidean neural networks. e3nn naturally operates on geometry and geometric tensors that describe systems in 3D and transform predictably under a change of coordinate system. The core of e3nn are equivariant operations such as the TensorProduct class or the spherical harmonics functions that can be composed to create more complex modules such as convolutions and attention mechanisms. These core operations of e3nn can be used to efficiently articulate Tensor Field Networks, 3D Steerable CNNs, Clebsch-Gordan Networks, SE(3) Transformers and other E(3) equivariant networks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 e3nn，一个用于创建 E(3) 等变可训练函数的通用框架，也称为欧几里德神经网络。 e3nn 自然地对几何和几何张量进行操作，这些几何和几何张量以 3D 方式描述系统，并在坐标系变化下进行可预测的变换。 e3nn 的核心是等变运算，例如 TensorProduct 类或球谐函数，可以组合它们来创建更复杂的模块，例如卷积和注意力机制。 e3nn 的这些核心操作可用于有效地表达张量场网络、3D 可操纵 CNN、Clebsch-Gordan 网络、SE(3) Transformers 和其他 E(3) 等变网络。

AI.tldr: 提出e3nn框架，用于构建E(3)等变的欧几里得神经网络，处理3D几何数据。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络难以有效处理具有旋转和平移对称性的3D几何数据，需设计对坐标变换保持等变性的模型。
AI.method: 基于等变操作（如TensorProduct和球谐函数）构建模块，实现E(3)等变性，支持多种网络结构。
AI.result: 提供了一个高效实现多种E(3)等变网络的框架，提升3D几何数据处理能力。
AI.conclusion: e3nn为处理3D几何数据提供了灵活且高效的工具，推动了欧几里得神经网络的发展。

authors_text: Shikhar Bahl,Abhinav Gupta,Deepak Pathak
title: Human-to-Robot Imitation in the Wild
title_zh: 野外人机模仿
comment: Published at RSS 2022. Demos at https://human2robot.github.io
comments: Published at RSS 2022. Demos at https://human2robot.github.io
abstract: We approach the problem of learning by watching humans in the wild. While traditional approaches in Imitation and Reinforcement Learning are promising for learning in the real world, they are either sample inefficient or are constrained to lab settings. Meanwhile, there has been a lot of success in processing passive, unstructured human data. We propose tackling this problem via an efficient one-shot robot learning algorithm, centered around learning from a third-person perspective. We call our method WHIRL: In-the-Wild Human Imitating Robot Learning. WHIRL extracts a prior over the intent of the human demonstrator, using it to initialize our agent's policy. We introduce an efficient real-world policy learning scheme that improves using interactions. Our key contributions are a simple sampling-based policy optimization approach, a novel objective function for aligning human and robot videos as well as an exploration method to boost sample efficiency. We show one-shot generalization and success in real-world settings, including 20 different manipulation tasks in the wild. Videos and talk at https://human2robot.github.io
summary: We approach the problem of learning by watching humans in the wild. While traditional approaches in Imitation and Reinforcement Learning are promising for learning in the real world, they are either sample inefficient or are constrained to lab settings. Meanwhile, there has been a lot of success in processing passive, unstructured human data. We propose tackling this problem via an efficient one-shot robot learning algorithm, centered around learning from a third-person perspective. We call our method WHIRL: In-the-Wild Human Imitating Robot Learning. WHIRL extracts a prior over the intent of the human demonstrator, using it to initialize our agent's policy. We introduce an efficient real-world policy learning scheme that improves using interactions. Our key contributions are a simple sampling-based policy optimization approach, a novel objective function for aligning human and robot videos as well as an exploration method to boost sample efficiency. We show one-shot generalization and success in real-world settings, including 20 different manipulation tasks in the wild. Videos and talk at https://human2robot.github.io
abstract_zh: 我们通过观察野外人类来解决学习问题。虽然模仿和强化学习的传统方法对于现实世界中的学习很有希望，但它们要么样本效率低下，要么仅限于实验室环境。与此同时，在处理被动的、非结构化的人类数据方面已经取得了很大的成功。我们建议通过一种高效的一次性机器人学习算法来解决这个问题，该算法以第三人称视角的学习为中心。我们将我们的方法称为 WHIRL：野外人类模仿机器人学习。 WHIRL 提取了人类演示者意图的先验信息，用它来初始化我们代理的策略。我们引入了一种有效的现实世界政策学习方案，可以改进交互的使用。我们的主要贡献是一种简单的基于采样的策略优化方法、一种用于对齐人类和机器人视频的新颖目标函数以及一种提高样本效率的探索方法。我们展示了在现实环境中的一次性泛化和成功，包括 20 种不同的野外操作任务。视频和演讲请访问 https:// human2robot.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为WHIRL的算法，用于解决机器人通过观察人类在真实世界中的行为进行模仿学习的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统模仿学习和强化学习方法在样本效率或实验环境限制方面存在不足，而处理非结构化人类数据的方法已取得一定成功，因此需要一种更高效的算法。
AI.method: 提出WHIRL算法，通过从第三人称视角学习人类意图的先验知识，初始化机器人策略，并引入高效的现实世界策略学习方案，包括基于采样的策略优化方法、对齐人类和机器人视频的新目标函数以及提升样本效率的探索方法。
AI.result: 在真实世界中实现了单次学习的泛化能力，成功应用于20种不同的操作任务。
AI.conclusion: WHIRL算法在样本效率和泛化能力方面表现出色，为机器人在真实世界中的模仿学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Human-to-Robot Imitation in the Wild 野外人机模仿 We approach the problem of learning by watching humans in the wild. While traditional approaches in Imitation and Reinforcement Learning are promising for learning in the real world, they are either sample inefficient or are constrained to lab settings. Meanwhile, there has been a lot of success in processing passive, unstructured human data. We propose tackling this problem via an efficient one-shot robot learning algorithm, centered around learning from a third-person perspective. We call our method WHIRL: In-the-Wild Human Imitating Robot Learning. WHIRL extracts a prior over the intent of the human demonstrator, using it to initialize our agent's policy. We introduce an efficient real-world policy learning scheme that improves using interactions. Our key contributions are a simple sampling-based policy optimization approach, a novel objective function for aligning human and robot videos as well as an exploration method to boost sample efficiency. We show one-shot generalization and success in real-world settings, including 20 different manipulation tasks in the wild. Videos and talk at https://human2robot.github.io 我们通过观察野外人类来解决学习问题。虽然模仿和强化学习的传统方法对于现实世界中的学习很有希望，但它们要么样本效率低下，要么仅限于实验室环境。与此同时，在处理被动的、非结构化的人类数据方面已经取得了很大的成功。我们建议通过一种高效的一次性机器人学习算法来解决这个问题，该算法以第三人称视角的学习为中心。我们将我们的方法称为 WHIRL：野外人类模仿机器人学习。 WHIRL 提取了人类演示者意图的先验信息，用它来初始化我们代理的策略。我们引入了一种有效的现实世界政策学习方案，可以改进交互的使用。我们的主要贡献是一种简单的基于采样的策略优化方法、一种用于对齐人类和机器人视频的新颖目标函数以及一种提高样本效率的探索方法。我们展示了在现实环境中的一次性泛化和成功，包括 20 种不同的野外操作任务。视频和演讲请访问 https:// human2robot.github.io 本文提出了一种名为WHIRL的算法，用于解决机器人通过观察人类在真实世界中的行为进行模仿学习的问题。 Shikhar Bahl,Abhinav Gupta,Deepak Pathak cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.SY

authors_text: Rao Fu,Xiao Zhan,Yiwen Chen,Daniel Ritchie,Srinath Sridhar
title: ShapeCrafter: A Recursive Text-Conditioned 3D Shape Generation Model
title_zh: ShapeCrafter：递归文本条件 3D 形状生成模型
comment: Presented at the Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022
comments: Presented at the Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022
abstract: We present ShapeCrafter, a neural network for recursive text-conditioned 3D shape generation. Existing methods to generate text-conditioned 3D shapes consume an entire text prompt to generate a 3D shape in a single step. However, humans tend to describe shapes recursively-we may start with an initial description and progressively add details based on intermediate results. To capture this recursive process, we introduce a method to generate a 3D shape distribution, conditioned on an initial phrase, that gradually evolves as more phrases are added. Since existing datasets are insufficient for training this approach, we present Text2Shape++, a large dataset of 369K shape-text pairs that supports recursive shape generation. To capture local details that are often used to refine shape descriptions, we build on top of vector-quantized deep implicit functions that generate a distribution of high-quality shapes. Results show that our method can generate shapes consistent with text descriptions, and shapes evolve gradually as more phrases are added. Our method supports shape editing, extrapolation, and can enable new applications in human-machine collaboration for creative design.
summary: We present ShapeCrafter, a neural network for recursive text-conditioned 3D shape generation. Existing methods to generate text-conditioned 3D shapes consume an entire text prompt to generate a 3D shape in a single step. However, humans tend to describe shapes recursively-we may start with an initial description and progressively add details based on intermediate results. To capture this recursive process, we introduce a method to generate a 3D shape distribution, conditioned on an initial phrase, that gradually evolves as more phrases are added. Since existing datasets are insufficient for training this approach, we present Text2Shape++, a large dataset of 369K shape-text pairs that supports recursive shape generation. To capture local details that are often used to refine shape descriptions, we build on top of vector-quantized deep implicit functions that generate a distribution of high-quality shapes. Results show that our method can generate shapes consistent with text descriptions, and shapes evolve gradually as more phrases are added. Our method supports shape editing, extrapolation, and can enable new applications in human-machine collaboration for creative design.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 ShapeCrafter，一种用于递归文本条件 3D 形状生成的神经网络。生成文本条件 3D 形状的现有方法需要消耗整个文本提示才能在一个步骤中生成 3D 形状。然而，人类倾向于递归地描述形状——我们可能从初始描述开始，并根据中间结果逐步添加细节。为了捕捉这个递归过程，我们引入了一种生成 3D 形状分布的方法，以初始短语为条件，随着更多短语的添加而逐渐演变。由于现有数据集不足以训练这种方法，因此我们提出了 Text2Shape++，这是一个包含 369K 形状文本对的大型数据集，支持递归形状生成。为了捕获通常用于细化形状描述的局部细节，我们在矢量量化的深度隐式函数的基础上构建，这些函数生成高质量形状的分布。结果表明，我们的方法可以生成与文本描述一致的形状，并且随着更多短语的添加，形状逐渐演变。我们的方法支持形状编辑、外推，并且可以在人机协作中实现创意设计的新应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ShapeCrafter，一种基于递归文本条件的3D形状生成模型，通过逐步添加文本描述生成并优化3D形状。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过单次文本提示生成3D形状，但人类描述形状时更倾向于递归式逐步细化，现有数据集难以支持此类递归生成过程。
AI.method: 引入递归生成机制，基于初始文本生成形状分布并逐步细化；构建Text2Shape++数据集（369K形状-文本对）；采用向量量化深度隐式函数生成高质量形状分布。
AI.result: 生成结果与文本描述一致，形状随新增文本逐步演化；支持形状编辑、外推及人机协作设计应用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过模拟人类递归描述过程提升生成质量，为创意设计领域的人机协作提供新可能。

authors_text: Matteo Taiana,Matteo Toso,Stuart James,Alessio Del Bue
title: PoserNet: Refining Relative Camera Poses Exploiting Object Detections
title_zh: PoserNet：利用对象检测改进相对相机姿势
abstract: The estimation of the camera poses associated with a set of images commonly relies on feature matches between the images. In contrast, we are the first to address this challenge by using objectness regions to guide the pose estimation problem rather than explicit semantic object detections. We propose Pose Refiner Network (PoserNet) a light-weight Graph Neural Network to refine the approximate pair-wise relative camera poses. PoserNet exploits associations between the objectness regions - concisely expressed as bounding boxes - across multiple views to globally refine sparsely connected view graphs. We evaluate on the 7-Scenes dataset across varied sizes of graphs and show how this process can be beneficial to optimisation-based Motion Averaging algorithms improving the median error on the rotation by 62 degrees with respect to the initial estimates obtained based on bounding boxes. Code and data are available at https://github.com/IIT-PAVIS/PoserNet.
summary: The estimation of the camera poses associated with a set of images commonly relies on feature matches between the images. In contrast, we are the first to address this challenge by using objectness regions to guide the pose estimation problem rather than explicit semantic object detections. We propose Pose Refiner Network (PoserNet) a light-weight Graph Neural Network to refine the approximate pair-wise relative camera poses. PoserNet exploits associations between the objectness regions - concisely expressed as bounding boxes - across multiple views to globally refine sparsely connected view graphs. We evaluate on the 7-Scenes dataset across varied sizes of graphs and show how this process can be beneficial to optimisation-based Motion Averaging algorithms improving the median error on the rotation by 62 degrees with respect to the initial estimates obtained based on bounding boxes. Code and data are available at https://github.com/IIT-PAVIS/PoserNet.
abstract_zh: 与一组图像相关联的相机姿态的估计通常依赖于图像之间的特征匹配。相比之下，我们是第一个通过使用对象区域来指导姿势估计问题而不是显式语义对象检测来解决这一挑战的人。我们提出姿势细化网络（PoserNet），一种轻量级图神经网络，用于细化近似的成对相对相机姿势。 PoserNet 利用跨多个视图的对象区域之间的关联（简明地表示为边界框）来全局细化稀疏连接的视图图。我们对不同大小的图形的 7-Scenes 数据集进行了评估，并展示了这个过程如何有利于基于优化的运动平均算法，相对于基于边界框获得的初始估计，将旋转的中值误差提高了 62 度。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/IIT-PAVIS/PoserNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PoserNet，一种利用对象区域信息优化多视角图像中相机相对姿态估计的轻量级图神经网络。
AI.motivation: 传统相机姿态估计依赖特征匹配存在局限性，而显式语义检测计算成本高。通过对象区域（bounding box）的跨视角关联可更高效地优化稀疏视图图。
AI.method: 设计轻量级图神经网络PoserNet，通过多视角对象区域的关联关系，全局优化稀疏连接的视图图结构以提升姿态估计精度。
AI.result: 在7-Scenes数据集上，相对于基于边界框的初始估计，旋转误差中位数降低62度，显著提升基于运动平均的优化算法性能。
AI.conclusion: PoserNet通过对象区域关联有效优化相机姿态估计，验证了图神经网络在稀疏视图图优化中的潜力，代码数据已开源。

ai_content_json.result: 在7-Scenes数据集上，相对于基于边界框的初始估计，旋转误差中位数降低62度，显著提升基于运动平均的优化算法性能。
ai_content_json.conclusion: PoserNet通过对象区域关联有效优化相机姿态估计，验证了图神经网络在稀疏视图图优化中的潜力，代码数据已开源。

tldr: 本文提出PoserNet，一种利用对象区域信息优化多视角图像中相机相对姿态估计的轻量级图神经网络。
motivation: 传统相机姿态估计依赖特征匹配存在局限性，而显式语义检测计算成本高。通过对象区域（bounding box）的跨视角关联可更高效地优化稀疏视图图。
method: 设计轻量级图神经网络PoserNet，通过多视角对象区域的关联关系，全局优化稀疏连接的视图图结构以提升姿态估计精度。
result: 在7-Scenes数据集上，相对于基于边界框的初始估计，旋转误差中位数降低62度，显著提升基于运动平均的优化算法性能。
conclusion: PoserNet通过对象区域关联有效优化相机姿态估计，验证了图神经网络在稀疏视图图优化中的潜力，代码数据已开源。
search_text: PoserNet: Refining Relative Camera Poses Exploiting Object Detections PoserNet：利用对象检测改进相对相机姿势 The estimation of the camera poses associated with a set of images commonly relies on feature matches between the images. In contrast, we are the first to address this challenge by using objectness regions to guide the pose estimation problem rather than explicit semantic object detections. We propose Pose Refiner Network (PoserNet) a light-weight Graph Neural Network to refine the approximate pair-wise relative camera poses. PoserNet exploits associations between the objectness regions - concisely expressed as bounding boxes - across multiple views to globally refine sparsely connected view graphs. We evaluate on the 7-Scenes dataset across varied sizes of graphs and show how this process can be beneficial to optimisation-based Motion Averaging algorithms improving the median error on the rotation by 62 degrees with respect to the initial estimates obtained based on bounding boxes. Code and data are available at https://github.com/IIT-PAVIS/PoserNet. 与一组图像相关联的相机姿态的估计通常依赖于图像之间的特征匹配。相比之下，我们是第一个通过使用对象区域来指导姿势估计问题而不是显式语义对象检测来解决这一挑战的人。我们提出姿势细化网络（PoserNet），一种轻量级图神经网络，用于细化近似的成对相对相机姿势。 PoserNet 利用跨多个视图的对象区域之间的关联（简明地表示为边界框）来全局细化稀疏连接的视图图。我们对不同大小的图形的 7-Scenes 数据集进行了评估，并展示了这个过程如何有利于基于优化的运动平均算法，相对于基于边界框获得的初始估计，将旋转的中值误差提高了 62 度。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/IIT-PAVIS/PoserNet 获取。 本文提出PoserNet，一种利用对象区域信息优化多视角图像中相机相对姿态估计的轻量级图神经网络。 Matteo Taiana,Matteo Toso,Stuart James,Alessio Del Bue cs.CV

authors_text: Luis Pineda,Taosha Fan,Maurizio Monge,Shobha Venkataraman,Paloma Sodhi,Ricky T. Q. Chen,Joseph Ortiz,Daniel DeTone,Austin Wang,Stuart Anderson,Jing Dong,Brandon Amos,Mustafa Mukadam
title: Theseus: A Library for Differentiable Nonlinear Optimization
title_zh: Theseus：可微分非线性优化库
comment: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS), 2022
comments: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS), 2022
abstract: We present Theseus, an efficient application-agnostic open source library for differentiable nonlinear least squares (DNLS) optimization built on PyTorch, providing a common framework for end-to-end structured learning in robotics and vision. Existing DNLS implementations are application specific and do not always incorporate many ingredients important for efficiency. Theseus is application-agnostic, as we illustrate with several example applications that are built using the same underlying differentiable components, such as second-order optimizers, standard costs functions, and Lie groups. For efficiency, Theseus incorporates support for sparse solvers, automatic vectorization, batching, GPU acceleration, and gradient computation with implicit differentiation and direct loss minimization. We do extensive performance evaluation in a set of applications, demonstrating significant efficiency gains and better scalability when these features are incorporated. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/theseus-ai
summary: We present Theseus, an efficient application-agnostic open source library for differentiable nonlinear least squares (DNLS) optimization built on PyTorch, providing a common framework for end-to-end structured learning in robotics and vision. Existing DNLS implementations are application specific and do not always incorporate many ingredients important for efficiency. Theseus is application-agnostic, as we illustrate with several example applications that are built using the same underlying differentiable components, such as second-order optimizers, standard costs functions, and Lie groups. For efficiency, Theseus incorporates support for sparse solvers, automatic vectorization, batching, GPU acceleration, and gradient computation with implicit differentiation and direct loss minimization. We do extensive performance evaluation in a set of applications, demonstrating significant efficiency gains and better scalability when these features are incorporated. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/theseus-ai
abstract_zh: 我们推出Theseus，这是一个与应用程序无关的高效开源库，用于基于 PyTorch 构建的可微非线性最小二乘 (DNLS) 优化，为机器人和视觉领域的端到端结构化学习提供通用框架。现有的 DNLS 实现是特定于应用程序的，并不总是包含许多对效率很重要的成分。 Theseus 与应用程序无关，正如我们通过使用相同的底层可微分组件（例如二阶优化器、标准成本函数和李群）构建的几个示例应用程序所说明的那样。为了提高效率，Theseus 结合了对稀疏求解器、自动矢量化、批处理、GPU 加速以及具有隐式微分和直接损失最小化的梯度计算的支持。我们在一组应用程序中进行了广泛的性能评估，证明了合并这些功能后显着的效率提升和更好的可扩展性。项目页面：https://sites.google.com/view/theseus-ai

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Theseus的高效、应用无关的开源库，用于可微分非线性最小二乘优化，支持机器人和视觉领域的端到端结构化学习。
AI.motivation: 现有可微分非线性最小二乘（DNLS）实现通常针对特定应用，缺乏通用性和效率优化，难以满足多领域需求。
AI.method: Theseus基于PyTorch构建，提供统一框架，包含二阶优化器、标准代价函数和李群等通用组件，并通过稀疏求解器、自动向量化、GPU加速等技术提升效率。
AI.result: 在多个应用中验证了Theseus的效率优势，证明其特性可显著提升计算效率和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: Theseus作为通用DNLS库，为机器人、视觉等领域提供了高效优化工具，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Mohammad Mahdian,Jieming Mao,Kangning Wang
title: Regret Minimization with Noisy Observations
title_zh: 通过嘈杂的观察来最小化遗憾
abstract: In a typical optimization problem, the task is to pick one of a number of options with the lowest cost or the highest value. In practice, these cost/value quantities often come through processes such as measurement or machine learning, which are noisy, with quantifiable noise distributions. To take these noise distributions into account, one approach is to assume a prior for the values, use it to build a posterior, and then apply standard stochastic optimization to pick a solution. However, in many practical applications, such prior distributions may not be available. In this paper, we study such scenarios using a regret minimization model. In our model, the task is to pick the highest one out of $n$ values. The values are unknown and chosen by an adversary, but can be observed through noisy channels, where additive noises are stochastically drawn from known distributions. The goal is to minimize the regret of our selection, defined as the expected difference between the highest and the selected value on the worst-case choices of values. We show that the naïve algorithm of picking the highest observed value has regret arbitrarily worse than the optimum, even when $n = 2$ and the noises are unbiased in expectation. On the other hand, we propose an algorithm which gives a constant-approximation to the optimal regret for any $n$. Our algorithm is conceptually simple, computationally efficient, and requires only minimal knowledge of the noise distributions.
summary: In a typical optimization problem, the task is to pick one of a number of options with the lowest cost or the highest value. In practice, these cost/value quantities often come through processes such as measurement or machine learning, which are noisy, with quantifiable noise distributions. To take these noise distributions into account, one approach is to assume a prior for the values, use it to build a posterior, and then apply standard stochastic optimization to pick a solution. However, in many practical applications, such prior distributions may not be available. In this paper, we study such scenarios using a regret minimization model. In our model, the task is to pick the highest one out of $n$ values. The values are unknown and chosen by an adversary, but can be observed through noisy channels, where additive noises are stochastically drawn from known distributions. The goal is to minimize the regret of our selection, defined as the expected difference between the highest and the selected value on the worst-case choices of values. We show that the naïve algorithm of picking the highest observed value has regret arbitrarily worse than the optimum, even when $n = 2$ and the noises are unbiased in expectation. On the other hand, we propose an algorithm which gives a constant-approximation to the optimal regret for any $n$. Our algorithm is conceptually simple, computationally efficient, and requires only minimal knowledge of the noise distributions.
abstract_zh: 在典型的优化问题中，任务是从多个选项中选择成本最低或价值最高的选项之一。在实践中，这些成本/价值量通常来自测量或机器学习等过程，这些过程是有噪声的，具有可量化的噪声分布。为了考虑这些噪声分布，一种方法是假设值的先验，用它来构建后验，然后应用标准随机优化来选择解决方案。然而，在许多实际应用中，这样的先验分布可能不可用。在本文中，我们使用后悔最小化模型来研究此类场景。在我们的模型中，任务是从 $n$ 值中选择最高的一个。这些值是未知的并且由对手选择，但可以通过噪声通道观察到，其中加性噪声是从已知分布中随机抽取的。目标是最大限度地减少我们选择的遗憾，遗憾的定义是在最坏情况的值选择中最高值和所选值之间的预期差异。我们表明，即使当 $n = 2$ 并且噪声在期望中是无偏的时，选择最高观测值的朴素算法的遗憾也比最优值任意差。另一方面，我们提出了一种算法，可以对任何 $n$ 给出最佳后悔的常数近似值。我们的算法概念上简单，计算效率高，并且只需要很少的噪声分布知识。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在存在噪声观测的情况下，如何通过最小化遗憾（regret）来选择最优选项的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法依赖先验分布，但在实际应用中先验信息可能不可用，且直接选择最高观测值的朴素算法在噪声环境下表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出一种无需先验信息的算法，基于已知噪声分布，通过计算加权观测值并选择最优解，实现对最优遗憾的常数近似。
AI.result: 该算法在任意选项数量n下均能保证常数近似比，且在n=2时表现优于朴素算法，计算效率高且对噪声分布要求低。
AI.conclusion: 本文为噪声观测下的优化问题提供了鲁棒且高效的解决方案，证明了在无先验信息条件下仍可实现近似最优遗憾的理论可能性。

We show that the naïve algorithm of picking the highest observed value has regret arbitrarily worse than the optimum, even when $n = 2$ and the noises are unbiased in expectation. On the other hand, we propose an algorithm which gives a constant-approximation to the optimal regret for any $n$. Our algorithm is conceptually simple, computationally efficient, and requires only minimal knowledge of the noise distributions. 在典型的优化问题中，任务是从多个选项中选择成本最低或价值最高的选项之一。在实践中，这些成本/价值量通常来自测量或机器学习等过程，这些过程是有噪声的，具有可量化的噪声分布。为了考虑这些噪声分布，一种方法是假设值的先验，用它来构建后验，然后应用标准随机优化来选择解决方案。然而，在许多实际应用中，这样的先验分布可能不可用。在本文中，我们使用后悔最小化模型来研究此类场景。在我们的模型中，任务是从 $n$ 值中选择最高的一个。这些值是未知的并且由对手选择，但可以通过噪声通道观察到，其中加性噪声是从已知分布中随机抽取的。目标是最大限度地减少我们选择的遗憾，遗憾的定义是在最坏情况的值选择中最高值和所选值之间的预期差异。我们表明，即使当 $n = 2$ 并且噪声在期望中是无偏的时，选择最高观测值的朴素算法的遗憾也比最优值任意差。另一方面，我们提出了一种算法，可以对任何 $n$ 给出最佳后悔的常数近似值。我们的算法概念上简单，计算效率高，并且只需要很少的噪声分布知识。 本文研究在存在噪声观测的情况下，如何通过最小化遗憾（regret）来选择最优选项的问题。 Mohammad Mahdian,Jieming Mao,Kangning Wang cs.DS,cs.GT,cs.LG

authors_text: Tanqiu Qiao,Qianhui Men,Frederick W. B. Li,Yoshiki Kubotani,Shigeo Morishima,Hubert P. H. Shum
title: Geometric Features Informed Multi-person Human-object Interaction Recognition in Videos
title_zh: 几何特征为视频中的多人人机交互识别提供依据
abstract: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) recognition in videos is important for analyzing human activity. Most existing work focusing on visual features usually suffer from occlusion in the real-world scenarios. Such a problem will be further complicated when multiple people and objects are involved in HOIs. Consider that geometric features such as human pose and object position provide meaningful information to understand HOIs, we argue to combine the benefits of both visual and geometric features in HOI recognition, and propose a novel Two-level Geometric feature-informed Graph Convolutional Network (2G-GCN). The geometric-level graph models the interdependency between geometric features of humans and objects, while the fusion-level graph further fuses them with visual features of humans and objects. To demonstrate the novelty and effectiveness of our method in challenging scenarios, we propose a new multi-person HOI dataset (MPHOI-72). Extensive experiments on MPHOI-72 (multi-person HOI), CAD-120 (single-human HOI) and Bimanual Actions (two-hand HOI) datasets demonstrate our superior performance compared to state-of-the-arts.
summary: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) recognition in videos is important for analyzing human activity. Most existing work focusing on visual features usually suffer from occlusion in the real-world scenarios. Such a problem will be further complicated when multiple people and objects are involved in HOIs. Consider that geometric features such as human pose and object position provide meaningful information to understand HOIs, we argue to combine the benefits of both visual and geometric features in HOI recognition, and propose a novel Two-level Geometric feature-informed Graph Convolutional Network (2G-GCN). The geometric-level graph models the interdependency between geometric features of humans and objects, while the fusion-level graph further fuses them with visual features of humans and objects. To demonstrate the novelty and effectiveness of our method in challenging scenarios, we propose a new multi-person HOI dataset (MPHOI-72). Extensive experiments on MPHOI-72 (multi-person HOI), CAD-120 (single-human HOI) and Bimanual Actions (two-hand HOI) datasets demonstrate our superior performance compared to state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 视频中的人机交互 (HOI) 识别对于分析人类活动非常重要。大多数现有的关注视觉特征的工作通常会在现实场景中遭受遮挡。当 HOI 涉及多个人和多个物体时，这样的问题会变得更加复杂。考虑到人体姿势和物体位置等几何特征为理解 HOI 提供了有意义的信息，我们认为在 HOI 识别中结合视觉和几何特征的优点，并提出了一种新颖的两级几何特征通知图卷积网络（2G-GCN）。几何级图模拟了人类和物体的几何特征之间的相互依赖关系，而融合级图进一步将它们与人类和物体的视觉特征融合。为了证明我们的方法在具有挑战性的场景中的新颖性和有效性，我们提出了一个新的多人 HOI 数据集 (MPHOI-72)。在 MPHOI-72（多人 HOI）、CAD-120（单人 HOI）和 Bimanual Actions（双手 HOI）数据集上进行的大量实验证明，与最先进的技术相比，我们具有卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合几何特征的图卷积网络，用于视频中多人人类-物体交互识别。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉特征的方法在真实场景中因遮挡问题表现不佳，而几何特征（如人体姿态和物体位置）能提供关键信息，需融合视觉与几何特征提升识别效果。
AI.method: 设计两阶段几何特征图卷积网络（2G-GCN），几何层建模人体与物体几何特征的依赖关系，融合层将几何特征与视觉特征结合，并构建新数据集MPHOI-72验证方法。
AI.result: 在MPHOI-72、CAD-120和Bimanual Actions数据集上均优于现有最先进方法，证明了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合几何与视觉特征，本文方法在复杂遮挡和多人交互场景下显著提升了人类-物体交互识别性能。

authors_text: Xin Dong,Sai Qian Zhang,Ang Li,H. T. Kung
title: SphereFed: Hyperspherical Federated Learning
title_zh: SphereFed：超球形联邦学习
abstract: Federated Learning aims at training a global model from multiple decentralized devices (i.e. clients) without exchanging their private local data. A key challenge is the handling of non-i.i.d. (independent identically distributed) data across multiple clients that may induce disparities of their local features. We introduce the Hyperspherical Federated Learning (SphereFed) framework to address the non-i.i.d. issue by constraining learned representations of data points to be on a unit hypersphere shared by clients. Specifically, all clients learn their local representations by minimizing the loss with respect to a fixed classifier whose weights span the unit hypersphere. After federated training in improving the global model, this classifier is further calibrated with a closed-form solution by minimizing a mean squared loss. We show that the calibration solution can be computed efficiently and distributedly without direct access of local data. Extensive experiments indicate that our SphereFed approach is able to improve the accuracy of multiple existing federated learning algorithms by a considerable margin (up to 6% on challenging datasets) with enhanced computation and communication efficiency across datasets and model architectures.
summary: Federated Learning aims at training a global model from multiple decentralized devices (i.e. clients) without exchanging their private local data. A key challenge is the handling of non-i.i.d. (independent identically distributed) data across multiple clients that may induce disparities of their local features. We introduce the Hyperspherical Federated Learning (SphereFed) framework to address the non-i.i.d. issue by constraining learned representations of data points to be on a unit hypersphere shared by clients. Specifically, all clients learn their local representations by minimizing the loss with respect to a fixed classifier whose weights span the unit hypersphere. After federated training in improving the global model, this classifier is further calibrated with a closed-form solution by minimizing a mean squared loss. We show that the calibration solution can be computed efficiently and distributedly without direct access of local data. Extensive experiments indicate that our SphereFed approach is able to improve the accuracy of multiple existing federated learning algorithms by a considerable margin (up to 6% on challenging datasets) with enhanced computation and communication efficiency across datasets and model architectures.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习旨在从多个分散设备（即客户端）训练全局模型，而无需交换其私有本地数据。一个关键的挑战是处理非独立同分布的问题。跨多个客户端的（独立同分布）数据可能会导致其局部特征的差异。我们引入超球形联合学习 (SphereFed) 框架来解决非独立同分布问题。通过将学习到的数据点表示限制在客户端共享的单位超球面上来解决这个问题。具体来说，所有客户端都通过最小化相对于权重跨越单位超球面的固定分类器的损失来学习其局部表示。在改进全局模型的联合训练之后，通过最小化均方损失，使用封闭式解决方案进一步校准该分类器。我们表明，无需直接访问本地数据，即可高效且分布式地计算校准解。大量实验表明，我们的 SphereFed 方法能够大幅提高多种现有联邦学习算法的准确性（在具有挑战性的数据集上最多可提高 6%），同时提高跨数据集和模型架构的计算和通信效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SphereFed框架，通过将数据表示约束在共享的单位超球面上，解决联邦学习中的非独立同分布数据问题。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中非独立同分布数据会导致本地特征差异，现有方法难以有效处理这一问题，需新框架提升模型性能。
AI.method: 约束客户端数据表示于单位超球面，使用固定分类器优化本地模型，并通过闭式解校准分类器，无需访问本地数据。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和模型架构上，SphereFed使现有联邦学习算法准确率提升最高达6%，同时提高计算与通信效率。
AI.conclusion: SphereFed通过超球面约束有效缓解非独立同分布问题，显著提升联邦学习的准确率与效率。

authors_text: Junyuan Ouyang,Haoyao Chen
title: Det6D: A Ground-Aware Full-Pose 3D Object Detector for Improving Terrain Robustness
title_zh: Det6D：用于提高地形鲁棒性的地面感知全姿态 3D 物体探测器
abstract: Accurate 3D object detection with LiDAR is critical for autonomous driving. Existing research is all based on the flat-world assumption. However, the actual road can be complex with steep sections, which breaks the premise. Current methods suffer from performance degradation in this case due to difficulty correctly detecting objects on sloped terrain. In this work, we propose Det6D, the first full-degree-of-freedom 3D object detector without spatial and postural limitations, to improve terrain robustness. We choose the point-based framework by founding their capability of detecting objects in the entire spatial range. To predict full-degree poses, including pitch and roll, we design a ground-aware orientation branch that leverages the local ground constraints. Given the difficulty of long-tail non-flat scene data collection and 6D pose annotation, we present Slope-Aug, a data augmentation method for synthesizing non-flat terrain from existing datasets recorded in flat scenes. Experiments on various datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our method in different terrains. We further conducted an extended experiment to explore how the network predicts the two extra poses. The proposed modules are plug-and-play for existing point-based frameworks. The code is available at https://github.com/HITSZ-NRSL/De6D.
summary: Accurate 3D object detection with LiDAR is critical for autonomous driving. Existing research is all based on the flat-world assumption. However, the actual road can be complex with steep sections, which breaks the premise. Current methods suffer from performance degradation in this case due to difficulty correctly detecting objects on sloped terrain. In this work, we propose Det6D, the first full-degree-of-freedom 3D object detector without spatial and postural limitations, to improve terrain robustness. We choose the point-based framework by founding their capability of detecting objects in the entire spatial range. To predict full-degree poses, including pitch and roll, we design a ground-aware orientation branch that leverages the local ground constraints. Given the difficulty of long-tail non-flat scene data collection and 6D pose annotation, we present Slope-Aug, a data augmentation method for synthesizing non-flat terrain from existing datasets recorded in flat scenes. Experiments on various datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our method in different terrains. We further conducted an extended experiment to explore how the network predicts the two extra poses. The proposed modules are plug-and-play for existing point-based frameworks. The code is available at https://github.com/HITSZ-NRSL/De6D.
abstract_zh: 使用 LiDAR 进行准确的 3D 物体检测对于自动驾驶至关重要。现有的研究都是基于平坦世界的假设。然而，实际道路可能很复杂，路段陡峭，这就打破了这个前提。由于难以正确检测倾斜地形上的物体，当前的方法在这种情况下会出现性能下降。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Det6D，这是第一个没有空间和姿势限制的全自由度 3D 物体检测器，以提高地形鲁棒性。我们通过建立基于点的框架在整个空间范围内检测对象的能力来选择它们。为了预测全度姿态，包括俯仰和滚动，我们设计了一个利用局部地面约束的地面感知方向分支。考虑到长尾非平坦场景数据收集和 6D 姿态注释的困难，我们提出了 Slope-Aug，一种数据增强方法，用于从平坦场景中记录的现有数据集合成非平坦地形。对各种数据集的实验证明了我们的方法在不同地形下的有效性和鲁棒性。我们进一步进行了一项扩展实验，以探索网络如何预测这两个额外的姿势。所提出的模块对于现有的基于点的框架是即插即用的。该代码可从 https://github.com/HITSZ-NRSL/De6D 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出Det6D，一种地面感知的全姿态3D目标检测器，以提高非平坦地形下的检测鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法基于平坦地形假设，在复杂地形下检测性能下降，需提升地形适应性。
AI.method: 采用点框架，设计地面感知方向分支预测全姿态，并提出Slope-Aug合成非平坦数据。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证了方法的有效性和鲁棒性，模块可集成到现有框架。
AI.conclusion: Det6D有效提升了复杂地形下的检测能力，为自动驾驶提供可靠方案。

search_text: Det6D: A Ground-Aware Full-Pose 3D Object Detector for Improving Terrain Robustness Det6D：用于提高地形鲁棒性的地面感知全姿态 3D 物体探测器 Accurate 3D object detection with LiDAR is critical for autonomous driving. Existing research is all based on the flat-world assumption. However, the actual road can be complex with steep sections, which breaks the premise. Current methods suffer from performance degradation in this case due to difficulty correctly detecting objects on sloped terrain. In this work, we propose Det6D, the first full-degree-of-freedom 3D object detector without spatial and postural limitations, to improve terrain robustness. We choose the point-based framework by founding their capability of detecting objects in the entire spatial range. To predict full-degree poses, including pitch and roll, we design a ground-aware orientation branch that leverages the local ground constraints. Given the difficulty of long-tail non-flat scene data collection and 6D pose annotation, we present Slope-Aug, a data augmentation method for synthesizing non-flat terrain from existing datasets recorded in flat scenes. Experiments on various datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our method in different terrains. We further conducted an extended experiment to explore how the network predicts the two extra poses. The proposed modules are plug-and-play for existing point-based frameworks. The code is available at https://github.com/HITSZ-NRSL/De6D. 使用 LiDAR 进行准确的 3D 物体检测对于自动驾驶至关重要。现有的研究都是基于平坦世界的假设。然而，实际道路可能很复杂，路段陡峭，这就打破了这个前提。由于难以正确检测倾斜地形上的物体，当前的方法在这种情况下会出现性能下降。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Det6D，这是第一个没有空间和姿势限制的全自由度 3D 物体检测器，以提高地形鲁棒性。我们通过建立基于点的框架在整个空间范围内检测对象的能力来选择它们。为了预测全度姿态，包括俯仰和滚动，我们设计了一个利用局部地面约束的地面感知方向分支。考虑到长尾非平坦场景数据收集和 6D 姿态注释的困难，我们提出了 Slope-Aug，一种数据增强方法，用于从平坦场景中记录的现有数据集合成非平坦地形。对各种数据集的实验证明了我们的方法在不同地形下的有效性和鲁棒性。我们进一步进行了一项扩展实验，以探索网络如何预测这两个额外的姿势。所提出的模块对于现有的基于点的框架是即插即用的。该代码可从 https://github.com/HITSZ-NRSL/De6D 获取。 提出Det6D，一种地面感知的全姿态3D目标检测器，以提高非平坦地形下的检测鲁棒性。 Junyuan Ouyang,Haoyao Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Angus Galloway,Anna Golubeva,Mahmoud Salem,Mihai Nica,Yani Ioannou,Graham W. Taylor
title: Bounding generalization error with input compression: An empirical study with infinite-width networks
title_zh: 输入压缩限制泛化误差：无限宽度网络的实证研究
abstract: Estimating the Generalization Error (GE) of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) is an important task that often relies on availability of held-out data. The ability to better predict GE based on a single training set may yield overarching DNN design principles to reduce a reliance on trial-and-error, along with other performance assessment advantages. In search of a quantity relevant to GE, we investigate the Mutual Information (MI) between the input and final layer representations, using the infinite-width DNN limit to bound MI. An existing input compression-based GE bound is used to link MI and GE. To the best of our knowledge, this represents the first empirical study of this bound. In our attempt to empirically falsify the theoretical bound, we find that it is often tight for best-performing models. Furthermore, it detects randomization of training labels in many cases, reflects test-time perturbation robustness, and works well given only few training samples. These results are promising given that input compression is broadly applicable where MI can be estimated with confidence.
summary: Estimating the Generalization Error (GE) of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) is an important task that often relies on availability of held-out data. The ability to better predict GE based on a single training set may yield overarching DNN design principles to reduce a reliance on trial-and-error, along with other performance assessment advantages. In search of a quantity relevant to GE, we investigate the Mutual Information (MI) between the input and final layer representations, using the infinite-width DNN limit to bound MI. An existing input compression-based GE bound is used to link MI and GE. To the best of our knowledge, this represents the first empirical study of this bound. In our attempt to empirically falsify the theoretical bound, we find that it is often tight for best-performing models. Furthermore, it detects randomization of training labels in many cases, reflects test-time perturbation robustness, and works well given only few training samples. These results are promising given that input compression is broadly applicable where MI can be estimated with confidence.
abstract_zh: 估计深度神经网络 (DNN) 的泛化误差 (GE) 是一项重要任务，通常依赖于保留数据的可用性。基于单个训练集更好地预测 GE 的能力可能会产生总体 DNN 设计原则，以减少对试错的依赖，并具有其他性能评估优势。为了寻找与 GE 相关的量，我们使用无限宽度 DNN 限制来限制 MI，研究输入层表示和最终层表示之间的互信息 (MI)。现有的基于输入压缩的 GE 边界用于链接 MI 和 GE。据我们所知，这是对该界限的首次实证研究。在我们尝试凭经验证伪理论界限时，我们发现对于表现最佳的模型来说，它通常很紧。此外，它在许多情况下检测训练标签的随机化，反映测试时间扰动的鲁棒性，并且在仅少量训练样本的情况下就可以很好地工作。鉴于输入压缩广泛适用于可以自信地估计 MI 的情况，这些结果是有希望的。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过输入压缩方法研究无限宽度网络的泛化误差上界，并进行实证分析。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络的泛化误差估计通常依赖验证数据，而基于单一训练集的预测方法可减少试错成本，但相关理论尚不明确。
AI.method: 利用输入与最终层表示之间的互信息（MI）构建泛化误差上界，结合无限宽度网络极限理论，并通过输入压缩方法进行实证检验。
AI.result: 发现该上界在高性能模型中常较紧，能检测标签随机化、反映测试扰动鲁棒性，且在少量样本下表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 输入压缩方法在互信息可可靠估计的场景下具有广泛适用性，为泛化误差分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Xingchen Wan,Cong Lu,Jack Parker-Holder,Philip J. Ball,Vu Nguyen,Binxin Ru,Michael A. Osborne
title: Bayesian Generational Population-Based Training
title_zh: 基于贝叶斯世代群体的训练
comment: AutoML Conference 2022. 10 pages, 4 figure, 3 tables (28 pages, 10 figures, 7 tables including references and appendices)
comments: AutoML Conference 2022. 10 pages, 4 figure, 3 tables (28 pages, 10 figures, 7 tables including references and appendices)
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) offers the potential for training generally capable agents that can interact autonomously in the real world. However, one key limitation is the brittleness of RL algorithms to core hyperparameters and network architecture choice. Furthermore, non-stationarities such as evolving training data and increased agent complexity mean that different hyperparameters and architectures may be optimal at different points of training. This motivates AutoRL, a class of methods seeking to automate these design choices. One prominent class of AutoRL methods is Population-Based Training (PBT), which have led to impressive performance in several large scale settings. In this paper, we introduce two new innovations in PBT-style methods. First, we employ trust-region based Bayesian Optimization, enabling full coverage of the high-dimensional mixed hyperparameter search space. Second, we show that using a generational approach, we can also learn both architectures and hyperparameters jointly on-the-fly in a single training run. Leveraging the new highly parallelizable Brax physics engine, we show that these innovations lead to large performance gains, significantly outperforming the tuned baseline while learning entire configurations on the fly. Code is available at https://github.com/xingchenwan/bgpbt.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) offers the potential for training generally capable agents that can interact autonomously in the real world. However, one key limitation is the brittleness of RL algorithms to core hyperparameters and network architecture choice. Furthermore, non-stationarities such as evolving training data and increased agent complexity mean that different hyperparameters and architectures may be optimal at different points of training. This motivates AutoRL, a class of methods seeking to automate these design choices. One prominent class of AutoRL methods is Population-Based Training (PBT), which have led to impressive performance in several large scale settings. In this paper, we introduce two new innovations in PBT-style methods. First, we employ trust-region based Bayesian Optimization, enabling full coverage of the high-dimensional mixed hyperparameter search space. Second, we show that using a generational approach, we can also learn both architectures and hyperparameters jointly on-the-fly in a single training run. Leveraging the new highly parallelizable Brax physics engine, we show that these innovations lead to large performance gains, significantly outperforming the tuned baseline while learning entire configurations on the fly. Code is available at https://github.com/xingchenwan/bgpbt.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）为训练具有一般能力的智能体提供了潜力，这些智能体可以在现实世界中自主交互。然而，一个关键的限制是强化学习算法对核心超参数和网络架构选择的脆弱性。此外，不断变化的训练数据和增加的代理复杂性等非平稳性意味着不同的超参数和架构在不同的训练点可能是最佳的。这激发了 AutoRL，一类寻求自动化这些设计选择的方法。 AutoRL 方法中一类突出的方法是基于群体的训练 (PBT)，它在多个大规模环境中取得了令人印象深刻的性能。在本文中，我们介绍了 PBT 式方法的两项新创新。首先，我们采用基于信任域的贝叶斯优化，实现高维混合超参数搜索空间的完全覆盖。其次，我们表明，使用生成方法，我们还可以在一次训练运行中同时动态学习架构和超参数。利用新的高度并行化的 Brax 物理引擎，我们证明这些创新带来了巨大的性能提升，在动态学习整个配置的同时显着优于调整的基线。代码可在 https://github.com/xingchenwan/bgpbt 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯优化的生成式种群训练方法，用于自动优化强化学习中的超参数和网络架构。
AI.motivation: 强化学习算法对核心超参数和网络架构选择非常敏感，且随着训练数据和代理复杂性的变化，最优超参数和架构可能不同，因此需要自动化这些设计选择。
AI.method: 本文引入了两种新的PBT方法创新：基于信任区域的贝叶斯优化，以覆盖高维混合超参数搜索空间；以及使用生成式方法，在单次训练过程中联合学习架构和超参数。
AI.result: 利用新的高度并行化的Brax物理引擎，这些创新方法显著提升了性能，优于调优基线，并在训练过程中实时学习了完整的配置。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的贝叶斯生成式种群训练方法在自动优化强化学习代理的超参数和架构方面表现出色，具有重要的应用价值。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯优化的生成式种群训练方法，用于自动优化强化学习中的超参数和网络架构。
motivation: 强化学习算法对核心超参数和网络架构选择非常敏感，且随着训练数据和代理复杂性的变化，最优超参数和架构可能不同，因此需要自动化这些设计选择。
method: 本文引入了两种新的PBT方法创新：基于信任区域的贝叶斯优化，以覆盖高维混合超参数搜索空间；以及使用生成式方法，在单次训练过程中联合学习架构和超参数。
result: 利用新的高度并行化的Brax物理引擎，这些创新方法显著提升了性能，优于调优基线，并在训练过程中实时学习了完整的配置。
conclusion: 本文提出的贝叶斯生成式种群训练方法在自动优化强化学习代理的超参数和架构方面表现出色，具有重要的应用价值。
search_text: Bayesian Generational Population-Based Training 基于贝叶斯世代群体的训练 Reinforcement learning (RL) offers the potential for training generally capable agents that can interact autonomously in the real world. However, one key limitation is the brittleness of RL algorithms to core hyperparameters and network architecture choice. Furthermore, non-stationarities such as evolving training data and increased agent complexity mean that different hyperparameters and architectures may be optimal at different points of training. This motivates AutoRL, a class of methods seeking to automate these design choices. One prominent class of AutoRL methods is Population-Based Training (PBT), which have led to impressive performance in several large scale settings. In this paper, we introduce two new innovations in PBT-style methods. First, we employ trust-region based Bayesian Optimization, enabling full coverage of the high-dimensional mixed hyperparameter search space. Second, we show that using a generational approach, we can also learn both architectures and hyperparameters jointly on-the-fly in a single training run. Leveraging the new highly parallelizable Brax physics engine, we show that these innovations lead to large performance gains, significantly outperforming the tuned baseline while learning entire configurations on the fly. Code is available at https://github.com/xingchenwan/bgpbt. 强化学习（RL）为训练具有一般能力的智能体提供了潜力，这些智能体可以在现实世界中自主交互。然而，一个关键的限制是强化学习算法对核心超参数和网络架构选择的脆弱性。此外，不断变化的训练数据和增加的代理复杂性等非平稳性意味着不同的超参数和架构在不同的训练点可能是最佳的。这激发了 AutoRL，一类寻求自动化这些设计选择的方法。 AutoRL 方法中一类突出的方法是基于群体的训练 (PBT)，它在多个大规模环境中取得了令人印象深刻的性能。在本文中，我们介绍了 PBT 式方法的两项新创新。首先，我们采用基于信任域的贝叶斯优化，实现高维混合超参数搜索空间的完全覆盖。其次，我们表明，使用生成方法，我们还可以在一次训练运行中同时动态学习架构和超参数。利用新的高度并行化的 Brax 物理引擎，我们证明这些创新带来了巨大的性能提升，在动态学习整个配置的同时显着优于调整的基线。代码可在 https://github.com/xingchenwan/bgpbt 获取。 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯优化的生成式种群训练方法，用于自动优化强化学习中的超参数和网络架构。 Xingchen Wan,Cong Lu,Jack Parker-Holder,Philip J. Ball,Vu Nguyen,Binxin Ru,Michael A. Osborne cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Shenghua Xu,Xinyue Cai,Bin Zhao,Li Zhang,Hang Xu,Yanwei Fu,Xiangyang Xue
title: RCLane: Relay Chain Prediction for Lane Detection
title_zh: RCLane：用于车道检测的中继链预测
abstract: Lane detection is an important component of many real-world autonomous systems. Despite a wide variety of lane detection approaches have been proposed, reporting steady benchmark improvements over time, lane detection remains a largely unsolved problem. This is because most of the existing lane detection methods either treat the lane detection as a dense prediction or a detection task, few of them consider the unique topologies (Y-shape, Fork-shape, nearly horizontal lane) of the lane markers, which leads to sub-optimal solution. In this paper, we present a new method for lane detection based on relay chain prediction. Specifically, our model predicts a segmentation map to classify the foreground and background region. For each pixel point in the foreground region, we go through the forward branch and backward branch to recover the whole lane. Each branch decodes a transfer map and a distance map to produce the direction moving to the next point, and how many steps to progressively predict a relay station (next point). As such, our model is able to capture the keypoints along the lanes. Despite its simplicity, our strategy allows us to establish new state-of-the-art on four major benchmarks including TuSimple, CULane, CurveLanes and LLAMAS.
summary: Lane detection is an important component of many real-world autonomous systems. Despite a wide variety of lane detection approaches have been proposed, reporting steady benchmark improvements over time, lane detection remains a largely unsolved problem. This is because most of the existing lane detection methods either treat the lane detection as a dense prediction or a detection task, few of them consider the unique topologies (Y-shape, Fork-shape, nearly horizontal lane) of the lane markers, which leads to sub-optimal solution. In this paper, we present a new method for lane detection based on relay chain prediction. Specifically, our model predicts a segmentation map to classify the foreground and background region. For each pixel point in the foreground region, we go through the forward branch and backward branch to recover the whole lane. Each branch decodes a transfer map and a distance map to produce the direction moving to the next point, and how many steps to progressively predict a relay station (next point). As such, our model is able to capture the keypoints along the lanes. Despite its simplicity, our strategy allows us to establish new state-of-the-art on four major benchmarks including TuSimple, CULane, CurveLanes and LLAMAS.
abstract_zh: 车道检测是许多现实世界自主系统的重要组成部分。尽管已经提出了各种各样的车道检测方法，并随着时间的推移报告了基准的稳定改进，但车道检测仍然是一个很大程度上未解决的问题。这是因为大多数现有的车道检测方法要么将车道检测视为密集预测或检测任务，但很少考虑车道标记的独特拓扑（Y形、叉形、近水平车道），从而导致次优解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于中继链预测的车道检测新方法。具体来说，我们的模型预测分割图来对前景和背景区域进行分类。对于前景区域中的每个像素点，我们通过前向分支和后向分支来恢复整个车道。每个分支对传输图和距离图进行解码，以产生移动到下一个点的方向，以及逐步预测中继站（下一个点）的步骤。因此，我们的模型能够捕获车道上的关键点。尽管很简单，但我们的策略使我们能够在 TuSimple、CULane、CurveLanes 和 LLAMAS 等四个主要基准上建立新的最先进水平。

AI.tldr: 提出RCLane方法，通过接力链预测进行车道检测，解决现有方法未能考虑车道标记独特拓扑结构的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有车道检测方法多将任务视为密集预测或检测，忽视车道标记的Y形、分叉形等独特拓扑结构，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 模型预测分割图区分前景与背景，通过前向与后向分支生成转移图和距离图，逐步预测接力站位置以捕捉车道关键点。
AI.result: 在TuSimple、CULane、CurveLanes和LLAMAS四个基准数据集上均取得新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简单有效的接力链预测机制，成功捕捉车道拓扑特征，在多个基准上验证了其优越性。

authors_text: Xin Lyu
title: Composition Theorems for Interactive Differential Privacy
title_zh: 交互式差分隐私的组合定理
comment: To appear in NeurIPS 2022; Revised according to reviewers' feedback; Mentioned a concurrent and independent work
comments: To appear in NeurIPS 2022; Revised according to reviewers' feedback; Mentioned a concurrent and independent work
abstract: An interactive mechanism is an algorithm that stores a data set and answers adaptively chosen queries to it. The mechanism is called differentially private, if any adversary cannot distinguish whether a specific individual is in the data set by interacting with the mechanism. We study composition properties of differential privacy in concurrent compositions. In this setting, an adversary interacts with k interactive mechanisms in parallel and can interleave its queries to the mechanisms arbitrarily. Previously, Vadhan and Wang [2021] proved an optimal concurrent composition theorem for pure-differential privacy. We significantly generalize and extend their results. Namely, we prove optimal parallel composition properties for several major notions of differential privacy in the literature, including approximate DP, Rényi DP, and zero-concentrated DP. Our results demonstrate that the adversary gains no advantage by interleaving its queries to independently running mechanisms. Hence, interactivity is a feature that differential privacy grants us for free. Concurrently and independently of our work, Vadhan and Zhang [2022] proved an optimal concurrent composition theorem for f-DP [Dong et al., 2022], which implies our result for the approximate DP case.
summary: An interactive mechanism is an algorithm that stores a data set and answers adaptively chosen queries to it. The mechanism is called differentially private, if any adversary cannot distinguish whether a specific individual is in the data set by interacting with the mechanism. We study composition properties of differential privacy in concurrent compositions. In this setting, an adversary interacts with k interactive mechanisms in parallel and can interleave its queries to the mechanisms arbitrarily. Previously, Vadhan and Wang [2021] proved an optimal concurrent composition theorem for pure-differential privacy. We significantly generalize and extend their results. Namely, we prove optimal parallel composition properties for several major notions of differential privacy in the literature, including approximate DP, Rényi DP, and zero-concentrated DP. Our results demonstrate that the adversary gains no advantage by interleaving its queries to independently running mechanisms. Hence, interactivity is a feature that differential privacy grants us for free. Concurrently and independently of our work, Vadhan and Zhang [2022] proved an optimal concurrent composition theorem for f-DP [Dong et al., 2022], which implies our result for the approximate DP case.
abstract_zh: 交互机制是一种存储数据集并回答自适应选择的查询的算法。如果任何对手无法通过与该机制交互来区分特定个体是否在数据集中，则该机制被称为差分隐私。我们研究并发组合中差异隐私的组合属性。在此设置中，对手与 k 个交互机制并行交互，并且可以任意地将其查询交错到这些机制。此前，Vadhan 和 Wang [2021] 证明了纯差分隐私的最优并发组合定理。我们显着概括并扩展了他们的结果。也就是说，我们证明了文献中差分隐私的几个主要概念的最佳并行组合属性，包括近似 DP、Rényi DP 和零集中 DP。我们的结果表明，对手通过将其查询交错到独立运行的机制并没有获得任何优势。因此，交互性是差异隐私免费赋予我们的一项功能。同时且独立于我们的工作，Vadhan 和Zhang [2022] 证明了 f-DP 的最优并发组合定理 [Dong et al., 2022]，这意味着我们对近似 DP 情况的结果。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了交互式差分隐私在并发组合下的性质，证明了多种差分隐私定义的最优并行组合定理。
AI.motivation: 差分隐私机制在应对自适应查询时需保证安全性，但并发环境下多个机制并行运行可能影响隐私保证，需明确其组合性质。
AI.method: 通过数学分析和对现有结果的推广，作者将纯差分隐私的并发组合定理扩展到近似DP、Rényi DP和零集中DP等主要定义，并利用数学归纳法和信息论工具证明。
AI.result: 证明了在并发设置下，攻击者无法通过交错查询多个独立机制获得额外优势，所有主要差分隐私定义均满足最优并行组合性质。
AI.conclusion: 交互性不会削弱差分隐私的保证，且并发组合下的隐私损失可精确量化，为实际应用提供了理论支持。
