Our results demonstrate that the adversary gains no advantage by interleaving its queries to independently running mechanisms. Hence, interactivity is a feature that differential privacy grants us for free. Concurrently and independently of our work, Vadhan and Zhang [2022] proved an optimal concurrent composition theorem for f-DP [Dong et al., 2022], which implies our result for the approximate DP case. 交互机制是一种存储数据集并回答自适应选择的查询的算法。如果任何对手无法通过与该机制交互来区分特定个体是否在数据集中，则该机制被称为差分隐私。我们研究并发组合中差异隐私的组合属性。在此设置中，对手与 k 个交互机制并行交互，并且可以任意地将其查询交错到这些机制。此前，Vadhan 和 Wang [2021] 证明了纯差分隐私的最优并发组合定理。我们显着概括并扩展了他们的结果。也就是说，我们证明了文献中差分隐私的几个主要概念的最佳并行组合属性，包括近似 DP、Rényi DP 和零集中 DP。我们的结果表明，对手通过将其查询交错到独立运行的机制并没有获得任何优势。因此，交互性是差异隐私免费赋予我们的一项功能。同时且独立于我们的工作，Vadhan 和Zhang [2022] 证明了 f-DP 的最优并发组合定理 [Dong et al., 2022]，这意味着我们对近似 DP 情况的结果。 该论文研究了交互式差分隐私在并发组合下的性质，证明了多种差分隐私定义的最优并行组合定理。 Xin Lyu cs.CR,cs.DS,cs.IT

authors_text: Reid McIlroy-Young,Jon Kleinberg,Siddhartha Sen,Solon Barocas,Ashton Anderson
title: Mimetic Models: Ethical Implications of AI that Acts Like You
title_zh: 模仿模型：像你一样行事的人工智能的伦理意义
comment: In Proceedings of the 2022 AAAI/ACM Conference on AI, Ethics, and Society (AIES'22), August 1-3, 2022, Oxford, United Kingdom
comments: In Proceedings of the 2022 AAAI/ACM Conference on AI, Ethics, and Society (AIES'22), August 1-3, 2022, Oxford, United Kingdom
abstract: An emerging theme in artificial intelligence research is the creation of models to simulate the decisions and behavior of specific people, in domains including game-playing, text generation, and artistic expression. These models go beyond earlier approaches in the way they are tailored to individuals, and the way they are designed for interaction rather than simply the reproduction of fixed, pre-computed behaviors. We refer to these as mimetic models, and in this paper we develop a framework for characterizing the ethical and social issues raised by their growing availability. Our framework includes a number of distinct scenarios for the use of such models, and considers the impacts on a range of different participants, including the target being modeled, the operator who deploys the model, and the entities that interact with it.
summary: An emerging theme in artificial intelligence research is the creation of models to simulate the decisions and behavior of specific people, in domains including game-playing, text generation, and artistic expression. These models go beyond earlier approaches in the way they are tailored to individuals, and the way they are designed for interaction rather than simply the reproduction of fixed, pre-computed behaviors. We refer to these as mimetic models, and in this paper we develop a framework for characterizing the ethical and social issues raised by their growing availability. Our framework includes a number of distinct scenarios for the use of such models, and considers the impacts on a range of different participants, including the target being modeled, the operator who deploys the model, and the entities that interact with it.
abstract_zh: 人工智能研究的一个新兴主题是创建模型来模拟特定人的决策和行为，领域包括游戏、文本生成和艺术表达。这些模型超越了早期的方法，因为它们是为个人量身定制的，并且它们是为交互而设计的，而不是简单地复制固定的、预先计算的行为。我们将这些称为模仿模型，在本文中，我们开发了一个框架来描述其日益增长的可用性所引发的伦理和社会问题。我们的框架包括使用此类模型的许多不同场景，并考虑了对一系列不同参与者的影响，包括正在建模的目标、部署模型的操作员以及与其交互的实体。

AI.tldr: 构建一个框架以分析模仿模型的伦理和社会影响
AI.motivation: 随着模仿模型在多个领域的应用增加，其伦理和社会影响需要被系统分析
AI.method: 通过构建包含多种使用场景和参与者影响的分析框架
AI.result: 识别出不同情境下的伦理问题，并分析其对各方参与者的影响
AI.conclusion: 需建立规范和指导原则以确保模仿模型的负责任开发与应用

authors_text: Xiaoyu Chen,Xinyuan Zhang
title: A Near-Linear Time Sampler for the Ising Model with External Field
title_zh: 外场伊辛模型的近线性时间采样器
abstract: We give a near-linear time sampler for the Gibbs distribution of the ferromagnetic Ising models with edge activities $\boldsymbolβ > 1$ and external fields $\boldsymbolλ<1$ (or symmetrically, $\boldsymbolλ>1$) on general graphs with bounded or unbounded maximum degree. Our algorithm is based on the field dynamics given in [CFYZ21]. We prove the correctness and efficiency of our algorithm by establishing spectral independence of distribution of the random cluster model and the rapid mixing of Glauber dynamics on the random cluster model in a low-temperature regime, which may be of independent interest.
summary: We give a near-linear time sampler for the Gibbs distribution of the ferromagnetic Ising models with edge activities $\boldsymbolβ > 1$ and external fields $\boldsymbolλ<1$ (or symmetrically, $\boldsymbolλ>1$) on general graphs with bounded or unbounded maximum degree. Our algorithm is based on the field dynamics given in [CFYZ21]. We prove the correctness and efficiency of our algorithm by establishing spectral independence of distribution of the random cluster model and the rapid mixing of Glauber dynamics on the random cluster model in a low-temperature regime, which may be of independent interest.
abstract_zh: 我们为铁磁 Ising 模型的吉布斯分布提供了一个近线性时间采样器，在具有有界或无界最大度的一般图上，边缘活动 $\boldsymbolβ > 1$ 和外部场 $\boldsymbolλ<1$ （或对称地 $\boldsymbolλ>1$）。我们的算法基于[CFYZ21]中给出的场动力学。我们通过建立随机簇模型分布的谱独立性以及低温状态下随机簇模型上的格劳伯动力学的快速混合来证明我们算法的正确性和效率，这可能是独立的兴趣。

AI.tldr: 开发一种近线性时间的采样器，用于铁磁伊辛模型在外部场下的吉布斯分布。
AI.motivation: 伊辛模型在统计物理和计算领域有广泛应用，但现有采样方法在处理外部场和复杂图结构时效率不足，需更高效的算法。
AI.method: 基于场动力学，结合随机簇模型的谱独立性分析和Glauber动力学的快速混合性质，设计高效采样算法。
AI.result: 提出近线性时间采样器，证明其正确性及效率，结果可能对随机簇模型和其他相关领域有独立价值。
AI.conclusion: 本研究在理论和应用层面推进了伊辛模型采样技术，为相关领域提供了新工具，未来可探索更广泛条件下的算法扩展。

authors_text: Zhenrong Shen,Xi Ouyang,Bin Xiao,Jie-Zhi Cheng,Qian Wang,Dinggang Shen
title: Image Synthesis with Disentangled Attributes for Chest X-Ray Nodule Augmentation and Detection
title_zh: 用于胸部 X 射线结节增强和检测的具有解缠结属性的图像合成
abstract: Lung nodule detection in chest X-ray (CXR) images is common to early screening of lung cancers. Deep-learning-based Computer-Assisted Diagnosis (CAD) systems can support radiologists for nodule screening in CXR. However, it requires large-scale and diverse medical data with high-quality annotations to train such robust and accurate CADs. To alleviate the limited availability of such datasets, lung nodule synthesis methods are proposed for the sake of data augmentation. Nevertheless, previous methods lack the ability to generate nodules that are realistic with the size attribute desired by the detector. To address this issue, we introduce a novel lung nodule synthesis framework in this paper, which decomposes nodule attributes into three main aspects including shape, size, and texture, respectively. A GAN-based Shape Generator firstly models nodule shapes by generating diverse shape masks. The following Size Modulation then enables quantitative control on the diameters of the generated nodule shapes in pixel-level granularity. A coarse-to-fine gated convolutional Texture Generator finally synthesizes visually plausible nodule textures conditioned on the modulated shape masks. Moreover, we propose to synthesize nodule CXR images by controlling the disentangled nodule attributes for data augmentation, in order to better compensate for the nodules that are easily missed in the detection task. Our experiments demonstrate the enhanced image quality, diversity, and controllability of the proposed lung nodule synthesis framework. We also validate the effectiveness of our data augmentation on greatly improving nodule detection performance.
summary: Lung nodule detection in chest X-ray (CXR) images is common to early screening of lung cancers. Deep-learning-based Computer-Assisted Diagnosis (CAD) systems can support radiologists for nodule screening in CXR. However, it requires large-scale and diverse medical data with high-quality annotations to train such robust and accurate CADs. To alleviate the limited availability of such datasets, lung nodule synthesis methods are proposed for the sake of data augmentation. Nevertheless, previous methods lack the ability to generate nodules that are realistic with the size attribute desired by the detector. To address this issue, we introduce a novel lung nodule synthesis framework in this paper, which decomposes nodule attributes into three main aspects including shape, size, and texture, respectively. A GAN-based Shape Generator firstly models nodule shapes by generating diverse shape masks. The following Size Modulation then enables quantitative control on the diameters of the generated nodule shapes in pixel-level granularity. A coarse-to-fine gated convolutional Texture Generator finally synthesizes visually plausible nodule textures conditioned on the modulated shape masks. Moreover, we propose to synthesize nodule CXR images by controlling the disentangled nodule attributes for data augmentation, in order to better compensate for the nodules that are easily missed in the detection task. Our experiments demonstrate the enhanced image quality, diversity, and controllability of the proposed lung nodule synthesis framework. We also validate the effectiveness of our data augmentation on greatly improving nodule detection performance.
abstract_zh: 胸部 X 光 (CXR) 图像中的肺结节检测对于肺癌的早期筛查很常见。基于深度学习的计算机辅助诊断 (CAD) 系统可以支持放射科医生在 CXR 中进行结节筛查。然而，它需要大规模、多样化的医学数据和高质量的注释来训练如此强大和准确的 CAD。为了缓解此类数据集的有限可用性，提出了肺结节合成方法以增强数据。然而，以前的方法缺乏生成具有探测器所需尺寸属性的真实结节的能力。为了解决这个问题，我们在本文中引入了一种新颖的肺结节合成框架，它将结节属性分别分解为三个主要方面，包括形状、大小和纹理。基于 GAN 的形状生成器首先通过生成不同的形状掩模来对结节形状进行建模。然后，以下尺寸调制能够以像素级粒度对生成的结节形状的直径进行定量控制。从粗到细的门控卷积纹理生成器最终合成以调制形状掩模为条件的视觉上合理的结节纹理。此外，我们建议通过控制解开的结节属性进行数据增强来合成结节CXR图像，以更好地补偿检测任务中容易遗漏的结节。我们的实验证明了所提出的肺结节合成框架的增强的图像质量、多样性和可控性。我们还验证了数据增强对于极大提高结节检测性能的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于解耦属性的肺结节合成框架，用于增强胸部X光图像中的结节检测。
AI.motivation: 现有肺结节检测方法因数据集规模有限且难以生成符合检测需求的结节图像，导致检测性能受限。
AI.method: 通过解耦结节形状、尺寸和纹理属性，采用GAN生成形状掩膜，像素级调节尺寸，分层卷积网络生成纹理，并利用合成图像进行数据增强。
AI.result: 实验表明合成图像具有更高的质量、多样性和可控性，数据增强显著提升了结节检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能有效生成符合检测需求的肺结节图像，为数据增强和检测优化提供了新方法。

A GAN-based Shape Generator firstly models nodule shapes by generating diverse shape masks. The following Size Modulation then enables quantitative control on the diameters of the generated nodule shapes in pixel-level granularity. A coarse-to-fine gated convolutional Texture Generator finally synthesizes visually plausible nodule textures conditioned on the modulated shape masks. Moreover, we propose to synthesize nodule CXR images by controlling the disentangled nodule attributes for data augmentation, in order to better compensate for the nodules that are easily missed in the detection task. Our experiments demonstrate the enhanced image quality, diversity, and controllability of the proposed lung nodule synthesis framework. We also validate the effectiveness of our data augmentation on greatly improving nodule detection performance. 胸部 X 光 (CXR) 图像中的肺结节检测对于肺癌的早期筛查很常见。基于深度学习的计算机辅助诊断 (CAD) 系统可以支持放射科医生在 CXR 中进行结节筛查。然而，它需要大规模、多样化的医学数据和高质量的注释来训练如此强大和准确的 CAD。为了缓解此类数据集的有限可用性，提出了肺结节合成方法以增强数据。然而，以前的方法缺乏生成具有探测器所需尺寸属性的真实结节的能力。为了解决这个问题，我们在本文中引入了一种新颖的肺结节合成框架，它将结节属性分别分解为三个主要方面，包括形状、大小和纹理。基于 GAN 的形状生成器首先通过生成不同的形状掩模来对结节形状进行建模。然后，以下尺寸调制能够以像素级粒度对生成的结节形状的直径进行定量控制。从粗到细的门控卷积纹理生成器最终合成以调制形状掩模为条件的视觉上合理的结节纹理。此外，我们建议通过控制解开的结节属性进行数据增强来合成结节CXR图像，以更好地补偿检测任务中容易遗漏的结节。我们的实验证明了所提出的肺结节合成框架的增强的图像质量、多样性和可控性。我们还验证了数据增强对于极大提高结节检测性能的有效性。 本文提出一种基于解耦属性的肺结节合成框架，用于增强胸部X光图像中的结节检测。 Zhenrong Shen,Xi Ouyang,Bin Xiao,Jie-Zhi Cheng,Qian Wang,Dinggang Shen eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Silvan Mertes,Christina Karle,Tobias Huber,Katharina Weitz,Ruben Schlagowski,Elisabeth André
title: Alterfactual Explanations -- The Relevance of Irrelevance for Explaining AI Systems
title_zh: 非事实解释——解释人工智能系统的不相关性的相关性
comment: Accepted at IJCAI 2022 Workshop on XAI
comments: Accepted at IJCAI 2022 Workshop on XAI
abstract: Explanation mechanisms from the field of Counterfactual Thinking are a widely-used paradigm for Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI), as they follow a natural way of reasoning that humans are familiar with. However, all common approaches from this field are based on communicating information about features or characteristics that are especially important for an AI's decision. We argue that in order to fully understand a decision, not only knowledge about relevant features is needed, but that the awareness of irrelevant information also highly contributes to the creation of a user's mental model of an AI system. Therefore, we introduce a new way of explaining AI systems. Our approach, which we call Alterfactual Explanations, is based on showing an alternative reality where irrelevant features of an AI's input are altered. By doing so, the user directly sees which characteristics of the input data can change arbitrarily without influencing the AI's decision. We evaluate our approach in an extensive user study, revealing that it is able to significantly contribute to the participants' understanding of an AI. We show that alterfactual explanations are suited to convey an understanding of different aspects of the AI's reasoning than established counterfactual explanation methods.
summary: Explanation mechanisms from the field of Counterfactual Thinking are a widely-used paradigm for Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI), as they follow a natural way of reasoning that humans are familiar with. However, all common approaches from this field are based on communicating information about features or characteristics that are especially important for an AI's decision. We argue that in order to fully understand a decision, not only knowledge about relevant features is needed, but that the awareness of irrelevant information also highly contributes to the creation of a user's mental model of an AI system. Therefore, we introduce a new way of explaining AI systems. Our approach, which we call Alterfactual Explanations, is based on showing an alternative reality where irrelevant features of an AI's input are altered. By doing so, the user directly sees which characteristics of the input data can change arbitrarily without influencing the AI's decision. We evaluate our approach in an extensive user study, revealing that it is able to significantly contribute to the participants' understanding of an AI. We show that alterfactual explanations are suited to convey an understanding of different aspects of the AI's reasoning than established counterfactual explanation methods.
abstract_zh: 反事实思维领域的解释机制是可解释人工智能（XAI）广泛使用的范例，因为它们遵循人类熟悉的自然推理方式。然而，该领域的所有常见方法都是基于传达对人工智能决策特别重要的特征或特性的信息。我们认为，为了充分理解决策，不仅需要有关相关特征的知识，而且对不相关信息的认识也有助于创建人工智能系统的用户心理模型。因此，我们引入了一种解释人工智能系统的新方法。我们的方法被称为“替代事实解释”，它基于展示另一种现实，其中人工智能输入的不相关特征被改变。通过这样做，用户可以直接看到输入数据的哪些特征可以任意改变，而不会影响人工智能的决策。我们在广泛的用户研究中评估了我们的方法，表明它能够极大地促进参与者对人工智能的理解。我们表明，与既定的反事实解释方法相比，异事实解释更适合传达对人工智能推理不同方面的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的解释人工智能系统的方法，称为'Alterfactual Explanations'，通过展示无关特征变化对AI决策无影响的替代现实，以帮助用户理解AI系统的决策过程。
AI.motivation: 现有的反事实解释方法主要关注于重要特征，但忽略了无关信息对用户理解AI系统决策的影响。本文认为，了解无关信息同样有助于构建用户的AI系统心理模型。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的解释方法，即'Alterfactual Explanations'，通过改变输入数据中的无关特征，展示这些变化不会影响AI决策的替代现实。
AI.result: 通过广泛的用户研究，结果表明这种方法能够显著提高用户对AI系统的理解，并且能够传达与现有反事实解释方法不同的AI推理方面。
AI.conclusion: Alterfactual Explanations方法为解释AI系统提供了一种新的视角，有助于用户更全面地理解AI的决策过程，补充了现有反事实解释方法的不足。

authors_text: Tenggan Zhang,Chuanhe Liu,Xiaolong Liu,Yuchen Liu,Liyu Meng,Lei Sun,Wenqiang Jiang,Fengyuan Zhang,Jinming Zhao,Qin Jin
title: Multi-Task Learning Framework for Emotion Recognition in-the-wild
title_zh: 野外情绪识别的多任务学习框架
abstract: This paper presents our system for the Multi-Task Learning (MTL) Challenge in the 4th Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) competition. We explore the research problems of this challenge from three aspects: 1) For obtaining efficient and robust visual feature representations, we propose MAE-based unsupervised representation learning and IResNet/DenseNet-based supervised representation learning methods; 2) Considering the importance of temporal information in videos, we explore three types of sequential encoders to capture the temporal information, including the encoder based on transformer, the encoder based on LSTM, and the encoder based on GRU; 3) For modeling the correlation between these different tasks (i.e., valence, arousal, expression, and AU) for multi-task affective analysis, we first explore the dependency between these different tasks and propose three multi-task learning frameworks to model the correlations effectively. Our system achieves the performance of $1.7607$ on the validation dataset and $1.4361$ on the test dataset, ranking first in the MTL Challenge. The code is available at https://github.com/AIM3-RUC/ABAW4.
summary: This paper presents our system for the Multi-Task Learning (MTL) Challenge in the 4th Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) competition. We explore the research problems of this challenge from three aspects: 1) For obtaining efficient and robust visual feature representations, we propose MAE-based unsupervised representation learning and IResNet/DenseNet-based supervised representation learning methods; 2) Considering the importance of temporal information in videos, we explore three types of sequential encoders to capture the temporal information, including the encoder based on transformer, the encoder based on LSTM, and the encoder based on GRU; 3) For modeling the correlation between these different tasks (i.e., valence, arousal, expression, and AU) for multi-task affective analysis, we first explore the dependency between these different tasks and propose three multi-task learning frameworks to model the correlations effectively. Our system achieves the performance of $1.7607$ on the validation dataset and $1.4361$ on the test dataset, ranking first in the MTL Challenge. The code is available at https://github.com/AIM3-RUC/ABAW4.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们在第四届野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 竞赛中的多任务学习 (MTL) 挑战赛的系统。我们从三个方面探讨了这一挑战的研究问题：1）为了获得高效且鲁棒的视觉特征表示，我们提出了基于MAE的无监督表示学习和基于IResNet/DenseNet的有监督表示学习方法； 2）考虑到视频中时间信息的重要性，我们探索了三种类型的顺序编码器来捕获时间信息，包括基于Transformer的编码器、基于LSTM的编码器和基于GRU的编码器； 3）为了对这些不同任务（即效价、唤醒、表达和AU）之间的相关性进行建模以进行多任务情感分析，我们首先探索这些不同任务之间的依赖性，并提出三个多任务学习框架来有效地建模相关性。我们的系统在验证数据集上实现了 1.7607 美元的性能，在测试数据集上实现了 1.4361 美元的性能，在 MTL 挑战赛中排名第一。该代码可从 https://github.com/AIM3-RUC/ABAW4 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务学习框架，用于在真实场景视频中进行情绪识别，通过结合无监督和监督特征学习、时序编码器以及任务间关联建模，解决多任务情感分析问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在情绪识别任务中难以有效融合多任务间关联及视频时序信息，导致模型鲁棒性和泛化能力不足，需探索更高效的多任务学习策略。
AI.method: 提出基于MAE的无监督特征学习与IResNet/DenseNet的监督学习方法；采用Transformer/LSTM/GRU三种时序编码器捕捉视频动态信息；设计三种多任务框架建模情绪价值、唤醒度、表情和动作单元间的依赖关系。
AI.result: 在ABAW4竞赛验证集和测试集分别取得1.7607和1.4361的性能指标，多任务挑战赛排名第一，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合多模态特征学习、时序建模与任务关联分析，所提框架显著提升了真实场景下情绪识别的准确性，为多任务情感计算提供了有效解决方案。

We explore the research problems of this challenge from three aspects: 1) For obtaining efficient and robust visual feature representations, we propose MAE-based unsupervised representation learning and IResNet/DenseNet-based supervised representation learning methods; 2) Considering the importance of temporal information in videos, we explore three types of sequential encoders to capture the temporal information, including the encoder based on transformer, the encoder based on LSTM, and the encoder based on GRU; 3) For modeling the correlation between these different tasks (i.e., valence, arousal, expression, and AU) for multi-task affective analysis, we first explore the dependency between these different tasks and propose three multi-task learning frameworks to model the correlations effectively. Our system achieves the performance of $1.7607$ on the validation dataset and $1.4361$ on the test dataset, ranking first in the MTL Challenge. The code is available at https://github.com/AIM3-RUC/ABAW4. 本文介绍了我们在第四届野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 竞赛中的多任务学习 (MTL) 挑战赛的系统。我们从三个方面探讨了这一挑战的研究问题：1）为了获得高效且鲁棒的视觉特征表示，我们提出了基于MAE的无监督表示学习和基于IResNet/DenseNet的有监督表示学习方法； 2）考虑到视频中时间信息的重要性，我们探索了三种类型的顺序编码器来捕获时间信息，包括基于Transformer的编码器、基于LSTM的编码器和基于GRU的编码器； 3）为了对这些不同任务（即效价、唤醒、表达和AU）之间的相关性进行建模以进行多任务情感分析，我们首先探索这些不同任务之间的依赖性，并提出三个多任务学习框架来有效地建模相关性。我们的系统在验证数据集上实现了 1.7607 美元的性能，在测试数据集上实现了 1.4361 美元的性能，在 MTL 挑战赛中排名第一。该代码可从 https://github.com/AIM3-RUC/ABAW4 获取。 本文提出一种多任务学习框架，用于在真实场景视频中进行情绪识别，通过结合无监督和监督特征学习、时序编码器以及任务间关联建模，解决多任务情感分析问题。 Tenggan Zhang,Chuanhe Liu,Xiaolong Liu,Yuchen Liu,Liyu Meng,Lei Sun,Wenqiang Jiang,Fengyuan Zhang,Jinming Zhao,Qin Jin cs.CV

authors_text: Jayprakash S. Nair,Divya D. Kulkarni,Ajitem Joshi,Sruthy Suresh
title: On Decentralizing Federated Reinforcement Learning in Multi-Robot Scenarios
title_zh: 多机器人场景下的去中心化联合强化学习
comment: Submitted to SEEDA 2022. This arxiv is a preprint and NOT the final version
comments: Submitted to SEEDA 2022. This arxiv is a preprint and NOT the final version
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) allows for collaboratively aggregating learned information across several computing devices and sharing the same amongst them, thereby tackling issues of privacy and the need of huge bandwidth. FL techniques generally use a central server or cloud for aggregating the models received from the devices. Such centralized FL techniques suffer from inherent problems such as failure of the central node and bottlenecks in channel bandwidth. When FL is used in conjunction with connected robots serving as devices, a failure of the central controlling entity can lead to a chaotic situation. This paper describes a mobile agent based paradigm to decentralize FL in multi-robot scenarios. Using Webots, a popular free open-source robot simulator, and Tartarus, a mobile agent platform, we present a methodology to decentralize federated learning in a set of connected robots. With Webots running on different connected computing systems, we show how mobile agents can perform the task of Decentralized Federated Reinforcement Learning (dFRL). Results obtained from experiments carried out using Q-learning and SARSA by aggregating their corresponding Q-tables, show the viability of using decentralized FL in the domain of robotics. Since the proposed work can be used in conjunction with other learning algorithms and also real robots, it can act as a vital tool for the study of decentralized FL using heterogeneous learning algorithms concurrently in multi-robot scenarios.

Since the proposed work can be used in conjunction with other learning algorithms and also real robots, it can act as a vital tool for the study of decentralized FL using heterogeneous learning algorithms concurrently in multi-robot scenarios.
abstract_zh: 联合学习（FL）允许跨多个计算设备协作聚合学习信息并在它们之间共享相同的信息，从而解决隐私问题和巨大带宽的需求。 FL 技术通常使用中央服务器或云来聚合从设备接收到的模型。这种集中式FL技术存在诸如中心节点故障和信道带宽瓶颈等固有问题。当FL与作为设备的联网机器人结合使用时，中央控制实体的故障可能会导致混乱的情况。本文描述了一种基于移动代理的范例，用于在多机器人场景中分散 FL。使用流行的免费开源机器人模拟器 Webots 和移动代理平台 Tartarus，我们提出了一种在一组互联机器人中分散联邦学习的方法。通过在不同的连接计算系统上运行的 Webbot，我们展示了移动代理如何执行去中心化联合强化学习 (dFRL) 的任务。使用 Q 学习和 SARSA 通过聚合相应的 Q 表进行的实验获得的结果显示了在机器人领域使用分散式 FL 的可行性。由于所提出的工作可以与其他学习算法以及真实机器人结合使用，因此它可以作为在多机器人场景中同时使用异构学习算法来研究去中心化 FL 的重要工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于移动代理的去中心化联邦强化学习框架，用于多机器人场景，以解决传统集中式联邦学习中的单点故障和带宽瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习依赖中心服务器，存在单点故障风险和通信带宽瓶颈，尤其在多机器人协作场景中可能导致系统崩溃，需探索去中心化解决方案。
AI.method: 结合Webots机器人模拟器和Tartarus移动代理平台，设计移动代理执行去中心化联邦强化学习（dFRL），通过Q-learning和SARSA算法聚合Q表验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于移动代理的dFRL方法在多机器人场景中可行，能够有效实现去中心化模型聚合，且可扩展至其他学习算法和实际机器人系统。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多机器人场景下的异构算法协同学习提供了关键工具，展示了去中心化联邦学习在机器人领域的应用潜力和鲁棒性优势。

authors_text: Xudong Mao,Liujuan Cao,Aurele T. Gnanha,Zhenguo Yang,Qing Li,Rongrong Ji
title: Cycle Encoding of a StyleGAN Encoder for Improved Reconstruction and Editability
title_zh: StyleGAN 编码器的循环编码以改进重建和可编辑性
abstract: GAN inversion aims to invert an input image into the latent space of a pre-trained GAN. Despite the recent advances in GAN inversion, there remain challenges to mitigate the tradeoff between distortion and editability, i.e. reconstructing the input image accurately and editing the inverted image with a small visual quality drop. The recently proposed pivotal tuning model makes significant progress towards reconstruction and editability, by using a two-step approach that first inverts the input image into a latent code, called pivot code, and then alters the generator so that the input image can be accurately mapped into the pivot code. Here, we show that both reconstruction and editability can be improved by a proper design of the pivot code. We present a simple yet effective method, named cycle encoding, for a high-quality pivot code. The key idea of our method is to progressively train an encoder in varying spaces according to a cycle scheme: W->W+->W. This training methodology preserves the properties of both W and W+ spaces, i.e. high editability of W and low distortion of W+. To further decrease the distortion, we also propose to refine the pivot code with an optimization-based method, where a regularization term is introduced to reduce the degradation in editability. Qualitative and quantitative comparisons to several state-of-the-art methods demonstrate the superiority of our approach.
summary: GAN inversion aims to invert an input image into the latent space of a pre-trained GAN. Despite the recent advances in GAN inversion, there remain challenges to mitigate the tradeoff between distortion and editability, i.e. reconstructing the input image accurately and editing the inverted image with a small visual quality drop. The recently proposed pivotal tuning model makes significant progress towards reconstruction and editability, by using a two-step approach that first inverts the input image into a latent code, called pivot code, and then alters the generator so that the input image can be accurately mapped into the pivot code. Here, we show that both reconstruction and editability can be improved by a proper design of the pivot code. We present a simple yet effective method, named cycle encoding, for a high-quality pivot code. The key idea of our method is to progressively train an encoder in varying spaces according to a cycle scheme: W->W+->W. This training methodology preserves the properties of both W and W+ spaces, i.e. high editability of W and low distortion of W+. To further decrease the distortion, we also propose to refine the pivot code with an optimization-based method, where a regularization term is introduced to reduce the degradation in editability. Qualitative and quantitative comparisons to several state-of-the-art methods demonstrate the superiority of our approach.
abstract_zh: GAN 反转旨在将输入图像反转到预训练 GAN 的潜在空间中。尽管 GAN 反转最近取得了进展，但在减轻失真和可编辑性之间的权衡方面仍然存在挑战，即准确地重建输入图像并在视觉质量略有下降的情况下编辑反转图像。最近提出的枢轴调整模型在重建和可编辑性方面取得了重大进展，通过使用两步方法，首先将输入图像反转为潜在代码，称为枢轴代码，然后更改生成器，以便输入图像可以准确地映射到枢轴代码。在这里，我们表明可以通过正确设计枢轴代码来提高重构和可编辑性。我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，称为循环编码，用于高质量的主元代码。我们方法的关键思想是根据循环方案在不同的空间中逐步训练编码器：W->W+->W。这种训练方法保留了 W 和 W+ 空间的属性，即 W 的高可编辑性和 W+ 的低失真度。为了进一步减少失真，我们还建议使用基于优化的方法来细化主元代码，其中引入正则化项来减少可编辑性的下降。与几种最先进方法的定性和定量比较证明了我们方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为cycle encoding的方法，通过优化StyleGAN编码器的pivot code设计，提升生成对抗网络（GAN）反转任务中图像重建与可编辑性的平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN反转方法难以兼顾图像重建精度与编辑后的视觉质量，需解决重建误差与可编辑性之间的矛盾。
AI.method: 采用循环训练策略（W→W+→W）逐步训练编码器，结合优化算法与正则化项精炼pivot code，保留W空间的高可编辑性与W+空间的低失真特性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在定性与定量评估中均优于现有先进方法，显著提升了重建质量与编辑效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过合理设计pivot code，cycle encoding方法有效解决了GAN反转中的重建与可编辑性矛盾，为后续研究提供了新思路。

To further decrease the distortion, we also propose to refine the pivot code with an optimization-based method, where a regularization term is introduced to reduce the degradation in editability. Qualitative and quantitative comparisons to several state-of-the-art methods demonstrate the superiority of our approach. GAN 反转旨在将输入图像反转到预训练 GAN 的潜在空间中。尽管 GAN 反转最近取得了进展，但在减轻失真和可编辑性之间的权衡方面仍然存在挑战，即准确地重建输入图像并在视觉质量略有下降的情况下编辑反转图像。最近提出的枢轴调整模型在重建和可编辑性方面取得了重大进展，通过使用两步方法，首先将输入图像反转为潜在代码，称为枢轴代码，然后更改生成器，以便输入图像可以准确地映射到枢轴代码。在这里，我们表明可以通过正确设计枢轴代码来提高重构和可编辑性。我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，称为循环编码，用于高质量的主元代码。我们方法的关键思想是根据循环方案在不同的空间中逐步训练编码器：W->W+->W。这种训练方法保留了 W 和 W+ 空间的属性，即 W 的高可编辑性和 W+ 的低失真度。为了进一步减少失真，我们还建议使用基于优化的方法来细化主元代码，其中引入正则化项来减少可编辑性的下降。与几种最先进方法的定性和定量比较证明了我们方法的优越性。 本文提出了一种名为cycle encoding的方法，通过优化StyleGAN编码器的pivot code设计，提升生成对抗网络（GAN）反转任务中图像重建与可编辑性的平衡。 Xudong Mao,Liujuan Cao,Aurele T. Gnanha,Zhenguo Yang,Qing Li,Rongrong Ji cs.CV

authors_text: Sepehr Assadi,Soheil Behnezhad,Sanjeev Khanna,Huan Li
title: On Regularity Lemma and Barriers in Streaming and Dynamic Matching
title_zh: 流媒体和动态匹配中的正则引理和障碍
abstract: We present a new approach for finding matchings in dense graphs by building on Szemerédi's celebrated Regularity Lemma. This allows us to obtain non-trivial albeit slight improvements over longstanding bounds for matchings in streaming and dynamic graphs. In particular, we establish the following results for $n$-vertex graphs: * A deterministic single-pass streaming algorithm that finds a $(1-o(1))$-approximate matching in $o(n^2)$ bits of space. This constitutes the first single-pass algorithm for this problem in sublinear space that improves over the $\frac{1}{2}$-approximation of the greedy algorithm. * A randomized fully dynamic algorithm that with high probability maintains a $(1-o(1))$-approximate matching in $o(n)$ worst-case update time per each edge insertion or deletion. The algorithm works even against an adaptive adversary. This is the first $o(n)$ update-time dynamic algorithm with approximation guarantee arbitrarily close to one. Given the use of regularity lemma, the improvement obtained by our algorithms over trivial bounds is only by some $(\log^*{n})^{Θ(1)}$ factor. Nevertheless, in each case, they show that the ``right'' answer to the problem is not what is dictated by the previous bounds. Finally, in the streaming model, we also present a randomized $(1-o(1))$-approximation algorithm whose space can be upper bounded by the density of certain Ruzsa-Szemerédi (RS) graphs. While RS graphs by now have been used extensively to prove streaming lower bounds, ours is the first to use them as an upper bound tool for designing improved streaming algorithms.

This allows us to obtain non-trivial albeit slight improvements over longstanding bounds for matchings in streaming and dynamic graphs. In particular, we establish the following results for $n$-vertex graphs: * A deterministic single-pass streaming algorithm that finds a $(1-o(1))$-approximate matching in $o(n^2)$ bits of space. This constitutes the first single-pass algorithm for this problem in sublinear space that improves over the $\frac{1}{2}$-approximation of the greedy algorithm. * A randomized fully dynamic algorithm that with high probability maintains a $(1-o(1))$-approximate matching in $o(n)$ worst-case update time per each edge insertion or deletion. The algorithm works even against an adaptive adversary. This is the first $o(n)$ update-time dynamic algorithm with approximation guarantee arbitrarily close to one. Given the use of regularity lemma, the improvement obtained by our algorithms over trivial bounds is only by some $(\log^*{n})^{Θ(1)}$ factor. Nevertheless, in each case, they show that the ``right'' answer to the problem is not what is dictated by the previous bounds. Finally, in the streaming model, we also present a randomized $(1-o(1))$-approximation algorithm whose space can be upper bounded by the density of certain Ruzsa-Szemerédi (RS) graphs. While RS graphs by now have been used extensively to prove streaming lower bounds, ours is the first to use them as an upper bound tool for designing improved streaming algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们基于 Szemerédi 著名的正则引理，提出了一种在密集图中查找匹配的新方法。这使我们能够在流图和动态图中的匹配的长期界限上获得不平凡的改进，尽管略有改进。特别是，我们为 $n$ 顶点图建立了以下结果： * 一种确定性单通道流算法，可在 $o(n^2)$ 位空间中找到 $(1-o(1))$ 近似匹配。这是次线性空间中针对该问题的第一个单遍算法，该算法改进了贪婪算法的 $\frac{1}{2}$ 近似。 * 一种随机的完全动态算法，在每次边缘插入或删除的最坏情况更新时间内以高概率维持 $(1-o(1))$ 近似匹配。该算法甚至可以对抗自适应对手。这是第一个 $o(n)$ 更新时间动态算法，其近似保证任意接近于 1。考虑到使用正则引理，我们的算法在微不足道的范围上获得的改进仅是通过一些 $(\log^*{n})^{θ(1)}$ 因子。然而，在每种情况下，它们都表明问题的“正确”答案并不是先前界限所规定的。最后，在流模型中，我们还提出了一种随机 $(1-o(1))$ 近似算法，其空间可以由某些 Ruzsa-Szemerédi (RS) 图的密度上限。虽然 RS 图现在已被广泛用于证明流下界，但我们的图是第一个将它们用作设计改进流算法的上限工具。

AI.tldr: 本文基于正则引理，提出改进流和动态图匹配算法的新方法，突破传统界限。
AI.motivation: 现有流和动态匹配算法在近似比和效率上存在局限，需寻找更优解决方案以突破理论瓶颈。
AI.method: 利用Szemerédi正则引理与Ruzsa-Szemerédi图，设计单次流算法与动态算法，结合随机化技术应对自适应对手。
AI.result: 提出首个亚线性空间单次流算法（(1-o(1))-近似）及o(n)动态更新时间算法，且首次将RS图作为上界工具优化流算法。
AI.conclusion: 虽改进幅度有限，但证明传统界非最优，为未来算法设计提供新方向与工具。

authors_text: Deniz Gunduz,Zhijin Qin,Inaki Estella Aguerri,Harpreet S. Dhillon,Zhaohui Yang,Aylin Yener,Kai Kit Wong,Chan-Byoung Chae
title: Beyond Transmitting Bits: Context, Semantics, and Task-Oriented Communications
title_zh: 超越传输位：上下文、语义和面向任务的通信
abstract: Communication systems to date primarily aim at reliably communicating bit sequences. Such an approach provides efficient engineering designs that are agnostic to the meanings of the messages or to the goal that the message exchange aims to achieve. Next generation systems, however, can be potentially enriched by folding message semantics and goals of communication into their design. Further, these systems can be made cognizant of the context in which communication exchange takes place, providing avenues for novel design insights. This tutorial summarizes the efforts to date, starting from its early adaptations, semantic-aware and task-oriented communications, covering the foundations, algorithms and potential implementations. The focus is on approaches that utilize information theory to provide the foundations, as well as the significant role of learning in semantics and task-aware communications.
summary: Communication systems to date primarily aim at reliably communicating bit sequences. Such an approach provides efficient engineering designs that are agnostic to the meanings of the messages or to the goal that the message exchange aims to achieve. Next generation systems, however, can be potentially enriched by folding message semantics and goals of communication into their design. Further, these systems can be made cognizant of the context in which communication exchange takes place, providing avenues for novel design insights. This tutorial summarizes the efforts to date, starting from its early adaptations, semantic-aware and task-oriented communications, covering the foundations, algorithms and potential implementations. The focus is on approaches that utilize information theory to provide the foundations, as well as the significant role of learning in semantics and task-aware communications.
abstract_zh: 迄今为止的通信系统主要旨在可靠地传送比特序列。这种方法提供了高效的工程设计，该设计与消息的含义或消息交换想要实现的目标无关。然而，通过将消息语义和通信目标融入到其设计中，下一代系统可能会得到丰富。此外，这些系统可以了解通信交换发生的环境，从而为新颖的设计见解提供途径。本教程总结了迄今为止的工作，从早期的适应、语义感知和面向任务的通信开始，涵盖基础、算法和潜在的实现。重点是利用信息论提供基础的方法，以及学习在语义和任务感知通信中的重要作用。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了下一代通信系统的设计方向，强调将语义、任务目标和上下文纳入通信系统框架，并探讨其理论基础与实现方法。
AI.motivation: 现有通信系统仅关注比特序列传输，忽视消息语义与通信目标，限制了系统效率与智能化水平，需通过融合语义信息和任务导向设计提升通信能力。
AI.method: 基于信息论构建理论框架，结合机器学习技术，研究语义感知与任务导向的通信算法，并分析其在实际系统中的潜在实现方式。
AI.result: 总结了语义通信与任务导向通信的最新进展，明确了信息论与学习方法的结合路径，为未来通信系统设计提供了理论支持与技术方向。
AI.conclusion: 下一代通信系统需突破传统比特传输范式，通过融合语义理解、任务目标与上下文感知，实现更高效、智能的通信架构。

authors_text: Xiaofei Huang,Michael Wan,Lingfei Luan,Bethany Tunik,Sarah Ostadabbas
title: Computer Vision to the Rescue: Infant Postural Symmetry Estimation from Incongruent Annotations
title_zh: 计算机视觉来救援：根据不一致的注释估计婴儿姿势对称性
abstract: Bilateral postural symmetry plays a key role as a potential risk marker for autism spectrum disorder (ASD) and as a symptom of congenital muscular torticollis (CMT) in infants, but current methods of assessing symmetry require laborious clinical expert assessments. In this paper, we develop a computer vision based infant symmetry assessment system, leveraging 3D human pose estimation for infants. Evaluation and calibration of our system against ground truth assessments is complicated by our findings from a survey of human ratings of angle and symmetry, that such ratings exhibit low inter-rater reliability. To rectify this, we develop a Bayesian estimator of the ground truth derived from a probabilistic graphical model of fallible human raters. We show that the 3D infant pose estimation model can achieve 68% area under the receiver operating characteristic curve performance in predicting the Bayesian aggregate labels, compared to only 61% from a 2D infant pose estimation model and 60% from a 3D adult pose estimation model, highlighting the importance of 3D poses and infant domain knowledge in assessing infant body symmetry. Our survey analysis also suggests that human ratings are susceptible to higher levels of bias and inconsistency, and hence our final 3D pose-based symmetry assessment system is calibrated but not directly supervised by Bayesian aggregate human ratings, yielding higher levels of consistency and lower levels of inter-limb assessment bias.
summary: Bilateral postural symmetry plays a key role as a potential risk marker for autism spectrum disorder (ASD) and as a symptom of congenital muscular torticollis (CMT) in infants, but current methods of assessing symmetry require laborious clinical expert assessments. In this paper, we develop a computer vision based infant symmetry assessment system, leveraging 3D human pose estimation for infants. Evaluation and calibration of our system against ground truth assessments is complicated by our findings from a survey of human ratings of angle and symmetry, that such ratings exhibit low inter-rater reliability. To rectify this, we develop a Bayesian estimator of the ground truth derived from a probabilistic graphical model of fallible human raters. We show that the 3D infant pose estimation model can achieve 68% area under the receiver operating characteristic curve performance in predicting the Bayesian aggregate labels, compared to only 61% from a 2D infant pose estimation model and 60% from a 3D adult pose estimation model, highlighting the importance of 3D poses and infant domain knowledge in assessing infant body symmetry. Our survey analysis also suggests that human ratings are susceptible to higher levels of bias and inconsistency, and hence our final 3D pose-based symmetry assessment system is calibrated but not directly supervised by Bayesian aggregate human ratings, yielding higher levels of consistency and lower levels of inter-limb assessment bias.
abstract_zh: 双侧姿势对称性作为自闭症谱系障碍 (ASD) 的潜在风险标记和婴儿先天性肌性斜颈 (CMT) 的症状发挥着关键作用，但目前评估对称性的方法需要费力的临床专家评估。在本文中，我们开发了一种基于计算机视觉的婴儿对称性评估系统，利用婴儿的 3D 人体姿势估计。我们对人类角度和对称性评分的调查结果表明，这些评分表现出较低的评分者间可靠性，因此根据地面真实评估对我们的系统进行评估和校准变得复杂。为了纠正这个问题，我们开发了一个基本事实的贝叶斯估计器，该估计器源自易犯错误的人类评估者的概率图形模型。我们表明，在预测贝叶斯聚合标签时，3D 婴儿姿势估计模型可以实现接收者操作特征曲线性能下 68% 的面积，而 2D 婴儿姿势估计模型只能达到 61%，3D 成人姿势估计模型只能达到 60%，这凸显了 3D 姿势和婴儿领域知识在评估婴儿身体对称性方面的重要性。我们的调查分析还表明，人类评分容易受到更高水平的偏差和不一致的影响，因此我们最终的基于 3D 姿势的对称性评估系统经过校准，但不受贝叶斯总体人类评分的直接监督，从而产生更高水平的一致性和更低水平的肢体间评估偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于计算机视觉的婴儿体态对称性评估系统，利用3D姿态估计技术解决传统人工评估效率低、可靠性差的问题。
AI.motivation: 婴儿体态对称性是自闭症谱系障碍(ASD)和先天性肌性斜颈(CMT)的重要风险指标，但现有依赖临床专家人工评估的方法存在劳动强度大、评估者间一致性差的问题。
AI.method: 构建基于3D人体姿态估计的婴儿对称性评估模型，通过概率图模型建立可故障的人类评分贝叶斯估计器，对比2D婴儿模型和3D成人模型的性能差异。
AI.result: 3D婴儿姿态模型在预测贝叶斯聚合标签时达到68%的AUC值，显著优于2D婴儿模型(61%)和3D成人模型(60%)，且系统校准后减少了肢体评估偏差。
AI.conclusion: 3D婴儿专用姿态估计结合贝叶斯校准能有效提升对称性评估的准确性和一致性，为自动化临床辅助诊断提供新方法。

search_text: Computer Vision to the Rescue: Infant Postural Symmetry Estimation from Incongruent Annotations 计算机视觉来救援：根据不一致的注释估计婴儿姿势对称性 Bilateral postural symmetry plays a key role as a potential risk marker for autism spectrum disorder (ASD) and as a symptom of congenital muscular torticollis (CMT) in infants, but current methods of assessing symmetry require laborious clinical expert assessments. In this paper, we develop a computer vision based infant symmetry assessment system, leveraging 3D human pose estimation for infants. Evaluation and calibration of our system against ground truth assessments is complicated by our findings from a survey of human ratings of angle and symmetry, that such ratings exhibit low inter-rater reliability. To rectify this, we develop a Bayesian estimator of the ground truth derived from a probabilistic graphical model of fallible human raters. We show that the 3D infant pose estimation model can achieve 68% area under the receiver operating characteristic curve performance in predicting the Bayesian aggregate labels, compared to only 61% from a 2D infant pose estimation model and 60% from a 3D adult pose estimation model, highlighting the importance of 3D poses and infant domain knowledge in assessing infant body symmetry. Our survey analysis also suggests that human ratings are susceptible to higher levels of bias and inconsistency, and hence our final 3D pose-based symmetry assessment system is calibrated but not directly supervised by Bayesian aggregate human ratings, yielding higher levels of consistency and lower levels of inter-limb assessment bias. 双侧姿势对称性作为自闭症谱系障碍 (ASD) 的潜在风险标记和婴儿先天性肌性斜颈 (CMT) 的症状发挥着关键作用，但目前评估对称性的方法需要费力的临床专家评估。在本文中，我们开发了一种基于计算机视觉的婴儿对称性评估系统，利用婴儿的 3D 人体姿势估计。我们对人类角度和对称性评分的调查结果表明，这些评分表现出较低的评分者间可靠性，因此根据地面真实评估对我们的系统进行评估和校准变得复杂。为了纠正这个问题，我们开发了一个基本事实的贝叶斯估计器，该估计器源自易犯错误的人类评估者的概率图形模型。我们表明，在预测贝叶斯聚合标签时，3D 婴儿姿势估计模型可以实现接收者操作特征曲线性能下 68% 的面积，而 2D 婴儿姿势估计模型只能达到 61%，3D 成人姿势估计模型只能达到 60%，这凸显了 3D 姿势和婴儿领域知识在评估婴儿身体对称性方面的重要性。我们的调查分析还表明，人类评分容易受到更高水平的偏差和不一致的影响，因此我们最终的基于 3D 姿势的对称性评估系统经过校准，但不受贝叶斯总体人类评分的直接监督，从而产生更高水平的一致性和更低水平的肢体间评估偏差。 本文提出一种基于计算机视觉的婴儿体态对称性评估系统，利用3D姿态估计技术解决传统人工评估效率低、可靠性差的问题。 Xiaofei Huang,Michael Wan,Lingfei Luan,Bethany Tunik,Sarah Ostadabbas cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Tom Z. Jiahao,Kong Yao Chee,M. Ani Hsieh
title: Online Dynamics Learning for Predictive Control with an Application to Aerial Robots
title_zh: 用于预测控制的在线动力学学习及其在空中机器人中的应用
comment: Accepted into Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2022, 8 pages, 4 figures
comments: Accepted into Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2022, 8 pages, 4 figures
abstract: In this work, we consider the task of improving the accuracy of dynamic models for model predictive control (MPC) in an online setting. Although prediction models can be learned and applied to model-based controllers, these models are often learned offline. In this offline setting, training data is first collected and a prediction model is learned through an elaborated training procedure. However, since the model is learned offline, it does not adapt to disturbances or model errors observed during deployment. To improve the adaptiveness of the model and the controller, we propose an online dynamics learning framework that continually improves the accuracy of the dynamic model during deployment. We adopt knowledge-based neural ordinary differential equations (KNODE) as the dynamic models, and use techniques inspired by transfer learning to continually improve the model accuracy. We demonstrate the efficacy of our framework with a quadrotor, and verify the framework in both simulations and physical experiments. Results show that our approach can account for disturbances that are possibly time-varying, while maintaining good trajectory tracking performance.
summary: In this work, we consider the task of improving the accuracy of dynamic models for model predictive control (MPC) in an online setting. Although prediction models can be learned and applied to model-based controllers, these models are often learned offline. In this offline setting, training data is first collected and a prediction model is learned through an elaborated training procedure. However, since the model is learned offline, it does not adapt to disturbances or model errors observed during deployment. To improve the adaptiveness of the model and the controller, we propose an online dynamics learning framework that continually improves the accuracy of the dynamic model during deployment. We adopt knowledge-based neural ordinary differential equations (KNODE) as the dynamic models, and use techniques inspired by transfer learning to continually improve the model accuracy. We demonstrate the efficacy of our framework with a quadrotor, and verify the framework in both simulations and physical experiments. Results show that our approach can account for disturbances that are possibly time-varying, while maintaining good trajectory tracking performance.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们考虑在在线环境中提高模型预测控制（MPC）动态模型的准确性的任务。尽管可以学习预测模型并将其应用于基于模型的控制器，但这些模型通常是离线学习的。在这种离线设置中，首先收集训练数据，并通过详细的训练过程学习预测模型。然而，由于模型是离线学习的，它不能适应部署期间观察到的干扰或模型错误。为了提高模型和控制器的适应性，我们提出了一种在线动态学习框架，可以在部署过程中不断提高动态模型的准确性。我们采用基于知识的神经常微分方程（KNODE）作为动态模型，并使用受迁移学习启发的技术来不断提高模型精度。我们用四旋翼飞行器展示了我们的框架的有效性，并在模拟和物理实验中验证了该框架。结果表明，我们的方法可以解释可能随时间变化的干扰，同时保持良好的轨迹跟踪性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在线动力学学习框架，用于改进模型预测控制（MPC）中动态模型的准确性，特别应用于无人机系统。
AI.motivation: 传统离线学习的动态模型无法适应部署过程中出现的扰动或模型误差，导致控制性能下降。
AI.method: 采用基于知识的神经常微分方程（KNODE）作为动态模型，并结合迁移学习技术实现模型的持续在线优化。
AI.result: 在仿真和物理实验中验证了框架的有效性，能够处理时变扰动并保持良好的轨迹跟踪性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过在线学习显著提升了动态模型的适应性与控制精度，为复杂环境下的无人机控制提供了新方法。

authors_text: Li Zhang,Jiachen Lu,Sixiao Zheng,Xinxuan Zhao,Xiatian Zhu,Yanwei Fu,Tao Xiang,Jianfeng Feng,Philip H. S. Torr
title: Vision Transformers: From Semantic Segmentation to Dense Prediction
title_zh: 视觉变压器：从语义分割到密集预测
comment: Extended version of CVPR 2021 paper arXiv:2012.15840 Published on International Journal of Computer Vision (2024)
comments: Extended version of CVPR 2021 paper arXiv:2012.15840 Published on International Journal of Computer Vision (2024)
abstract: The emergence of vision transformers (ViTs) in image classification has shifted the methodologies for visual representation learning. In particular, ViTs learn visual representation at full receptive field per layer across all the image patches, in comparison to the increasing receptive fields of CNNs across layers and other alternatives (e.g., large kernels and atrous convolution). In this work, for the first time we explore the global context learning potentials of ViTs for dense visual prediction (e.g., semantic segmentation). Our motivation is that through learning global context at full receptive field layer by layer, ViTs may capture stronger long-range dependency information, critical for dense prediction tasks. We first demonstrate that encoding an image as a sequence of patches, a vanilla ViT without local convolution and resolution reduction can yield stronger visual representation for semantic segmentation. For example, our model, termed as SEgmentation TRansformer (SETR), excels on ADE20K (50.28% mIoU, the first position in the test leaderboard on the day of submission) and performs competitively on Cityscapes. However, the basic ViT architecture falls short in broader dense prediction applications, such as object detection and instance segmentation, due to its lack of a pyramidal structure, high computational demand, and insufficient local context. For tackling general dense visual prediction tasks in a cost-effective manner, we further formulate a family of Hierarchical Local-Global (HLG) Transformers, characterized by local attention within windows and global-attention across windows in a pyramidal architecture. Extensive experiments show that our methods achieve appealing performance on a variety of dense prediction tasks (e.g., object detection and instance segmentation and semantic segmentation) as well as image classification.
summary: The emergence of vision transformers (ViTs) in image classification has shifted the methodologies for visual representation learning. In particular, ViTs learn visual representation at full receptive field per layer across all the image patches, in comparison to the increasing receptive fields of CNNs across layers and other alternatives (e.g., large kernels and atrous convolution). In this work, for the first time we explore the global context learning potentials of ViTs for dense visual prediction (e.g., semantic segmentation). Our motivation is that through learning global context at full receptive field layer by layer, ViTs may capture stronger long-range dependency information, critical for dense prediction tasks. We first demonstrate that encoding an image as a sequence of patches, a vanilla ViT without local convolution and resolution reduction can yield stronger visual representation for semantic segmentation. For example, our model, termed as SEgmentation TRansformer (SETR), excels on ADE20K (50.28% mIoU, the first position in the test leaderboard on the day of submission) and performs competitively on Cityscapes. However, the basic ViT architecture falls short in broader dense prediction applications, such as object detection and instance segmentation, due to its lack of a pyramidal structure, high computational demand, and insufficient local context. For tackling general dense visual prediction tasks in a cost-effective manner, we further formulate a family of Hierarchical Local-Global (HLG) Transformers, characterized by local attention within windows and global-attention across windows in a pyramidal architecture. Extensive experiments show that our methods achieve appealing performance on a variety of dense prediction tasks (e.g., object detection and instance segmentation and semantic segmentation) as well as image classification.
abstract_zh: 图像分类中视觉变换器（ViT）的出现改变了视觉表示学习的方法。特别是，与 CNN 跨层和其他替代方案（例如大内核和空洞卷积）不断增加的感受野相比，ViT 在所有图像块的每层完整感受野上学习视觉表示。在这项工作中，我们首次探索 ViT 在密集视觉预测（例如语义分割）中的全局上下文学习潜力。我们的动机是，通过在完整的感受野中逐层学习全局上下文，ViT 可以捕获更强的远程依赖性信息，这对于密集的预测任务至关重要。我们首先证明，将图像编码为补丁序列、没有局部卷积和分辨率降低的普通 ViT 可以为语义分割产生更强的视觉表示。例如，我们的模型，称为SEgmentation TRansformer (SETR)，在ADE20K上表现出色（50.28% mIoU，提交当天测试排行榜第一名），并且在Cityscapes上表现也很有竞争力。然而，由于缺乏金字塔结构、高计算需求和局部上下文不足，基本 ViT 架构在更广泛的密集预测应用（例如对象检测和实例分割）中存在不足。为了以经济有效的方式处理一般密集视觉预测任务，我们进一步制定了一系列分层局部全局（HLG）变压器，其特征是金字塔结构中窗口内的局部注意力和跨窗口的全局注意力。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在各种密集预测任务（例如对象检测、实例分割和语义分割）以及图像分类上实现了引人注目的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文探索了视觉变换器（ViT）在密集视觉预测任务（如语义分割）中的潜力，并提出了改进方法以适应更广泛的密集预测任务。
AI.motivation: 通过逐层学习全局上下文，ViT可能捕捉到密集预测任务所需的更强长程依赖信息，但基础ViT架构在计算成本和局部上下文处理上存在不足。
AI.method: 提出SETR模型（无局部卷积的ViT直接用于分割），并设计分层局部-全局（HLG）Transformer架构，结合窗口内局部注意力与跨窗口全局注意力的金字塔结构。
AI.result: SETR在ADE20K数据集上达到50.28% mIoU（提交当日榜单第一），在Cityscapes上表现竞争力；HLG Transformer在目标检测、实例分割等任务中均取得良好效果。
AI.conclusion: ViT通过适配局部-全局注意力结构，可有效解决密集预测任务，证明其在视觉表征学习中的广泛适用性。

search_text: Vision Transformers: From Semantic Segmentation to Dense Prediction 视觉变压器：从语义分割到密集预测 The emergence of vision transformers (ViTs) in image classification has shifted the methodologies for visual representation learning. In particular, ViTs learn visual representation at full receptive field per layer across all the image patches, in comparison to the increasing receptive fields of CNNs across layers and other alternatives (e.g., large kernels and atrous convolution). In this work, for the first time we explore the global context learning potentials of ViTs for dense visual prediction (e.g., semantic segmentation). Our motivation is that through learning global context at full receptive field layer by layer, ViTs may capture stronger long-range dependency information, critical for dense prediction tasks. We first demonstrate that encoding an image as a sequence of patches, a vanilla ViT without local convolution and resolution reduction can yield stronger visual representation for semantic segmentation. For example, our model, termed as SEgmentation TRansformer (SETR), excels on ADE20K (50.28% mIoU, the first position in the test leaderboard on the day of submission) and performs competitively on Cityscapes. However, the basic ViT architecture falls short in broader dense prediction applications, such as object detection and instance segmentation, due to its lack of a pyramidal structure, high computational demand, and insufficient local context. For tackling general dense visual prediction tasks in a cost-effective manner, we further formulate a family of Hierarchical Local-Global (HLG) Transformers, characterized by local attention within windows and global-attention across windows in a pyramidal architecture. Extensive experiments show that our methods achieve appealing performance on a variety of dense prediction tasks (e.g., object detection and instance segmentation and semantic segmentation) as well as image classification. 图像分类中视觉变换器（ViT）的出现改变了视觉表示学习的方法。特别是，与 CNN 跨层和其他替代方案（例如大内核和空洞卷积）不断增加的感受野相比，ViT 在所有图像块的每层完整感受野上学习视觉表示。在这项工作中，我们首次探索 ViT 在密集视觉预测（例如语义分割）中的全局上下文学习潜力。我们的动机是，通过在完整的感受野中逐层学习全局上下文，ViT 可以捕获更强的远程依赖性信息，这对于密集的预测任务至关重要。我们首先证明，将图像编码为补丁序列、没有局部卷积和分辨率降低的普通 ViT 可以为语义分割产生更强的视觉表示。例如，我们的模型，称为SEgmentation TRansformer (SETR)，在ADE20K上表现出色（50.28% mIoU，提交当天测试排行榜第一名），并且在Cityscapes上表现也很有竞争力。然而，由于缺乏金字塔结构、高计算需求和局部上下文不足，基本 ViT 架构在更广泛的密集预测应用（例如对象检测和实例分割）中存在不足。为了以经济有效的方式处理一般密集视觉预测任务，我们进一步制定了一系列分层局部全局（HLG）变压器，其特征是金字塔结构中窗口内的局部注意力和跨窗口的全局注意力。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在各种密集预测任务（例如对象检测、实例分割和语义分割）以及图像分类上实现了引人注目的性能。 本文探索了视觉变换器（ViT）在密集视觉预测任务（如语义分割）中的潜力，并提出了改进方法以适应更广泛的密集预测任务。 Li Zhang,Jiachen Lu,Sixiao Zheng,Xinxuan Zhao,Xiatian Zhu,Yanwei Fu,Tao Xiang,Jianfeng Feng,Philip H. authors_text: Shervin Ardeshir,Navid Azizan
title: Uncertainty in Contrastive Learning: On the Predictability of Downstream Performance
title_zh: 对比学习的不确定性：下游绩效的可预测性
abstract: The superior performance of some of today's state-of-the-art deep learning models is to some extent owed to extensive (self-)supervised contrastive pretraining on large-scale datasets. In contrastive learning, the network is presented with pairs of positive (similar) and negative (dissimilar) datapoints and is trained to find an embedding vector for each datapoint, i.e., a representation, which can be further fine-tuned for various downstream tasks. In order to safely deploy these models in critical decision-making systems, it is crucial to equip them with a measure of their uncertainty or reliability. However, due to the pairwise nature of training a contrastive model, and the lack of absolute labels on the output (an abstract embedding vector), adapting conventional uncertainty estimation techniques to such models is non-trivial. In this work, we study whether the uncertainty of such a representation can be quantified for a single datapoint in a meaningful way. In other words, we explore if the downstream performance on a given datapoint is predictable, directly from its pre-trained embedding. We show that this goal can be achieved by directly estimating the distribution of the training data in the embedding space and accounting for the local consistency of the representations. Our experiments show that this notion of uncertainty for an embedding vector often strongly correlates with its downstream accuracy.
summary: The superior performance of some of today's state-of-the-art deep learning models is to some extent owed to extensive (self-)supervised contrastive pretraining on large-scale datasets. In contrastive learning, the network is presented with pairs of positive (similar) and negative (dissimilar) datapoints and is trained to find an embedding vector for each datapoint, i.e., a representation, which can be further fine-tuned for various downstream tasks. In order to safely deploy these models in critical decision-making systems, it is crucial to equip them with a measure of their uncertainty or reliability. However, due to the pairwise nature of training a contrastive model, and the lack of absolute labels on the output (an abstract embedding vector), adapting conventional uncertainty estimation techniques to such models is non-trivial. In this work, we study whether the uncertainty of such a representation can be quantified for a single datapoint in a meaningful way. In other words, we explore if the downstream performance on a given datapoint is predictable, directly from its pre-trained embedding. We show that this goal can be achieved by directly estimating the distribution of the training data in the embedding space and accounting for the local consistency of the representations. Our experiments show that this notion of uncertainty for an embedding vector often strongly correlates with its downstream accuracy.
abstract_zh: 当今一些最先进的深度学习模型的卓越性能在某种程度上归功于对大规模数据集的广泛（自）监督对比预训练。在对比学习中，网络呈现成对的正（相似）和负（不相似）数据点，并被训练为每个数据点找到一个嵌入向量，即一个表示，可以针对各种下游任务进一步微调。为了在关键决策系统中安全地部署这些模型，为它们配备不确定性或可靠性的衡量标准至关重要。然而，由于训练对比模型的成对性质，以及输出上缺乏绝对标签（抽象嵌入向量），将传统的不确定性估计技术应用于此类模型并非易事。在这项工作中，我们研究是否可以以有意义的方式对单个数据点的这种表示的不确定性进行量化。换句话说，我们探索给定数据点的下游性能是否可以直接从其预训练的嵌入中预测。我们表明，可以通过直接估计嵌入空间中训练数据的分布并考虑表示的局部一致性来实现这一目标。我们的实验表明，嵌入向量的不确定性概念通常与其下游精度密切相关。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究如何量化对比学习模型中表示的不确定性，以预测下游任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 对比学习模型在关键决策系统中部署时需要可靠性评估，但传统不确定性估计方法难以直接应用。
AI.method: 通过估计嵌入空间中训练数据分布并分析表示的局部一致性来量化不确定性。
AI.result: 实验表明，嵌入向量的不确定性与其下游任务准确率存在强相关性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效预测预训练表示的下游性能，为模型可靠性评估提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文研究如何量化对比学习模型中表示的不确定性，以预测下游任务的性能。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法能有效预测预训练表示的下游性能，为模型可靠性评估提供新思路。

authors_text: Joel Clay,Sofia Wyetzner,Alex Gaudio,Boxi Xia,Andrew Moshova,Jacob Austin,Max Segan,Hod Lipson
title: A Massively-Parallel 3D Simulator for Soft and Hybrid Robots
title_zh: 适用于软体和混合机器人的大规模并行 3D 模拟器
abstract: Simulation is an important step in robotics for creating control policies and testing various physical parameters. Soft robotics is a field that presents unique physical challenges for simulating its subjects due to the nonlinearity of deformable material components along with other innovative, and often complex, physical properties. Because of the computational cost of simulating soft and heterogeneous objects with traditional techniques, rigid robotics simulators are not well suited to simulating soft robots. Thus, many engineers must build their own one-off simulators tailored to their system, or use existing simulators with reduced performance. In order to facilitate the development of this exciting technology, this work presents an interactive-speed, accurate, and versatile simulator for a variety of types of soft robots. Cronos, our open-source 3D simulation engine, parallelizes a mass-spring model for ultra-fast performance on both deformable and rigid objects. Our approach is applicable to a wide array of nonlinear material configurations, including high deformability, volumetric actuation, or heterogenous stiffness. This versatility provides the ability to mix materials and geometric components freely within a single robot simulation. By exploiting the flexibility and scalability of nonlinear Hookean mass-spring systems, this framework simulates soft and rigid objects via a highly parallel model for near real-time speed. We describe an efficient GPU CUDA implementation, which we demonstrate to achieve computation of over 1 billion elements per second on consumer-grade GPU cards. Dynamic physical accuracy of the system is validated by comparing results to Euler-Bernoulli beam theory, natural frequency predictions, and empirical data of a soft structure under large deformation.

We describe an efficient GPU CUDA implementation, which we demonstrate to achieve computation of over 1 billion elements per second on consumer-grade GPU cards. Dynamic physical accuracy of the system is validated by comparing results to Euler-Bernoulli beam theory, natural frequency predictions, and empirical data of a soft structure under large deformation.
abstract_zh: 仿真是机器人技术中创建控制策略和测试各种物理参数的重要一步。由于可变形材料组件的非线性以及其他创新且通常复杂的物理特性，软机器人技术对于模拟其对象提出了独特的物理挑战。由于使用传统技术模拟软体和异质物体的计算成本较高，刚性机器人模拟器不太适合模拟软体机器人。因此，许多工程师必须构建适合其系统的一次性模拟器，或者使用性能较低的现有模拟器。为了促进这项令人兴奋的技术的发展，这项工作为各种类型的软机器人提供了一种交互式速度、精确且多功能的模拟器。 Cronos 是我们的开源 3D 仿真引擎，可并行化质量弹簧模型，以在可变形物体和刚性物体上实现超快性能。我们的方法适用于各种非线性材料配置，包括高变形性、体积驱动或异质刚度。这种多功能性提供了在单个机器人模拟中自由混合材料和几何组件的能力。通过利用非线性胡克质量弹簧系统的灵活性和可扩展性，该框架通过高度并行模型模拟软体和刚体物体，以达到近实时的速度。我们描述了一种高效的 GPU CUDA 实现，我们证明该实现可以在消费级 GPU 卡上实现每秒超过 10 亿个元素的计算。通过将结果与欧拉-伯努利梁理论、固有频率预测和大变形下软结构的经验数据进行比较，验证了系统的动态物理精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Cronos的开源3D仿真引擎，用于快速、准确地模拟软体机器人和混合机器人的复杂物理特性。
AI.motivation: 传统仿真方法难以高效处理软体机器人非线性变形材料和复杂物理特性的计算需求，现有工具性能不足或需定制开发。
AI.method: 基于非线性胡克质量-弹簧模型，通过GPU CUDA实现高度并行化计算，支持混合材料与几何组件的自由组合。
AI.result: 在消费级GPU上实现每秒超过10亿个元素的计算速度，通过欧拉-伯努利梁理论、自然频率预测及实验数据验证了动态物理精度。
AI.conclusion: Cronos为软体机器人开发提供了高效、通用的仿真解决方案，推动了该领域技术进步。

search_text: A Massively-Parallel 3D Simulator for Soft and Hybrid Robots 适用于软体和混合机器人的大规模并行 3D 模拟器 Simulation is an important step in robotics for creating control policies and testing various physical parameters. Soft robotics is a field that presents unique physical challenges for simulating its subjects due to the nonlinearity of deformable material components along with other innovative, and often complex, physical properties. Because of the computational cost of simulating soft and heterogeneous objects with traditional techniques, rigid robotics simulators are not well suited to simulating soft robots. Thus, many engineers must build their own one-off simulators tailored to their system, or use existing simulators with reduced performance. In order to facilitate the development of this exciting technology, this work presents an interactive-speed, accurate, and versatile simulator for a variety of types of soft robots. Cronos, our open-source 3D simulation engine, parallelizes a mass-spring model for ultra-fast performance on both deformable and rigid objects. Our approach is applicable to a wide array of nonlinear material configurations, including high deformability, volumetric actuation, or heterogenous stiffness. This versatility provides the ability to mix materials and geometric components freely within a single robot simulation. By exploiting the flexibility and scalability of nonlinear Hookean mass-spring systems, this framework simulates soft and rigid objects via a highly parallel model for near real-time speed. We describe an efficient GPU CUDA implementation, which we demonstrate to achieve computation of over 1 billion elements per second on consumer-grade GPU cards. Dynamic physical accuracy of the system is validated by comparing results to Euler-Bernoulli beam theory, natural frequency predictions, and empirical data of a soft structure under large deformation. 仿真是机器人技术中创建控制策略和测试各种物理参数的重要一步。由于可变形材料组件的非线性以及其他创新且通常复杂的物理特性，软机器人技术对于模拟其对象提出了独特的物理挑战。由于使用传统技术模拟软体和异质物体的计算成本较高，刚性机器人模拟器不太适合模拟软体机器人。因此，许多工程师必须构建适合其系统的一次性模拟器，或者使用性能较低的现有模拟器。为了促进这项令人兴奋的技术的发展，这项工作为各种类型的软机器人提供了一种交互式速度、精确且多功能的模拟器。 Cronos 是我们的开源 3D 仿真引擎，可并行化质量弹簧模型，以在可变形物体和刚性物体上实现超快性能。我们的方法适用于各种非线性材料配置，包括高变形性、体积驱动或异质刚度。这种多功能性提供了在单个机器人模拟中自由混合材料和几何组件的能力。通过利用非线性胡克质量弹簧系统的灵活性和可扩展性，该框架通过高度并行模型模拟软体和刚体物体，以达到近实时的速度。我们描述了一种高效的 GPU CUDA 实现，我们证明该实现可以在消费级 GPU 卡上实现每秒超过 10 亿个元素的计算。通过将结果与欧拉-伯努利梁理论、固有频率预测和大变形下软结构的经验数据进行比较，验证了系统的动态物理精度。 本文提出了一种名为Cronos的开源3D仿真引擎，用于快速、准确地模拟软体机器人和混合机器人的复杂物理特性。 Joel Clay,Sofia Wyetzner,Alex Gaudio,Boxi Xia,Andrew Moshova,Jacob Austin,Max Segan,Hod Lipson cs.RO

authors_text: Hualian Sheng,Sijia Cai,Na Zhao,Bing Deng,Jianqiang Huang,Xian-Sheng Hua,Min-Jian Zhao,Gim Hee Lee
title: Rethinking IoU-based Optimization for Single-stage 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 重新思考基于 IoU 的单阶段 3D 目标检测优化
comment: Accepted by ECCV2022. The code is available at https://github.com/hlsheng1/RDIoU
comments: Accepted by ECCV2022. The code is available at https://github.com/hlsheng1/RDIoU
abstract: Since Intersection-over-Union (IoU) based optimization maintains the consistency of the final IoU prediction metric and losses, it has been widely used in both regression and classification branches of single-stage 2D object detectors. Recently, several 3D object detection methods adopt IoU-based optimization and directly replace the 2D IoU with 3D IoU. However, such a direct computation in 3D is very costly due to the complex implementation and inefficient backward operations. Moreover, 3D IoU-based optimization is sub-optimal as it is sensitive to rotation and thus can cause training instability and detection performance deterioration. In this paper, we propose a novel Rotation-Decoupled IoU (RDIoU) method that can mitigate the rotation-sensitivity issue, and produce more efficient optimization objectives compared with 3D IoU during the training stage. Specifically, our RDIoU simplifies the complex interactions of regression parameters by decoupling the rotation variable as an independent term, yet preserving the geometry of 3D IoU. By incorporating RDIoU into both the regression and classification branches, the network is encouraged to learn more precise bounding boxes and concurrently overcome the misalignment issue between classification and regression. Extensive experiments on the benchmark KITTI and Waymo Open Dataset validate that our RDIoU method can bring substantial improvement for the single-stage 3D object detection.
summary: Since Intersection-over-Union (IoU) based optimization maintains the consistency of the final IoU prediction metric and losses, it has been widely used in both regression and classification branches of single-stage 2D object detectors. Recently, several 3D object detection methods adopt IoU-based optimization and directly replace the 2D IoU with 3D IoU. However, such a direct computation in 3D is very costly due to the complex implementation and inefficient backward operations. Moreover, 3D IoU-based optimization is sub-optimal as it is sensitive to rotation and thus can cause training instability and detection performance deterioration. In this paper, we propose a novel Rotation-Decoupled IoU (RDIoU) method that can mitigate the rotation-sensitivity issue, and produce more efficient optimization objectives compared with 3D IoU during the training stage. Specifically, our RDIoU simplifies the complex interactions of regression parameters by decoupling the rotation variable as an independent term, yet preserving the geometry of 3D IoU. By incorporating RDIoU into both the regression and classification branches, the network is encouraged to learn more precise bounding boxes and concurrently overcome the misalignment issue between classification and regression. Extensive experiments on the benchmark KITTI and Waymo Open Dataset validate that our RDIoU method can bring substantial improvement for the single-stage 3D object detection.
abstract_zh: 由于基于交联（IoU）的优化保持了最终 IoU 预测指标和损失的一致性，因此它已广泛应用于单级 2D 目标检测器的回归和分类分支。最近，一些3D物体检测方法采用基于IoU的优化，直接用3D IoU代替2D IoU。然而，由于复杂的实现和低效的后向运算，这种 3D 直接计算的成本非常高。此外，基于 3D IoU 的优化是次优的，因为它对旋转敏感，因此可能导致训练不稳定和检测性能恶化。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的旋转解耦 IoU（RDIoU）方法，该方法可以减轻旋转敏感性问题，并在训练阶段产生比 3D IoU 更有效的优化目标。具体来说，我们的 RDIoU 通过将旋转变量解耦为独立项，简化了回归参数的复杂交互，同时保留了 3D IoU 的几何形状。通过将 RDIoU 纳入回归和分类分支，可以鼓励网络学习更精确的边界框，同时克服分类和回归之间的错位问题。在基准 KITTI 和 Waymo 开放数据集上进行的大量实验验证了我们的 RDIoU 方法可以为单阶段 3D 物体检测带来实质性改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的基于交并比（IoU）的优化方法，用于解决单阶段3D目标检测中的旋转敏感性和计算效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的3D目标检测方法直接使用3D IoU进行优化，但存在计算成本高、对旋转敏感导致训练不稳定和检测性能下降的问题。
AI.method: 提出旋转解耦交并比（RDIoU）方法，通过将旋转变量解耦为独立项，简化回归参数的复杂交互，同时保留3D IoU的几何特性，并将其应用于回归和分类分支。
AI.result: 在KITTI和Waymo Open Dataset基准测试中，RDIoU方法显著提升了单阶段3D目标检测的性能。
AI.conclusion: RDIoU有效缓解了旋转敏感性问题，提高了优化效率，为单阶段3D目标检测提供了更优的解决方案。

search_text: Rethinking IoU-based Optimization for Single-stage 3D Object Detection 重新思考基于 IoU 的单阶段 3D 目标检测优化 Since Intersection-over-Union (IoU) based optimization maintains the consistency of the final IoU prediction metric and losses, it has been widely used in both regression and classification branches of single-stage 2D object detectors. Recently, several 3D object detection methods adopt IoU-based optimization and directly replace the 2D IoU with 3D IoU. However, such a direct computation in 3D is very costly due to the complex implementation and inefficient backward operations. Moreover, 3D IoU-based optimization is sub-optimal as it is sensitive to rotation and thus can cause training instability and detection performance deterioration. In this paper, we propose a novel Rotation-Decoupled IoU (RDIoU) method that can mitigate the rotation-sensitivity issue, and produce more efficient optimization objectives compared with 3D IoU during the training stage. Specifically, our RDIoU simplifies the complex interactions of regression parameters by decoupling the rotation variable as an independent term, yet preserving the geometry of 3D IoU. By incorporating RDIoU into both the regression and classification branches, the network is encouraged to learn more precise bounding boxes and concurrently overcome the misalignment issue between classification and regression. Extensive experiments on the benchmark KITTI and Waymo Open Dataset validate that our RDIoU method can bring substantial improvement for the single-stage 3D object detection. 由于基于交联（IoU）的优化保持了最终 IoU 预测指标和损失的一致性，因此它已广泛应用于单级 2D 目标检测器的回归和分类分支。最近，一些3D物体检测方法采用基于IoU的优化，直接用3D IoU代替2D IoU。然而，由于复杂的实现和低效的后向运算，这种 3D 直接计算的成本非常高。此外，基于 3D IoU 的优化是次优的，因为它对旋转敏感，因此可能导致训练不稳定和检测性能恶化。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的旋转解耦 IoU（RDIoU）方法，该方法可以减轻旋转敏感性问题，并在训练阶段产生比 3D IoU 更有效的优化目标。具体来说，我们的 RDIoU 通过将旋转变量解耦为独立项，简化了回归参数的复杂交互，同时保留了 3D IoU 的几何形状。通过将 RDIoU 纳入回归和分类分支，可以鼓励网络学习更精确的边界框，同时克服分类和回归之间的错位问题。在基准 KITTI 和 Waymo 开放数据集上进行的大量实验验证了我们的 RDIoU 方法可以为单阶段 3D 物体检测带来实质性改进。 本文提出了一种改进的基于交并比（IoU）的优化方法，用于解决单阶段3D目标检测中的旋转敏感性和计算效率问题。 Hualian Sheng,Sijia Cai,Na Zhao,Bing Deng,Jianqiang Huang,Xian-Sheng Hua,Min-Jian Zhao,Gim Hee Lee cs.CV

authors_text: Houjian Yu,Changhyun Choi
title: Self-Supervised Interactive Object Segmentation Through a Singulation-and-Grasping Approach
title_zh: 通过单一和抓取方法进行自监督交互式对象分割
abstract: Instance segmentation with unseen objects is a challenging problem in unstructured environments. To solve this problem, we propose a robot learning approach to actively interact with novel objects and collect each object's training label for further fine-tuning to improve the segmentation model performance, while avoiding the time-consuming process of manually labeling a dataset. The Singulation-and-Grasping (SaG) policy is trained through end-to-end reinforcement learning. Given a cluttered pile of objects, our approach chooses pushing and grasping motions to break the clutter and conducts object-agnostic grasping for which the SaG policy takes as input the visual observations and imperfect segmentation. We decompose the problem into three subtasks: (1) the object singulation subtask aims to separate the objects from each other, which creates more space that alleviates the difficulty of (2) the collision-free grasping subtask; (3) the mask generation subtask to obtain the self-labeled ground truth masks by using an optical flow-based binary classifier and motion cue post-processing for transfer learning. Our system achieves 70% singulation success rate in simulated cluttered scenes. The interactive segmentation of our system achieves 87.8%, 73.9%, and 69.3% average precision for toy blocks, YCB objects in simulation and real-world novel objects, respectively, which outperforms several baselines.
summary: Instance segmentation with unseen objects is a challenging problem in unstructured environments. To solve this problem, we propose a robot learning approach to actively interact with novel objects and collect each object's training label for further fine-tuning to improve the segmentation model performance, while avoiding the time-consuming process of manually labeling a dataset. The Singulation-and-Grasping (SaG) policy is trained through end-to-end reinforcement learning. Given a cluttered pile of objects, our approach chooses pushing and grasping motions to break the clutter and conducts object-agnostic grasping for which the SaG policy takes as input the visual observations and imperfect segmentation. We decompose the problem into three subtasks: (1) the object singulation subtask aims to separate the objects from each other, which creates more space that alleviates the difficulty of (2) the collision-free grasping subtask; (3) the mask generation subtask to obtain the self-labeled ground truth masks by using an optical flow-based binary classifier and motion cue post-processing for transfer learning. Our system achieves 70% singulation success rate in simulated cluttered scenes. The interactive segmentation of our system achieves 87.8%, 73.9%, and 69.3% average precision for toy blocks, YCB objects in simulation and real-world novel objects, respectively, which outperforms several baselines.
abstract_zh: 在非结构化环境中，对不可见对象进行实例分割是一个具有挑战性的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种机器人学习方法，主动与新物体交互，并收集每个物体的训练标签进行进一步微调，以提高分割模型的性能，同时避免手动标记数据集的耗时过程。分离和抓取（SaG）策略通过端到端强化学习进行训练。给定一堆杂乱的物体，我们的方法选择推动和抓取动作来打破杂乱，并进行与物体无关的抓取，SaG 策略将视觉观察和不完美的分割作为输入。我们将问题分解为三个子任务：（1）对象分离子任务旨在将对象彼此分离，这创造了更多空间，减轻了（2）无碰撞抓取子任务的难度； （3）掩模生成子任务，通过使用基于光流的二元分类器和用于迁移学习的运动线索后处理来获得自标记的地面真实掩模。我们的系统在模拟杂乱场景中实现了 70% 的分割成功率。我们系统的交互式分割对于玩具块、模拟中的 YCB 对象和现实世界的新颖对象分别实现了 87.8%、73.9% 和 69.3% 的平均精度，优于多个基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过机器人主动交互实现未见过物体实例分割的自监督方法，利用分拣与抓取策略减少人工标注依赖。
AI.motivation: 在杂乱环境中对未见过的物体进行实例分割具有挑战性，传统方法依赖耗时的人工标注且难以处理新物体。
AI.method: 训练端到端强化学习的Singulation-and-Grasping（SaG）策略，通过分拣（分离物体）、无碰撞抓取和基于光流的二分类器生成自标注掩码三个子任务实现分割。
AI.result: 模拟环境中分拣成功率70%，对玩具积木、YCB物体和真实新物体的平均精度分别达到87.8%、73.9%和69.3%，优于多个基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该交互式分割方法通过自监督学习有效提升了新型物体的分割性能，为机器人自主处理杂乱场景提供了可行方案。

search_text: Self-Supervised Interactive Object Segmentation Through a Singulation-and-Grasping Approach 通过单一和抓取方法进行自监督交互式对象分割 Instance segmentation with unseen objects is a challenging problem in unstructured environments. To solve this problem, we propose a robot learning approach to actively interact with novel objects and collect each object's training label for further fine-tuning to improve the segmentation model performance, while avoiding the time-consuming process of manually labeling a dataset. The Singulation-and-Grasping (SaG) policy is trained through end-to-end reinforcement learning. Given a cluttered pile of objects, our approach chooses pushing and grasping motions to break the clutter and conducts object-agnostic grasping for which the SaG policy takes as input the visual observations and imperfect segmentation. We decompose the problem into three subtasks: (1) the object singulation subtask aims to separate the objects from each other, which creates more space that alleviates the difficulty of (2) the collision-free grasping subtask; (3) the mask generation subtask to obtain the self-labeled ground truth masks by using an optical flow-based binary classifier and motion cue post-processing for transfer learning. Our system achieves 70% singulation success rate in simulated cluttered scenes. The interactive segmentation of our system achieves 87.8%, 73.9%, and 69.3% average precision for toy blocks, YCB objects in simulation and real-world novel objects, respectively, which outperforms several baselines. 在非结构化环境中，对不可见对象进行实例分割是一个具有挑战性的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种机器人学习方法，主动与新物体交互，并收集每个物体的训练标签进行进一步微调，以提高分割模型的性能，同时避免手动标记数据集的耗时过程。分离和抓取（SaG）策略通过端到端强化学习进行训练。给定一堆杂乱的物体，我们的方法选择推动和抓取动作来打破杂乱，并进行与物体无关的抓取，SaG 策略将视觉观察和不完美的分割作为输入。我们将问题分解为三个子任务：（1）对象分离子任务旨在将对象彼此分离，这创造了更多空间，减轻了（2）无碰撞抓取子任务的难度； （3）掩模生成子任务，通过使用基于光流的二元分类器和用于迁移学习的运动线索后处理来获得自标记的地面真实掩模。我们的系统在模拟杂乱场景中实现了 70% 的分割成功率。我们系统的交互式分割对于玩具块、模拟中的 YCB 对象和现实世界的新颖对象分别实现了 87.8%、73.9% 和 69.3% 的平均精度，优于多个基线。 本文提出一种通过机器人主动交互实现未见过物体实例分割的自监督方法，利用分拣与抓取策略减少人工标注依赖。 Houjian Yu,Changhyun Choi cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Bin Chen,Jian Zhang
title: Content-aware Scalable Deep Compressed Sensing
title_zh: 内容感知可扩展深度压缩感知
comment: Accepted for publication as a Regular paper in the IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (T-IP)
comments: Accepted for publication as a Regular paper in the IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (T-IP)
abstract: To more efficiently address image compressed sensing (CS) problems, we present a novel content-aware scalable network dubbed CASNet which collectively achieves adaptive sampling rate allocation, fine granular scalability and high-quality reconstruction. We first adopt a data-driven saliency detector to evaluate the importances of different image regions and propose a saliency-based block ratio aggregation (BRA) strategy for sampling rate allocation. A unified learnable generating matrix is then developed to produce sampling matrix of any CS ratio with an ordered structure. Being equipped with the optimization-inspired recovery subnet guided by saliency information and a multi-block training scheme preventing blocking artifacts, CASNet jointly reconstructs the image blocks sampled at various sampling rates with one single model. To accelerate training convergence and improve network robustness, we propose an SVD-based initialization scheme and a random transformation enhancement (RTE) strategy, which are extensible without introducing extra parameters. All the CASNet components can be combined and learned end-to-end. We further provide a four-stage implementation for evaluation and practical deployments. Experiments demonstrate that CASNet outperforms other CS networks by a large margin, validating the collaboration and mutual supports among its components and strategies. Codes are available at https://github.com/Guaishou74851/CASNet.
summary: To more efficiently address image compressed sensing (CS) problems, we present a novel content-aware scalable network dubbed CASNet which collectively achieves adaptive sampling rate allocation, fine granular scalability and high-quality reconstruction. We first adopt a data-driven saliency detector to evaluate the importances of different image regions and propose a saliency-based block ratio aggregation (BRA) strategy for sampling rate allocation. A unified learnable generating matrix is then developed to produce sampling matrix of any CS ratio with an ordered structure. Being equipped with the optimization-inspired recovery subnet guided by saliency information and a multi-block training scheme preventing blocking artifacts, CASNet jointly reconstructs the image blocks sampled at various sampling rates with one single model. To accelerate training convergence and improve network robustness, we propose an SVD-based initialization scheme and a random transformation enhancement (RTE) strategy, which are extensible without introducing extra parameters. All the CASNet components can be combined and learned end-to-end. We further provide a four-stage implementation for evaluation and practical deployments. Experiments demonstrate that CASNet outperforms other CS networks by a large margin, validating the collaboration and mutual supports among its components and strategies. Codes are available at https://github.com/Guaishou74851/CASNet.
abstract_zh: 为了更有效地解决图像压缩感知（CS）问题，我们提出了一种新颖的内容感知可扩展网络，称为 CASNet，它共同实现了自适应采样率分配、细粒度可扩展性和高质量重建。我们首先采用数据驱动的显着性检测器来评估不同图像区域的重要性，并提出一种基于显着性的块比率聚合（BRA）策略来进行采样率分配。然后开发一个统一的可学习生成矩阵，以生成具有有序结构的任意 CS 比率的采样矩阵。 CASNet 配备了由显着性信息引导的优化恢复子网和防止块伪影的多块训练方案，可以使用一个模型联合重建以不同采样率采样的图像块。为了加速训练收敛并提高网络鲁棒性，我们提出了基于 SVD 的初始化方案和随机变换增强（RTE）策略，这些策略是可扩展的，无需引入额外的参数。所有 CASNet 组件都可以端到端地组合和学习。我们进一步提供了评估和实际部署的四个阶段的实施。实验表明，CASNet 大幅优于其他 CS 网络，验证了其组件和策略之间的协作和相互支持。代码可在 https://github.com/Guaishou74851/CASNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种内容感知的可扩展深度压缩感知网络CASNet，通过自适应采样率分配和高质量重建提升图像压缩感知效率。
AI.motivation: 现有压缩感知方法在采样率分配和可扩展性方面存在不足，难以兼顾图像内容重要性与重建质量。
AI.method: 采用数据驱动显著性检测器评估图像区域重要性，结合基于显著性的块比例聚合策略与统一可学习生成矩阵，设计优化引导的恢复子网络及多块训练方案，并引入SVD初始化和随机变换增强策略。
AI.result: 实验表明CASNet在多个指标上显著优于现有方法，验证了组件协同有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过内容感知与可扩展架构设计，CASNet实现了高效压缩感知，其模块化方法具有良好的泛化性与工程实用性。
