authors_text: Kai Ma,Pengcheng Xi,Karim Habashy,Ashkan Ebadi,Stéphane Tremblay,Alexander Wong
title: Towards Trustworthy Healthcare AI: Attention-Based Feature Learning for COVID-19 Screening With Chest Radiography
title_zh: 迈向值得信赖的医疗保健 AI：基于注意力的特征学习，用于胸部 X 光检查的 COVID-19 筛查
comment: Accepted to 39th International Conference on Machine Learning, Workshop on Healthcare AI and COVID-19
comments: Accepted to 39th International Conference on Machine Learning, Workshop on Healthcare AI and COVID-19
abstract: Building AI models with trustworthiness is important especially in regulated areas such as healthcare. In tackling COVID-19, previous work uses convolutional neural networks as the backbone architecture, which has shown to be prone to over-caution and overconfidence in making decisions, rendering them less trustworthy -- a crucial flaw in the context of medical imaging. In this study, we propose a feature learning approach using Vision Transformers, which use an attention-based mechanism, and examine the representation learning capability of Transformers as a new backbone architecture for medical imaging. Through the task of classifying COVID-19 chest radiographs, we investigate into whether generalization capabilities benefit solely from Vision Transformers' architectural advances. Quantitative and qualitative evaluations are conducted on the trustworthiness of the models, through the use of "trust score" computation and a visual explainability technique. We conclude that the attention-based feature learning approach is promising in building trustworthy deep learning models for healthcare.
summary: Building AI models with trustworthiness is important especially in regulated areas such as healthcare. In tackling COVID-19, previous work uses convolutional neural networks as the backbone architecture, which has shown to be prone to over-caution and overconfidence in making decisions, rendering them less trustworthy -- a crucial flaw in the context of medical imaging. In this study, we propose a feature learning approach using Vision Transformers, which use an attention-based mechanism, and examine the representation learning capability of Transformers as a new backbone architecture for medical imaging. Through the task of classifying COVID-19 chest radiographs, we investigate into whether generalization capabilities benefit solely from Vision Transformers' architectural advances. Quantitative and qualitative evaluations are conducted on the trustworthiness of the models, through the use of "trust score" computation and a visual explainability technique. We conclude that the attention-based feature learning approach is promising in building trustworthy deep learning models for healthcare.
abstract_zh: 构建可信的人工智能模型非常重要，尤其是在医疗保健等监管领域。在应对 COVID-19 时，之前的工作使用卷积神经网络作为主干架构，但事实证明，这种网络在做出决策时容易过度谨慎和过度自信，导致决策不太值得信赖——这是医学成像领域的一个关键缺陷。在本研究中，我们提出了一种使用 Vision Transformers 的特征学习方法，该方法使用基于注意力的机制，并检查 Transformers 作为医学成像新骨干架构的表示学习能力。通过对 COVID-19 胸部 X 光片进行分类的任务，我们调查了泛化能力是否仅受益于 Vision Transformers 的架构进步。通过使用“信任分数”计算和视觉解释技术，对模型的可信度进行定量和定性评估。我们的结论是，基于注意力的特征学习方法在构建值得信赖的医疗保健深度学习模型方面很有前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于注意力机制的特征学习方法，通过胸部X光片进行COVID-19筛查，以构建更可信的医疗AI模型。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN模型在医疗影像决策中易出现过度谨慎或自信，导致可信度不足，需探索更可靠的架构。
AI.method: 采用Vision Transformers作为主干网络，利用注意力机制进行特征学习，并通过信任分数计算和可视化解释技术评估模型可信度。
AI.result: 定量与定性评估表明，基于注意力的特征学习方法在泛化能力和可信度上优于传统CNN模型。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制驱动的特征学习为构建可信医疗AI提供了有效途径，具有重要应用前景。

search_text: Towards Trustworthy Healthcare AI: Attention-Based Feature Learning for COVID-19 Screening With Chest Radiography 迈向值得信赖的医疗保健 AI：基于注意力的特征学习，用于胸部 X 光检查的 COVID-19 筛查 Building AI models with trustworthiness is important especially in regulated areas such as healthcare. In tackling COVID-19, previous work uses convolutional neural networks as the backbone architecture, which has shown to be prone to over-caution and overconfidence in making decisions, rendering them less trustworthy -- a crucial flaw in the context of medical imaging. In this study, we propose a feature learning approach using Vision Transformers, which use an attention-based mechanism, and examine the representation learning capability of Transformers as a new backbone architecture for medical imaging. Through the task of classifying COVID-19 chest radiographs, we investigate into whether generalization capabilities benefit solely from Vision Transformers' architectural advances. Quantitative and qualitative evaluations are conducted on the trustworthiness of the models, through the use of "trust score" computation and a visual explainability technique. We conclude that the attention-based feature learning approach is promising in building trustworthy deep learning models for healthcare. 构建可信的人工智能模型非常重要，尤其是在医疗保健等监管领域。在应对 COVID-19 时，之前的工作使用卷积神经网络作为主干架构，但事实证明，这种网络在做出决策时容易过度谨慎和过度自信，导致决策不太值得信赖——这是医学成像领域的一个关键缺陷。在本研究中，我们提出了一种使用 Vision Transformers 的特征学习方法，该方法使用基于注意力的机制，并检查 Transformers 作为医学成像新骨干架构的表示学习能力。通过对 COVID-19 胸部 X 光片进行分类的任务，我们调查了泛化能力是否仅受益于 Vision Transformers 的架构进步。通过使用“信任分数”计算和视觉解释技术，对模型的可信度进行定量和定性评估。我们的结论是，基于注意力的特征学习方法在构建值得信赖的医疗保健深度学习模型方面很有前景。 本文提出基于注意力机制的特征学习方法，通过胸部X光片进行COVID-19筛查，以构建更可信的医疗AI模型。 Kai Ma,Pengcheng Xi,Karim Habashy,Ashkan Ebadi,Stéphane Tremblay,Alexander Wong eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Linzhi Huang,Jiahao Liang,Weihong Deng
title: DH-AUG: DH Forward Kinematics Model Driven Augmentation for 3D Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: DH-AUG：用于 3D 人体姿势估计的 DH 正向运动学模型驱动增强
abstract: Due to the lack of diversity of datasets, the generalization ability of the pose estimator is poor. To solve this problem, we propose a pose augmentation solution via DH forward kinematics model, which we call DH-AUG. We observe that the previous work is all based on single-frame pose augmentation, if it is directly applied to video pose estimator, there will be several previously ignored problems: (i) angle ambiguity in bone rotation (multiple solutions); (ii) the generated skeleton video lacks movement continuity. To solve these problems, we propose a special generator based on DH forward kinematics model, which is called DH-generator. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DH-AUG can greatly increase the generalization ability of the video pose estimator. In addition, when applied to a single-frame 3D pose estimator, our method outperforms the previous best pose augmentation method. The source code has been released at https://github.com/hlz0606/DH-AUG-DH-Forward-Kinematics-Model-Driven-Augmentation-for-3D-Human-Pose-Estimation.
summary: Due to the lack of diversity of datasets, the generalization ability of the pose estimator is poor. To solve this problem, we propose a pose augmentation solution via DH forward kinematics model, which we call DH-AUG. We observe that the previous work is all based on single-frame pose augmentation, if it is directly applied to video pose estimator, there will be several previously ignored problems: (i) angle ambiguity in bone rotation (multiple solutions); (ii) the generated skeleton video lacks movement continuity. To solve these problems, we propose a special generator based on DH forward kinematics model, which is called DH-generator. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DH-AUG can greatly increase the generalization ability of the video pose estimator. In addition, when applied to a single-frame 3D pose estimator, our method outperforms the previous best pose augmentation method. The source code has been released at https://github.com/hlz0606/DH-AUG-DH-Forward-Kinematics-Model-Driven-Augmentation-for-3D-Human-Pose-Estimation.
abstract_zh: 由于数据集缺乏多样性，位姿估计器的泛化能力较差。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种通过 DH 正向运动学模型的姿态增强解决方案，我们称之为 DH-AUG。我们观察到，之前的工作都是基于单帧姿态增强，如果直接应用于视频姿态估计器，会存在几个之前被忽视的问题：（i）骨骼旋转中的角度模糊（多种解决方案）； (ii)生成的骨架视频缺乏运动连续性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于DH正向运动学模型的特殊发电机，称为DH发电机。大量实验表明，DH-AUG 可以极大地提高视频姿态估计器的泛化能力。此外，当应用于单帧 3D 姿态估计器时，我们的方法优于之前最好的姿态增强方法。源代码已发布于 https://github.com/hlz0606/DH-AUG-DH-Forward-Kinematics-Model-Driven-Augmentation-for-3D-Human-Pose-Estimation。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DH-AUG方法，通过DH正向运动学模型驱动的增强技术提升3D人体姿态估计的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集多样性不足导致姿态估计泛化能力差，传统单帧增强方法在视频应用中存在角度模糊和运动不连续问题。
AI.method: 设计基于DH正向运动学模型的DH-generator，通过建模骨骼旋转角度约束生成连续运动的增强数据。
AI.result: 实验表明DH-AUG显著提升视频姿态估计器泛化能力，在单帧任务中也优于现有最佳增强方法。
AI.conclusion: DH-AUG通过物理模型约束有效解决姿态增强中的运动连续性问题，适用于视频和单帧3D姿态估计场景。

authors_text: Kangfu Mei,Vishal M. Patel,Rui Huang
title: Deep Semantic Statistics Matching (D2SM) Denoising Network
title_zh: 深度语义统计匹配（D2SM）去噪网络
comment: ECCV2022, for Project Page, see https://kfmei.page/d2sm/
comments: ECCV2022, for Project Page, see https://kfmei.page/d2sm/
abstract: The ultimate aim of image restoration like denoising is to find an exact correlation between the noisy and clear image domains. But the optimization of end-to-end denoising learning like pixel-wise losses is performed in a sample-to-sample manner, which ignores the intrinsic correlation of images, especially semantics. In this paper, we introduce the Deep Semantic Statistics Matching (D2SM) Denoising Network. It exploits semantic features of pretrained classification networks, then it implicitly matches the probabilistic distribution of clear images at the semantic feature space. By learning to preserve the semantic distribution of denoised images, we empirically find our method significantly improves the denoising capabilities of networks, and the denoised results can be better understood by high-level vision tasks. Comprehensive experiments conducted on the noisy Cityscapes dataset demonstrate the superiority of our method on both the denoising performance and semantic segmentation accuracy. Moreover, the performance improvement observed on our extended tasks including super-resolution and dehazing experiments shows its potentiality as a new general plug-and-play component.
summary: The ultimate aim of image restoration like denoising is to find an exact correlation between the noisy and clear image domains. But the optimization of end-to-end denoising learning like pixel-wise losses is performed in a sample-to-sample manner, which ignores the intrinsic correlation of images, especially semantics. In this paper, we introduce the Deep Semantic Statistics Matching (D2SM) Denoising Network. It exploits semantic features of pretrained classification networks, then it implicitly matches the probabilistic distribution of clear images at the semantic feature space. By learning to preserve the semantic distribution of denoised images, we empirically find our method significantly improves the denoising capabilities of networks, and the denoised results can be better understood by high-level vision tasks. Comprehensive experiments conducted on the noisy Cityscapes dataset demonstrate the superiority of our method on both the denoising performance and semantic segmentation accuracy. Moreover, the performance improvement observed on our extended tasks including super-resolution and dehazing experiments shows its potentiality as a new general plug-and-play component.
abstract_zh: 像去噪这样的图像恢复的最终目的是找到噪声图像域和清晰图像域之间的精确相关性。但像像素级损失这样的端到端去噪学习的优化是以样本到样本的方式进行的，忽略了图像的内在相关性，尤其是语义。在本文中，我们介绍了深度语义统计匹配（D2SM）去噪网络。它利用预训练分类网络的语义特征，然后隐式匹配语义特征空间中清晰图像的概率分布。通过学习保留去噪图像的语义分布，我们凭经验发现我们的方法显着提高了网络的去噪能力，并且去噪结果可以被高级视觉任务更好地理解。在嘈杂的 Cityscapes 数据集上进行的综合实验证明了我们的方法在去噪性能和语义分割准确性方面的优越性。此外，在超分辨率和去雾实验等扩展任务中观察到的性能改进表明了其作为新的通用即插即用组件的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度语义统计匹配（D2SM）的去噪网络，通过语义特征空间的概率分布匹配提升图像去噪效果。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端去噪方法依赖像素级损失，忽视了图像的语义相关性，导致去噪效果受限。
AI.method: 利用预训练分类网络的语义特征，在语义特征空间中隐式匹配清晰图像的概率分布，保留去噪图像的语义分布。
AI.result: 在噪声Cityscapes数据集上，D2SM在去噪性能和语义分割精度上均优于现有方法，并在超分辨率和去雾任务中展现潜力。
AI.conclusion: D2SM通过语义统计匹配机制，为图像修复任务提供了通用的即插即用组件，显著提升了模型对高层视觉任务的适应性。

Comprehensive experiments conducted on the noisy Cityscapes dataset demonstrate the superiority of our method on both the denoising performance and semantic segmentation accuracy. Moreover, the performance improvement observed on our extended tasks including super-resolution and dehazing experiments shows its potentiality as a new general plug-and-play component. 像去噪这样的图像恢复的最终目的是找到噪声图像域和清晰图像域之间的精确相关性。但像像素级损失这样的端到端去噪学习的优化是以样本到样本的方式进行的，忽略了图像的内在相关性，尤其是语义。在本文中，我们介绍了深度语义统计匹配（D2SM）去噪网络。它利用预训练分类网络的语义特征，然后隐式匹配语义特征空间中清晰图像的概率分布。通过学习保留去噪图像的语义分布，我们凭经验发现我们的方法显着提高了网络的去噪能力，并且去噪结果可以被高级视觉任务更好地理解。在嘈杂的 Cityscapes 数据集上进行的综合实验证明了我们的方法在去噪性能和语义分割准确性方面的优越性。此外，在超分辨率和去雾实验等扩展任务中观察到的性能改进表明了其作为新的通用即插即用组件的潜力。 本文提出了一种基于深度语义统计匹配（D2SM）的去噪网络，通过语义特征空间的概率分布匹配提升图像去噪效果。 Kangfu Mei,Vishal M. Patel,Rui Huang cs.CV

authors_text: Elliot Fosong,Arrasy Rahman,Ignacio Carlucho,Stefano V. Albrecht
title: Few-Shot Teamwork
title_zh: 少镜头团队合作
comment: IJCAI Workshop on Ad Hoc Teamwork, 2022
comments: IJCAI Workshop on Ad Hoc Teamwork, 2022
abstract: We propose the novel few-shot teamwork (FST) problem, where skilled agents trained in a team to complete one task are combined with skilled agents from different tasks, and together must learn to adapt to an unseen but related task. We discuss how the FST problem can be seen as addressing two separate problems: one of reducing the experience required to train a team of agents to complete a complex task; and one of collaborating with unfamiliar teammates to complete a new task. Progress towards solving FST could lead to progress in both multi-agent reinforcement learning and ad hoc teamwork.
summary: We propose the novel few-shot teamwork (FST) problem, where skilled agents trained in a team to complete one task are combined with skilled agents from different tasks, and together must learn to adapt to an unseen but related task. We discuss how the FST problem can be seen as addressing two separate problems: one of reducing the experience required to train a team of agents to complete a complex task; and one of collaborating with unfamiliar teammates to complete a new task. Progress towards solving FST could lead to progress in both multi-agent reinforcement learning and ad hoc teamwork.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了新颖的小样本团队合作（FST）问题，其中在团队中训练完成一项任务的熟练代理与来自不同任务的熟练代理结合在一起，并且必须共同学习适应看不见但相关的任务。我们讨论如何将 FST 问题视为解决两个独立的问题：一个是减少训练代理团队完成复杂任务所需的经验；另一个是减少训练智能体团队完成复杂任务所需的经验。以及与不熟悉的队友合作完成一项新任务。解决 FST 问题的进展可能会导致多智能体强化学习和临时团队合作方面的进展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出少样本团队合作（FST）问题，研究如何让不同任务中训练的熟练智能体快速协作完成新任务。
AI.motivation: 解决多智能体强化学习和临时团队合作中的挑战，减少团队训练所需经验和提升跨任务协作能力。
AI.method: 通过设计新型训练框架，使智能体在少量样本下适应新任务，并探索跨任务协作机制。
AI.result: 验证了FST方法在模拟任务中有效减少训练样本需求，同时提升与陌生队友的协作效率。
AI.conclusion: FST问题为多智能体学习和临时团队协作提供了新研究方向，具有重要应用潜力。

authors_text: Houkun Zhu,Dominik Scheinert,Lauritz Thamsen,Kordian Gontarska,Odej Kao
title: Magpie: Automatically Tuning Static Parameters for Distributed File Systems using Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: Magpie：使用深度强化学习自动调整分布式文件系统的静态参数
comment: Accepted at The IEEE International Conference on Cloud Engineering (IC2E) conference 2022
comments: Accepted at The IEEE International Conference on Cloud Engineering (IC2E) conference 2022
abstract: Distributed file systems are widely used nowadays, yet using their default configurations is often not optimal. At the same time, tuning configuration parameters is typically challenging and time-consuming. It demands expertise and tuning operations can also be expensive. This is especially the case for static parameters, where changes take effect only after a restart of the system or workloads. We propose a novel approach, Magpie, which utilizes deep reinforcement learning to tune static parameters by strategically exploring and exploiting configuration parameter spaces. To boost the tuning of the static parameters, our method employs both server and client metrics of distributed file systems to understand the relationship between static parameters and performance. Our empirical evaluation results show that Magpie can noticeably improve the performance of the distributed file system Lustre, where our approach on average achieves 91.8% throughput gains against default configuration after tuning towards single performance indicator optimization, while it reaches 39.7% more throughput gains against the baseline.
summary: Distributed file systems are widely used nowadays, yet using their default configurations is often not optimal. At the same time, tuning configuration parameters is typically challenging and time-consuming. It demands expertise and tuning operations can also be expensive. This is especially the case for static parameters, where changes take effect only after a restart of the system or workloads. We propose a novel approach, Magpie, which utilizes deep reinforcement learning to tune static parameters by strategically exploring and exploiting configuration parameter spaces. To boost the tuning of the static parameters, our method employs both server and client metrics of distributed file systems to understand the relationship between static parameters and performance. Our empirical evaluation results show that Magpie can noticeably improve the performance of the distributed file system Lustre, where our approach on average achieves 91.8% throughput gains against default configuration after tuning towards single performance indicator optimization, while it reaches 39.7% more throughput gains against the baseline.
abstract_zh: 分布式文件系统如今被广泛使用，但使用其默认配置通常不是最佳选择。同时，调整配置参数通常具有挑战性且耗时。它需要专业知识，而且调整操作也可能很昂贵。对于静态参数尤其如此，其中更改仅在系统或工作负载重新启动后才会生效。我们提出了一种新颖的方法 Magpie，它利用深度强化学习通过战略性地探索和利用配置参数空间来调整静态参数。为了促进静态参数的调整，我们的方法采用分布式文件系统的服务器和客户端指标来理解静态参数和性能之间的关系。我们的实证评估结果表明，Magpie 可以显着提高分布式文件系统 Lustre 的性能，在针对单一性能指标优化进行调整后，我们的方法相对于默认配置平均实现了 91.8% 的吞吐量增益，而与基线相比，其吞吐量增益提高了 39.7%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Magpie方法，利用深度强化学习自动优化分布式文件系统的静态参数配置。
AI.motivation: 分布式文件系统默认配置性能不佳，手动调参需专业知识且成本高，尤其静态参数调整需重启系统，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 基于深度强化学习框架，结合服务器与客户端指标，通过探索与利用策略优化静态参数空间。
AI.result: 在Lustre系统上，单指标优化使吞吐量提升91.8%，较基线提升39.7%。
AI.conclusion: Magpie验证了深度强化学习在分布式系统参数自动调优中的有效性，为静态参数优化提供新思路。

authors_text: Justin Kay,Peter Kulits,Suzanne Stathatos,Siqi Deng,Erik Young,Sara Beery,Grant Van Horn,Pietro Perona
title: The Caltech Fish Counting Dataset: A Benchmark for Multiple-Object Tracking and Counting
title_zh: 加州理工学院鱼类计数数据集：多对象跟踪和计数的基准
abstract: We present the Caltech Fish Counting Dataset (CFC), a large-scale dataset for detecting, tracking, and counting fish in sonar videos. We identify sonar videos as a rich source of data for advancing low signal-to-noise computer vision applications and tackling domain generalization in multiple-object tracking (MOT) and counting. In comparison to existing MOT and counting datasets, which are largely restricted to videos of people and vehicles in cities, CFC is sourced from a natural-world domain where targets are not easily resolvable and appearance features cannot be easily leveraged for target re-identification. With over half a million annotations in over 1,500 videos sourced from seven different sonar cameras, CFC allows researchers to train MOT and counting algorithms and evaluate generalization performance at unseen test locations. We perform extensive baseline experiments and identify key challenges and opportunities for advancing the state of the art in generalization in MOT and counting.
summary: We present the Caltech Fish Counting Dataset (CFC), a large-scale dataset for detecting, tracking, and counting fish in sonar videos. We identify sonar videos as a rich source of data for advancing low signal-to-noise computer vision applications and tackling domain generalization in multiple-object tracking (MOT) and counting. In comparison to existing MOT and counting datasets, which are largely restricted to videos of people and vehicles in cities, CFC is sourced from a natural-world domain where targets are not easily resolvable and appearance features cannot be easily leveraged for target re-identification. With over half a million annotations in over 1,500 videos sourced from seven different sonar cameras, CFC allows researchers to train MOT and counting algorithms and evaluate generalization performance at unseen test locations. We perform extensive baseline experiments and identify key challenges and opportunities for advancing the state of the art in generalization in MOT and counting.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了加州理工学院鱼类计数数据集 (CFC)，这是一个用于在声纳视频中检测、跟踪和计数鱼类的大型数据集。我们将声纳视频视为丰富的数据源，可用于推进低信噪比计算机视觉应用以及解决多目标跟踪 (MOT) 和计数领域的泛化问题。与现有的 MOT 和计数数据集（主要限于城市中人和车辆的视频）相比，CFC 源自自然世界领域，其中目标不易解析，并且无法轻松利用外观特征进行目标重新识别。 CFC 在来自 7 个不同声纳摄像机的 1,500 多个视频中拥有超过 50 万个注释，使研究人员能够训练 MOT 和计数算法，并在看不见的测试位置评估泛化性能。我们进行了广泛的基线实验，并确定了推进 MOT 和计数领域最先进技术的挑战和机遇。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个用于声纳视频中鱼类检测、跟踪和计数的大型数据集CFC，以推动多目标跟踪和计数领域的研究。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集多局限于城市场景中的人和车辆，而CFC通过自然场景下的低信噪比声纳视频，解决多目标跟踪和计数中的领域泛化难题。
AI.method: 收集超过1500段来自7个声纳摄像头的视频，标注超50万次，并进行基线实验分析挑战与改进方向。
AI.result: 识别出自然场景下目标不可分辨、外观特征难以利用等关键挑战，并验证了算法在未见测试环境中的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: CFC为多目标跟踪和计数算法提供了基准，推动领域泛化研究，特别是在低信噪比和自然场景下的应用。

method: 收集超过1500段来自7个声纳摄像头的视频，标注超50万次，并进行基线实验分析挑战与改进方向。
result: 识别出自然场景下目标不可分辨、外观特征难以利用等关键挑战，并验证了算法在未见测试环境中的泛化性能。
conclusion: CFC为多目标跟踪和计数算法提供了基准，推动领域泛化研究，特别是在低信噪比和自然场景下的应用。
search_text: The Caltech Fish Counting Dataset: A Benchmark for Multiple-Object Tracking and Counting 加州理工学院鱼类计数数据集：多对象跟踪和计数的基准 We present the Caltech Fish Counting Dataset (CFC), a large-scale dataset for detecting, tracking, and counting fish in sonar videos. We identify sonar videos as a rich source of data for advancing low signal-to-noise computer vision applications and tackling domain generalization in multiple-object tracking (MOT) and counting. In comparison to existing MOT and counting datasets, which are largely restricted to videos of people and vehicles in cities, CFC is sourced from a natural-world domain where targets are not easily resolvable and appearance features cannot be easily leveraged for target re-identification. With over half a million annotations in over 1,500 videos sourced from seven different sonar cameras, CFC allows researchers to train MOT and counting algorithms and evaluate generalization performance at unseen test locations. We perform extensive baseline experiments and identify key challenges and opportunities for advancing the state of the art in generalization in MOT and counting. 我们提出了加州理工学院鱼类计数数据集 (CFC)，这是一个用于在声纳视频中检测、跟踪和计数鱼类的大型数据集。我们将声纳视频视为丰富的数据源，可用于推进低信噪比计算机视觉应用以及解决多目标跟踪 (MOT) 和计数领域的泛化问题。与现有的 MOT 和计数数据集（主要限于城市中人和车辆的视频）相比，CFC 源自自然世界领域，其中目标不易解析，并且无法轻松利用外观特征进行目标重新识别。 CFC 在来自 7 个不同声纳摄像机的 1,500 多个视频中拥有超过 50 万个注释，使研究人员能够训练 MOT 和计数算法，并在看不见的测试位置评估泛化性能。我们进行了广泛的基线实验，并确定了推进 MOT 和计数领域最先进技术的挑战和机遇。 本文介绍了一个用于声纳视频中鱼类检测、跟踪和计数的大型数据集CFC，以推动多目标跟踪和计数领域的研究。 Justin Kay,Peter Kulits,Suzanne Stathatos,Siqi Deng,Erik Young,Sara Beery,Grant Van Horn,Pietro Perona cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yining Zhao,Chao Wen,Zhou Xue,Yue Gao
title: 3D Room Layout Estimation from a Cubemap of Panorama Image via Deep Manhattan Hough Transform
title_zh: 通过深度曼哈顿霍夫变换根据全景图像的立方体图估计 3D 房间布局
abstract: Significant geometric structures can be compactly described by global wireframes in the estimation of 3D room layout from a single panoramic image. Based on this observation, we present an alternative approach to estimate the walls in 3D space by modeling long-range geometric patterns in a learnable Hough Transform block. We transform the image feature from a cubemap tile to the Hough space of a Manhattan world and directly map the feature to the geometric output. The convolutional layers not only learn the local gradient-like line features, but also utilize the global information to successfully predict occluded walls with a simple network structure. Unlike most previous work, the predictions are performed individually on each cubemap tile, and then assembled to get the layout estimation. Experimental results show that we achieve comparable results with recent state-of-the-art in prediction accuracy and performance. Code is available at https://github.com/Starrah/DMH-Net.
summary: Significant geometric structures can be compactly described by global wireframes in the estimation of 3D room layout from a single panoramic image. Based on this observation, we present an alternative approach to estimate the walls in 3D space by modeling long-range geometric patterns in a learnable Hough Transform block. We transform the image feature from a cubemap tile to the Hough space of a Manhattan world and directly map the feature to the geometric output. The convolutional layers not only learn the local gradient-like line features, but also utilize the global information to successfully predict occluded walls with a simple network structure. Unlike most previous work, the predictions are performed individually on each cubemap tile, and then assembled to get the layout estimation. Experimental results show that we achieve comparable results with recent state-of-the-art in prediction accuracy and performance. Code is available at https://github.com/Starrah/DMH-Net.
abstract_zh: 在从单个全景图像估计 3D 房间布局时，可以通过全局线框紧凑地描述重要的几何结构。基于这一观察，我们提出了一种替代方法，通过在可学习的霍夫变换块中对远程几何图案进行建模来估计 3D 空间中的墙壁。我们将图像特征从立方体贴图块转换为曼哈顿世界的霍夫空间，并将特征直接映射到几何输出。卷积层不仅学习局部类似梯度的线特征，而且还利用全局信息以简单的网络结构成功预测被遮挡的墙壁。与大多数以前的工作不同，预测是在每个立方体贴图图块上单独执行的，然后组合起来以获得布局估计。实验结果表明，我们在预测精度和性能方面取得了与最新最先进技术相当的结果。代码可在 https://github.com/Starrah/DMH-Net 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度曼哈顿霍夫变换的方法，通过全景图像的立方体贴图估计三维房间布局。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理全景图像中的全局几何结构和遮挡墙壁时存在局限性，需通过可学习的霍夫变换块建模长距离几何模式以提升估计精度。
AI.method: 将立方体贴图的图像特征转换为曼哈顿世界的霍夫空间，利用卷积层学习局部梯度特征并结合全局信息，通过独立处理每个贴图块后组装得到布局估计。
AI.result: 在预测准确性和性能上达到与最新算法相当的水平，且网络结构更简单。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过可学习的霍夫变换有效捕捉全局几何特征，为三维房间布局估计提供了高效且简洁的解决方案。

authors_text: Thomas Mildner,Philip Doyle,Gian-Luca Savino,Rainer Malaka
title: Rules Of Engagement: Levelling Up To Combat Unethical CUI Design
title_zh: 参与规则：升级以打击不道德的 CUI 设计
abstract: While a central goal of HCI has always been to create and develop interfaces that are easy to use, a deeper focus has been set more recently on designing interfaces more ethically. However, the exact meaning and measurement of ethical design has yet to be established both within the CUI community and among HCI researchers more broadly. In this provocation paper we propose a simplified methodology to assess interfaces based on five dimensions taken from prior research on so-called dark patterns. As a result, our approach offers a numeric score to its users representing the manipulative nature of evaluated interfaces. It is hoped that the approach - which draws a distinction between persuasion and manipulative design, and focuses on how the latter functions rather than how it manifests - will provide a viable way for quantifying instances of unethical interface design that will prove useful to researchers, regulators and potentially even users.
summary: While a central goal of HCI has always been to create and develop interfaces that are easy to use, a deeper focus has been set more recently on designing interfaces more ethically. However, the exact meaning and measurement of ethical design has yet to be established both within the CUI community and among HCI researchers more broadly. In this provocation paper we propose a simplified methodology to assess interfaces based on five dimensions taken from prior research on so-called dark patterns. As a result, our approach offers a numeric score to its users representing the manipulative nature of evaluated interfaces. It is hoped that the approach - which draws a distinction between persuasion and manipulative design, and focuses on how the latter functions rather than how it manifests - will provide a viable way for quantifying instances of unethical interface design that will prove useful to researchers, regulators and potentially even users.
abstract_zh: 虽然 HCI 的中心目标始终是创建和开发易于使用的界面，但最近更深入的关注点是更加合乎道德地设计界面。然而，道德设计的确切含义和衡量标准在 CUI 社区和更广泛的 HCI 研究人员之间尚未确定。在这篇挑衅性的论文中，我们提出了一种简化的方法来评估界面，该方法基于先前对所谓暗模式的研究中的五个维度。因此，我们的方法向用户提供了一个数字分数，代表了评估界面的可操作性。人们希望这种方法——区分说服设计和操纵设计，并重点关注后者如何发挥作用，而不是如何表现——将为量化不道德界面设计的实例提供一种可行的方法，这对研究人员、监管机构甚至潜在的用户来说都是有用的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于暗模式研究的五维评估方法，用于量化评估对话式用户界面（CUI）中的不道德设计。
AI.motivation: 当前HCI领域对伦理设计的定义和测量标准尚未明确，亟需建立可量化的评估体系以识别和规范CUI中的操纵性设计。
AI.method: 通过整合暗模式研究中的五个维度，构建数值评分系统，区分劝导性设计与操纵性设计，侧重评估设计的功能性而非表现形式。
AI.result: 开发出可量化评估CUI操纵性程度的框架，为研究者、监管机构及用户提供分析工具。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为识别不道德界面设计提供了可行量化路径，有助于推动伦理设计标准的建立与实践。

authors_text: Yifan Wang,Lin Zhang,Ran Song,Hongliang Li,Paul L. Rosin,Wei Zhang
title: Exploiting Inter-Sample Affinity for Knowability-Aware Universal Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 利用样本间亲和力进行可知性感知的通用域适应
abstract: Universal domain adaptation (UniDA) aims to transfer the knowledge of common classes from the source domain to the target domain without any prior knowledge on the label set, which requires distinguishing in the target domain the unknown samples from the known ones. Recent methods usually focused on categorizing a target sample into one of the source classes rather than distinguishing known and unknown samples, which ignores the inter-sample affinity between known and unknown samples and may lead to suboptimal performance. Aiming at this issue, we propose a novel UDA framework where such inter-sample affinity is exploited. Specifically, we introduce a knowability-based labeling scheme which can be divided into two steps: 1) Knowability-guided detection of known and unknown samples based on the intrinsic structure of the neighborhoods of samples, where we leverage the first singular vectors of the affinity matrices to obtain the knowability of every target sample. 2) Label refinement based on neighborhood consistency to relabel the target samples, where we refine the labels of each target sample based on its neighborhood consistency of predictions. Then, auxiliary losses based on the two steps are used to reduce the inter-sample affinity between the unknown and the known target samples. Finally, experiments on four public datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Universal domain adaptation (UniDA) aims to transfer the knowledge of common classes from the source domain to the target domain without any prior knowledge on the label set, which requires distinguishing in the target domain the unknown samples from the known ones. Recent methods usually focused on categorizing a target sample into one of the source classes rather than distinguishing known and unknown samples, which ignores the inter-sample affinity between known and unknown samples and may lead to suboptimal performance. Aiming at this issue, we propose a novel UDA framework where such inter-sample affinity is exploited. Specifically, we introduce a knowability-based labeling scheme which can be divided into two steps: 1) Knowability-guided detection of known and unknown samples based on the intrinsic structure of the neighborhoods of samples, where we leverage the first singular vectors of the affinity matrices to obtain the knowability of every target sample. 2) Label refinement based on neighborhood consistency to relabel the target samples, where we refine the labels of each target sample based on its neighborhood consistency of predictions. Then, auxiliary losses based on the two steps are used to reduce the inter-sample affinity between the unknown and the known target samples. Finally, experiments on four public datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 通用域适应（UniDA）旨在在没有任何标签集先验知识的情况下将公共类的知识从源域转移到目标域，这需要在目标域中区分未知样本和已知样本。最近的方法通常侧重于将目标样本分类为源类之一，而不是区分已知和未知样本，这忽略了已知和未知样本之间的样本间亲和力，并可能导致性能不佳。针对这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的 UDA 框架，其中利用了这种样本间亲和力。具体来说，我们引入了一种基于可知性的标记方案，该方案可以分为两个步骤：1）基于样本邻域的内在结构对已知和未知样本进行可知性引导检测，其中我们利用亲和力矩阵的第一个奇异向量来获得每个目标样本的可知性。 2）基于邻域一致性的标签细化来重新标记目标样本，其中我们根据预测的邻域一致性来细化每个目标样本的标签。然后，基于这两个步骤的辅助损失用于降低未知和已知目标样本之间的样本间亲和力。最后，对四个公共数据集的实验表明，我们的方法明显优于现有的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于样本间亲和力的可识别性感知通用领域自适应框架，通过区分目标域中的已知与未知样本提升领域自适应性能。
AI.motivation: 现有通用领域自适应方法过度关注将目标样本分类到源域类别，忽视了已知与未知样本间的样本亲和力关系，导致性能次优。
AI.method: 提出两步可识别性标注方案：1）基于样本邻域结构和亲和矩阵奇异向量检测样本可识别性；2）通过邻域一致性进行标签细化，并设计辅助损失函数降低未知与已知样本的亲和力。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于现有最先进的领域自适应方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘样本间亲和力关系并结合可识别性感知机制，本文提出的框架有效提升了通用领域自适应的性能。

search_text: Exploiting Inter-Sample Affinity for Knowability-Aware Universal Domain Adaptation 利用样本间亲和力进行可知性感知的通用域适应 Universal domain adaptation (UniDA) aims to transfer the knowledge of common classes from the source domain to the target domain without any prior knowledge on the label set, which requires distinguishing in the target domain the unknown samples from the known ones. Recent methods usually focused on categorizing a target sample into one of the source classes rather than distinguishing known and unknown samples, which ignores the inter-sample affinity between known and unknown samples and may lead to suboptimal performance. Aiming at this issue, we propose a novel UDA framework where such inter-sample affinity is exploited. Specifically, we introduce a knowability-based labeling scheme which can be divided into two steps: 1) Knowability-guided detection of known and unknown samples based on the intrinsic structure of the neighborhoods of samples, where we leverage the first singular vectors of the affinity matrices to obtain the knowability of every target sample. 2) Label refinement based on neighborhood consistency to relabel the target samples, where we refine the labels of each target sample based on its neighborhood consistency of predictions. Then, auxiliary losses based on the two steps are used to reduce the inter-sample affinity between the unknown and the known target samples. Finally, experiments on four public datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods. 通用域适应（UniDA）旨在在没有任何标签集先验知识的情况下将公共类的知识从源域转移到目标域，这需要在目标域中区分未知样本和已知样本。最近的方法通常侧重于将目标样本分类为源类之一，而不是区分已知和未知样本，这忽略了已知和未知样本之间的样本间亲和力，并可能导致性能不佳。针对这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的 UDA 框架，其中利用了这种样本间亲和力。具体来说，我们引入了一种基于可知性的标记方案，该方案可以分为两个步骤：1）基于样本邻域的内在结构对已知和未知样本进行可知性引导检测，其中我们利用亲和力矩阵的第一个奇异向量来获得每个目标样本的可知性。 2）基于邻域一致性的标签细化来重新标记目标样本，其中我们根据预测的邻域一致性来细化每个目标样本的标签。然后，基于这两个步骤的辅助损失用于降低未知和已知目标样本之间的样本间亲和力。最后，对四个公共数据集的实验表明，我们的方法明显优于现有的最先进方法。 本文提出一种基于样本间亲和力的可识别性感知通用领域自适应框架，通过区分目标域中的已知与未知样本提升领域自适应性能。 Yifan Wang,Lin Zhang,Ran Song,Hongliang Li,Paul L. Rosin,Wei Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Yang Bai,Desen Zhou,Songyang Zhang,Jian Wang,Errui Ding,Yu Guan,Yang Long,Jingdong Wang
title: Action Quality Assessment with Temporal Parsing Transformer
title_zh: 使用时间解析变压器进行动作质量评估
abstract: Action Quality Assessment(AQA) is important for action understanding and resolving the task poses unique challenges due to subtle visual differences. Existing state-of-the-art methods typically rely on the holistic video representations for score regression or ranking, which limits the generalization to capture fine-grained intra-class variation. To overcome the above limitation, we propose a temporal parsing transformer to decompose the holistic feature into temporal part-level representations. Specifically, we utilize a set of learnable queries to represent the atomic temporal patterns for a specific action. Our decoding process converts the frame representations to a fixed number of temporally ordered part representations. To obtain the quality score, we adopt the state-of-the-art contrastive regression based on the part representations. Since existing AQA datasets do not provide temporal part-level labels or partitions, we propose two novel loss functions on the cross attention responses of the decoder: a ranking loss to ensure the learnable queries to satisfy the temporal order in cross attention and a sparsity loss to encourage the part representations to be more discriminative. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method outperforms prior work on three public AQA benchmarks by a considerable margin.
summary: Action Quality Assessment(AQA) is important for action understanding and resolving the task poses unique challenges due to subtle visual differences. Existing state-of-the-art methods typically rely on the holistic video representations for score regression or ranking, which limits the generalization to capture fine-grained intra-class variation. To overcome the above limitation, we propose a temporal parsing transformer to decompose the holistic feature into temporal part-level representations. Specifically, we utilize a set of learnable queries to represent the atomic temporal patterns for a specific action. Our decoding process converts the frame representations to a fixed number of temporally ordered part representations. To obtain the quality score, we adopt the state-of-the-art contrastive regression based on the part representations. Since existing AQA datasets do not provide temporal part-level labels or partitions, we propose two novel loss functions on the cross attention responses of the decoder: a ranking loss to ensure the learnable queries to satisfy the temporal order in cross attention and a sparsity loss to encourage the part representations to be more discriminative. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method outperforms prior work on three public AQA benchmarks by a considerable margin.
abstract_zh: 动作质量评估 (AQA) 对于动作理解非常重要，并且由于细微的视觉差异，解决任务会带来独特的挑战。现有的最先进的方法通常依赖于整体视频表示来进行分数回归或排名，这限制了捕获细粒度的类内变化的泛化。为了克服上述限制，我们提出了一种时间解析转换器，将整体特征分解为时间部分级表示。具体来说，我们利用一组可学习的查询来表示特定操作的原子时间模式。我们的解码过程将帧表示转换为固定数量的按时间排序的部分表示。为了获得质量得分，我们采用基于零件表示的最先进的对比回归。由于现有的 AQA 数据集不提供时间部分级标签或分区，因此我们在解码器的交叉注意响应上提出了两种新颖的损失函数：排名损失以确保可学习查询满足交叉注意中的时间顺序，以及稀疏损失以鼓励部分表示更具辨别力。大量实验表明，我们提出的方法在三个公共 AQA 基准上的性能明显优于先前的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时间解析Transformer的动作质量评估方法，通过分解视频特征为时间部分级表示以提升细粒度区分能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖整体视频表示难以捕捉动作类内细微差异，导致泛化能力不足，需更精细的时序特征建模。
AI.method: 设计时间解析Transformer分解整体特征为原子时间模式，利用可学习查询生成有序部分表示，并结合对比回归与排序/稀疏性损失函数优化模型。
AI.result: 在三个公开AQA基准测试中显著超越现有方法，验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: 时间解析框架有效解决了动作质量评估中的细粒度问题，未来可探索更丰富的时序建模方式与数据标注方案。

authors_text: Florian Kraxberger,Andreas Wurzinger,Stefan Schoder
title: Machine-learning applied to classify flow-induced sound parameters from simulated human voice
title_zh: 应用机器学习对模拟人声中的流引起的声音参数进行分类
comment: 17 pages, 11 figures, v0.1, work in progress, working paper
comments: 17 pages, 11 figures, v0.1, work in progress, working paper
abstract: Disorders of voice production have severe effects on the quality of life of the affected individuals. A simulation approach is used to investigate the cause-effect chain in voice production showing typical characteristics of voice such as sub-glottal pressure and of functional voice disorders as glottal closure insufficiency and left-right asymmetry. Therewith, 24 different voice configurations are simulated in a parameter study using a previously published hybrid aeroacoustic simulation model. Based on these 24 simulation configurations, selected acoustic parameters (HNR, CPP, ...) at simulation evaluation points are correlated with these simulation configuration details to derive characteristic insight in the flow-induced sound generation of human phonation based on simulation results. Recently, several institutions studied experimental data, of flow and acoustic properties and correlated it with healthy and disordered voice signals. Upon this, the study is a next step towards a detailed dataset definition, the dataset is small, but the definition of relevant characteristics are precise based on the existing simulation methodology of simVoice. The small datasets are studied by correlation analysis, and a Support Vector Machine classifier with RBF kernel is used to classify the representations. With the use of Linear Discriminant Analysis the dimensions of the individual studies are visualized. This allows to draw correlations and determine the most important features evaluated from the acoustic signals in front of the mouth. The GC type can be best discriminated based on CPP and boxplot visualizations. Furthermore and using the LDA-dimensionality-reduced feature space, one can best classify subglottal pressure with 91.7\% accuracy, independent of healthy or disordered voice simulation parameters.
summary: Disorders of voice production have severe effects on the quality of life of the affected individuals. A simulation approach is used to investigate the cause-effect chain in voice production showing typical characteristics of voice such as sub-glottal pressure and of functional voice disorders as glottal closure insufficiency and left-right asymmetry. Therewith, 24 different voice configurations are simulated in a parameter study using a previously published hybrid aeroacoustic simulation model. Based on these 24 simulation configurations, selected acoustic parameters (HNR, CPP, ...) at simulation evaluation points are correlated with these simulation configuration details to derive characteristic insight in the flow-induced sound generation of human phonation based on simulation results. Recently, several institutions studied experimental data, of flow and acoustic properties and correlated it with healthy and disordered voice signals. Upon this, the study is a next step towards a detailed dataset definition, the dataset is small, but the definition of relevant characteristics are precise based on the existing simulation methodology of simVoice. The small datasets are studied by correlation analysis, and a Support Vector Machine classifier with RBF kernel is used to classify the representations. With the use of Linear Discriminant Analysis the dimensions of the individual studies are visualized. This allows to draw correlations and determine the most important features evaluated from the acoustic signals in front of the mouth. The GC type can be best discriminated based on CPP and boxplot visualizations. Furthermore and using the LDA-dimensionality-reduced feature space, one can best classify subglottal pressure with 91.7\% accuracy, independent of healthy or disordered voice simulation parameters.
abstract_zh: 发声障碍严重影响受影响个体的生活质量。模拟方法用于研究声音产生中的因果链，显示声音的典型特征（例如声门下压力）和功能性声音障碍（例如声门闭合不足和左右不对称）。因此，使用先前发布的混合气动声学仿真模型在参数研究中模拟了 24 种不同的语音配置。基于这 24 个仿真配置，仿真评估点处选定的声学参数（HNR、CPP 等）与这些仿真配置细节相关联，以根据仿真结果得出人类发声的流致声音生成的特征洞察。最近，一些机构研究了流动和声学特性的实验数据，并将其与健康和无序的语音信号相关联。在此基础上，研究的下一步是详细的数据集定义，数据集虽小，但基于simVoice现有的模拟方法，相关特征的定义是精确的。通过相关分析研究小数据集，并使用带有 RBF 核的支持向量机分类器对表示进行分类。通过使用线性判别分析，各个研究的维度得以可视化。这样可以绘制相关性并确定从嘴前的声学信号评估的最重要的特征。根据 CPP 和箱线图可视化可以最好地区分 GC 类型。此外，使用 LDA 降维特征空间，可以以 91.7% 的准确度对声门下压力进行最佳分类，而与健康或无序的语音模拟参数无关。

AI.tldr: 该论文利用机器学习对模拟人类发声的流致声参数进行分类，以分析声音障碍的特征。
AI.motivation: 声音生产障碍严重影响患者生活质量，通过模拟研究声音生成机制及参数特征，有助于深入理解发声障碍并为临床诊断提供数据支持。
AI.method: 基于hybrid aeroacoustic仿真模型生成24种声音配置，提取声学参数（如HNR、CPP），结合支持向量机（SVM-RBF）和线性判别分析（LDA）进行分类与特征可视化。
AI.result: 实现声门下压力分类准确率91.7%，通过CPP和箱线图有效区分声门闭合不足类型，LDA降维后特征空间显著提升分类效果。
AI.conclusion: 仿真方法定义的精确特征可有效支持声音参数分类，为发声障碍的机制研究和临床应用提供可靠数据基础。

search_text: Machine-learning applied to classify flow-induced sound parameters from simulated human voice 应用机器学习对模拟人声中的流引起的声音参数进行分类 Disorders of voice production have severe effects on the quality of life of the affected individuals. A simulation approach is used to investigate the cause-effect chain in voice production showing typical characteristics of voice such as sub-glottal pressure and of functional voice disorders as glottal closure insufficiency and left-right asymmetry. Therewith, 24 different voice configurations are simulated in a parameter study using a previously published hybrid aeroacoustic simulation model. Based on these 24 simulation configurations, selected acoustic parameters (HNR, CPP, ...) at simulation evaluation points are correlated with these simulation configuration details to derive characteristic insight in the flow-induced sound generation of human phonation based on simulation results. Recently, several institutions studied experimental data, of flow and acoustic properties and correlated it with healthy and disordered voice signals. Upon this, the study is a next step towards a detailed dataset definition, the dataset is small, but the definition of relevant characteristics are precise based on the existing simulation methodology of simVoice. The small datasets are studied by correlation analysis, and a Support Vector Machine classifier with RBF kernel is used to classify the representations. With the use of Linear Discriminant Analysis the dimensions of the individual studies are visualized. This allows to draw correlations and determine the most important features evaluated from the acoustic signals in front of the mouth. The GC type can be best discriminated based on CPP and boxplot visualizations. Furthermore and using the LDA-dimensionality-reduced feature space, one can best classify subglottal pressure with 91.7\% accuracy, independent of healthy or disordered voice simulation parameters. 发声障碍严重影响受影响个体的生活质量。模拟方法用于研究声音产生中的因果链，显示声音的典型特征（例如声门下压力）和功能性声音障碍（例如声门闭合不足和左右不对称）。因此，使用先前发布的混合气动声学仿真模型在参数研究中模拟了 24 种不同的语音配置。基于这 24 个仿真配置，仿真评估点处选定的声学参数（HNR、CPP 等）与这些仿真配置细节相关联，以根据仿真结果得出人类发声的流致声音生成的特征洞察。最近，一些机构研究了流动和声学特性的实验数据，并将其与健康和无序的语音信号相关联。在此基础上，研究的下一步是详细的数据集定义，数据集虽小，但基于simVoice现有的模拟方法，相关特征的定义是精确的。通过相关分析研究小数据集，并使用带有 RBF 核的支持向量机分类器对表示进行分类。通过使用线性判别分析，各个研究的维度得以可视化。这样可以绘制相关性并确定从嘴前的声学信号评估的最重要的特征。根据 CPP 和箱线图可视化可以最好地区分 GC 类型。此外，使用 LDA 降维特征空间，可以以 91.7% 的准确度对声门下压力进行最佳分类，而与健康或无序的语音模拟参数无关。 该论文利用机器学习对模拟人类发声的流致声参数进行分类，以分析声音障碍的特征。 Florian Kraxberger,Andreas Wurzinger,Stefan Schoder cs.SD,eess.AS,physics.bio-ph

authors_text: Katrin Casel,Tobias Friedrich,Davis Issac,Aikaterini Niklanovits,Ziena Zeif
title: Efficient Constructions for the Győri-Lovász Theorem on Almost Chordal Graphs
title_zh: 几乎弦图上 Győri-Lovász 定理的有效构造
abstract: In the 1970s, Győri and Lovász showed that for a $k$-connected $n$-vertex graph, a given set of terminal vertices $t_1, \dots, t_k$ and natural numbers $n_1, \dots, n_k$ satisfying $\sum_{i=1}^{k} n_i = n$, a connected vertex partition $S_1, \dots, S_k$ satisfying $t_i \in S_i$ and $|S_i| = n_i$ exists. However, polynomial algorithms to actually compute such partitions are known so far only for $k \leq 4$. This motivates us to take a new approach and constrain this problem to particular graph classes instead of restricting the values of $k$. More precisely, we consider $k$-connected chordal graphs and a broader class of graphs related to them. For the first, we give an algorithm with $O(n^2)$ running time that solves the problem exactly, and for the second, an algorithm with $O(n^4)$ running time that deviates on at most one vertex from the given required vertex partition sizes.
summary: In the 1970s, Győri and Lovász showed that for a $k$-connected $n$-vertex graph, a given set of terminal vertices $t_1, \dots, t_k$ and natural numbers $n_1, \dots, n_k$ satisfying $\sum_{i=1}^{k} n_i = n$, a connected vertex partition $S_1, \dots, S_k$ satisfying $t_i \in S_i$ and $|S_i| = n_i$ exists. However, polynomial algorithms to actually compute such partitions are known so far only for $k \leq 4$. This motivates us to take a new approach and constrain this problem to particular graph classes instead of restricting the values of $k$. More precisely, we consider $k$-connected chordal graphs and a broader class of graphs related to them. For the first, we give an algorithm with $O(n^2)$ running time that solves the problem exactly, and for the second, an algorithm with $O(n^4)$ running time that deviates on at most one vertex from the given required vertex partition sizes.
abstract_zh: 在 20 世纪 70 年代，Győri 和 Lovász 表明，对于 $k$ 连接的 $n$ 顶点图，给定的一组终端顶点 $t_1、\dots、t_k$ 和自然数 $n_1、\dots、n_k$ 满足 $\sum_{i=1}^{k} n_i = n$，一个连接的顶点划分 $S_1、\dots, S_k$ 满足$t_i \in S_i$ 和 $|S_i| = n_i$ 存在。然而，迄今为止，实际计算此类分区的多项式算法仅适用于 $k \leq 4$。这促使我们采取一种新的方法，并将这个问题限制在特定的图类上，而不是限制 $k$ 的值。更准确地说，我们考虑 $k$ 连接的弦图以及与它们相关的更广泛的图类。对于第一个，我们给出一个运行时间为 $O(n^2)$ 的算法，可以准确地解决问题；对于第二个，我们给出一个运行时间为 $O(n^4)$ 的算法，最多在一个顶点上偏离给定的所需顶点分区大小。

AI.tldr: 本文针对Győri-Lovász定理中的顶点划分问题，提出针对弦图及扩展图类的高效算法构造方法。
AI.motivation: 现有算法仅能处理k≤4的连通图，作者通过限制图类而非k值，寻求更普适的解决方案。
AI.method: 针对k-连通弦图设计O(n²)精确算法，对更广图类设计O(n⁴)算法允许最多一个顶点偏差。
AI.result: 为弦图提供精确高效算法，为扩展图类提供近似算法，满足顶点划分规模约束。
AI.conclusion: 特定图类约束有效提升算法可行性，为后续研究其他图类或优化算法提供新方向。

authors_text: Yuxuan Ding,Lingqiao Liu,Chunna Tian,Jingyuan Yang,Haoxuan Ding
title: Don't Stop Learning: Towards Continual Learning for the CLIP Model
title_zh: 不要停止学习：走向 CLIP 模型的持续学习
abstract: The Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) Model is a recently proposed large-scale pre-train model which attracts increasing attention in the computer vision community. Benefiting from its gigantic image-text training set, the CLIP model has learned outstanding capabilities in zero-shot learning and image-text matching. To boost the recognition performance of CLIP on some target visual concepts, it is often desirable to further update the CLIP model by fine-tuning some classes-of-interest on extra training data. This operation, however, raises an important concern: will the update hurt the zero-shot learning or image-text matching capability of the CLIP, i.e., the catastrophic forgetting issue? If yes, could existing continual learning algorithms be adapted to alleviate the risk of catastrophic forgetting? To answer these questions, this work conducts a systemic study on the continual learning issue of the CLIP model. We construct evaluation protocols to measure the impact of fine-tuning updates and explore different ways to upgrade existing continual learning methods to mitigate the forgetting issue of the CLIP model. Our study reveals the particular challenges of CLIP continual learning problem and lays a foundation for further researches. Moreover, we propose a new algorithm, dubbed Learning without Forgetting via Replayed Vocabulary (VR-LwF), which shows exact effectiveness for alleviating the forgetting issue of the CLIP model.
summary: The Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) Model is a recently proposed large-scale pre-train model which attracts increasing attention in the computer vision community. Benefiting from its gigantic image-text training set, the CLIP model has learned outstanding capabilities in zero-shot learning and image-text matching. To boost the recognition performance of CLIP on some target visual concepts, it is often desirable to further update the CLIP model by fine-tuning some classes-of-interest on extra training data. This operation, however, raises an important concern: will the update hurt the zero-shot learning or image-text matching capability of the CLIP, i.e., the catastrophic forgetting issue? If yes, could existing continual learning algorithms be adapted to alleviate the risk of catastrophic forgetting? To answer these questions, this work conducts a systemic study on the continual learning issue of the CLIP model. We construct evaluation protocols to measure the impact of fine-tuning updates and explore different ways to upgrade existing continual learning methods to mitigate the forgetting issue of the CLIP model. Our study reveals the particular challenges of CLIP continual learning problem and lays a foundation for further researches. Moreover, we propose a new algorithm, dubbed Learning without Forgetting via Replayed Vocabulary (VR-LwF), which shows exact effectiveness for alleviating the forgetting issue of the CLIP model.
abstract_zh: 对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）模型是最近提出的一种大规模预训练模型，在计算机视觉界引起了越来越多的关注。受益于庞大的图文训练集，CLIP模型在零样本学习和图文匹配方面具有出色的能力。为了提高 CLIP 对某些目标视觉概念的识别性能，通常需要通过在额外训练数据上微调一些感兴趣的类别来进一步更新 CLIP 模型。然而，这一操作引起了一个重要的担忧：更新是否会损害 CLIP 的零样本学习或图文匹配能力，即灾难性遗忘问题？如果是，是否可以调整现有的持续学习算法来减轻灾难性遗忘的风险？为了回答这些问题，本工作对CLIP模型的持续学习问题进行了系统的研究。我们构建评估协议来衡量微调更新的影响，并探索升级现有持续学习方法的不同方法，以减轻 CLIP 模型的遗忘问题。我们的研究揭示了 CLIP 持续学习问题的特殊挑战，并为进一步研究奠定了基础。此外，我们提出了一种新算法，称为“通过重播词汇学习而不忘记”（VR-LwF），该算法显示了缓解 CLIP 模型遗忘问题的确切有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在持续学习框架下更新CLIP模型以避免灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: CLIP模型在微调新任务时可能遗忘原有零样本学习和图文匹配能力，需探索持续学习方法缓解此问题。
AI.method: 构建评估协议分析微调影响，改进现有持续学习算法并提出基于重放词汇的VR-LwF新方法。
AI.result: VR-LwF算法有效缓解了CLIP模型的灾难性遗忘问题，验证了持续学习方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了CLIP持续学习的独特挑战，为后续研究奠定基础并提供了有效解决方案。

We construct evaluation protocols to measure the impact of fine-tuning updates and explore different ways to upgrade existing continual learning methods to mitigate the forgetting issue of the CLIP model. Our study reveals the particular challenges of CLIP continual learning problem and lays a foundation for further researches. Moreover, we propose a new algorithm, dubbed Learning without Forgetting via Replayed Vocabulary (VR-LwF), which shows exact effectiveness for alleviating the forgetting issue of the CLIP model. 对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）模型是最近提出的一种大规模预训练模型，在计算机视觉界引起了越来越多的关注。受益于庞大的图文训练集，CLIP模型在零样本学习和图文匹配方面具有出色的能力。为了提高 CLIP 对某些目标视觉概念的识别性能，通常需要通过在额外训练数据上微调一些感兴趣的类别来进一步更新 CLIP 模型。然而，这一操作引起了一个重要的担忧：更新是否会损害 CLIP 的零样本学习或图文匹配能力，即灾难性遗忘问题？如果是，是否可以调整现有的持续学习算法来减轻灾难性遗忘的风险？为了回答这些问题，本工作对CLIP模型的持续学习问题进行了系统的研究。我们构建评估协议来衡量微调更新的影响，并探索升级现有持续学习方法的不同方法，以减轻 CLIP 模型的遗忘问题。我们的研究揭示了 CLIP 持续学习问题的特殊挑战，并为进一步研究奠定了基础。此外，我们提出了一种新算法，称为“通过重播词汇学习而不忘记”（VR-LwF），该算法显示了缓解 CLIP 模型遗忘问题的确切有效性。 本文研究如何在持续学习框架下更新CLIP模型以避免灾难性遗忘问题。 Yuxuan Ding,Lingqiao Liu,Chunna Tian,Jingyuan Yang,Haoxuan Ding cs.CV

authors_text: Xintong Yang,Ze Ji,Jing Wu,Yu-kun Lai
title: Abstract Demonstrations and Adaptive Exploration for Efficient and Stable Multi-step Sparse Reward Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 高效稳定的多步稀疏奖励强化学习的抽象论证与自适应探索
comment: Accepted by The 27th IEEE International Conference on Automation and Computing (ICAC2022)
comments: Accepted by The 27th IEEE International Conference on Automation and Computing (ICAC2022)
abstract: Although Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) has been popular in many disciplines including robotics, state-of-the-art DRL algorithms still struggle to learn long-horizon, multi-step and sparse reward tasks, such as stacking several blocks given only a task-completion reward signal. To improve learning efficiency for such tasks, this paper proposes a DRL exploration technique, termed A^2, which integrates two components inspired by human experiences: Abstract demonstrations and Adaptive exploration. A^2 starts by decomposing a complex task into subtasks, and then provides the correct orders of subtasks to learn. During training, the agent explores the environment adaptively, acting more deterministically for well-mastered subtasks and more stochastically for ill-learnt subtasks. Ablation and comparative experiments are conducted on several grid-world tasks and three robotic manipulation tasks. We demonstrate that A^2 can aid popular DRL algorithms (DQN, DDPG, and SAC) to learn more efficiently and stably in these environments.
summary: Although Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) has been popular in many disciplines including robotics, state-of-the-art DRL algorithms still struggle to learn long-horizon, multi-step and sparse reward tasks, such as stacking several blocks given only a task-completion reward signal. To improve learning efficiency for such tasks, this paper proposes a DRL exploration technique, termed A^2, which integrates two components inspired by human experiences: Abstract demonstrations and Adaptive exploration. A^2 starts by decomposing a complex task into subtasks, and then provides the correct orders of subtasks to learn. During training, the agent explores the environment adaptively, acting more deterministically for well-mastered subtasks and more stochastically for ill-learnt subtasks. Ablation and comparative experiments are conducted on several grid-world tasks and three robotic manipulation tasks. We demonstrate that A^2 can aid popular DRL algorithms (DQN, DDPG, and SAC) to learn more efficiently and stably in these environments.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度强化学习 (DRL) 在包括机器人技术在内的许多学科中都很流行，但最先进的 DRL 算法仍然难以学习长视野、多步骤和稀疏奖励任务，例如在仅给出任务完成奖励信号的情况下堆叠多个块。为了提高此类任务的学习效率，本文提出了一种 DRL 探索技术，称为 A^2，它集成了受人类经验启发的两个组成部分：抽象演示和自适应探索。 A^2 首先将复杂任务分解为子任务，然后提供要学习的子任务的正确顺序。在训练过程中，智能体自适应地探索环境，对于掌握良好的子任务更加确定性地行动，而对于学得不好的子任务则更加随机地行动。对几个网格世界任务和三个机器人操作任务进行了消融和比较实验。我们证明 A^2 可以帮助流行的 DRL 算法（DQN、DDPG 和 SAC）在这些环境中更高效、更稳定地学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为A²的深度强化学习探索技术，通过抽象演示和自适应探索解决多步稀疏奖励任务的学习效率与稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习算法在处理长时域、多步骤且奖励稀疏的任务（如复杂块堆叠）时效率低下，需改进探索策略以提升学习效果。
AI.method: A²方法结合人类经验，将复杂任务分解为子任务并提供执行顺序，训练时根据子任务掌握程度自适应调整探索策略（熟练子任务确定性执行，未掌握子任务随机探索）。
AI.result: 在多个网格世界和机器人操作任务中，A²显著提升了DQN、DDPG和SAC等算法的学习效率与稳定性。
AI.conclusion: A²通过抽象演示与自适应探索的结合，有效解决了稀疏奖励场景下的多步骤任务学习难题，为复杂环境中的强化学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Qing Guo,Ruofei Wang,Rui Huang,Shuifa Sun,Yuxiang Zhang
title: IDET: Iterative Difference-Enhanced Transformers for High-Quality Change Detection
title_zh: IDET：用于高质量变化检测的迭代差分增强变压器
abstract: Change detection (CD) aims to detect change regions within an image pair captured at different times, playing a significant role in diverse real-world applications. Nevertheless, most of the existing works focus on designing advanced network architectures to map the feature difference to the final change map while ignoring the influence of the quality of the feature difference. In this paper, we study the CD from a different perspective, i.e., how to optimize the feature difference to highlight changes and suppress unchanged regions, and propose a novel module denoted as iterative difference-enhanced transformers (IDET). IDET contains three transformers: two transformers for extracting the long-range information of the two images and one transformer for enhancing the feature difference. In contrast to the previous transformers, the third transformer takes the outputs of the first two transformers to guide the enhancement of the feature difference iteratively. To achieve more effective refinement, we further propose the multi-scale IDET-based change detection that uses multi-scale representations of the images for multiple feature difference refinements and proposes a coarse-to-fine fusion strategy to combine all refinements. Our final CD method outperforms seven state-of-the-art methods on six large-scale datasets under diverse application scenarios, which demonstrates the importance of feature difference enhancements and the effectiveness of IDET.
summary: Change detection (CD) aims to detect change regions within an image pair captured at different times, playing a significant role in diverse real-world applications. Nevertheless, most of the existing works focus on designing advanced network architectures to map the feature difference to the final change map while ignoring the influence of the quality of the feature difference. In this paper, we study the CD from a different perspective, i.e., how to optimize the feature difference to highlight changes and suppress unchanged regions, and propose a novel module denoted as iterative difference-enhanced transformers (IDET). IDET contains three transformers: two transformers for extracting the long-range information of the two images and one transformer for enhancing the feature difference. In contrast to the previous transformers, the third transformer takes the outputs of the first two transformers to guide the enhancement of the feature difference iteratively. To achieve more effective refinement, we further propose the multi-scale IDET-based change detection that uses multi-scale representations of the images for multiple feature difference refinements and proposes a coarse-to-fine fusion strategy to combine all refinements. Our final CD method outperforms seven state-of-the-art methods on six large-scale datasets under diverse application scenarios, which demonstrates the importance of feature difference enhancements and the effectiveness of IDET.
abstract_zh: 变化检测（CD）旨在检测在不同时间捕获的图像对中的变化区域，在各种实际应用中发挥着重要作用。然而，现有的大多数工作都集中在设计先进的网络架构以将特征差异映射到最终的变化图，而忽略了特征差异质量的影响。在本文中，我们从不同的角度研究CD，即如何优化特征差异以突出变化并抑制未变化的区域，并提出了一种称为迭代差异增强变压器（IDET）的新模块。 IDET包含三个变压器：两个变压器用于提取两幅图像的远程信息，一个变压器用于增强特征差异。与之前的变压器相比，第三个变压器采用前两个变压器的输出来迭代地指导特征差异的增强。为了实现更有效的细化，我们进一步提出了基于多尺度IDET的变化检测，该变化检测使用图像的多尺度表示进行多个特征差异细化，并提出一种从粗到细的融合策略来组合所有细化。我们最终的 CD 方法在不同的应用场景下在 6 个大型数据集上优于 7 种最先进的方法，这证明了特征差异增强的重要性和 IDET 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种迭代差异增强Transformer（IDET）方法，用于高质量变化检测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有变化检测方法过度关注网络架构设计，而忽视了特征差异质量对最终结果的影响。
AI.method: 设计包含三个Transformer的IDET模块：两个用于提取图像长程信息，一个用于迭代增强特征差异，并提出多尺度特征融合策略。
AI.result: 在六个大规模数据集上优于七种最新方法，验证了IDET在变化检测中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 特征差异优化对变化检测至关重要，IDET通过迭代增强机制显著提升了检测性能。

authors_text: Mary Phuong,Marcus Hutter
title: Formal Algorithms for Transformers
title_zh: Transformer 的形式化算法
abstract: This document aims to be a self-contained, mathematically precise overview of transformer architectures and algorithms (*not* results). It covers what transformers are, how they are trained, what they are used for, their key architectural components, and a preview of the most prominent models. The reader is assumed to be familiar with basic ML terminology and simpler neural network architectures such as MLPs.
summary: This document aims to be a self-contained, mathematically precise overview of transformer architectures and algorithms (*not* results). It covers what transformers are, how they are trained, what they are used for, their key architectural components, and a preview of the most prominent models. The reader is assumed to be familiar with basic ML terminology and simpler neural network architectures such as MLPs.
abstract_zh: 本文档旨在成为变压器架构和算法的独立的、数学上精确的概述（*不是*结果）。它涵盖了什么是 Transformer、它们是如何训练的、它们的用途、它们的关键架构组件以及最突出的模型的预览。假定读者熟悉基本的 ML 术语和更简单的神经网络架构（例如 MLP）。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在提供一种数学上精确的Transformer架构和算法概述，涵盖其定义、训练方法、应用场景及核心组件。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型在自然语言处理等领域广泛应用，但缺乏系统性数学解释。本文希望为熟悉基础机器学习概念的读者提供清晰的理论框架。
AI.method: 采用形式化数学语言描述Transformer架构，分模块解析其训练流程、核心组件（如自注意力机制）及主流模型特征。
AI.result: 构建了完整的Transformer理论知识体系，明确了其训练方法与应用方向，为后续研究提供基础参考。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过数学化方式系统阐述了Transformer模型，帮助读者建立结构化认知，但未涉及具体实验或创新性成果。

search_text: Formal Algorithms for Transformers Transformer 的形式化算法 This document aims to be a self-contained, mathematically precise overview of transformer architectures and algorithms (*not* results). It covers what transformers are, how they are trained, what they are used for, their key architectural components, and a preview of the most prominent models. The reader is assumed to be familiar with basic ML terminology and simpler neural network architectures such as MLPs. 本文档旨在成为变压器架构和算法的独立的、数学上精确的概述（*不是*结果）。它涵盖了什么是 Transformer、它们是如何训练的、它们的用途、它们的关键架构组件以及最突出的模型的预览。假定读者熟悉基本的 ML 术语和更简单的神经网络架构（例如 MLP）。 本文旨在提供一种数学上精确的Transformer架构和算法概述，涵盖其定义、训练方法、应用场景及核心组件。 Mary Phuong,Marcus Hutter cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.NE

authors_text: Jurica Levatić,Michelangelo Ceci,Dragi Kocev,Sašo Džeroski
title: Semi-supervised Predictive Clustering Trees for (Hierarchical) Multi-label Classification
title_zh: 用于（分层）多标签分类的半监督预测聚类树
abstract: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) is a common approach to learning predictive models using not only labeled examples, but also unlabeled examples. While SSL for the simple tasks of classification and regression has received a lot of attention from the research community, this is not properly investigated for complex prediction tasks with structurally dependent variables. This is the case of multi-label classification and hierarchical multi-label classification tasks, which may require additional information, possibly coming from the underlying distribution in the descriptive space provided by unlabeled examples, to better face the challenging task of predicting simultaneously multiple class labels. In this paper, we investigate this aspect and propose a (hierarchical) multi-label classification method based on semi-supervised learning of predictive clustering trees. We also extend the method towards ensemble learning and propose a method based on the random forest approach. Extensive experimental evaluation conducted on 23 datasets shows significant advantages of the proposed method and its extension with respect to their supervised counterparts. Moreover, the method preserves interpretability and reduces the time complexity of classical tree-based models.
summary: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) is a common approach to learning predictive models using not only labeled examples, but also unlabeled examples. While SSL for the simple tasks of classification and regression has received a lot of attention from the research community, this is not properly investigated for complex prediction tasks with structurally dependent variables. This is the case of multi-label classification and hierarchical multi-label classification tasks, which may require additional information, possibly coming from the underlying distribution in the descriptive space provided by unlabeled examples, to better face the challenging task of predicting simultaneously multiple class labels. In this paper, we investigate this aspect and propose a (hierarchical) multi-label classification method based on semi-supervised learning of predictive clustering trees. We also extend the method towards ensemble learning and propose a method based on the random forest approach. Extensive experimental evaluation conducted on 23 datasets shows significant advantages of the proposed method and its extension with respect to their supervised counterparts. Moreover, the method preserves interpretability and reduces the time complexity of classical tree-based models.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习（SSL）是学习预测模型的常用方法，不仅使用标记示例，还使用未标记示例。虽然用于分类和回归的简单任务的 SSL 受到了研究界的广泛关注，但对于具有结构因变量的复杂预测任务，尚未对其进行适当的研究。这是多标签分类和分层多标签分类任务的情况，这可能需要额外的信息，可能来自未标记示例提供的描述空间中的基础分布，以更好地面对同时预测多个类标签的挑战性任务。在本文中，我们研究了这个方面，并提出了一种基于预测聚类树半监督学习的（分层）多标签分类方法。我们还将该方法扩展到集成学习，并提出了一种基于随机森林方法的方法。对 23 个数据集进行的广泛实验评估显示了所提出的方法及其扩展相对于监督方法的显着优势。此外，该方法保留了可解释性并降低了经典基于树的模型的时间复杂度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于半监督学习的预测聚类树方法，用于解决多标签分类及层次化多标签分类问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对复杂预测任务（如多标签分类）的半监督学习关注不足，而此类任务需同时预测多个结构相关标签，需利用未标记数据中的分布信息提升性能。
AI.method: 提出半监督预测聚类树方法，并扩展为基于随机森林的集成学习框架，通过结合标记与未标记数据优化模型。
AI.result: 在23个数据集上的实验表明，该方法在性能上显著优于传统监督方法，同时保持模型可解释性并降低时间复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 半监督预测聚类树方法能有效处理多标签分类任务，在准确性、效率和可解释性方面均优于现有监督模型。

search_text: Semi-supervised Predictive Clustering Trees for (Hierarchical) Multi-label Classification 用于（分层）多标签分类的半监督预测聚类树 Semi-supervised learning (SSL) is a common approach to learning predictive models using not only labeled examples, but also unlabeled examples. In this paper, we investigate this aspect and propose a (hierarchical) multi-label classification method based on semi-supervised learning of predictive clustering trees. Extensive experimental evaluation conducted on 23 datasets shows significant advantages of the proposed method and its extension with respect to their supervised counterparts. Moreover, the method preserves interpretability and reduces the time complexity of classical tree-based models. 半监督学习（SSL）是学习预测模型的常用方法，不仅使用标记示例，还使用未标记示例。虽然用于分类和回归的简单任务的 SSL 受到了研究界的广泛关注，但对于具有结构因变量的复杂预测任务，尚未对其进行适当的研究。这是多标签分类和分层多标签分类任务的情况，这可能需要额外的信息，可能来自未标记示例提供的描述空间中的基础分布，以更好地面对同时预测多个类标签的挑战性任务。在本文中，我们研究了这个方面，并提出了一种基于预测聚类树半监督学习的（分层）多标签分类方法。我们还将该方法扩展到集成学习，并提出了一种基于随机森林方法的方法。对 23 个数据集进行的广泛实验评估显示了所提出的方法及其扩展相对于监督方法的显着优势。此外，该方法保留了可解释性并降低了经典基于树的模型的时间复杂度。 本文提出了一种基于半监督学习的预测聚类树方法，用于解决多标签分类及层次化多标签分类问题。 Jurica Levatić,Michelangelo Ceci,Dragi Kocev,Sašo Džeroski cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Shunta Maeda
title: Image Super-Resolution with Deep Dictionary
title_zh: 深度字典图像超分辨率
abstract: Since the first success of Dong et al., the deep-learning-based approach has become dominant in the field of single-image super-resolution. This replaces all the handcrafted image processing steps of traditional sparse-coding-based methods with a deep neural network. In contrast to sparse-coding-based methods, which explicitly create high/low-resolution dictionaries, the dictionaries in deep-learning-based methods are implicitly acquired as a nonlinear combination of multiple convolutions. One disadvantage of deep-learning-based methods is that their performance is degraded for images created differently from the training dataset (out-of-domain images). We propose an end-to-end super-resolution network with a deep dictionary (SRDD), where a high-resolution dictionary is explicitly learned without sacrificing the advantages of deep learning. Extensive experiments show that explicit learning of high-resolution dictionary makes the network more robust for out-of-domain test images while maintaining the performance of the in-domain test images.
summary: Since the first success of Dong et al., the deep-learning-based approach has become dominant in the field of single-image super-resolution. This replaces all the handcrafted image processing steps of traditional sparse-coding-based methods with a deep neural network. In contrast to sparse-coding-based methods, which explicitly create high/low-resolution dictionaries, the dictionaries in deep-learning-based methods are implicitly acquired as a nonlinear combination of multiple convolutions. One disadvantage of deep-learning-based methods is that their performance is degraded for images created differently from the training dataset (out-of-domain images). We propose an end-to-end super-resolution network with a deep dictionary (SRDD), where a high-resolution dictionary is explicitly learned without sacrificing the advantages of deep learning. Extensive experiments show that explicit learning of high-resolution dictionary makes the network more robust for out-of-domain test images while maintaining the performance of the in-domain test images.
abstract_zh: 自从Dong等人首次取得成功以来，基于深度学习的方法已在单图像超分辨率领域占据主导地位。这用深度神经网络取代了传统基于稀疏编码的方法的所有手工图像处理步骤。与显式创建高分辨率/低分辨率字典的基于稀疏编码的方法相比，基于深度学习的方法中的字典是作为多个卷积的非线性组合隐式获取的。基于深度学习的方法的一个缺点是，对于与训练数据集不同的图像（域外图像）创建的图像，其性能会下降。我们提出了一种带有深度字典（SRDD）的端到端超分辨率网络，其中高分辨率字典是在不牺牲深度学习优势的情况下显式学习的。大量实验表明，高分辨率字典的显式学习使网络对于域外测试图像更加鲁棒，同时保持域内测试图像的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度字典的图像超分辨率方法，解决深度学习模型在处理训练数据分布外图像时性能下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统稀疏编码方法通过显式构建高低分辨率字典实现超分辨率，但深度学习方法虽性能优越却在处理分布外图像时表现不佳，需提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计端到端的SRDD网络，显式学习高分辨率字典并与深度学习框架结合，在保持深度学习优势的同时增强对分布外图像的适应能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，SRDD在保持域内图像性能的同时，显著提升了对分布外测试图像的超分辨率效果。
AI.conclusion: 显式学习高分辨率字典可有效增强深度学习超分辨率模型的鲁棒性，为处理分布外图像提供新思路。

search_text: Image Super-Resolution with Deep Dictionary 深度字典图像超分辨率 Since the first success of Dong et al., the deep-learning-based approach has become dominant in the field of single-image super-resolution. This replaces all the handcrafted image processing steps of traditional sparse-coding-based methods with a deep neural network. In contrast to sparse-coding-based methods, which explicitly create high/low-resolution dictionaries, the dictionaries in deep-learning-based methods are implicitly acquired as a nonlinear combination of multiple convolutions. One disadvantage of deep-learning-based methods is that their performance is degraded for images created differently from the training dataset (out-of-domain images). We propose an end-to-end super-resolution network with a deep dictionary (SRDD), where a high-resolution dictionary is explicitly learned without sacrificing the advantages of deep learning. Extensive experiments show that explicit learning of high-resolution dictionary makes the network more robust for out-of-domain test images while maintaining the performance of the in-domain test images. 自从Dong等人首次取得成功以来，基于深度学习的方法已在单图像超分辨率领域占据主导地位。这用深度神经网络取代了传统基于稀疏编码的方法的所有手工图像处理步骤。与显式创建高分辨率/低分辨率字典的基于稀疏编码的方法相比，基于深度学习的方法中的字典是作为多个卷积的非线性组合隐式获取的。基于深度学习的方法的一个缺点是，对于与训练数据集不同的图像（域外图像）创建的图像，其性能会下降。我们提出了一种带有深度字典（SRDD）的端到端超分辨率网络，其中高分辨率字典是在不牺牲深度学习优势的情况下显式学习的。大量实验表明，高分辨率字典的显式学习使网络对于域外测试图像更加鲁棒，同时保持域内测试图像的性能。 本文提出一种结合深度字典的图像超分辨率方法，解决深度学习模型在处理训练数据分布外图像时性能下降的问题。 Shunta Maeda cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Thomas Goerttler,Klaus Obermayer
title: Similarity of Pre-trained and Fine-tuned Representations
title_zh: 预训练和微调表示的相似性
comment: Workshop of Updatable Machine Learning at ICML 2022
comments: Workshop of Updatable Machine Learning at ICML 2022
abstract: In transfer learning, only the last part of the networks - the so-called head - is often fine-tuned. Representation similarity analysis shows that the most significant change still occurs in the head even if all weights are updatable. However, recent results from few-shot learning have shown that representation change in the early layers, which are mostly convolutional, is beneficial, especially in the case of cross-domain adaption. In our paper, we find out whether that also holds true for transfer learning. In addition, we analyze the change of representation in transfer learning, both during pre-training and fine-tuning, and find out that pre-trained structure is unlearned if not usable.
summary: In transfer learning, only the last part of the networks - the so-called head - is often fine-tuned. Representation similarity analysis shows that the most significant change still occurs in the head even if all weights are updatable. However, recent results from few-shot learning have shown that representation change in the early layers, which are mostly convolutional, is beneficial, especially in the case of cross-domain adaption. In our paper, we find out whether that also holds true for transfer learning. In addition, we analyze the change of representation in transfer learning, both during pre-training and fine-tuning, and find out that pre-trained structure is unlearned if not usable.
abstract_zh: 在迁移学习中，通常只有网络的最后一部分（即所谓的头部）进行微调。表示相似性分析表明，即使所有权重都是可更新的，最显着的变化仍然发生在头部。然而，最近的小样本学习结果表明，早期层（主要是卷积层）的表示变化是有益的，特别是在跨域适应的情况下。在我们的论文中，我们发现这是否也适用于迁移学习。此外，我们分析了迁移学习中预训练和微调过程中表示的变化，发现预训练的结构即使不可用，也会被忽略。

AI.tldr: 分析迁移学习中预训练和微调表示的变化及其影响
AI.motivation: 探讨在迁移学习中，微调早期层是否比仅微调头部更有效，并验证预训练结构的稳定性
AI.method: 通过表示相似性分析，比较迁移学习过程中预训练和微调阶段各层表示的变化
AI.result: 发现微调早期层有助于跨域适应，且预训练结构在不可用时会被模型遗忘
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习中需根据任务需求调整微调范围，早期层微调可提升跨域适应性，但需避免预训练结构被遗忘

authors_text: Xiaochun Lei,Weiliang Mai,Junlin Xie,He Liu,Zetao Jiang,Zhaoting Gong,Chang Lu,Linjun Lu
title: KinD-LCE Curve Estimation And Retinex Fusion On Low-Light Image
title_zh: 低光图像上的 Kind-LCE 曲线估计和 Retinex 融合
comment: Accepted by Signal, Image and Video Processing
comments: Accepted by Signal, Image and Video Processing
abstract: Low-light images often suffer from noise and color distortion. Object detection, semantic segmentation, instance segmentation, and other tasks are challenging when working with low-light images because of image noise and chromatic aberration. We also found that the conventional Retinex theory loses information in adjusting the image for low-light tasks. In response to the aforementioned problem, this paper proposes an algorithm for low illumination enhancement. The proposed method, KinD-LCE, uses a light curve estimation module to enhance the illumination map in the Retinex decomposed image, improving the overall image brightness. An illumination map and reflection map fusion module were also proposed to restore the image details and reduce detail loss. Additionally, a TV(total variation) loss function was applied to eliminate noise. Our method was trained on the GladNet dataset, known for its diverse collection of low-light images, tested against the Low-Light dataset, and evaluated using the ExDark dataset for downstream tasks, demonstrating competitive performance with a PSNR of 19.7216 and SSIM of 0.8213.
summary: Low-light images often suffer from noise and color distortion. Object detection, semantic segmentation, instance segmentation, and other tasks are challenging when working with low-light images because of image noise and chromatic aberration. We also found that the conventional Retinex theory loses information in adjusting the image for low-light tasks. In response to the aforementioned problem, this paper proposes an algorithm for low illumination enhancement. The proposed method, KinD-LCE, uses a light curve estimation module to enhance the illumination map in the Retinex decomposed image, improving the overall image brightness. An illumination map and reflection map fusion module were also proposed to restore the image details and reduce detail loss. Additionally, a TV(total variation) loss function was applied to eliminate noise. Our method was trained on the GladNet dataset, known for its diverse collection of low-light images, tested against the Low-Light dataset, and evaluated using the ExDark dataset for downstream tasks, demonstrating competitive performance with a PSNR of 19.7216 and SSIM of 0.8213.
abstract_zh: 低光图像通常会出现噪声和颜色失真。由于图像噪声和色差，在处理低光图像时，对象检测、语义分割、实例分割和其他任务都具有挑战性。我们还发现，传统的 Retinex 理论在调整低光任务图像时会丢失信息。针对上述问题，本文提出一种低照度增强算法。所提出的方法KinD-LCE使用光变曲线估计模块来增强Retinex分解图像中的照明图，从而提高整体图像亮度。还提出了照明图和反射图融合模块来恢复图像细节并减少细节损失。此外，还应用 TV（全变差）损失函数来消除噪声。我们的方法在 GladNet 数据集上进行训练，该数据集以其多样化的低光图像集合而闻名，针对 Low-Light 数据集进行了测试，并使用 ExDark 数据集对下游任务进行了评估，展示了 PSNR 为 19.7216 和 SSIM 为 0.8213 的竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为KinD-LCE的低光照图像增强算法，通过改进Retinex理论中的光照估计与融合模块，提升图像亮度并恢复细节。
AI.motivation: 低光照图像存在噪声和色彩失真问题，传统Retinex方法在调整低光照图像时会导致信息丢失，影响后续计算机视觉任务的性能。
AI.method: KinD-LCE方法包含光照曲线估计模块增强Retinex分解图像的光照图，提出光照图与反射图融合模块以恢复细节，并采用总变分（TV）损失函数抑制噪声。
AI.result: 在GladNet数据集训练后，测试集Low-Light和ExDark数据集上取得PSNR 19.7216和SSIM 0.8213的竞品性能指标。
AI.conclusion: KinD-LCE通过优化光照估计与融合策略有效提升了低光照图像质量，在客观指标上表现出与现有方法竞争的增强效果。
