authors_text: Zaixi Zhang,Xiaoyu Cao,Jinyuan Jia,Neil Zhenqiang Gong
title: FLDetector: Defending Federated Learning Against Model Poisoning Attacks via Detecting Malicious Clients
title_zh: FLDetector：通过检测恶意客户端来防御联邦学习免受模型中毒攻击
abstract: Federated learning (FL) is vulnerable to model poisoning attacks, in which malicious clients corrupt the global model via sending manipulated model updates to the server. Existing defenses mainly rely on Byzantine-robust FL methods, which aim to learn an accurate global model even if some clients are malicious. However, they can only resist a small number of malicious clients in practice. It is still an open challenge how to defend against model poisoning attacks with a large number of malicious clients. Our FLDetector addresses this challenge via detecting malicious clients. FLDetector aims to detect and remove the majority of the malicious clients such that a Byzantine-robust FL method can learn an accurate global model using the remaining clients. Our key observation is that, in model poisoning attacks, the model updates from a client in multiple iterations are inconsistent. Therefore, FLDetector detects malicious clients via checking their model-updates consistency. Roughly speaking, the server predicts a client's model update in each iteration based on its historical model updates using the Cauchy mean value theorem and L-BFGS, and flags a client as malicious if the received model update from the client and the predicted model update are inconsistent in multiple iterations. Our extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets show that FLDetector can accurately detect malicious clients in multiple state-of-the-art model poisoning attacks. After removing the detected malicious clients, existing Byzantine-robust FL methods can learn accurate global models.Our code is available at https://github.com/zaixizhang/FLDetector.
summary: Federated learning (FL) is vulnerable to model poisoning attacks, in which malicious clients corrupt the global model via sending manipulated model updates to the server. Existing defenses mainly rely on Byzantine-robust FL methods, which aim to learn an accurate global model even if some clients are malicious. However, they can only resist a small number of malicious clients in practice. It is still an open challenge how to defend against model poisoning attacks with a large number of malicious clients. Our FLDetector addresses this challenge via detecting malicious clients. FLDetector aims to detect and remove the majority of the malicious clients such that a Byzantine-robust FL method can learn an accurate global model using the remaining clients. Our key observation is that, in model poisoning attacks, the model updates from a client in multiple iterations are inconsistent. Therefore, FLDetector detects malicious clients via checking their model-updates consistency. Roughly speaking, the server predicts a client's model update in each iteration based on its historical model updates using the Cauchy mean value theorem and L-BFGS, and flags a client as malicious if the received model update from the client and the predicted model update are inconsistent in multiple iterations. Our extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets show that FLDetector can accurately detect malicious clients in multiple state-of-the-art model poisoning attacks. After removing the detected malicious clients, existing Byzantine-robust FL methods can learn accurate global models.Our code is available at https://github.com/zaixizhang/FLDetector.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 很容易受到模型中毒攻击，其中恶意客户端通过向服务器发送受操纵的模型更新来破坏全局模型。现有的防御主要依赖于拜占庭稳健的 FL 方法，该方法的目标是学习准确的全局模型，即使某些客户端是恶意的。但在实践中它们只能抵抗少量的恶意客户端。如何防御大量恶意客户端的模型中毒攻击仍然是一个开放的挑战。我们的 FLDetector 通过检测恶意客户端来解决这一挑战。 FLDetector 旨在检测并删除大多数恶意客户端，以便拜占庭鲁棒 FL 方法可以使用剩余客户端学习准确的全局模型。我们的主要观察结果是，在模型中毒攻击中，多次迭代中来自客户端的模型更新是不一致的。因此，FLDetector 通过检查模型更新一致性来检测恶意客户端。粗略地说，服务器使用柯西均值定理和 L-BFGS 根据历史模型更新来预测客户端在每次迭代中的模型更新，如果从客户端接收到的模型更新与预测的模型更新在多次迭代中不一致，则将客户端标记为恶意客户端。我们对三个基准数据集进行的广泛实验表明，FLDetector 可以在多种最先进的模型中毒攻击中准确检测恶意客户端。删除检测到的恶意客户端后，现有的拜占庭鲁棒 FL 方法可以学习准确的全局模型。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/zaixizhang/FLDetector 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FLDetector，通过检测恶意客户端来防御联邦学习中的模型投毒攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有防御方法在面对大量恶意客户端时效果有限，亟需一种能有效识别并移除多数恶意客户端的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于客户端模型更新的一致性检测，利用柯西中值定理和L-BFGS算法预测客户端更新，通过对比实际与预测值的不一致性标记恶意客户端。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上实验表明，FLDetector能准确检测多种先进投毒攻击中的恶意客户端，移除后可使拜占庭鲁棒方法恢复准确全局模型。
AI.conclusion: FLDetector通过有效性验证，为联邦学习提供了针对大规模恶意客户端的模型投毒攻击防御新思路。

search_text: FLDetector: Defending Federated Learning Against Model Poisoning Attacks via Detecting Malicious Clients FLDetector：通过检测恶意客户端来防御联邦学习免受模型中毒攻击 Federated learning (FL) is vulnerable to model poisoning attacks, in which malicious clients corrupt the global model via sending manipulated model updates to the server. Existing defenses mainly rely on Byzantine-robust FL methods, which aim to learn an accurate global model even if some clients are malicious. However, they can only resist a small number of malicious clients in practice. It is still an open challenge how to defend against model poisoning attacks with a large number of malicious clients. Our FLDetector addresses this challenge via detecting malicious clients. FLDetector aims to detect and remove the majority of the malicious clients such that a Byzantine-robust FL method can learn an accurate global model using the remaining clients. Our key observation is that, in model poisoning attacks, the model updates from a client in multiple iterations are inconsistent. Therefore, FLDetector detects malicious clients via checking their model-updates consistency. Roughly speaking, the server predicts a client's model update in each iteration based on its historical model updates using the Cauchy mean value theorem and L-BFGS, and flags a client as malicious if the received model update from the client and the predicted model update are inconsistent in multiple iterations. Our extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets show that FLDetector can accurately detect malicious clients in multiple state-of-the-art model poisoning attacks. After removing the detected malicious clients, existing Byzantine-robust FL methods can learn accurate global models.Our code is available at https://github.com/zaixizhang/FLDetector. 联邦学习 (FL) 很容易受到模型中毒攻击，其中恶意客户端通过向服务器发送受操纵的模型更新来破坏全局模型。现有的防御主要依赖于拜占庭稳健的 FL 方法，该方法的目标是学习准确的全局模型，即使某些客户端是恶意的。但在实践中它们只能抵抗少量的恶意客户端。如何防御大量恶意客户端的模型中毒攻击仍然是一个开放的挑战。我们的 FLDetector 通过检测恶意客户端来解决这一挑战。 FLDetector 旨在检测并删除大多数恶意客户端，以便拜占庭鲁棒 FL 方法可以使用剩余客户端学习准确的全局模型。我们的主要观察结果是，在模型中毒攻击中，多次迭代中来自客户端的模型更新是不一致的。因此，FLDetector 通过检查模型更新一致性来检测恶意客户端。粗略地说，服务器使用柯西均值定理和 L-BFGS 根据历史模型更新来预测客户端在每次迭代中的模型更新，如果从客户端接收到的模型更新与预测的模型更新在多次迭代中不一致，则将客户端标记为恶意客户端。我们对三个基准数据集进行的广泛实验表明，FLDetector 可以在多种最先进的模型中毒攻击中准确检测恶意客户端。删除检测到的恶意客户端后，现有的拜占庭鲁棒 FL 方法可以学习准确的全局模型。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/zaixizhang/FLDetector 获取。 本文提出FLDetector，通过检测恶意客户端来防御联邦学习中的模型投毒攻击。 Zaixi Zhang,Xiaoyu Cao,Jinyuan Jia,Neil Zhenqiang Gong cs.CR,cs.AI

authors_text: Sascha Kirch,Rafael Pagés,Sergio Arnaldo,Sergio Martín
title: VoloGAN: Adversarial Domain Adaptation for Synthetic Depth Data
title_zh: VoloGAN：合成深度数据的对抗域适应
abstract: We present VoloGAN, an adversarial domain adaptation network that translates synthetic RGB-D images of a high-quality 3D model of a person, into RGB-D images that could be generated with a consumer depth sensor. This system is especially useful to generate high amount training data for single-view 3D reconstruction algorithms replicating the real-world capture conditions, being able to imitate the style of different sensor types, for the same high-end 3D model database. The network uses a CycleGAN framework with a U-Net architecture for the generator and a discriminator inspired by SIV-GAN. We use different optimizers and learning rate schedules to train the generator and the discriminator. We further construct a loss function that considers image channels individually and, among other metrics, evaluates the structural similarity. We demonstrate that CycleGANs can be used to apply adversarial domain adaptation of synthetic 3D data to train a volumetric video generator model having only few training samples.
summary: We present VoloGAN, an adversarial domain adaptation network that translates synthetic RGB-D images of a high-quality 3D model of a person, into RGB-D images that could be generated with a consumer depth sensor. This system is especially useful to generate high amount training data for single-view 3D reconstruction algorithms replicating the real-world capture conditions, being able to imitate the style of different sensor types, for the same high-end 3D model database. The network uses a CycleGAN framework with a U-Net architecture for the generator and a discriminator inspired by SIV-GAN. We use different optimizers and learning rate schedules to train the generator and the discriminator. We further construct a loss function that considers image channels individually and, among other metrics, evaluates the structural similarity. We demonstrate that CycleGANs can be used to apply adversarial domain adaptation of synthetic 3D data to train a volumetric video generator model having only few training samples.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 VoloGAN，这是一种对抗域适应网络，可将人体高质量 3D 模型的合成 RGB-D 图像转换为可由消费者深度传感器生成的 RGB-D 图像。该系统对于为单视图 3D 重建算法生成大量训练数据特别有用，可复制真实世界的捕获条件，能够为相同的高端 3D 模型数据库模仿不同传感器类型的风格。该网络使用 CycleGAN 框架，其中生成器采用 U-Net 架构，鉴别器则受 SIV-GAN 启发。我们使用不同的优化器和学习率计划来训练生成器和鉴别器。我们进一步构建了一个损失函数，该函数单独考虑图像通道，并在其他指标中评估结构相似性。我们证明了 CycleGAN 可用于应用合成 3D 数据的对抗域适应来训练仅具有少量训练样本的体积视频生成器模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VoloGAN，一种基于对抗域适应的网络，将高质量3D模型生成的合成RGB-D图像转换为消费级深度传感器生成的RGB-D图像，以生成单视角3D重建算法的训练数据。
AI.motivation: 高质量3D模型数据库难以直接用于模拟真实传感器条件，而生成符合真实深度传感器特性的训练数据对单视角3D重建算法至关重要。
AI.method: 基于CycleGAN框架，采用U-Net生成器和SIV-GAN启发的判别器，结合通道独立损失函数与结构相似性评估，使用不同优化器和学习率策略训练生成器与判别器。
AI.result: 验证了CycleGAN在少量样本条件下可有效实现合成3D数据到体素视频生成模型的域适应，生成数据符合真实传感器风格。
AI.conclusion: 对抗域适应方法能高效生成符合真实传感器特性的训练数据，为单视角3D重建算法提供实用的数据增强方案。

authors_text: Jiahao Liang,Huafeng Shi,Weihong Deng
title: Exploring Disentangled Content Information for Face Forgery Detection
title_zh: 探索用于人脸伪造检测的解开内容信息
abstract: Convolutional neural network based face forgery detection methods have achieved remarkable results during training, but struggled to maintain comparable performance during testing. We observe that the detector is prone to focus more on content information than artifact traces, suggesting that the detector is sensitive to the intrinsic bias of the dataset, which leads to severe overfitting. Motivated by this key observation, we design an easily embeddable disentanglement framework for content information removal, and further propose a Content Consistency Constraint (C2C) and a Global Representation Contrastive Constraint (GRCC) to enhance the independence of disentangled features. Furthermore, we cleverly construct two unbalanced datasets to investigate the impact of the content bias. Extensive visualizations and experiments demonstrate that our framework can not only ignore the interference of content information, but also guide the detector to mine suspicious artifact traces and achieve competitive performance.
summary: Convolutional neural network based face forgery detection methods have achieved remarkable results during training, but struggled to maintain comparable performance during testing. We observe that the detector is prone to focus more on content information than artifact traces, suggesting that the detector is sensitive to the intrinsic bias of the dataset, which leads to severe overfitting. Motivated by this key observation, we design an easily embeddable disentanglement framework for content information removal, and further propose a Content Consistency Constraint (C2C) and a Global Representation Contrastive Constraint (GRCC) to enhance the independence of disentangled features. Furthermore, we cleverly construct two unbalanced datasets to investigate the impact of the content bias. Extensive visualizations and experiments demonstrate that our framework can not only ignore the interference of content information, but also guide the detector to mine suspicious artifact traces and achieve competitive performance.
abstract_zh: 基于卷积神经网络的人脸伪造检测方法在训练期间取得了显着的效果，但在测试期间难以保持可比较的性能。我们观察到，检测器更倾向于关注内容信息而不是伪影痕迹，这表明检测器对数据集的内在偏差很敏感，这会导致严重的过度拟合。受这一关键观察的启发，我们设计了一个用于内容信息去除的易于嵌入的解缠框架，并进一步提出了内容一致性约束（C2C）和全局表示对比约束（GRCC）以增强解缠特征的独立性。此外，我们巧妙地构建了两个不平衡的数据集来研究内容偏差的影响。大量的可视化和实验表明，我们的框架不仅可以忽略内容信息的干扰，还可以指导检测器挖掘可疑的伪影痕迹并获得有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决人脸伪造检测中因内容信息干扰导致的过拟合问题，通过解耦内容信息提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度依赖内容信息而忽略伪影特征，导致对数据集偏差敏感并出现严重过拟合。
AI.method: 设计解耦框架移除内容信息，提出内容一致性约束（C2C）和全局表示对比约束（GRCC），构建两个不平衡数据集验证内容偏差影响。
AI.result: 实验表明框架能有效消除内容干扰，引导检测器关注伪影特征，取得与现有方法相当的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦内容信息可缓解过拟合问题，提升伪造检测鲁棒性，为实际应用提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Maria Kosche,Tore Koß,Florin Manea,Viktoriya Pak
title: Subsequences in Bounded Ranges: Matching and Analysis Problems
title_zh: 有界范围内的子序列：匹配和分析问题
comment: Extended version of a paper which will appear in the proceedings of the 16th International Conference on Reachability Problems, RP 2022
comments: Extended version of a paper which will appear in the proceedings of the 16th International Conference on Reachability Problems, RP 2022
abstract: In this paper, we consider a variant of the classical algorithmic problem of checking whether a given word $v$ is a subsequence of another word $w$. More precisely, we consider the problem of deciding, given a number $p$ (defining a range-bound) and two words $v$ and $w$, whether there exists a factor $w[i:i+p-1]$ (or, in other words, a range of length $p$) of $w$ having $v$ as subsequence (i.\,e., $v$ occurs as a subsequence in the bounded range $w[i:i+p-1]$). We give matching upper and lower quadratic bounds for the time complexity of this problem. Further, we consider a series of algorithmic problems in this setting, in which, for given integers $k$, $p$ and a word $w$, we analyse the set $p$-Subseq$_{k}(w)$ of all words of length $k$ which occur as subsequence of some factor of length $p$ of $w$. Among these, we consider the $k$-universality problem, the $k$-equivalence problem, as well as problems related to absent subsequences. Surprisingly, unlike the case of the classical model of subsequences in words where such problems have efficient solutions in general, we show that most of these problems become intractable in the new setting when subsequences in bounded ranges are considered. Finally, we provide an example of how some of our results can be applied to subsequence matching problems for circular words.
summary: In this paper, we consider a variant of the classical algorithmic problem of checking whether a given word $v$ is a subsequence of another word $w$. More precisely, we consider the problem of deciding, given a number $p$ (defining a range-bound) and two words $v$ and $w$, whether there exists a factor $w[i:i+p-1]$ (or, in other words, a range of length $p$) of $w$ having $v$ as subsequence (i.\,e., $v$ occurs as a subsequence in the bounded range $w[i:i+p-1]$). We give matching upper and lower quadratic bounds for the time complexity of this problem. Further, we consider a series of algorithmic problems in this setting, in which, for given integers $k$, $p$ and a word $w$, we analyse the set $p$-Subseq$_{k}(w)$ of all words of length $k$ which occur as subsequence of some factor of length $p$ of $w$. Among these, we consider the $k$-universality problem, the $k$-equivalence problem, as well as problems related to absent subsequences. Surprisingly, unlike the case of the classical model of subsequences in words where such problems have efficient solutions in general, we show that most of these problems become intractable in the new setting when subsequences in bounded ranges are considered. Finally, we provide an example of how some of our results can be applied to subsequence matching problems for circular words.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑检查给定单词 $v$ 是否是另一个单词 $w$ 的子序列的经典算法问题的变体。更准确地说，我们考虑的问题是，给定一个数字$p$（定义范围界限）和两个单词$v$和$w$，是否存在$w$的因子$w[i:i+p-1]$（或者，换句话说，长度为$p$的范围），其中$v$作为子序列（即，$v$作为有界范围中的子序列出现） $w[i:i+p-1]$)。我们给出了该问题的时间复杂度的匹配上下二次界。此外，我们在此设置中考虑一系列算法问题，其中，对于给定的整数 $k$、$p$ 和单词 $w$，我们分析长度为 $k$ 的所有单词的集合 $p$-Subseq$_{k}(w)$，这些单词作为 $w$ 的长度为 $p$ 的某个因子的子序列出现。其中，我们考虑$k$-普遍性问题、$k$-等价问题，以及与不存在子序列相关的问题。令人惊讶的是，与单词子序列的经典模型的情况不同，此类问题通常具有有效的解决方案，我们表明，当考虑有界范围内的子序列时，大多数这些问题在新设置中变得棘手。最后，我们提供了一个示例，说明如何将我们的一些结果应用于循环词的子序列匹配问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在限定长度范围内判断子序列存在性的问题，并分析相关算法问题的复杂度。
AI.motivation: 传统子序列问题在限定范围内的处理存在计算复杂度挑战，且实际应用中需要考虑范围约束。
AI.method: 通过复杂度分析与问题归约，建立时间复杂度的上下界，并探讨k-普遍性、k-等价性等算法问题。
AI.result: 确定该问题的时间复杂度为二次上下界，发现多数问题在限定范围内变为不可解，提出环状字符串的应用案例。
AI.conclusion: 限定范围子序列问题显著增加计算难度，但部分结果可应用于环状字符串匹配等场景。

search_text: Subsequences in Bounded Ranges: Matching and Analysis Problems 有界范围内的子序列：匹配和分析问题 In this paper, we consider a variant of the classical algorithmic problem of checking whether a given word $v$ is a subsequence of another word $w$. More precisely, we consider the problem of deciding, given a number $p$ (defining a range-bound) and two words $v$ and $w$, whether there exists a factor $w[i:i+p-1]$ (or, in other words, a range of length $p$) of $w$ having $v$ as subsequence (i.\,e., $v$ occurs as a subsequence in the bounded range $w[i:i+p-1]$). We give matching upper and lower quadratic bounds for the time complexity of this problem. Further, we consider a series of algorithmic problems in this setting, in which, for given integers $k$, $p$ and a word $w$, we analyse the set $p$-Subseq$_{k}(w)$ of all words of length $k$ which occur as subsequence of some factor of length $p$ of $w$. Among these, we consider the $k$-universality problem, the $k$-equivalence problem, as well as problems related to absent subsequences. Surprisingly, unlike the case of the classical model of subsequences in words where such problems have efficient solutions in general, we show that most of these problems become intractable in the new setting when subsequences in bounded ranges are considered. Finally, we provide an example of how some of our results can be applied to subsequence matching problems for circular words. 在本文中，我们考虑检查给定单词 $v$ 是否是另一个单词 $w$ 的子序列的经典算法问题的变体。更准确地说，我们考虑的问题是，给定一个数字$p$（定义范围界限）和两个单词$v$和$w$，是否存在$w$的因子$w[i:i+p-1]$（或者，换句话说，长度为$p$的范围），其中$v$作为子序列（即，$v$作为有界范围中的子序列出现） $w[i:i+p-1]$)。我们给出了该问题的时间复杂度的匹配上下二次界。此外，我们在此设置中考虑一系列算法问题，其中，对于给定的整数 $k$、$p$ 和单词 $w$，我们分析长度为 $k$ 的所有单词的集合 $p$-Subseq$_{k}(w)$，这些单词作为 $w$ 的长度为 $p$ 的某个因子的子序列出现。其中，我们考虑$k$-普遍性问题、$k$-等价问题，以及与不存在子序列相关的问题。令人惊讶的是，与单词子序列的经典模型的情况不同，此类问题通常具有有效的解决方案，我们表明，当考虑有界范围内的子序列时，大多数这些问题在新设置中变得棘手。最后，我们提供了一个示例，说明如何将我们的一些结果应用于循环词的子序列匹配问题。 本文研究在限定长度范围内判断子序列存在性的问题，并分析相关算法问题的复杂度。 Maria Kosche,Tore Koß,Florin Manea,Viktoriya Pak cs.FL,cs.DS

authors_text: Ruiqi Zhang,Jie Chen
title: NDF: Neural Deformable Fields for Dynamic Human Modelling
title_zh: NDF：用于动态人体建模的神经可变形场
abstract: We propose Neural Deformable Fields (NDF), a new representation for dynamic human digitization from a multi-view video. Recent works proposed to represent a dynamic human body with shared canonical neural radiance fields which links to the observation space with deformation fields estimations. However, the learned canonical representation is static and the current design of the deformation fields is not able to represent large movements or detailed geometry changes. In this paper, we propose to learn a neural deformable field wrapped around a fitted parametric body model to represent the dynamic human. The NDF is spatially aligned by the underlying reference surface. A neural network is then learned to map pose to the dynamics of NDF. The proposed NDF representation can synthesize the digitized performer with novel views and novel poses with a detailed and reasonable dynamic appearance. Experiments show that our method significantly outperforms recent human synthesis methods.
summary: We propose Neural Deformable Fields (NDF), a new representation for dynamic human digitization from a multi-view video. Recent works proposed to represent a dynamic human body with shared canonical neural radiance fields which links to the observation space with deformation fields estimations. However, the learned canonical representation is static and the current design of the deformation fields is not able to represent large movements or detailed geometry changes. In this paper, we propose to learn a neural deformable field wrapped around a fitted parametric body model to represent the dynamic human. The NDF is spatially aligned by the underlying reference surface. A neural network is then learned to map pose to the dynamics of NDF. The proposed NDF representation can synthesize the digitized performer with novel views and novel poses with a detailed and reasonable dynamic appearance. Experiments show that our method significantly outperforms recent human synthesis methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了神经变形场（NDF），这是一种多视图视频动态人体数字化的新表示。最近的工作提出用共享的规范神经辐射场来表示动态人体，该神经辐射场通过变形场估计链接到观察空间。然而，学习到的规范表示是静态的，变形场的当前设计无法表示大的运动或详细的几何变化。在本文中，我们建议学习围绕拟合参数身体模型的神经可变形场来表示动态人体。 NDF 通过下面的参考表面在空间上对齐。然后学习神经网络将姿态映射到 NDF 的动态。所提出的 NDF 表示可以合成具有新颖视角和新颖姿势的数字化表演者，并具有详细且合理的动态外观。实验表明，我们的方法明显优于最近的人类合成方法。

AI.tldr: 提出NDF方法，用于从多视角视频中实现动态人体的数字化建模
AI.motivation: 现有方法基于静态规范神经辐射场，难以处理大范围运动或几何细节变化
AI.method: 基于参数化身体模型构建空间对齐的神经可变形场，通过神经网络学习姿势到动态形变的映射
AI.result: 实验表明NDF在动态人体合成任务中显著优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: NDF有效解决了动态人体建模中的大运动和几何变化问题，实现了高质量的动态外观合成

authors_text: Min Li,Jiashu Wu,Junbiao Dai,Qingshan Jiang,Qiang Qu,Xiaoluo Huang,Yang Wang
title: A self-contained and self-explanatory DNA storage system
title_zh: 一个独立且不言自明的 DNA 存储系统
abstract: Current research on DNA storage usually focuses on the improvement of storage density by developing effective encoding and decoding schemes while lacking the consideration on the uncertainty in ultra-long-term data storage and retention. Consequently, the current DNA storage systems are often not self-contained, implying that they have to resort to external tools for the restoration of the stored DNA data. This may result in high risks in data loss since the required tools might not be available due to the high uncertainty in far future. To address this issue, we propose in this paper a self-contained DNA storage system that can bring self-explanatory to its stored data without relying on any external tool. To this end, we design a specific DNA file format whereby a separate storage scheme is developed to reduce the data redundancy while an effective indexing is designed for random read operations to the stored data file. We verified through experimental data that the proposed self-contained and self-explanatory method can not only get rid of the reliance on external tools for data restoration but also minimise the data redundancy brought about when the amount of data to be stored reaches a certain scale.
summary: Current research on DNA storage usually focuses on the improvement of storage density by developing effective encoding and decoding schemes while lacking the consideration on the uncertainty in ultra-long-term data storage and retention. Consequently, the current DNA storage systems are often not self-contained, implying that they have to resort to external tools for the restoration of the stored DNA data. This may result in high risks in data loss since the required tools might not be available due to the high uncertainty in far future. To address this issue, we propose in this paper a self-contained DNA storage system that can bring self-explanatory to its stored data without relying on any external tool. To this end, we design a specific DNA file format whereby a separate storage scheme is developed to reduce the data redundancy while an effective indexing is designed for random read operations to the stored data file. We verified through experimental data that the proposed self-contained and self-explanatory method can not only get rid of the reliance on external tools for data restoration but also minimise the data redundancy brought about when the amount of data to be stored reaches a certain scale.
abstract_zh: 目前DNA存储的研究通常侧重于通过开发有效的编码和解码方案来提高存储密度，而缺乏对超长期数据存储和保留的不确定性的考虑。因此，当前的 DNA 存储系统通常不是独立的，这意味着它们必须借助外部工具来恢复存储的 DNA 数据。这可能会导致数据丢失的高风险，因为由于遥远的未来的高度不确定性，所需的工具可能无法使用。为了解决这个问题，我们在本文中提出了一种独立的 DNA 存储系统，可以在不依赖任何外部工具的情况下为其存储的数据带来不言自明的效果。为此，我们设计了一种特定的DNA文件格式，其中开发了单独的存储方案以减少数据冗余，同时设计了有效的索引以对存储的数据文件进行随机读取操作。我们通过实验数据验证，所提出的自包含且不言自明的方法不仅可以摆脱对外部工具进行数据恢复的依赖，而且可以最大限度地减少存储数据量达到一定规模时带来的数据冗余。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自包含且自解释的DNA存储系统，以解决超长期数据存储中对外部工具的依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 现有DNA存储系统因缺乏对超长期存储不确定性的考虑，需依赖外部工具恢复数据，存在数据丢失风险。
AI.method: 设计特定DNA文件格式，采用独立存储方案减少冗余，并构建高效索引以实现随机读取。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法可摆脱外部工具依赖，同时有效降低大规模数据存储时的冗余度。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为超长期DNA存储提供了更可靠且自给自足的解决方案。

result: 实验验证该方法可摆脱外部工具依赖，同时有效降低大规模数据存储时的冗余度。
conclusion: 该系统为超长期DNA存储提供了更可靠且自给自足的解决方案。
search_text: A self-contained and self-explanatory DNA storage system 一个独立且不言自明的 DNA 存储系统 Current research on DNA storage usually focuses on the improvement of storage density by developing effective encoding and decoding schemes while lacking the consideration on the uncertainty in ultra-long-term data storage and retention. Consequently, the current DNA storage systems are often not self-contained, implying that they have to resort to external tools for the restoration of the stored DNA data. This may result in high risks in data loss since the required tools might not be available due to the high uncertainty in far future. To address this issue, we propose in this paper a self-contained DNA storage system that can bring self-explanatory to its stored data without relying on any external tool. To this end, we design a specific DNA file format whereby a separate storage scheme is developed to reduce the data redundancy while an effective indexing is designed for random read operations to the stored data file. We verified through experimental data that the proposed self-contained and self-explanatory method can not only get rid of the reliance on external tools for data restoration but also minimise the data redundancy brought about when the amount of data to be stored reaches a certain scale. 目前DNA存储的研究通常侧重于通过开发有效的编码和解码方案来提高存储密度，而缺乏对超长期数据存储和保留的不确定性的考虑。因此，当前的 DNA 存储系统通常不是独立的，这意味着它们必须借助外部工具来恢复存储的 DNA 数据。这可能会导致数据丢失的高风险，因为由于遥远的未来的高度不确定性，所需的工具可能无法使用。为了解决这个问题，我们在本文中提出了一种独立的 DNA 存储系统，可以在不依赖任何外部工具的情况下为其存储的数据带来不言自明的效果。为此，我们设计了一种特定的DNA文件格式，其中开发了单独的存储方案以减少数据冗余，同时设计了有效的索引以对存储的数据文件进行随机读取操作。我们通过实验数据验证，所提出的自包含且不言自明的方法不仅可以摆脱对外部工具进行数据恢复的依赖，而且可以最大限度地减少存储数据量达到一定规模时带来的数据冗余。 本文提出一种自包含且自解释的DNA存储系统，以解决超长期数据存储中对外部工具的依赖问题。 Min Li,Jiashu Wu,Junbiao Dai,Qingshan Jiang,Qiang Qu,Xiaoluo Huang,Yang Wang cs.ET,cs.DB,cs.MM

authors_text: Alejandro Guerrero-López,Carlos Sevilla-Salcedo,Vanessa Gómez-Verdejo,Pablo M. Olmos
title: Multimodal hierarchical Variational AutoEncoders with Factor Analysis latent space
title_zh: 具有因子分析潜在空间的多模态分层变分自动编码器
comment: 21 pages main work, 2 pages supplementary, 14 figures
comments: 21 pages main work, 2 pages supplementary, 14 figures
abstract: Purpose: Handling heterogeneous and mixed data types has become increasingly critical with the exponential growth in real-world databases. While deep generative models attempt to merge diverse data views into a common latent space, they often sacrifice interpretability, flexibility, and modularity. This study proposes a novel method to address these limitations by combining Variational AutoEncoders (VAEs) with a Factor Analysis latent space (FA-VAE). Methods: The proposed FA-VAE method employs multiple VAEs to learn a private representation for each heterogeneous data view in a continuous latent space. Information is shared between views using a low-dimensional latent space, generated via a linear projection matrix. This modular design creates a hierarchical dependency between private and shared latent spaces, allowing for the flexible addition of new views and conditioning of pre-trained models. Results: The FA-VAE approach facilitates cross-generation of data from different domains and enables transfer learning between generative models. This allows for effective integration of information across diverse data views while preserving their distinct characteristics. Conclusions: By overcoming the limitations of existing methods, the FA-VAE provides a more interpretable, flexible, and modular solution for managing heterogeneous data types. It offers a pathway to more efficient and scalable data-handling strategies, enhancing the potential for cross-domain data synthesis and model transferability.
summary: Purpose: Handling heterogeneous and mixed data types has become increasingly critical with the exponential growth in real-world databases. While deep generative models attempt to merge diverse data views into a common latent space, they often sacrifice interpretability, flexibility, and modularity. This study proposes a novel method to address these limitations by combining Variational AutoEncoders (VAEs) with a Factor Analysis latent space (FA-VAE). Methods: The proposed FA-VAE method employs multiple VAEs to learn a private representation for each heterogeneous data view in a continuous latent space. Information is shared between views using a low-dimensional latent space, generated via a linear projection matrix. This modular design creates a hierarchical dependency between private and shared latent spaces, allowing for the flexible addition of new views and conditioning of pre-trained models. Results: The FA-VAE approach facilitates cross-generation of data from different domains and enables transfer learning between generative models. This allows for effective integration of information across diverse data views while preserving their distinct characteristics. Conclusions: By overcoming the limitations of existing methods, the FA-VAE provides a more interpretable, flexible, and modular solution for managing heterogeneous data types. It offers a pathway to more efficient and scalable data-handling strategies, enhancing the potential for cross-domain data synthesis and model transferability.
abstract_zh: 目的：随着现实世界数据库的指数级增长，处理异构和混合数据类型变得越来越重要。虽然深度生成模型试图将不同的数据视图合并到一个共同的潜在空间中，但它们通常会牺牲可解释性、灵活性和模块化。本研究提出了一种新方法，通过将变分自动编码器 (VAE) 与因子分析潜在空间 (FA-VAE) 相结合来解决这些限制。方法：所提出的 FA-VAE 方法采用多个 VAE 来学习连续潜在空间中每个异构数据视图的私有表示。使用通过线性投影矩阵生成的低维潜在空间在视图之间共享信息。这种模块化设计在私有和共享潜在空间之间创建了层次依赖性，允许灵活添加新视图和预训练模型的调节。结果：FA-VAE 方法促进了不同领域数据的交叉生成，并实现了生成模型之间的迁移学习。这样可以有效集成不同数据视图中的信息，同时保留其独特的特征。结论：通过克服现有方法的局限性，FA-VAE 为管理异构数据类型提供了一种更可解释、更灵活、更模块化的解决方案。它提供了一条实现更高效和可扩展的数据处理策略的途径，增强了跨域数据合成和模型可转移性的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合变分自编码器（VAE）与因子分析潜在空间的多模态分层模型（FA-VAE），以解决异构数据类型的处理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度生成模型在融合多源数据时牺牲了可解释性、灵活性和模块化，亟需一种更高效的异构数据处理方法。
AI.method: 通过多个VAE学习各数据视图的私有表示，并利用线性投影矩阵生成低维共享潜在空间，构建私有与共享空间的分层依赖关系。
AI.result: 实现了跨领域数据生成与模型迁移学习，有效整合多视图信息同时保留其独特特征。
AI.conclusion: FA-VAE克服了传统方法的局限性，为异构数据处理提供了更可解释、灵活且模块化的解决方案。

authors_text: Yuning Lu,Liangjian Wen,Jianzhuang Liu,Yajing Liu,Xinmei Tian
title: Self-Supervision Can Be a Good Few-Shot Learner
title_zh: 自我监督可以成为一个很好的小样本学习者
abstract: Existing few-shot learning (FSL) methods rely on training with a large labeled dataset, which prevents them from leveraging abundant unlabeled data. From an information-theoretic perspective, we propose an effective unsupervised FSL method, learning representations with self-supervision. Following the InfoMax principle, our method learns comprehensive representations by capturing the intrinsic structure of the data. Specifically, we maximize the mutual information (MI) of instances and their representations with a low-bias MI estimator to perform self-supervised pre-training. Rather than supervised pre-training focusing on the discriminable features of the seen classes, our self-supervised model has less bias toward the seen classes, resulting in better generalization for unseen classes. We explain that supervised pre-training and self-supervised pre-training are actually maximizing different MI objectives. Extensive experiments are further conducted to analyze their FSL performance with various training settings. Surprisingly, the results show that self-supervised pre-training can outperform supervised pre-training under the appropriate conditions. Compared with state-of-the-art FSL methods, our approach achieves comparable performance on widely used FSL benchmarks without any labels of the base classes.
summary: Existing few-shot learning (FSL) methods rely on training with a large labeled dataset, which prevents them from leveraging abundant unlabeled data. From an information-theoretic perspective, we propose an effective unsupervised FSL method, learning representations with self-supervision. Following the InfoMax principle, our method learns comprehensive representations by capturing the intrinsic structure of the data. Specifically, we maximize the mutual information (MI) of instances and their representations with a low-bias MI estimator to perform self-supervised pre-training. Rather than supervised pre-training focusing on the discriminable features of the seen classes, our self-supervised model has less bias toward the seen classes, resulting in better generalization for unseen classes. We explain that supervised pre-training and self-supervised pre-training are actually maximizing different MI objectives. Extensive experiments are further conducted to analyze their FSL performance with various training settings. Surprisingly, the results show that self-supervised pre-training can outperform supervised pre-training under the appropriate conditions. Compared with state-of-the-art FSL methods, our approach achieves comparable performance on widely used FSL benchmarks without any labels of the base classes.
abstract_zh: 现有的少样本学习（FSL）方法依赖于使用大型标记数据集进行训练，这使得它们无法利用大量的未标记数据。从信息论的角度来看，我们提出了一种有效的无监督 FSL 方法，通过自我监督学习表示。遵循 InfoMax 原则，我们的方法通过捕获数据的内在结构来学习综合表示。具体来说，我们使用低偏差 MI 估计器最大化实例及其表示的互信息 (MI)，以执行自监督预训练。我们的自监督模型不是专注于所见类别的可辨别特征的监督预训练，而是对所见类别的偏见较小，从而更好地概括了看不见的类别。我们解释说，监督预训练和自监督预训练实际上是在最大化不同的 MI 目标。进一步进行了广泛的实验来分析他们在各种训练设置下的 FSL 表现。令人惊讶的是，结果表明，在适当的条件下，自监督预训练可以优于监督预训练。与最先进的 FSL 方法相比，我们的方法在广泛使用的 FSL 基准上实现了可比的性能，而无需任何基类标签。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督的少样本学习方法，通过最大化实例与其表示之间的互信息来学习数据的内在结构，从而在无标签数据上实现良好的少样本学习性能。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本学习方法依赖大量标注数据，无法有效利用丰富的无标签数据，而自监督学习可能通过捕捉数据内在结构提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 基于信息论的InfoMax原理，通过低偏差互信息估计器最大化实例与表示之间的互信息，进行自监督预训练，减少对已见类别的偏差。
AI.result: 在多个少样本学习基准测试中，该方法在无需基础类别标签的情况下达到与最先进方法相当的性能，且在特定条件下优于监督预训练方法。
AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练在少样本学习中具有与监督预训练相当甚至更优的性能，能够有效利用无标签数据提升模型对未见类别的泛化能力。

Extensive experiments are further conducted to analyze their FSL performance with various training settings. Surprisingly, the results show that self-supervised pre-training can outperform supervised pre-training under the appropriate conditions. Compared with state-of-the-art FSL methods, our approach achieves comparable performance on widely used FSL benchmarks without any labels of the base classes. 现有的少样本学习（FSL）方法依赖于使用大型标记数据集进行训练，这使得它们无法利用大量的未标记数据。从信息论的角度来看，我们提出了一种有效的无监督 FSL 方法，通过自我监督学习表示。遵循 InfoMax 原则，我们的方法通过捕获数据的内在结构来学习综合表示。具体来说，我们使用低偏差 MI 估计器最大化实例及其表示的互信息 (MI)，以执行自监督预训练。我们的自监督模型不是专注于所见类别的可辨别特征的监督预训练，而是对所见类别的偏见较小，从而更好地概括了看不见的类别。我们解释说，监督预训练和自监督预训练实际上是在最大化不同的 MI 目标。进一步进行了广泛的实验来分析他们在各种训练设置下的 FSL 表现。令人惊讶的是，结果表明，在适当的条件下，自监督预训练可以优于监督预训练。与最先进的 FSL 方法相比，我们的方法在广泛使用的 FSL 基准上实现了可比的性能，而无需任何基类标签。 本文提出一种基于自监督的少样本学习方法，通过最大化实例与其表示之间的互信息来学习数据的内在结构，从而在无标签数据上实现良好的少样本学习性能。 Yuning Lu,Liangjian Wen,Jianzhuang Liu,Yajing Liu,Xinmei Tian cs.CV

authors_text: Yusheng Liu,Zhongchen Zhao,Lisheng Wang
title: A Multi-Stage Framework for the 2022 Multi-Structure Segmentation for Renal Cancer Treatment
title_zh: 2022 年肾癌治疗多结构细分的多阶段框架
abstract: Three-dimensional (3D) kidney parsing on computed tomography angiography (CTA) images is of great clinical significance. Automatic segmentation of kidney, renal tumor, renal vein and renal artery benefits a lot on surgery-based renal cancer treatment. In this paper, we propose a new nnhra-unet network, and use a multi-stage framework which is based on it to segment the multi-structure of kidney and participate in the KiPA2022 challenge.
summary: Three-dimensional (3D) kidney parsing on computed tomography angiography (CTA) images is of great clinical significance. Automatic segmentation of kidney, renal tumor, renal vein and renal artery benefits a lot on surgery-based renal cancer treatment. In this paper, we propose a new nnhra-unet network, and use a multi-stage framework which is based on it to segment the multi-structure of kidney and participate in the KiPA2022 challenge.
abstract_zh: 计算机断层扫描血管造影（CTA）图像的三维（3D）肾脏解析具有重要的临床意义。肾脏、肾肿瘤、肾静脉和肾动脉的自动分割对于基于手术的肾癌治疗有很大帮助。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的nnhra-unet网络，并使用基于它的多阶段框架来分割肾脏的多结构并参与KiPA2022挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于nnhra-unet网络的多阶段框架，用于对肾癌治疗中的CTA图像进行多结构分割。
AI.motivation: 3D肾脏解析对肾癌手术治疗具有重要意义，而自动分割肾脏、肾肿瘤、肾静脉和肾动脉有助于提高手术效果。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的nnhra-unet网络，并基于该网络构建了一个多阶段框架，用于分割CTA图像中的多结构。
AI.result: 该方法参与了KiPA2022挑战赛，实现了对肾脏及其相关结构的准确分割。
AI.conclusion: 该多阶段框架在肾癌治疗中的多结构分割任务中表现出良好的性能，具有临床应用价值。

authors_text: Darwin Saire,Adín Ramírez Rivera
title: Global and Local Features through Gaussian Mixture Models on Image Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 通过图像语义分割的高斯混合模型的全局和局部特征
comment: Pre-print to appear in IEEE Access. Code available at https://gitlab.com/mipl/phgmm
comments: Pre-print to appear in IEEE Access. Code available at https://gitlab.com/mipl/phgmm
abstract: The semantic segmentation task aims at dense classification at the pixel-wise level. Deep models exhibited progress in tackling this task. However, one remaining problem with these approaches is the loss of spatial precision, often produced at the segmented objects' boundaries. Our proposed model addresses this problem by providing an internal structure for the feature representations while extracting a global representation that supports the former. To fit the internal structure, during training, we predict a Gaussian Mixture Model from the data, which, merged with the skip connections and the decoding stage, helps avoid wrong inductive biases. Furthermore, our results show that we can improve semantic segmentation by providing both learning representations (global and local) with a clustering behavior and combining them. Finally, we present results demonstrating our advances in Cityscapes and Synthia datasets.
summary: The semantic segmentation task aims at dense classification at the pixel-wise level. Deep models exhibited progress in tackling this task. However, one remaining problem with these approaches is the loss of spatial precision, often produced at the segmented objects' boundaries. Our proposed model addresses this problem by providing an internal structure for the feature representations while extracting a global representation that supports the former. To fit the internal structure, during training, we predict a Gaussian Mixture Model from the data, which, merged with the skip connections and the decoding stage, helps avoid wrong inductive biases. Furthermore, our results show that we can improve semantic segmentation by providing both learning representations (global and local) with a clustering behavior and combining them. Finally, we present results demonstrating our advances in Cityscapes and Synthia datasets.
abstract_zh: 语义分割任务旨在像素级别的密集分类。深度模型在解决这项任务方面取得了进展。然而，这些方法的一个遗留问题是空间精度的损失，这通常是在分割对象的边界处产生的。我们提出的模型通过为特征表示提供内部结构，同时提取支持前者的全局表示来解决这个问题。为了适应内部结构，在训练期间，我们根据数据预测高斯混合模型，该模型与跳跃连接和解码阶段合并，有助于避免错误的归纳偏差。此外，我们的结果表明，我们可以通过提供具有聚类行为的学习表示（全局和局部）并将它们组合来改进语义分割。最后，我们展示的结果展示了我们在 Cityscapes 和 Synthia 数据集方面的进展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合高斯混合模型（GMM）的语义分割方法，通过全局与局部特征融合提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在语义分割中存在边界区域空间精度不足的问题，需通过结构化特征表示改进分割效果。
AI.method: 训练阶段预测高斯混合模型，将其与跳跃连接及解码阶段结合，通过聚类行为实现全局与局部特征的联合学习。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和Synthia数据集上验证了方法有效性，分割精度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 融合全局-局部特征表示的GMM方法可有效解决语义分割中的边界模糊问题。

authors_text: Shuai Bai,Huiling Zhou,Zhikang Li,Chang Zhou,Hongxia Yang
title: Single Stage Virtual Try-on via Deformable Attention Flows
title_zh: 通过可变形注意力流进行单阶段虚拟试穿
abstract: Virtual try-on aims to generate a photo-realistic fitting result given an in-shop garment and a reference person image. Existing methods usually build up multi-stage frameworks to deal with clothes warping and body blending respectively, or rely heavily on intermediate parser-based labels which may be noisy or even inaccurate. To solve the above challenges, we propose a single-stage try-on framework by developing a novel Deformable Attention Flow (DAFlow), which applies the deformable attention scheme to multi-flow estimation. With pose keypoints as the guidance only, the self- and cross-deformable attention flows are estimated for the reference person and the garment images, respectively. By sampling multiple flow fields, the feature-level and pixel-level information from different semantic areas are simultaneously extracted and merged through the attention mechanism. It enables clothes warping and body synthesizing at the same time which leads to photo-realistic results in an end-to-end manner. Extensive experiments on two try-on datasets demonstrate that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance both qualitatively and quantitatively. Furthermore, additional experiments on the other two image editing tasks illustrate the versatility of our method for multi-view synthesis and image animation.
summary: Virtual try-on aims to generate a photo-realistic fitting result given an in-shop garment and a reference person image. Existing methods usually build up multi-stage frameworks to deal with clothes warping and body blending respectively, or rely heavily on intermediate parser-based labels which may be noisy or even inaccurate. To solve the above challenges, we propose a single-stage try-on framework by developing a novel Deformable Attention Flow (DAFlow), which applies the deformable attention scheme to multi-flow estimation. With pose keypoints as the guidance only, the self- and cross-deformable attention flows are estimated for the reference person and the garment images, respectively. By sampling multiple flow fields, the feature-level and pixel-level information from different semantic areas are simultaneously extracted and merged through the attention mechanism. It enables clothes warping and body synthesizing at the same time which leads to photo-realistic results in an end-to-end manner. Extensive experiments on two try-on datasets demonstrate that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance both qualitatively and quantitatively. Furthermore, additional experiments on the other two image editing tasks illustrate the versatility of our method for multi-view synthesis and image animation.
abstract_zh: 虚拟试穿旨在根据店内服装和参考人物图像生成逼真的试穿结果。现有的方法通常建立多阶段框架来分别处理衣服变形和身体混合，或者严重依赖基于中间解析器的标签，这些标签可能有噪音甚至不准确。为了解决上述挑战，我们通过开发一种新颖的可变形注意流（DAFlow）提出了一个单阶段试戴框架，该框架将可变形注意方案应用于多流估计。仅以姿势关键点作为指导，分别估计参考人和服装图像的自变形注意力流和交叉变形注意力流。通过对多个流场进行采样，通过注意力机制同时提取并合并来自不同语义区域的特征级和像素级信息。它可以同时实现衣服变形和身体合成，从而以端到端的方式产生照片般逼真的结果。对两个试戴数据集的大量实验表明，我们提出的方法在定性和定量上都实现了最先进的性能。此外，对其他两个图像编辑任务的附加实验说明了我们的多视图合成和图像动画方法的多功能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可变形注意力流的单阶段虚拟试穿方法，通过同时处理衣物变形和人体合成生成逼真的试穿效果。
AI.motivation: 现有虚拟试穿方法多采用多阶段框架或依赖可能不准确的中间标签，存在流程复杂和结果不稳定的问题。
AI.method: 开发了可变形注意力流（DAFlow），利用姿态关键点作为引导，分别估计参考人体和衣物图像的自注意流与交叉注意流，通过多流场采样实现特征级和像素级信息的融合。
AI.result: 在两个试穿数据集上达到最先进的性能，同时在多视角合成和图像动画任务中展现出方法的通用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过单阶段端到端流程实现了高质量虚拟试穿，验证了其在复杂图像编辑任务中的有效性与适应性。

search_text: Single Stage Virtual Try-on via Deformable Attention Flows 通过可变形注意力流进行单阶段虚拟试穿 Virtual try-on aims to generate a photo-realistic fitting result given an in-shop garment and a reference person image. Existing methods usually build up multi-stage frameworks to deal with clothes warping and body blending respectively, or rely heavily on intermediate parser-based labels which may be noisy or even inaccurate. To solve the above challenges, we propose a single-stage try-on framework by developing a novel Deformable Attention Flow (DAFlow), which applies the deformable attention scheme to multi-flow estimation. With pose keypoints as the guidance only, the self- and cross-deformable attention flows are estimated for the reference person and the garment images, respectively. By sampling multiple flow fields, the feature-level and pixel-level information from different semantic areas are simultaneously extracted and merged through the attention mechanism. It enables clothes warping and body synthesizing at the same time which leads to photo-realistic results in an end-to-end manner. Extensive experiments on two try-on datasets demonstrate that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance both qualitatively and quantitatively. Furthermore, additional experiments on the other two image editing tasks illustrate the versatility of our method for multi-view synthesis and image animation. 虚拟试穿旨在根据店内服装和参考人物图像生成逼真的试穿结果。现有的方法通常建立多阶段框架来分别处理衣服变形和身体混合，或者严重依赖基于中间解析器的标签，这些标签可能有噪音甚至不准确。为了解决上述挑战，我们通过开发一种新颖的可变形注意流（DAFlow）提出了一个单阶段试戴框架，该框架将可变形注意方案应用于多流估计。仅以姿势关键点作为指导，分别估计参考人和服装图像的自变形注意力流和交叉变形注意力流。通过对多个流场进行采样，通过注意力机制同时提取并合并来自不同语义区域的特征级和像素级信息。它可以同时实现衣服变形和身体合成，从而以端到端的方式产生照片般逼真的结果。对两个试戴数据集的大量实验表明，我们提出的方法在定性和定量上都实现了最先进的性能。此外，对其他两个图像编辑任务的附加实验说明了我们的多视图合成和图像动画方法的多功能性。 本文提出了一种基于可变形注意力流的单阶段虚拟试穿方法，通过同时处理衣物变形和人体合成生成逼真的试穿效果。 Shuai Bai,Huiling Zhou,Zhikang Li,Chang Zhou,Hongxia Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Sungwon Han,Sungwon Park,Fangzhao Wu,Sundong Kim,Chuhan Wu,Xing Xie,Meeyoung Cha
title: FedX: Unsupervised Federated Learning with Cross Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: FedeX：具有交叉知识蒸馏的无监督联邦学习
comment: Accepted and will be published at ECCV2022
comments: Accepted and will be published at ECCV2022
abstract: This paper presents FedX, an unsupervised federated learning framework. Our model learns unbiased representation from decentralized and heterogeneous local data. It employs a two-sided knowledge distillation with contrastive learning as a core component, allowing the federated system to function without requiring clients to share any data features. Furthermore, its adaptable architecture can be used as an add-on module for existing unsupervised algorithms in federated settings. Experiments show that our model improves performance significantly (1.58--5.52pp) on five unsupervised algorithms.
summary: This paper presents FedX, an unsupervised federated learning framework. Our model learns unbiased representation from decentralized and heterogeneous local data. It employs a two-sided knowledge distillation with contrastive learning as a core component, allowing the federated system to function without requiring clients to share any data features. Furthermore, its adaptable architecture can be used as an add-on module for existing unsupervised algorithms in federated settings. Experiments show that our model improves performance significantly (1.58--5.52pp) on five unsupervised algorithms.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 FedX，一个无监督的联邦学习框架。我们的模型从分散的异构本地数据中学习无偏差的表示。它采用双向知识蒸馏，以对比学习为核心组件，允许联邦系统在不需要客户端共享任何数据特征的情况下运行。此外，其适应性强的架构可以用作联合设置中现有无监督算法的附加模块。实验表明，我们的模型在五种无监督算法上显着提高了性能（1.58--5.52pp）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedX框架，通过无监督联邦学习在无需共享数据特征的情况下提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习面临数据异构性和隐私保护挑战，传统方法难以有效利用去中心化数据。
AI.method: 采用双向知识蒸馏与对比学习，构建无需数据共享的联邦学习架构，并可作为现有算法的扩展模块。
AI.result: 在五个无监督算法上实现1.58-5.52个百分点的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: FedX通过跨知识蒸馏有效解决了联邦学习中的数据异构问题，具有良好的扩展性和应用价值。

authors_text: Xiaoyu Dong,Naoto Yokoya,Longguang Wang,Tatsumi Uezato
title: Learning Mutual Modulation for Self-Supervised Cross-Modal Super-Resolution
title_zh: 学习互调制以实现自监督跨模态超分辨率
abstract: Self-supervised cross-modal super-resolution (SR) can overcome the difficulty of acquiring paired training data, but is challenging because only low-resolution (LR) source and high-resolution (HR) guide images from different modalities are available. Existing methods utilize pseudo or weak supervision in LR space and thus deliver results that are blurry or not faithful to the source modality. To address this issue, we present a mutual modulation SR (MMSR) model, which tackles the task by a mutual modulation strategy, including a source-to-guide modulation and a guide-to-source modulation. In these modulations, we develop cross-domain adaptive filters to fully exploit cross-modal spatial dependency and help induce the source to emulate the resolution of the guide and induce the guide to mimic the modality characteristics of the source. Moreover, we adopt a cycle consistency constraint to train MMSR in a fully self-supervised manner. Experiments on various tasks demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of our MMSR.
summary: Self-supervised cross-modal super-resolution (SR) can overcome the difficulty of acquiring paired training data, but is challenging because only low-resolution (LR) source and high-resolution (HR) guide images from different modalities are available. Existing methods utilize pseudo or weak supervision in LR space and thus deliver results that are blurry or not faithful to the source modality. To address this issue, we present a mutual modulation SR (MMSR) model, which tackles the task by a mutual modulation strategy, including a source-to-guide modulation and a guide-to-source modulation. In these modulations, we develop cross-domain adaptive filters to fully exploit cross-modal spatial dependency and help induce the source to emulate the resolution of the guide and induce the guide to mimic the modality characteristics of the source. Moreover, we adopt a cycle consistency constraint to train MMSR in a fully self-supervised manner. Experiments on various tasks demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of our MMSR.
abstract_zh: 自监督跨模态超分辨率（SR）可以克服获取配对训练数据的困难，但具有挑战性，因为只有来自不同模态的低分辨率（LR）源和高分辨率（HR）引导图像可用。现有方法利用 LR 空间中的伪监督或弱监督，从而提供模糊或不忠实于源模态的结果。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种互调制 SR (MMSR) 模型，该模型通过互调制策略来解决该任务，包括源到引导调制和引导到源调制。在这些调制中，我们开发了跨域自适应滤波器，以充分利用跨模态空间依赖性，并帮助诱导源模拟波导的分辨率，并诱导波导模仿源的模态特征。此外，我们采用循环一致性约束以完全自监督的方式训练 MMSR。各种任务的实验证明了我们的 MMSR 的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督跨模态超分辨率方法，通过源图像与引导图像的双向调制实现高质量重建。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态超分辨率方法因仅依赖低分辨率空间的伪监督，导致重建结果模糊或与源模态不一致，亟需更有效的跨模态信息交互机制。
AI.method: 设计双向调制策略（源到引导调制与引导到源调制），结合跨域自适应滤波器挖掘模态间空间依赖关系，并引入循环一致性约束实现全自监督训练。
AI.result: 在多个跨模态超分辨率任务中达到SOTA性能，显著提升重建清晰度与模态保真度。
AI.conclusion: 双向调制框架有效解决了跨模态超分辨率中的信息对齐与细节保留难题，为自监督学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Learning Mutual Modulation for Self-Supervised Cross-Modal Super-Resolution 学习互调制以实现自监督跨模态超分辨率 Self-supervised cross-modal super-resolution (SR) can overcome the difficulty of acquiring paired training data, but is challenging because only low-resolution (LR) source and high-resolution (HR) guide images from different modalities are available. Existing methods utilize pseudo or weak supervision in LR space and thus deliver results that are blurry or not faithful to the source modality. To address this issue, we present a mutual modulation SR (MMSR) model, which tackles the task by a mutual modulation strategy, including a source-to-guide modulation and a guide-to-source modulation. In these modulations, we develop cross-domain adaptive filters to fully exploit cross-modal spatial dependency and help induce the source to emulate the resolution of the guide and induce the guide to mimic the modality characteristics of the source. Moreover, we adopt a cycle consistency constraint to train MMSR in a fully self-supervised manner. Experiments on various tasks demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of our MMSR. 自监督跨模态超分辨率（SR）可以克服获取配对训练数据的困难，但具有挑战性，因为只有来自不同模态的低分辨率（LR）源和高分辨率（HR）引导图像可用。现有方法利用 LR 空间中的伪监督或弱监督，从而提供模糊或不忠实于源模态的结果。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种互调制 SR (MMSR) 模型，该模型通过互调制策略来解决该任务，包括源到引导调制和引导到源调制。在这些调制中，我们开发了跨域自适应滤波器，以充分利用跨模态空间依赖性，并帮助诱导源模拟波导的分辨率，并诱导波导模仿源的模态特征。此外，我们采用循环一致性约束以完全自监督的方式训练 MMSR。各种任务的实验证明了我们的 MMSR 的最先进的性能。 本文提出一种自监督跨模态超分辨率方法，通过源图像与引导图像的双向调制实现高质量重建。 Xiaoyu Dong,Naoto Yokoya,Longguang Wang,Tatsumi Uezato cs.CV

authors_text: Oralie Cattan,Sahar Ghannay,Christophe Servan,Sophie Rosset
title: Benchmarking Transformers-based models on French Spoken Language Understanding tasks
title_zh: 对基于 Transformers 的法语口语理解任务模型进行基准测试
abstract: In the last five years, the rise of the self-attentional Transformer-based architectures led to state-of-the-art performances over many natural language tasks. Although these approaches are increasingly popular, they require large amounts of data and computational resources. There is still a substantial need for benchmarking methodologies ever upwards on under-resourced languages in data-scarce application conditions. Most pre-trained language models were massively studied using the English language and only a few of them were evaluated on French. In this paper, we propose a unified benchmark, focused on evaluating models quality and their ecological impact on two well-known French spoken language understanding tasks. Especially we benchmark thirteen well-established Transformer-based models on the two available spoken language understanding tasks for French: MEDIA and ATIS-FR. Within this framework, we show that compact models can reach comparable results to bigger ones while their ecological impact is considerably lower. However, this assumption is nuanced and depends on the considered compression method.
summary: In the last five years, the rise of the self-attentional Transformer-based architectures led to state-of-the-art performances over many natural language tasks. Although these approaches are increasingly popular, they require large amounts of data and computational resources. There is still a substantial need for benchmarking methodologies ever upwards on under-resourced languages in data-scarce application conditions. Most pre-trained language models were massively studied using the English language and only a few of them were evaluated on French. In this paper, we propose a unified benchmark, focused on evaluating models quality and their ecological impact on two well-known French spoken language understanding tasks. Especially we benchmark thirteen well-established Transformer-based models on the two available spoken language understanding tasks for French: MEDIA and ATIS-FR. Within this framework, we show that compact models can reach comparable results to bigger ones while their ecological impact is considerably lower. However, this assumption is nuanced and depends on the considered compression method.
abstract_zh: 在过去五年中，基于 Transformer 的自注意力架构的兴起在许多自然语言任务上取得了最先进的性能。尽管这些方法越来越流行，但它们需要大量的数据和计算资源。在数据稀缺的应用程序条件下，仍然非常需要对资源不足的语言进行基准测试方法。大多数预训练语言模型都是使用英语进行大量研究的，只有少数模型使用法语进行了评估。在本文中，我们提出了一个统一的基准，重点评估模型质量及其对两个著名的法语口语理解任务的生态影响。特别是，我们在两种可用的法语口语理解任务上对 13 个基于 Transformer 的成熟模型进行了基准测试：MEDIA 和 ATIS-FR。在此框架内，我们表明紧凑模型可以达到与大型模型相当的结果，而其生态影响却相当低。然而，这种假设是微妙的，并且取决于所考虑的压缩方法。

AI.tldr: 本文在法语口语理解任务上对13种基于Transformer的模型进行基准测试，评估其性能与生态影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer模型在自然语言处理中表现优异，但其对数据和计算资源需求高，且针对低资源语言（如法语）的基准测试研究不足。
AI.method: 构建统一基准框架，在MEDIA和ATIS-FR两个法语口语理解任务中测试13种Transformer模型，对比不同压缩方法的性能与生态影响。
AI.result: 小型模型在保持性能的同时显著降低生态影响，但效果依赖于具体的模型压缩技术。
AI.conclusion: 在数据稀缺场景下，通过合理压缩方法可实现高效的小型模型，平衡性能与生态效益。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 在数据稀缺场景下，通过合理压缩方法可实现高效的小型模型，平衡性能与生态效益。

tldr: 本文在法语口语理解任务上对13种基于Transformer的模型进行基准测试，评估其性能与生态影响。
motivation: 尽管Transformer模型在自然语言处理中表现优异，但其对数据和计算资源需求高，且针对低资源语言（如法语）的基准测试研究不足。
method: 构建统一基准框架，在MEDIA和ATIS-FR两个法语口语理解任务中测试13种Transformer模型，对比不同压缩方法的性能与生态影响。
result: 小型模型在保持性能的同时显著降低生态影响，但效果依赖于具体的模型压缩技术。
conclusion: 在数据稀缺场景下，通过合理压缩方法可实现高效的小型模型，平衡性能与生态效益。
search_text: Benchmarking Transformers-based models on French Spoken Language Understanding tasks 对基于 Transformers 的法语口语理解任务模型进行基准测试 In the last five years, the rise of the self-attentional Transformer-based architectures led to state-of-the-art performances over many natural language tasks. Although these approaches are increasingly popular, they require large amounts of data and computational resources. There is still a substantial need for benchmarking methodologies ever upwards on under-resourced languages in data-scarce application conditions. Most pre-trained language models were massively studied using the English language and only a few of them were evaluated on French. In this paper, we propose a unified benchmark, focused on evaluating models quality and their ecological impact on two well-known French spoken language understanding tasks. Especially we benchmark thirteen well-established Transformer-based models on the two available spoken language understanding tasks for French: MEDIA and ATIS-FR. Within this framework, we show that compact models can reach comparable results to bigger ones while their ecological impact is considerably lower. However, this assumption is nuanced and depends on the considered compression method. 在过去五年中，基于 Transformer 的自注意力架构的兴起在许多自然语言任务上取得了最先进的性能。尽管这些方法越来越流行，但它们需要大量的数据和计算资源。在数据稀缺的应用程序条件下，仍然非常需要对资源不足的语言进行基准测试方法。大多数预训练语言模型都是使用英语进行大量研究的，只有少数模型使用法语进行了评估。在本文中，我们提出了一个统一的基准，重点评估模型质量及其对两个著名的法语口语理解任务的生态影响。特别是，我们在两种可用的法语口语理解任务上对 13 个基于 Transformer 的成熟模型进行了基准测试：MEDIA 和 ATIS-FR。在此框架内，我们表明紧凑模型可以达到与大型模型相当的结果，而其生态影响却相当低。然而，这种假设是微妙的，并且取决于所考虑的压缩方法。 本文在法语口语理解任务上对13种基于Transformer的模型进行基准测试，评估其性能与生态影响。 Oralie Cattan,Sahar Ghannay,Christophe Servan,Sophie Rosset cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Oralie Cattan,Christophe Servan,Sophie Rosset
title: On the Usability of Transformers-based models for a French Question-Answering task
title_zh: 基于 Transformers 的模型在法语问答任务中的可用性
comment: French compact model paper: FrALBERT, Accepted to RANLP 2021
comments: French compact model paper: FrALBERT, Accepted to RANLP 2021
abstract: For many tasks, state-of-the-art results have been achieved with Transformer-based architectures, resulting in a paradigmatic shift in practices from the use of task-specific architectures to the fine-tuning of pre-trained language models. The ongoing trend consists in training models with an ever-increasing amount of data and parameters, which requires considerable resources. It leads to a strong search to improve resource efficiency based on algorithmic and hardware improvements evaluated only for English. This raises questions about their usability when applied to small-scale learning problems, for which a limited amount of training data is available, especially for under-resourced languages tasks. The lack of appropriately sized corpora is a hindrance to applying data-driven and transfer learning-based approaches with strong instability cases. In this paper, we establish a state-of-the-art of the efforts dedicated to the usability of Transformer-based models and propose to evaluate these improvements on the question-answering performances of French language which have few resources. We address the instability relating to data scarcity by investigating various training strategies with data augmentation, hyperparameters optimization and cross-lingual transfer. We also introduce a new compact model for French FrALBERT which proves to be competitive in low-resource settings.
summary: For many tasks, state-of-the-art results have been achieved with Transformer-based architectures, resulting in a paradigmatic shift in practices from the use of task-specific architectures to the fine-tuning of pre-trained language models. The ongoing trend consists in training models with an ever-increasing amount of data and parameters, which requires considerable resources. It leads to a strong search to improve resource efficiency based on algorithmic and hardware improvements evaluated only for English. This raises questions about their usability when applied to small-scale learning problems, for which a limited amount of training data is available, especially for under-resourced languages tasks. The lack of appropriately sized corpora is a hindrance to applying data-driven and transfer learning-based approaches with strong instability cases. In this paper, we establish a state-of-the-art of the efforts dedicated to the usability of Transformer-based models and propose to evaluate these improvements on the question-answering performances of French language which have few resources. We address the instability relating to data scarcity by investigating various training strategies with data augmentation, hyperparameters optimization and cross-lingual transfer. We also introduce a new compact model for French FrALBERT which proves to be competitive in low-resource settings.
abstract_zh: 对于许多任务，基于 Transformer 的架构已经取得了最先进的结果，导致实践中从使用特定于任务的架构到微调预训练语言模型的范式转变。当前的趋势在于训练模型的数据和参数数量不断增加，这需要大量资源。它导致了基于仅针对英语评估的算法和硬件改进来提高资源效率的强烈搜索。这引发了人们对它们应用于小规模学习问题时的可用性的质疑，因为小规模学习问题的可用训练数据有限，特别是对于资源不足的语言任务。缺乏适当大小的语料库是应用数据驱动和基于迁移学习的方法的一个障碍，具有很强的不稳定情况。在本文中，我们建立了致力于基于 Transformer 的模型可用性的最先进的工作，并建议评估这些对资源匮乏的法语问答性能的改进。我们通过研究数据增强、超参数优化和跨语言传输等各种训练策略来解决与数据稀缺相关的不稳定性。我们还为法国 FrALBERT 推出了一种新的紧凑型模型，事实证明该模型在资源匮乏的环境中具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 评估基于Transformer的模型在法语问答任务中的可用性，并提出一种适用于低资源场景的紧凑模型FrALBERT。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型依赖大量数据和计算资源，而低资源语言（如法语）因数据不足导致模型不稳定，需探索更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过数据增强、超参数优化、跨语言迁移策略，并设计新型紧凑模型FrALBERT以提升法语问答任务的性能。
AI.result: FrALBERT在低资源条件下表现出竞争力，验证了所提方法对法语问答任务的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Transformer模型可适用于法语问答任务，但需结合数据增强和模型优化策略，FrALBERT为低资源场景提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Zhaoyang Bu,Hanhaodi Zhang,Xiaohu Zhu
title: GAFX: A General Audio Feature eXtractor
title_zh: GAFX：通用音频特征提取器
abstract: Most machine learning models for audio tasks are dealing with a handcrafted feature, the spectrogram. However, it is still unknown whether the spectrogram could be replaced with deep learning based features. In this paper, we answer this question by comparing the different learnable neural networks extracting features with a successful spectrogram model and proposed a General Audio Feature eXtractor (GAFX) based on a dual U-Net (GAFX-U), ResNet (GAFX-R), and Attention (GAFX-A) modules. We design experiments to evaluate this model on the music genre classification task on the GTZAN dataset and perform a detailed ablation study of different configurations of our framework and our model GAFX-U, following the Audio Spectrogram Transformer (AST) classifier achieves competitive performance.
summary: Most machine learning models for audio tasks are dealing with a handcrafted feature, the spectrogram. However, it is still unknown whether the spectrogram could be replaced with deep learning based features. In this paper, we answer this question by comparing the different learnable neural networks extracting features with a successful spectrogram model and proposed a General Audio Feature eXtractor (GAFX) based on a dual U-Net (GAFX-U), ResNet (GAFX-R), and Attention (GAFX-A) modules. We design experiments to evaluate this model on the music genre classification task on the GTZAN dataset and perform a detailed ablation study of different configurations of our framework and our model GAFX-U, following the Audio Spectrogram Transformer (AST) classifier achieves competitive performance.
abstract_zh: 大多数音频任务的机器学习模型都在处理手工制作的特征，即频谱图。然而，目前尚不清楚频谱图是否可以被基于深度学习的特征取代。在本文中，我们通过比较提取特征的不同可学习神经网络与成功的频谱图模型来回答这个问题，并提出了一种基于双 U-Net (GAFX-U)、ResNet (GAFX-R) 和 Attention (GAFX-A) 模块的通用音频特征提取器 (GAFX)。我们设计实验来评估该模型在 GTZAN 数据集上的音乐流派分类任务，并对我们的框架和模型 GAFX-U 的不同配置进行详细的消融研究，随后音频频谱图变换器 (AST) 分类器实现了有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用音频特征提取器GAFX，旨在替代传统频谱图特征，通过深度学习模型提升音频任务性能。
AI.motivation: 传统音频任务依赖手工设计的频谱图特征，但其表现可能受限，需探索基于深度学习的自动特征提取方法以提升效果。
AI.method: 设计了基于双U-Net（GAFX-U）、ResNet（GAFX-R）和注意力（GAFX-A）模块的GAFX模型，在GTZAN数据集上进行音乐流派分类实验，并开展消融研究验证不同模块效果。
AI.result: GAFX-U在GTZAN数据集上达到与Audio Spectrogram Transformer（AST）相当的性能，消融实验证明其模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: GAFX-U验证了深度学习特征替代频谱图的可行性，为音频特征提取提供了新的通用框架。

authors_text: Guangming Wang,Yunzhe Hu,Zhe Liu,Yiyang Zhou,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Wei Zhan,Hesheng Wang
title: What Matters for 3D Scene Flow Network
title_zh: 3D 场景流网络最重要的是什么
abstract: 3D scene flow estimation from point clouds is a low-level 3D motion perception task in computer vision. Flow embedding is a commonly used technique in scene flow estimation, and it encodes the point motion between two consecutive frames. Thus, it is critical for the flow embeddings to capture the correct overall direction of the motion. However, previous works only search locally to determine a soft correspondence, ignoring the distant points that turn out to be the actual matching ones. In addition, the estimated correspondence is usually from the forward direction of the adjacent point clouds, and may not be consistent with the estimated correspondence acquired from the backward direction. To tackle these problems, we propose a novel all-to-all flow embedding layer with backward reliability validation during the initial scene flow estimation. Besides, we investigate and compare several design choices in key components of the 3D scene flow network, including the point similarity calculation, input elements of predictor, and predictor & refinement level design. After carefully choosing the most effective designs, we are able to present a model that achieves the state-of-the-art performance on FlyingThings3D and KITTI Scene Flow datasets. Our proposed model surpasses all existing methods by at least 38.2% on FlyingThings3D dataset and 24.7% on KITTI Scene Flow dataset for EPE3D metric. We release our codes at https://github.com/IRMVLab/3DFlow.
summary: 3D scene flow estimation from point clouds is a low-level 3D motion perception task in computer vision. Flow embedding is a commonly used technique in scene flow estimation, and it encodes the point motion between two consecutive frames. Thus, it is critical for the flow embeddings to capture the correct overall direction of the motion. However, previous works only search locally to determine a soft correspondence, ignoring the distant points that turn out to be the actual matching ones. In addition, the estimated correspondence is usually from the forward direction of the adjacent point clouds, and may not be consistent with the estimated correspondence acquired from the backward direction. To tackle these problems, we propose a novel all-to-all flow embedding layer with backward reliability validation during the initial scene flow estimation. Besides, we investigate and compare several design choices in key components of the 3D scene flow network, including the point similarity calculation, input elements of predictor, and predictor & refinement level design. After carefully choosing the most effective designs, we are able to present a model that achieves the state-of-the-art performance on FlyingThings3D and KITTI Scene Flow datasets. Our proposed model surpasses all existing methods by at least 38.2% on FlyingThings3D dataset and 24.7% on KITTI Scene Flow dataset for EPE3D metric. We release our codes at https://github.com/IRMVLab/3DFlow.
abstract_zh: 从点云进行 3D 场景流估计是计算机视觉中的低级 3D 运动感知任务。流嵌入是场景流估计中常用的技术，它对两个连续帧之间的点运动进行编码。因此，流嵌入捕获运动的正确整体方向至关重要。然而，以前的工作仅在本地搜索以确定软对应，忽略了最终成为实际匹配点的远处点。另外，估计的对应关系通常来自于相邻点云的前向，并且可能与从后向获得的估计对应关系不一致。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的全对全流嵌入层，在初始场景流估计期间具有后向可靠性验证。此外，我们还研究并比较了 3D 场景流网络关键组件的几种设计选择，包括点相似度计算、预测器的输入元素以及预测器和细化级别设计。在仔细选择最有效的设计后，我们能够提出一个在 FlyingThings3D 和 KITTI 场景流数据集上实现最先进性能的模型。我们提出的模型在 FlyingThings3D 数据集上超越所有现有方法至少 38.2%，在 EPE3D 指标的 KITTI 场景流数据集上超越所有现有方法至少 38.2%。我们在 https://github.com/IRMVLab/3DFlow 发布了我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的3D场景流网络，通过优化流嵌入层和验证机制提升点云运动估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D场景流方法在局部软对应搜索中忽略远处关键点，且前后向对应关系不一致，导致估计误差。
AI.method: 设计全连接的流嵌入层并引入反向可靠性验证，同时系统比较点相似度计算、预测器输入要素及精炼层级等关键模块的优化方案。
AI.result: 在FlyingThings3D和KITTI数据集上，模型EPE3D指标分别超越现有方法38.2%和24.7%，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过全局对应搜索与双向验证机制的结合，有效提升了3D场景流估计的精度，为后续研究提供了优化框架。

search_text: What Matters for 3D Scene Flow Network 3D 场景流网络最重要的是什么 3D scene flow estimation from point clouds is a low-level 3D motion perception task in computer vision. Flow embedding is a commonly used technique in scene flow estimation, and it encodes the point motion between two consecutive frames. Thus, it is critical for the flow embeddings to capture the correct overall direction of the motion. However, previous works only search locally to determine a soft correspondence, ignoring the distant points that turn out to be the actual matching ones. In addition, the estimated correspondence is usually from the forward direction of the adjacent point clouds, and may not be consistent with the estimated correspondence acquired from the backward direction. To tackle these problems, we propose a novel all-to-all flow embedding layer with backward reliability validation during the initial scene flow estimation. Besides, we investigate and compare several design choices in key components of the 3D scene flow network, including the point similarity calculation, input elements of predictor, and predictor & refinement level design. After carefully choosing the most effective designs, we are able to present a model that achieves the state-of-the-art performance on FlyingThings3D and KITTI Scene Flow datasets. Our proposed model surpasses all existing methods by at least 38.2% on FlyingThings3D dataset and 24.7% on KITTI Scene Flow dataset for EPE3D metric. We release our codes at https://github.com/IRMVLab/3DFlow. 从点云进行 3D 场景流估计是计算机视觉中的低级 3D 运动感知任务。流嵌入是场景流估计中常用的技术，它对两个连续帧之间的点运动进行编码。因此，流嵌入捕获运动的正确整体方向至关重要。然而，以前的工作仅在本地搜索以确定软对应，忽略了最终成为实际匹配点的远处点。另外，估计的对应关系通常来自于相邻点云的前向，并且可能与从后向获得的估计对应关系不一致。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的全对全流嵌入层，在初始场景流估计期间具有后向可靠性验证。此外，我们还研究并比较了 3D 场景流网络关键组件的几种设计选择，包括点相似度计算、预测器的输入元素以及预测器和细化级别设计。在仔细选择最有效的设计后，我们能够提出一个在 FlyingThings3D 和 KITTI 场景流数据集上实现最先进性能的模型。我们提出的模型在 FlyingThings3D 数据集上超越所有现有方法至少 38.2%，在 EPE3D 指标的 KITTI 场景流数据集上超越所有现有方法至少 38.2%。我们在 https://github.com/IRMVLab/3DFlow 发布了我们的代码。 本文提出了一种改进的3D场景流网络，通过优化流嵌入层和验证机制提升点云运动估计的准确性。 Guangming Wang,Yunzhe Hu,Zhe Liu,Yiyang Zhou,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Wei Zhan,Hesheng Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Wang Zhao,Shaohui Liu,Hengkai Guo,Wenping Wang,Yong-Jin Liu
title: ParticleSfM: Exploiting Dense Point Trajectories for Localizing Moving Cameras in the Wild
title_zh: ParticleSfM：利用密集点轨迹来定位野外移动摄像机
abstract: Estimating the pose of a moving camera from monocular video is a challenging problem, especially due to the presence of moving objects in dynamic environments, where the performance of existing camera pose estimation methods are susceptible to pixels that are not geometrically consistent. To tackle this challenge, we present a robust dense indirect structure-from-motion method for videos that is based on dense correspondence initialized from pairwise optical flow. Our key idea is to optimize long-range video correspondence as dense point trajectories and use it to learn robust estimation of motion segmentation. A novel neural network architecture is proposed for processing irregular point trajectory data. Camera poses are then estimated and optimized with global bundle adjustment over the portion of long-range point trajectories that are classified as static. Experiments on MPI Sintel dataset show that our system produces significantly more accurate camera trajectories compared to existing state-of-the-art methods. In addition, our method is able to retain reasonable accuracy of camera poses on fully static scenes, which consistently outperforms strong state-of-the-art dense correspondence based methods with end-to-end deep learning, demonstrating the potential of dense indirect methods based on optical flow and point trajectories. As the point trajectory representation is general, we further present results and comparisons on in-the-wild monocular videos with complex motion of dynamic objects. Code is available at https://github.com/bytedance/particle-sfm.
summary: Estimating the pose of a moving camera from monocular video is a challenging problem, especially due to the presence of moving objects in dynamic environments, where the performance of existing camera pose estimation methods are susceptible to pixels that are not geometrically consistent. To tackle this challenge, we present a robust dense indirect structure-from-motion method for videos that is based on dense correspondence initialized from pairwise optical flow. Our key idea is to optimize long-range video correspondence as dense point trajectories and use it to learn robust estimation of motion segmentation. A novel neural network architecture is proposed for processing irregular point trajectory data. Camera poses are then estimated and optimized with global bundle adjustment over the portion of long-range point trajectories that are classified as static. Experiments on MPI Sintel dataset show that our system produces significantly more accurate camera trajectories compared to existing state-of-the-art methods. In addition, our method is able to retain reasonable accuracy of camera poses on fully static scenes, which consistently outperforms strong state-of-the-art dense correspondence based methods with end-to-end deep learning, demonstrating the potential of dense indirect methods based on optical flow and point trajectories. As the point trajectory representation is general, we further present results and comparisons on in-the-wild monocular videos with complex motion of dynamic objects. Code is available at https://github.com/bytedance/particle-sfm.
abstract_zh: 从单目视频估计移动相机的姿态是一个具有挑战性的问题，特别是由于动态环境中存在移动物体，现有相机姿态估计方法的性能容易受到几何不一致的像素的影响。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种强大的密集运动间接结构方法，该方法基于从成对光流初始化的密集对应关系。我们的关键思想是将远程视频对应优化为密集点轨迹，并用它来学习运动分割的鲁棒估计。提出了一种新颖的神经网络架构来处理不规则点轨迹数据。然后通过对分类为静态的远程点轨迹部分进行全局束调整来估计和优化相机姿势。 MPI Sintel 数据集上的实验表明，与现有最先进的方法相比，我们的系统产生的相机轨迹明显更准确。此外，我们的方法能够在完全静态场景上保持相机姿势的合理准确性，这始终优于基于端到端深度学习的最先进的密集对应方法，展示了基于光流和点轨迹的密集间接方法的潜力。由于点轨迹表示是通用的，我们进一步展示了具有动态物体复杂运动的野外单目视频的结果和比较。代码可在 https://github.com/bytedance/article-sfm 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于密集点轨迹的鲁棒间接结构从运动方法，用于在动态环境中通过单目视频定位移动相机。
AI.motivation: 现有相机位姿估计方法在动态环境中因移动物体导致的几何不一致性而表现不佳，需解决动态场景下相机位姿估计的鲁棒性问题。
AI.method: 通过成对光流初始化密集对应关系，优化长距离视频对应关系为密集点轨迹，并利用新型神经网络处理不规则轨迹数据，结合静态轨迹的全局光束法平差估计相机位姿。
AI.result: 在MPI Sintel数据集上显著优于现有方法，在静态场景和复杂动态物体的野外单目视频中保持合理精度。
AI.conclusion: 基于光流和点轨迹的密集间接方法在动态场景相机定位中展现潜力，优于端到端深度学习方法，且具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Chao Wang,Zhiqiu Huang,Shuren Qi,Yaoshen Yu,Guohua Shen,Yushu Zhang
title: Shrinking the Semantic Gap: Spatial Pooling of Local Moment Invariants for Copy-Move Forgery Detection
title_zh: 缩小语义差距：用于复制-移动伪造检测的局部矩不变量的空间池
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security, 2023, https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10007894
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security, 2023, https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10007894
abstract: Copy-move forgery is a manipulation of copying and pasting specific patches from and to an image, with potentially illegal or unethical uses. Recent advances in the forensic methods for copy-move forgery have shown increasing success in detection accuracy and robustness. However, for images with high self-similarity or strong signal corruption, the existing algorithms often exhibit inefficient processes and unreliable results. This is mainly due to the inherent semantic gap between low-level visual representation and high-level semantic concept. In this paper, we present a very first study of trying to mitigate the semantic gap problem in copy-move forgery detection, with spatial pooling of local moment invariants for midlevel image representation. Our detection method expands the traditional works on two aspects: 1) we introduce the bag-of-visual-words model into this field for the first time, may meaning a new perspective of forensic study; 2) we propose a word-to-phrase feature description and matching pipeline, covering the spatial structure and visual saliency information of digital images. Extensive experimental results show the superior performance of our framework over state-of-the-art algorithms in overcoming the related problems caused by the semantic gap.
summary: Copy-move forgery is a manipulation of copying and pasting specific patches from and to an image, with potentially illegal or unethical uses. Recent advances in the forensic methods for copy-move forgery have shown increasing success in detection accuracy and robustness. However, for images with high self-similarity or strong signal corruption, the existing algorithms often exhibit inefficient processes and unreliable results. This is mainly due to the inherent semantic gap between low-level visual representation and high-level semantic concept. In this paper, we present a very first study of trying to mitigate the semantic gap problem in copy-move forgery detection, with spatial pooling of local moment invariants for midlevel image representation. Our detection method expands the traditional works on two aspects: 1) we introduce the bag-of-visual-words model into this field for the first time, may meaning a new perspective of forensic study; 2) we propose a word-to-phrase feature description and matching pipeline, covering the spatial structure and visual saliency information of digital images. Extensive experimental results show the superior performance of our framework over state-of-the-art algorithms in overcoming the related problems caused by the semantic gap.
abstract_zh: 复制-移动伪造是一种从图像复制并粘贴特定补丁的操作，具有潜在的非法或不道德用途。复制-移动伪造取证方法的最新进展在检测准确性和稳健性方面取得了越来越大的成功。然而，对于自相似性高或信号损坏严重的图像，现有算法往往表现出低效的过程和不可靠的结果。这主要是由于低级视觉表示和高级语义概念之间固有的语义差距。在本文中，我们提出了第一个研究，试图通过局部矩不变量的空间池来缓解复制移动伪造检测中的语义差距问题，以实现中级图像表示。我们的检测方法在两个方面扩展了传统的工作：1）我们首次将视觉词袋模型引入该领域，可能意味着取证研究的新视角； 2）我们提出了词到短语的特征描述和匹配管道，涵盖数字图像的空间结构和视觉显着性信息。大量的实验结果表明，我们的框架在克服语义差距引起的相关问题方面比最先进的算法具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过空间池化局部矩不变量来缩小语义差距的方法，用于提高复制-移动伪造检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的复制-移动伪造检测算法在处理高自相似性或强信号损坏的图像时，存在效率低下和结果不可靠的问题，这主要是由于低级视觉表示与高级语义概念之间的固有语义差距。
AI.method: 本文引入了视觉词袋模型，并提出了一个从单词到短语的特征描述和匹配流程，覆盖了数字图像的空间结构和视觉显著性信息。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该框架在克服语义差距相关问题方面优于最先进的算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文的研究为复制-移动伪造检测提供了一种新的视角和方法，有效缓解了语义差距问题。
