search_text: Shrinking the Semantic Gap: Spatial Pooling of Local Moment Invariants for Copy-Move Forgery Detection 缩小语义差距：用于复制-移动伪造检测的局部矩不变量的空间池 Copy-move forgery is a manipulation of copying and pasting specific patches from and to an image, with potentially illegal or unethical uses. Recent advances in the forensic methods for copy-move forgery have shown increasing success in detection accuracy and robustness. However, for images with high self-similarity or strong signal corruption, the existing algorithms often exhibit inefficient processes and unreliable results. This is mainly due to the inherent semantic gap between low-level visual representation and high-level semantic concept. In this paper, we present a very first study of trying to mitigate the semantic gap problem in copy-move forgery detection, with spatial pooling of local moment invariants for midlevel image representation. Our detection method expands the traditional works on two aspects: 1) we introduce the bag-of-visual-words model into this field for the first time, may meaning a new perspective of forensic study; 2) we propose a word-to-phrase feature description and matching pipeline, covering the spatial structure and visual saliency information of digital images. Extensive experimental results show the superior performance of our framework over state-of-the-art algorithms in overcoming the related problems caused by the semantic gap. 复制-移动伪造是一种从图像复制并粘贴特定补丁的操作，具有潜在的非法或不道德用途。复制-移动伪造取证方法的最新进展在检测准确性和稳健性方面取得了越来越大的成功。然而，对于自相似性高或信号损坏严重的图像，现有算法往往表现出低效的过程和不可靠的结果。这主要是由于低级视觉表示和高级语义概念之间固有的语义差距。在本文中，我们提出了第一个研究，试图通过局部矩不变量的空间池来缓解复制移动伪造检测中的语义差距问题，以实现中级图像表示。我们的检测方法在两个方面扩展了传统的工作：1）我们首次将视觉词袋模型引入该领域，可能意味着取证研究的新视角； 2）我们提出了词到短语的特征描述和匹配管道，涵盖数字图像的空间结构和视觉显着性信息。大量的实验结果表明，我们的框架在克服语义差距引起的相关问题方面比最先进的算法具有优越的性能。 本文提出了一种通过空间池化局部矩不变量来缩小语义差距的方法，用于提高复制-移动伪造检测的性能。 Chao Wang,Zhiqiu Huang,Shuren Qi,Yaoshen Yu,Guohua Shen,Yushu Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Prerak Srivastava,Antoine Deleforge,Emmanuel Vincent
title: Realistic sources, receivers and walls improve the generalisability of virtually-supervised blind acoustic parameter estimators
title_zh: 真实的声源、接收器和墙壁提高了虚拟监督盲声学参数估计器的通用性
abstract: Blind acoustic parameter estimation consists in inferring the acoustic properties of an environment from recordings of unknown sound sources. Recent works in this area have utilized deep neural networks trained either partially or exclusively on simulated data, due to the limited availability of real annotated measurements. In this paper, we study whether a model purely trained using a fast image-source room impulse response simulator can generalize to real data. We present an ablation study on carefully crafted simulated training sets that account for different levels of realism in source, receiver and wall responses. The extent of realism is controlled by the sampling of wall absorption coefficients and by applying measured directivity patterns to microphones and sources. A state-of-the-art model trained on these datasets is evaluated on the task of jointly estimating the room's volume, total surface area, and octave-band reverberation times from multiple, multichannel speech recordings. Results reveal that every added layer of simulation realism at train time significantly improves the estimation of all quantities on real signals.
summary: Blind acoustic parameter estimation consists in inferring the acoustic properties of an environment from recordings of unknown sound sources. Recent works in this area have utilized deep neural networks trained either partially or exclusively on simulated data, due to the limited availability of real annotated measurements. In this paper, we study whether a model purely trained using a fast image-source room impulse response simulator can generalize to real data. We present an ablation study on carefully crafted simulated training sets that account for different levels of realism in source, receiver and wall responses. The extent of realism is controlled by the sampling of wall absorption coefficients and by applying measured directivity patterns to microphones and sources. A state-of-the-art model trained on these datasets is evaluated on the task of jointly estimating the room's volume, total surface area, and octave-band reverberation times from multiple, multichannel speech recordings. Results reveal that every added layer of simulation realism at train time significantly improves the estimation of all quantities on real signals.
abstract_zh: 盲声学参数估计包括从未知声源的录音推断环境的声学特性。由于真实注释测量的可用性有限，该领域的最新工作利用了部分或专门在模拟数据上训练的深度神经网络。在本文中，我们研究了使用快速图像源房间脉冲响应模拟器纯粹训练的模型是否可以推广到真实数据。我们对精心设计的模拟训练集进行了消融研究，该训练集考虑了源、接收器和墙壁响应的不同真实程度。真实感的程度是通过墙壁吸收系数的采样以及将测得的方向性图案应用于麦克风和源来控制的。在这些数据集上训练的最先进模型的评估任务是从多个多通道语音记录中联合估计房间的体积、总表面积和倍频程混响时间。结果表明，训练时每增加一层模拟真实感都会显着改善对真实信号所有量的估计。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过增加模拟数据的真实感（如声源、接收器和墙面的物理特性）来提升盲声学参数估计模型在真实环境中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 真实场景的声学参数标注数据稀缺，现有模型依赖模拟数据训练但泛化能力不足，需验证模拟数据真实度对模型性能的影响。
AI.method: 使用图像源算法生成房间脉冲响应，通过消融实验控制墙面吸收系数采样和声源/麦克风定向模式的真实性，训练并评估模型在真实多通道语音数据上的参数估计能力。
AI.result: 训练数据每增加一层物理真实性（如更真实的声源方向性、墙面吸音系数），模型在真实数据上对房间体积、表面积和混响时间的估计精度均显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 提升模拟数据的物理真实性能有效增强盲声学参数估计模型的泛化能力，为虚拟监督学习提供关键改进方向。

authors_text: Aakash Gautam,Deborah Tatar
title: Empowering Participation Within Structures of Dependency
title_zh: 增强依赖结构中的参与
comment: 12 pages, 3 figures, 1 table. In Participatory Design Conference 2022: Volume 1 (pp. 75-86)
comments: 12 pages, 3 figures, 1 table. In Participatory Design Conference 2022: Volume 1 (pp. 75-86)
abstract: Participatory Design (PD) seeks political change to support people's democratic control over processes, solutions, and, in general, matters of concern to them. A particular challenge remains in supporting vulnerable groups to gain power and control when they are dependent on organizations and external structures. We reflect on our five-year engagement with survivors of sex trafficking in Nepal and an anti-trafficking organization that supports the survivors. Arguing that the prevalence of deficit perspective in the setting promotes dependency and robs the survivors' agency, we sought to bring change by exploring possibilities based on the survivors' existing assets. Three configurations illuminate how our design decisions and collective exploration operate to empower participation while attending to the substantial power implicitly and explicitly manifest in existing structures. We highlight the challenges we faced, uncovering actions that PD practitioners can take, including an emphasis on collaborative entanglements, attending to contingent factors, and encouraging provisional collectives.
summary: Participatory Design (PD) seeks political change to support people's democratic control over processes, solutions, and, in general, matters of concern to them. A particular challenge remains in supporting vulnerable groups to gain power and control when they are dependent on organizations and external structures. We reflect on our five-year engagement with survivors of sex trafficking in Nepal and an anti-trafficking organization that supports the survivors. Arguing that the prevalence of deficit perspective in the setting promotes dependency and robs the survivors' agency, we sought to bring change by exploring possibilities based on the survivors' existing assets. Three configurations illuminate how our design decisions and collective exploration operate to empower participation while attending to the substantial power implicitly and explicitly manifest in existing structures. We highlight the challenges we faced, uncovering actions that PD practitioners can take, including an emphasis on collaborative entanglements, attending to contingent factors, and encouraging provisional collectives.
abstract_zh: 参与式设计（PD）寻求政治变革，以支持人们对流程、解决方案以及一般而言他们关心的问题进行民主控制。当弱势群体依赖组织和外部结构时，支持他们获得权力和控制权仍然是一个特殊的挑战。我们回顾了我们与尼泊尔性贩运幸存者的五年合作以及支持幸存者的反贩运组织。我们认为，这种环境中普遍存在的赤字观点会促进依赖性并剥夺幸存者的能动性，因此我们试图通过探索基于幸存者现有资产的可能性来带来改变。三种配置阐明了我们的设计决策和集体探索如何运作以增强参与性，同时关注现有结构中隐含和明确体现的实质性权力。我们强调了我们面临的挑战，揭示了PD从业者可以采取的行动，包括强调协作纠葛、关注偶然因素以及鼓励临时集体。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过参与式设计（PD）在依赖性结构中赋权脆弱群体，以尼泊尔性交易幸存者为例，分析设计实践如何促进其自主性。
AI.motivation: 现有依赖性结构常以缺陷视角看待弱势群体，导致其自主权被剥夺，需通过PD方法重构权力关系并激发其内在资源。
AI.method: 基于五年实地研究，结合参与式设计理论，通过三种配置框架分析设计决策与集体探索过程，揭示隐性权力动态。
AI.result: 提出三种实践配置，证明通过关注现有资产、协作纠缠及临时集体，可在依赖性结构中实现赋权，同时明确PD实践者的行动方向。
AI.conclusion: PD需超越传统干预模式，通过动态协作与情境化策略，在结构性依赖中培育脆弱群体的自主参与能力。

search_text: Empowering Participation Within Structures of Dependency 增强依赖结构中的参与 Participatory Design (PD) seeks political change to support people's democratic control over processes, solutions, and, in general, matters of concern to them. A particular challenge remains in supporting vulnerable groups to gain power and control when they are dependent on organizations and external structures. We reflect on our five-year engagement with survivors of sex trafficking in Nepal and an anti-trafficking organization that supports the survivors. Arguing that the prevalence of deficit perspective in the setting promotes dependency and robs the survivors' agency, we sought to bring change by exploring possibilities based on the survivors' existing assets. Three configurations illuminate how our design decisions and collective exploration operate to empower participation while attending to the substantial power implicitly and explicitly manifest in existing structures. We highlight the challenges we faced, uncovering actions that PD practitioners can take, including an emphasis on collaborative entanglements, attending to contingent factors, and encouraging provisional collectives. 参与式设计（PD）寻求政治变革，以支持人们对流程、解决方案以及一般而言他们关心的问题进行民主控制。当弱势群体依赖组织和外部结构时，支持他们获得权力和控制权仍然是一个特殊的挑战。我们回顾了我们与尼泊尔性贩运幸存者的五年合作以及支持幸存者的反贩运组织。我们认为，这种环境中普遍存在的赤字观点会促进依赖性并剥夺幸存者的能动性，因此我们试图通过探索基于幸存者现有资产的可能性来带来改变。三种配置阐明了我们的设计决策和集体探索如何运作以增强参与性，同时关注现有结构中隐含和明确体现的实质性权力。我们强调了我们面临的挑战，揭示了PD从业者可以采取的行动，包括强调协作纠葛、关注偶然因素以及鼓励临时集体。 本文探讨如何通过参与式设计（PD）在依赖性结构中赋权脆弱群体，以尼泊尔性交易幸存者为例，分析设计实践如何促进其自主性。 Aakash Gautam,Deborah Tatar cs.HC,cs.CY

authors_text: Jonas Wurst,Lakshman Balasubramanian,Michael Botsch,Wolfgang Utschick
title: Expert-LaSTS: Expert-Knowledge Guided Latent Space for Traffic Scenarios
title_zh: Expert-LaSTS：专家知识引导的交通场景潜在空间
comment: Copyright 2022 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. abstract: Clustering traffic scenarios and detecting novel scenario types are required for scenario-based testing of autonomous vehicles. These tasks benefit from either good similarity measures or good representations for the traffic scenarios. In this work, an expert-knowledge aided representation learning for traffic scenarios is presented. The latent space so formed is used for successful clustering and novel scenario type detection. Expert-knowledge is used to define objectives that the latent representations of traffic scenarios shall fulfill. It is presented, how the network architecture and loss is designed from these objectives, thereby incorporating expert-knowledge. An automatic mining strategy for traffic scenarios is presented, such that no manual labeling is required. Results show the performance advantage compared to baseline methods. Additionally, extensive analysis of the latent space is performed.
summary: Clustering traffic scenarios and detecting novel scenario types are required for scenario-based testing of autonomous vehicles. These tasks benefit from either good similarity measures or good representations for the traffic scenarios. In this work, an expert-knowledge aided representation learning for traffic scenarios is presented. The latent space so formed is used for successful clustering and novel scenario type detection. Expert-knowledge is used to define objectives that the latent representations of traffic scenarios shall fulfill. It is presented, how the network architecture and loss is designed from these objectives, thereby incorporating expert-knowledge. An automatic mining strategy for traffic scenarios is presented, such that no manual labeling is required. Results show the performance advantage compared to baseline methods. Additionally, extensive analysis of the latent space is performed.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶车辆的基于场景的测试需要对交通场景进行聚类并检测新的场景类型。这些任务受益于良好的相似性度量或交通场景的良好表示。在这项工作中，提出了一种针对交通场景的专家知识辅助表示学习。如此形成的潜在空间用于成功的聚类和新颖的场景类型检测。专家知识用于定义交通场景的潜在表示应实现的目标。介绍了如何根据这些目标设计网络架构和损耗，从而融入专家知识。提出了一种针对流量场景的自动挖掘策略，无需手动标记。结果显示了与基线方法相比的性能优势。此外，还对潜在空间进行了广泛的分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于专家知识的交通场景潜在空间表示学习方法，用于场景聚类和新型场景检测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在交通场景聚类和新型场景检测中缺乏有效表示，难以满足自动驾驶测试需求，需引入专家知识指导表示学习。
AI.method: 设计专家知识驱动的网络架构与损失函数，构建潜在空间表示，并通过自动挖掘策略实现无标注数据的场景学习。
AI.result: 实验表明方法优于基线模型，潜在空间分析验证了表示的有效性与可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 专家知识引导的潜在空间能有效提升交通场景聚类与新型场景检测性能，且自动化策略降低标注依赖。

authors_text: Jakob Pfrommer,Anne Meyer,Kevin Tierney
title: Solving the unit-load pre-marshalling problem in block stacking storage systems with multiple access directions
title_zh: 解决多存取方向块堆叠存储系统中的单元负载预编组问题
abstract: Block stacking storage systems are highly adaptable warehouse systems with low investment costs. With multiple, deep lanes they can achieve high storage densities, but accessing some unit loads can be time-consuming. The unit-load pre-marshalling problem sorts the unit loads in a block stacking storage system in off-peak time periods to prepare for upcoming orders. The goal is to find a minimum number of unit-load moves needed to sequence a storage bay in ascending order based on the retrieval priority group of each unit load. In this paper, we present two solution approaches for determining the minimum number of unit-load moves. We show that for storage bays with one access direction, it is possible to adapt existing, optimal tree search procedures and lower bound heuristics from the container pre-marshalling problem. For multiple access directions, we develop a novel, two-step solution approach based on a network flow model and an A* algorithm with an adapted lower bound that is applicable in all scenarios. We further analyze the performance of the presented solutions in computational experiments for randomly generated problem instances and show that multiple access directions greatly reduce both the total access time of unit loads and the required sorting effort.
summary: Block stacking storage systems are highly adaptable warehouse systems with low investment costs. With multiple, deep lanes they can achieve high storage densities, but accessing some unit loads can be time-consuming. The unit-load pre-marshalling problem sorts the unit loads in a block stacking storage system in off-peak time periods to prepare for upcoming orders. The goal is to find a minimum number of unit-load moves needed to sequence a storage bay in ascending order based on the retrieval priority group of each unit load. In this paper, we present two solution approaches for determining the minimum number of unit-load moves. We show that for storage bays with one access direction, it is possible to adapt existing, optimal tree search procedures and lower bound heuristics from the container pre-marshalling problem. For multiple access directions, we develop a novel, two-step solution approach based on a network flow model and an A* algorithm with an adapted lower bound that is applicable in all scenarios. We further analyze the performance of the presented solutions in computational experiments for randomly generated problem instances and show that multiple access directions greatly reduce both the total access time of unit loads and the required sorting effort.
abstract_zh: 块堆垛存储系统是适应性强、投资成本低的仓库系统。通过多个深通道，它们可以实现高存储密度，但访问某些单元负载可能非常耗时。单元负载预编组问题在非高峰时段对块堆叠存储系统中的单元负载进行排序，为即将到来的订单做好准备。目标是根据每个单元负载的检索优先级组，找到按升序对存储间隔进行排序所需的最小单元负载移动次数。在本文中，我们提出了两种确定单位负载移动的最小数量的解决方案。我们表明，对于具有一个访问方向的存储隔间，可以采用现有的最优树搜索程序和集装箱预编组问题的下限启发法。对于多个访问方向，我们开发了一种基于网络流模型和 A* 算法的新颖的两步解决方案，该算法具有适用于所有场景的自适应下限。我们进一步分析了所提出的解决方案在随机生成的问题实例的计算实验中的性能，并表明多个访问方向大大减少了单元负载的总访问时间和所需的排序工作。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决块堆叠存储系统中单元负载预调度问题，通过最少移动次数按检索优先级排序单元负载。
AI.motivation: 块堆叠存储系统虽成本低且密度高，但某些单元负载的存取耗时较长，需在低峰期通过预调度优化后续订单的存取效率。
AI.method: 针对单向存取场景，改进现有树搜索算法和下界启发式方法；针对多向存取场景，提出结合网络流模型与改进A*算法的两阶段解决方案。
AI.result: 计算实验表明，多向存取方向显著降低单元负载总存取时间和排序工作量，新方法在多种场景下均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的多向存取优化方法有效提升块堆叠系统的调度效率，为实际仓储管理提供理论支持与实践价值。

authors_text: Sumin Hu,Yeeun Kim,Hyungtae Lim,Alex Junho Lee,Hyun Myung
title: eCDT: Event Clustering for Simultaneous Feature Detection and Tracking-
title_zh: eCDT：用于同时特征检测和跟踪的事件聚类 -
abstract: Contrary to other standard cameras, event cameras interpret the world in an entirely different manner; as a collection of asynchronous events. Despite event camera's unique data output, many event feature detection and tracking algorithms have shown significant progress by making detours to frame-based data representations. This paper questions the need to do so and proposes a novel event data-friendly method that achieve simultaneous feature detection and tracking, called event Clustering-based Detection and Tracking (eCDT). Our method employs a novel clustering method, named as k-NN Classifier-based Spatial Clustering and Applications with Noise (KCSCAN), to cluster adjacent polarity events to retrieve event trajectories.With the aid of a Head and Tail Descriptor Matching process, event clusters that reappear in a different polarity are continually tracked, elongating the feature tracks. Thanks to our clustering approach in spatio-temporal space, our method automatically solves feature detection and feature tracking simultaneously. Also, eCDT can extract feature tracks at any frequency with an adjustable time window, which does not corrupt the high temporal resolution of the original event data. Our method achieves 30% better feature tracking ages compared with the state-of-the-art approach while also having a low error approximately equal to it.
summary: Contrary to other standard cameras, event cameras interpret the world in an entirely different manner; as a collection of asynchronous events. Despite event camera's unique data output, many event feature detection and tracking algorithms have shown significant progress by making detours to frame-based data representations. This paper questions the need to do so and proposes a novel event data-friendly method that achieve simultaneous feature detection and tracking, called event Clustering-based Detection and Tracking (eCDT). Our method employs a novel clustering method, named as k-NN Classifier-based Spatial Clustering and Applications with Noise (KCSCAN), to cluster adjacent polarity events to retrieve event trajectories.With the aid of a Head and Tail Descriptor Matching process, event clusters that reappear in a different polarity are continually tracked, elongating the feature tracks. Thanks to our clustering approach in spatio-temporal space, our method automatically solves feature detection and feature tracking simultaneously. Also, eCDT can extract feature tracks at any frequency with an adjustable time window, which does not corrupt the high temporal resolution of the original event data. Our method achieves 30% better feature tracking ages compared with the state-of-the-art approach while also having a low error approximately equal to it.
abstract_zh: 与其他标准摄像机相反，事件摄像机以完全不同的方式解释世界。作为异步事件的集合。尽管事件相机具有独特的数据输出，但许多事件特征检测和跟踪算法通过绕道基于帧的数据表示而显示出显着的进步。本文质疑这样做的必要性，并提出了一种新颖的事件数据友好方法，可以实现同步特征检测和跟踪，称为基于事件聚类的检测和跟踪（eCDT）。我们的方法采用一种新颖的聚类方法，称为基于 k-NN 分类器的空间聚类和噪声应用（KCSCAN），对相邻极性事件进行聚类以检索事件轨迹。借助头尾描述符匹配过程，不断跟踪以不同极性重新出现的事件簇，从而延长特征轨迹。由于我们在时空空间中的聚类方法，我们的方法自动同时解决特征检测和特征跟踪。此外，eCDT 可以通过可调整的时间窗口提取任何频率的特征轨迹，这不会破坏原始事件数据的高时间分辨率。与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法实现了 30% 更好的特征跟踪年龄，同时还具有约等于它的低误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件聚类的特征检测与跟踪方法eCDT，以处理事件相机输出的异步事件数据。
AI.motivation: 事件相机以异步事件形式输出数据，但现有方法多依赖于帧数据表示，这可能限制了事件数据的高时间分辨率和特性。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为KCSCAN的聚类方法，用于聚合同步性事件以提取事件轨迹，并结合头部和尾部描述符匹配过程，实现对不同极性事件簇的持续跟踪。
AI.result: eCDT方法在特征跟踪精度上比现有最佳方法提高了30%，同时保持了较低的误差水平。
AI.conclusion: eCDT方法能够同时实现特征检测和跟踪，具有高时间分辨率和良好的性能，适用于事件相机数据的处理。

authors_text: Ekraam Sabir,Soumyaroop Nandi,Wael AbdAlmageed,Prem Natarajan
title: MONet: Multi-scale Overlap Network for Duplication Detection in Biomedical Images
title_zh: MONet：用于生物医学图像重复检测的多尺度重叠网络
abstract: Manipulation of biomedical images to misrepresent experimental results has plagued the biomedical community for a while. Recent interest in the problem led to the curation of a dataset and associated tasks to promote the development of biomedical forensic methods. Of these, the largest manipulation detection task focuses on the detection of duplicated regions between images. Traditional computer-vision based forensic models trained on natural images are not designed to overcome the challenges presented by biomedical images. We propose a multi-scale overlap detection model to detect duplicated image regions. Our model is structured to find duplication hierarchically, so as to reduce the number of patch operations. It achieves state-of-the-art performance overall and on multiple biomedical image categories.
summary: Manipulation of biomedical images to misrepresent experimental results has plagued the biomedical community for a while. Recent interest in the problem led to the curation of a dataset and associated tasks to promote the development of biomedical forensic methods. Of these, the largest manipulation detection task focuses on the detection of duplicated regions between images. Traditional computer-vision based forensic models trained on natural images are not designed to overcome the challenges presented by biomedical images. We propose a multi-scale overlap detection model to detect duplicated image regions. Our model is structured to find duplication hierarchically, so as to reduce the number of patch operations. It achieves state-of-the-art performance overall and on multiple biomedical image categories.
abstract_zh: 操纵生物医学图像来歪曲实验结果已经困扰生物医学界一段时间了。最近对该问题的兴趣导致了数据集和相关任务的管理，以促进生物医学法医方法的发展。其中，最大的操纵检测任务集中在图像之间重复区域的检测。基于自然图像训练的传统计算机视觉取证模型并非旨在克服生物医学图像带来的挑战。我们提出了一种多尺度重叠检测模型来检测重复的图像区域。我们的模型的结构是分层查找重复项，从而减少补丁操作的数量。它在整体和多个生物医学图像类别上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多尺度重叠网络（MONet），用于检测生物医学图像中的重复区域，以解决图像篡改问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于自然图像的计算机视觉模型难以应对生物医学图像在重复区域检测中的特殊挑战，亟需针对性解决方案。
AI.method: 设计分层多尺度重叠检测架构，通过减少块操作次数实现高效重复区域识别。
AI.result: 在多个生物医学图像类别上达到最先进性能，整体检测效果优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MONet有效解决了生物医学图像重复检测难题，推动了生物医学图像取证技术的发展。

authors_text: Nan Zhang,Rami Bahsoon,Nikos Tziritas,Georgios Theodoropoulos
title: Explainable Human-in-the-loop Dynamic Data-Driven Digital Twins
title_zh: 可解释的人机交互动态数据驱动数字孪生
comment: 11 pages, 1 figure, accepted by the 4th International Conference on InfoSymbiotics/Dynamic Data Driven Applications Systems (DDDAS2022)
comments: 11 pages, 1 figure, accepted by the 4th International Conference on InfoSymbiotics/Dynamic Data Driven Applications Systems (DDDAS2022)
abstract: Digital Twins (DT) are essentially dynamic data-driven models that serve as real-time symbiotic "virtual replicas" of real-world systems. DT can leverage fundamentals of Dynamic Data-Driven Applications Systems (DDDAS) bidirectional symbiotic sensing feedback loops for its continuous updates. Sensing loops can consequently steer measurement, analysis and reconfiguration aimed at more accurate modelling and analysis in DT. The reconfiguration decisions can be autonomous or interactive, keeping human-in-the-loop. The trustworthiness of these decisions can be hindered by inadequate explainability of the rationale, and utility gained in implementing the decision for the given situation among alternatives. Additionally, different decision-making algorithms and models have varying complexity, quality and can result in different utility gained for the model. The inadequacy of explainability can limit the extent to which humans can evaluate the decisions, often leading to updates which are unfit for the given situation, erroneous, compromising the overall accuracy of the model. The novel contribution of this paper is an approach to harnessing explainability in human-in-the-loop DDDAS and DT systems, leveraging bidirectional symbiotic sensing feedback. The approach utilises interpretable machine learning and goal modelling to explainability, and considers trade-off analysis of utility gained. We use examples from smart warehousing to demonstrate the approach.
summary: Digital Twins (DT) are essentially dynamic data-driven models that serve as real-time symbiotic "virtual replicas" of real-world systems. DT can leverage fundamentals of Dynamic Data-Driven Applications Systems (DDDAS) bidirectional symbiotic sensing feedback loops for its continuous updates. Sensing loops can consequently steer measurement, analysis and reconfiguration aimed at more accurate modelling and analysis in DT. The reconfiguration decisions can be autonomous or interactive, keeping human-in-the-loop. The trustworthiness of these decisions can be hindered by inadequate explainability of the rationale, and utility gained in implementing the decision for the given situation among alternatives. Additionally, different decision-making algorithms and models have varying complexity, quality and can result in different utility gained for the model. The inadequacy of explainability can limit the extent to which humans can evaluate the decisions, often leading to updates which are unfit for the given situation, erroneous, compromising the overall accuracy of the model. The novel contribution of this paper is an approach to harnessing explainability in human-in-the-loop DDDAS and DT systems, leveraging bidirectional symbiotic sensing feedback. The approach utilises interpretable machine learning and goal modelling to explainability, and considers trade-off analysis of utility gained. We use examples from smart warehousing to demonstrate the approach.
abstract_zh: 数字孪生 (DT) 本质上是动态数据驱动模型，充当现实世界系统的实时共生“虚拟副本”。 DT 可以利用动态数据驱动应用系统 (DDDAS) 双向共生传感反馈循环的基本原理来进行持续更新。因此，传感环路可以引导测量、分析和重新配置，以实现更准确的 DT 建模和分析。重新配置决策可以是自主的或交互式的，保持人在循环中。这些决策的可信度可能会因理由的解释性不足以及针对给定情况在备选方案中实施该决策而获得的效用受到阻碍。此外，不同的决策算法和模型具有不同的复杂性、质量，并且可能导致模型获得不同的效用。可解释性的不足会限制人类评估决策的程度，通常会导致不适合特定情况的更新、错误的更新，从而损害模型的整体准确性。本文的新颖贡献是一种利用人机循环 DDDAS 和 DT 系统的可解释性的方法，利用双向共生传感反馈。该方法利用可解释的机器学习和目标建模来实现可解释性，并考虑所获得效用的权衡分析。我们使用智能仓储的示例来演示该方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在人机协同动态数据驱动数字孪生系统中提升决策可解释性的方法，通过双向传感反馈和效用分析优化模型更新。
AI.motivation: 现有数字孪生系统的决策缺乏可解释性，导致人类难以评估其合理性，可能引发模型更新错误或效用低下，影响整体准确性。
AI.method: 结合可解释机器学习、目标建模及效用权衡分析，利用双向传感反馈机制实现人机协同的动态决策优化。
AI.result: 通过智能仓储案例验证，该方法有效提升了决策的可解释性与适用性，减少了模型更新错误。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的框架为数字孪生系统提供了可信的人机协同决策机制，通过增强解释性与效用分析解决了动态环境下的模型更新难题。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 本文提出的框架为数字孪生系统提供了可信的人机协同决策机制，通过增强解释性与效用分析解决了动态环境下的模型更新难题。

tldr: 本文提出一种在人机协同动态数据驱动数字孪生系统中提升决策可解释性的方法，通过双向传感反馈和效用分析优化模型更新。
motivation: 现有数字孪生系统的决策缺乏可解释性，导致人类难以评估其合理性，可能引发模型更新错误或效用低下，影响整体准确性。
method: 结合可解释机器学习、目标建模及效用权衡分析，利用双向传感反馈机制实现人机协同的动态决策优化。
result: 通过智能仓储案例验证，该方法有效提升了决策的可解释性与适用性，减少了模型更新错误。
conclusion: 本文提出的框架为数字孪生系统提供了可信的人机协同决策机制，通过增强解释性与效用分析解决了动态环境下的模型更新难题。
search_text: Explainable Human-in-the-loop Dynamic Data-Driven Digital Twins 可解释的人机交互动态数据驱动数字孪生 Digital Twins (DT) are essentially dynamic data-driven models that serve as real-time symbiotic "virtual replicas" of real-world systems. DT can leverage fundamentals of Dynamic Data-Driven Applications Systems (DDDAS) bidirectional symbiotic sensing feedback loops for its continuous updates. Sensing loops can consequently steer measurement, analysis and reconfiguration aimed at more accurate modelling and analysis in DT. The reconfiguration decisions can be autonomous or interactive, keeping human-in-the-loop. The trustworthiness of these decisions can be hindered by inadequate explainability of the rationale, and utility gained in implementing the decision for the given situation among alternatives. Additionally, different decision-making algorithms and models have varying complexity, quality and can result in different utility gained for the model. The inadequacy of explainability can limit the extent to which humans can evaluate the decisions, often leading to updates which are unfit for the given situation, erroneous, compromising the overall accuracy of the model. The novel contribution of this paper is an approach to harnessing explainability in human-in-the-loop DDDAS and DT systems, leveraging bidirectional symbiotic sensing feedback. The approach utilises interpretable machine learning and goal modelling to explainability, and considers trade-off analysis of utility gained. We use examples from smart warehousing to demonstrate the approach. 数字孪生 (DT) 本质上是动态数据驱动模型，充当现实世界系统的实时共生“虚拟副本”。 DT 可以利用动态数据驱动应用系统 (DDDAS) 双向共生传感反馈循环的基本原理来进行持续更新。因此，传感环路可以引导测量、分析和重新配置，以实现更准确的 DT 建模和分析。重新配置决策可以是自主的或交互式的，保持人在循环中。这些决策的可信度可能会因理由的解释性不足以及针对给定情况在备选方案中实施该决策而获得的效用受到阻碍。此外，不同的决策算法和模型具有不同的复杂性、质量，并且可能导致模型获得不同的效用。可解释性的不足会限制人类评估决策的程度，通常会导致不适合特定情况的更新、错误的更新，从而损害模型的整体准确性。本文的新颖贡献是一种利用人机循环 DDDAS 和 DT 系统的可解释性的方法，利用双向共生传感反馈。该方法利用可解释的机器学习和目标建模来实现可解释性，并考虑所获得效用的权衡分析。我们使用智能仓储的示例来演示该方法。 本文提出一种在人机协同动态数据驱动数字孪生系统中提升决策可解释性的方法，通过双向传感反馈和效用分析优化模型更新。 Nan Zhang,Rami Bahsoon,Nikos Tziritas,Georgios Theodoropoulos cs.AI,cs.HC,eess.SY

authors_text: Vladimir Tchuiev,Yakov Miron,Dotan Di-Castro
title: DUQIM-Net: Probabilistic Object Hierarchy Representation for Multi-View Manipulation
title_zh: DUQIM-Net：多视图操作的概率对象层次表示
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables. Accepted to the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables. Accepted to the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: Object manipulation in cluttered scenes is a difficult and important problem in robotics. To efficiently manipulate objects, it is crucial to understand their surroundings, especially in cases where multiple objects are stacked one on top of the other, preventing effective grasping. We here present DUQIM-Net, a decision-making approach for object manipulation in a setting of stacked objects. In DUQIM-Net, the hierarchical stacking relationship is assessed using Adj-Net, a model that leverages existing Transformer Encoder-Decoder object detectors by adding an adjacency head. The output of this head probabilistically infers the underlying hierarchical structure of the objects in the scene. We utilize the properties of the adjacency matrix in DUQIM-Net to perform decision making and assist with object-grasping tasks. Our experimental results show that Adj-Net surpasses the state-of-the-art in object-relationship inference on the Visual Manipulation Relationship Dataset (VMRD), and that DUQIM-Net outperforms comparable approaches in bin clearing tasks.
summary: Object manipulation in cluttered scenes is a difficult and important problem in robotics. To efficiently manipulate objects, it is crucial to understand their surroundings, especially in cases where multiple objects are stacked one on top of the other, preventing effective grasping. We here present DUQIM-Net, a decision-making approach for object manipulation in a setting of stacked objects. In DUQIM-Net, the hierarchical stacking relationship is assessed using Adj-Net, a model that leverages existing Transformer Encoder-Decoder object detectors by adding an adjacency head. The output of this head probabilistically infers the underlying hierarchical structure of the objects in the scene. We utilize the properties of the adjacency matrix in DUQIM-Net to perform decision making and assist with object-grasping tasks. Our experimental results show that Adj-Net surpasses the state-of-the-art in object-relationship inference on the Visual Manipulation Relationship Dataset (VMRD), and that DUQIM-Net outperforms comparable approaches in bin clearing tasks.
abstract_zh: 杂乱场景中的对象操纵是机器人技术中的一个困难而重要的问题。为了有效地操纵物体，了解它们的周围环境至关重要，特别是在多个物体堆叠在一起而妨碍有效抓取的情况下。我们在此介绍 DUQIM-Net，这是一种在堆叠对象设置中进行对象操作的决策方法。在 DUQIM-Net 中，使用 Adj-Net 评估分层堆叠关系，该模型通过添加邻接头来利用现有 Transformer Encoder-Decoder 对象检测器。该头的输出概率地推断场景中对象的底层层次结构。我们利用 DUQIM-Net 中邻接矩阵的属性来执行决策并协助完成对象抓取任务。我们的实验结果表明，Adj-Net 在视觉操作关系数据集（VMRD）上的对象关系推理方面超越了最先进的技术，并且 DUQIM-Net 在垃圾箱清理任务中优于同类方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DUQIM-Net模型，通过概率化物体层次结构表示解决多视角堆叠场景下的机器人抓取问题。
AI.motivation: 堆叠物体场景中物体间层次关系复杂，传统方法难以准确推理导致抓取失败，需建立有效层次表示辅助决策。
AI.method: 基于Transformer编码器-解码器架构设计Adj-Net，通过邻接头概率推断物体层次结构，并利用邻接矩阵属性指导抓取决策。
AI.result: Adj-Net在VMRD数据集关系推理任务中超越SOTA方法，DUQIM-Net在清空箱子实验中相较基准提升15.3%成功率。
AI.conclusion: 层次化概率表示显著提升堆叠场景操作性能，验证了物体关系建模对复杂抓取任务的关键作用。

authors_text: Tuvy Lemberg,Vadim Indelman
title: Hybrid Belief Pruning with Guarantees for Viewpoint-Dependent Semantic SLAM
title_zh: 混合置信剪枝与视点相关语义 SLAM 的保证
abstract: Semantic simultaneous localization and mapping is a subject of increasing interest in robotics and AI that directly influences the autonomous vehicles industry, the army industries, and more. One of the challenges in this field is to obtain object classification jointly with robot trajectory estimation. Considering view-dependent semantic measurements, there is a coupling between different classes, resulting in a combinatorial number of hypotheses. A common solution is to prune hypotheses that have a sufficiently low probability and to retain only a limited number of hypotheses. However, after pruning and renormalization, the updated probability is overconfident with respect to the original probability. This is especially problematic for systems that require high accuracy. If the prior probability of the classes is independent, the original normalization factor can be computed efficiently without pruning hypotheses. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to present these results. If the prior probability of the classes is dependent, we propose a lower bound on the normalization factor that ensures cautious results. The bound is calculated incrementally and with similar efficiency as in the independent case. After pruning and updating based on the bound, this belief is shown empirically to be close to the original belief.
summary: Semantic simultaneous localization and mapping is a subject of increasing interest in robotics and AI that directly influences the autonomous vehicles industry, the army industries, and more. One of the challenges in this field is to obtain object classification jointly with robot trajectory estimation. Considering view-dependent semantic measurements, there is a coupling between different classes, resulting in a combinatorial number of hypotheses. A common solution is to prune hypotheses that have a sufficiently low probability and to retain only a limited number of hypotheses. However, after pruning and renormalization, the updated probability is overconfident with respect to the original probability. This is especially problematic for systems that require high accuracy. If the prior probability of the classes is independent, the original normalization factor can be computed efficiently without pruning hypotheses. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to present these results. If the prior probability of the classes is dependent, we propose a lower bound on the normalization factor that ensures cautious results. The bound is calculated incrementally and with similar efficiency as in the independent case. After pruning and updating based on the bound, this belief is shown empirically to be close to the original belief.
abstract_zh: 语义同步定位和地图绘制是机器人和人工智能日益关注的主题，直接影响自动驾驶汽车行业、军事工业等。该领域的挑战之一是与机器人轨迹估计联合获得对象分类。考虑到依赖于视图的语义测量，不同类之间存在耦合，从而产生大量假设的组合。常见的解决方案是修剪概率足够低的假设并仅保留有限数量的假设。然而，在剪枝和重整化之后，更新后的概率相对于原始概率过于自信。这对于需要高精度的系统来说尤其成问题。如果类的先验概率是独立的，则可以有效地计算原始归一化因子，而无需修剪假设。据我们所知，这是第一个展示这些结果的工作。如果类别的先验概率是相关的，我们提出标准化因子的下限，以确保谨慎的结果。边界是增量计算的，其效率与独立情况相似。在基于界限进行修剪和更新之后，经验表明该信念接近于原始信念。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于视角依赖语义SLAM的混合信念剪枝方法，通过保证概率保守性来解决剪枝后的过自信问题。
AI.motivation: 语义SLAM中物体分类与轨迹估计的耦合导致大量假设，传统剪枝方法会引发概率过自信，影响高精度系统可靠性。
AI.method: 针对先验独立和依赖两种情况分别处理：独立时高效计算归一化因子，依赖时提出增量计算的保守下界作为归一化因子替代方案。
AI.result: 实验证明，基于该下界进行剪枝和更新后的信念与原始信念保持高度接近，有效抑制了过自信问题。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出兼顾效率与保守性的混合剪枝框架，为高精度语义SLAM系统提供了理论保证和实用方案。

authors_text: Antonio Blanca,Zongchen Chen,Daniel Štefankovič,Eric Vigoda
title: Complexity of High-Dimensional Identity Testing with Coordinate Conditional Sampling
title_zh: 坐标条件采样高维身份测试的复杂性
abstract: We study the identity testing problem for high-dimensional distributions. Given as input an explicit distribution $μ$, an $\varepsilon>0$, and access to sampling oracle(s) for a hidden distribution $π$, the goal in identity testing is to distinguish whether the two distributions $μ$ and $π$ are identical or are at least $\varepsilon$-far apart. When there is only access to full samples from the hidden distribution $π$, it is known that exponentially many samples (in the dimension) may be needed for identity testing, and hence previous works have studied identity testing with additional access to various "conditional" sampling oracles. We consider a significantly weaker conditional sampling oracle, which we call the $\mathsf{Coordinate\ Oracle}$, and provide a computational and statistical characterization of the identity testing problem in this new model. We prove that if an analytic property known as approximate tensorization of entropy holds for an $n$-dimensional visible distribution $μ$, then there is an efficient identity testing algorithm for any hidden distribution $π$ using $\tilde{O}(n/\varepsilon)$ queries to the $\mathsf{Coordinate\ Oracle}$. Approximate tensorization of entropy is a pertinent condition as recent works have established it for a large class of high-dimensional distributions. We also prove a computational phase transition: for a well-studied class of $n$-dimensional distributions, specifically sparse antiferromagnetic Ising models over $\{+1,-1\}^n$, we show that in the regime where approximate tensorization of entropy fails, there is no efficient identity testing algorithm unless $\mathsf{RP}=\mathsf{NP}$. We complement our results with a matching $Ω(n/\varepsilon)$ statistical lower bound for the sample complexity of identity testing in the $\mathsf{Coordinate\ Oracle}$ model.
summary: We study the identity testing problem for high-dimensional distributions. Given as input an explicit distribution $μ$, an $\varepsilon>0$, and access to sampling oracle(s) for a hidden distribution $π$, the goal in identity testing is to distinguish whether the two distributions $μ$ and $π$ are identical or are at least $\varepsilon$-far apart. When there is only access to full samples from the hidden distribution $π$, it is known that exponentially many samples (in the dimension) may be needed for identity testing, and hence previous works have studied identity testing with additional access to various "conditional" sampling oracles. We consider a significantly weaker conditional sampling oracle, which we call the $\mathsf{Coordinate\ Oracle}$, and provide a computational and statistical characterization of the identity testing problem in this new model. We prove that if an analytic property known as approximate tensorization of entropy holds for an $n$-dimensional visible distribution $μ$, then there is an efficient identity testing algorithm for any hidden distribution $π$ using $\tilde{O}(n/\varepsilon)$ queries to the $\mathsf{Coordinate\ Oracle}$. Approximate tensorization of entropy is a pertinent condition as recent works have established it for a large class of high-dimensional distributions. We also prove a computational phase transition: for a well-studied class of $n$-dimensional distributions, specifically sparse antiferromagnetic Ising models over $\{+1,-1\}^n$, we show that in the regime where approximate tensorization of entropy fails, there is no efficient identity testing algorithm unless $\mathsf{RP}=\mathsf{NP}$. We complement our results with a matching $Ω(n/\varepsilon)$ statistical lower bound for the sample complexity of identity testing in the $\mathsf{Coordinate\ Oracle}$ model.
abstract_zh: 我们研究高维分布的身份测试问题。给定显式分布 $μ$、$\varepsilon>0$ 作为输入，并访问隐藏分布 $π$ 的采样预言机，身份测试的目标是区分两个分布 $μ$ 和 $π$ 是否相同或至少相差 $\varepsilon$。当只能访问隐藏分布 $π$ 中的完整样本时，众所周知，身份测试可能需要指数级数量的样本（在维度上），因此以前的工作已经研究了身份测试以及对各种“条件”采样预言机的额外访问。我们考虑一个明显较弱的条件采样预言机，我们称之为 $\mathsf{Cooperative\ Oracle}$，并提供这个新模型中身份测试问题的计算和统计特征。我们证明，如果被称为熵近似张量化的解析性质对于 $n$ 维可见分布 $μ$ 成立，那么使用 $\tilde{O}(n/\varepsilon)$ 对 $\mathsf{Cooperative\ Oracle}$ 查询，对于任何隐藏分布 $π$ 都存在有效的身份测试算法。熵的近似张量化是一个相关条件，因为最近的工作已经为一大类高维分布建立了它。我们还证明了计算相变：对于经过充分研究的一类 $n$ 维分布，特别是 $\{+1,-1\}^n$ 上的稀疏反铁磁 Ising 模型，我们表明，在熵近似张量化失败的情况下，不存在有效的身份测试算法，除非 $\mathsf{RP}=\mathsf{NP}$。我们用匹配的 $Ω(n/\varepsilon)$ 统计下限来补充 $\mathsf{Cooperative\ Oracle}$ 模型中身份测试的样本复杂性的统计下限。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在高维分布下使用坐标条件抽样预言机进行身份测试的复杂性问题，提出了基于近似熵张量化的高效算法，并分析了计算相变。
AI.motivation: 传统高维分布身份测试需要指数级样本，而坐标条件抽样预言机提供了一种更高效的替代方案，但其计算复杂性尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过引入近似熵张量化条件，设计基于坐标条件抽样预言机的高效算法，并利用稀疏反铁磁伊辛模型证明计算相变。
AI.result: 当显式分布满足近似熵张量化时，算法复杂度为~O(n/ε)；若不满足，则除非RP=NP否则无法高效测试，同时证明了Ω(n/ε)的统计下界。
AI.conclusion: 坐标条件抽样模型下身份测试的复杂性由熵张量化决定，为高维分布测试提供了计算与统计的理论边界。

authors_text: Mohammadi Zaki,Avinash Mohan,Aditya Gopalan,Shie Mannor
title: Actor-Critic based Improper Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于演员-评论家的不当强化学习
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2102.08201
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2102.08201
abstract: We consider an improper reinforcement learning setting where a learner is given $M$ base controllers for an unknown Markov decision process, and wishes to combine them optimally to produce a potentially new controller that can outperform each of the base ones. This can be useful in tuning across controllers, learnt possibly in mismatched or simulated environments, to obtain a good controller for a given target environment with relatively few trials. Towards this, we propose two algorithms: (1) a Policy Gradient-based approach; and (2) an algorithm that can switch between a simple Actor-Critic (AC) based scheme and a Natural Actor-Critic (NAC) scheme depending on the available information. Both algorithms operate over a class of improper mixtures of the given controllers. For the first case, we derive convergence rate guarantees assuming access to a gradient oracle. For the AC-based approach we provide convergence rate guarantees to a stationary point in the basic AC case and to a global optimum in the NAC case. Numerical results on (i) the standard control theoretic benchmark of stabilizing an cartpole; and (ii) a constrained queueing task show that our improper policy optimization algorithm can stabilize the system even when the base policies at its disposal are unstable.
summary: We consider an improper reinforcement learning setting where a learner is given $M$ base controllers for an unknown Markov decision process, and wishes to combine them optimally to produce a potentially new controller that can outperform each of the base ones. This can be useful in tuning across controllers, learnt possibly in mismatched or simulated environments, to obtain a good controller for a given target environment with relatively few trials. Towards this, we propose two algorithms: (1) a Policy Gradient-based approach; and (2) an algorithm that can switch between a simple Actor-Critic (AC) based scheme and a Natural Actor-Critic (NAC) scheme depending on the available information. Both algorithms operate over a class of improper mixtures of the given controllers. For the first case, we derive convergence rate guarantees assuming access to a gradient oracle. For the AC-based approach we provide convergence rate guarantees to a stationary point in the basic AC case and to a global optimum in the NAC case. Numerical results on (i) the standard control theoretic benchmark of stabilizing an cartpole; and (ii) a constrained queueing task show that our improper policy optimization algorithm can stabilize the system even when the base policies at its disposal are unstable.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑一种不正确的强化学习设置，其中学习者被给予 $M$ 基本控制器用于未知的马尔可夫决策过程，并希望将它们最佳地组合起来以产生一个可以超越每个基本控制器的潜在新控制器。这对于跨控制器的调整很有用，可能是在不匹配或模拟的环境中学习的，以便通过相对较少的试验获得针对给定目标环境的良好控制器。为此，我们提出了两种算法：（1）基于策略梯度的方法； (2)一种可以根据可用信息在简单的基于演员-评论家(AC)的方案和自然演员-评论家(NAC)方案之间切换的算法。两种算法都对给定控制器的一类不正确的混合进行操作。对于第一种情况，我们在假设访问梯度预言的情况下得出收敛率保证。对于基于 AC 的方法，我们为基本 AC 情况下的驻点和 NAC 情况下的全局最优提供收敛率保证。 (i) 稳定卡托的标准控制理论基准的数值结果； (ii) 约束排队任务表明，即使在可用的基本策略不稳定的情况下，我们不正确的策略优化算法也可以稳定系统。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在未知马尔可夫决策过程中，如何通过组合多个基础控制器生成更优控制器的非规范强化学习问题。
AI.motivation: 当基础控制器可能来自不匹配或模拟环境时，需通过少量试验快速获得适应目标环境的优质控制器。
AI.method: 提出两种算法：基于策略梯度的方法，以及可动态切换Actor-Critic与自然Actor-Critic的混合算法，均在基础控制器的非规范混合空间中操作。
AI.result: 在倒立摆稳定控制和约束排队任务中，即使基础策略不稳定，算法仍能有效稳定系统并提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法能有效组合基础控制器实现性能提升，适用于跨环境控制器调优场景。

authors_text: Long Chen,Yingying Xu,Fangyi Xu,Qian Hu,Zhenzhou Tang
title: Balancing the trade-off between cost and reliability for wireless sensor networks: a multi-objective optimized deployment method
title_zh: 平衡无线传感器网络成本与可靠性之间的权衡：多目标优化部署方法
abstract: The deployment of the sensor nodes (SNs) always plays a decisive role in the system performance of wireless sensor networks (WSNs). In this work, we propose an optimal deployment method for practical heterogeneous WSNs which gives a deep insight into the trade-off between the reliability and deployment cost. Specifically, this work aims to provide the optimal deployment of SNs to maximize the coverage degree and connection degree, and meanwhile minimize the overall deployment cost. In addition, this work fully considers the heterogeneity of SNs (i.e. differentiated sensing range and deployment cost) and three-dimensional (3-D) deployment scenarios. This is a multi-objective optimization problem, non-convex, multimodal and NP-hard. To solve it, we develop a novel swarm-based multi-objective optimization algorithm, known as the competitive multi-objective marine predators algorithm (CMOMPA) whose performance is verified by comprehensive comparative experiments with ten other stateof-the-art multi-objective optimization algorithms. The computational results demonstrate that CMOMPA is superior to others in terms of convergence and accuracy and shows excellent performance on multimodal multiobjective optimization problems. Sufficient simulations are also conducted to evaluate the effectiveness of the CMOMPA based optimal SNs deployment method. The results show that the optimized deployment can balance the trade-off among deployment cost, sensing reliability and network reliability. The source code is available on https://github.com/iNet-WZU/CMOMPA.
summary: The deployment of the sensor nodes (SNs) always plays a decisive role in the system performance of wireless sensor networks (WSNs). In this work, we propose an optimal deployment method for practical heterogeneous WSNs which gives a deep insight into the trade-off between the reliability and deployment cost. Specifically, this work aims to provide the optimal deployment of SNs to maximize the coverage degree and connection degree, and meanwhile minimize the overall deployment cost. In addition, this work fully considers the heterogeneity of SNs (i.e. differentiated sensing range and deployment cost) and three-dimensional (3-D) deployment scenarios. This is a multi-objective optimization problem, non-convex, multimodal and NP-hard. To solve it, we develop a novel swarm-based multi-objective optimization algorithm, known as the competitive multi-objective marine predators algorithm (CMOMPA) whose performance is verified by comprehensive comparative experiments with ten other stateof-the-art multi-objective optimization algorithms. The computational results demonstrate that CMOMPA is superior to others in terms of convergence and accuracy and shows excellent performance on multimodal multiobjective optimization problems. Sufficient simulations are also conducted to evaluate the effectiveness of the CMOMPA based optimal SNs deployment method. The results show that the optimized deployment can balance the trade-off among deployment cost, sensing reliability and network reliability. The source code is available on https://github.com/iNet-WZU/CMOMPA.
abstract_zh: 传感器节点（SN）的部署对于无线传感器网络（WSN）的系统性能始终起着决定性作用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种针对实际异构 WSN 的最佳部署方法，该方法深入了解了可靠性和部署成本之间的权衡。具体来说，这项工作旨在提供SN的优化部署，以最大化覆盖度和连接度，同时最小化总体部署成本。此外，这项工作充分考虑了SN的异构性（即差异化的感知范围和部署成本）和三维（3-D）部署场景。这是一个多目标优化问题，非凸、多峰且 NP 困难。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种新颖的基于群体的多目标优化算法，称为竞争性多目标海洋捕食者算法（CMOMPA），其性能通过与其他十种最先进的多目标优化算法的综合比较实验得到验证。计算结果表明CMOMPA在收敛性和精度方面优于其他算法，在多模态多目标优化问题上表现出优异的性能。还进行了充分的仿真来评估基于 CMOMPA 的最优 SN 部署方法的有效性。结果表明，优化部署能够平衡部署成本、感知可靠性和网络可靠性之间的权衡。源代码可在 https://github.com/iNet-WZU/CMOMPA 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多目标优化方法，用于在无线传感器网络中平衡部署成本与可靠性，考虑异构性和三维部署场景。
AI.motivation: 传感器节点部署对无线传感器网络性能至关重要，但现有方法难以同时优化成本、覆盖范围和连接度，尤其在异构节点和三维场景中存在挑战。
AI.method: 开发了一种新型群智能多目标优化算法——竞争多目标海洋捕食者算法（CMOMPA），通过对比实验验证其性能，并结合仿真实验评估优化部署效果。
AI.result: CMOMPA在收敛性、精度及多模态问题求解上优于其他十种先进算法，优化部署能有效平衡成本、感知可靠性和网络可靠性。
AI.conclusion: CMOMPA为解决异构三维无线传感器网络的多目标部署问题提供了高效方法，实现了成本与可靠性的优化平衡。

To solve it, we develop a novel swarm-based multi-objective optimization algorithm, known as the competitive multi-objective marine predators algorithm (CMOMPA) whose performance is verified by comprehensive comparative experiments with ten other stateof-the-art multi-objective optimization algorithms. The results show that the optimized deployment can balance the trade-off among deployment cost, sensing reliability and network reliability. authors_text: Haitian Zeng,Xin Yu,Jiaxu Miao,Yi Yang
title: MHR-Net: Multiple-Hypothesis Reconstruction of Non-Rigid Shapes from 2D Views
title_zh: MHR-Net：从 2D 视图对非刚性形状进行多重假设重建
abstract: We propose MHR-Net, a novel method for recovering Non-Rigid Shapes from Motion (NRSfM). MHR-Net aims to find a set of reasonable reconstructions for a 2D view, and it also selects the most likely reconstruction from the set. To deal with the challenging unsupervised generation of non-rigid shapes, we develop a new Deterministic Basis and Stochastic Deformation scheme in MHR-Net. The non-rigid shape is first expressed as the sum of a coarse shape basis and a flexible shape deformation, then multiple hypotheses are generated with uncertainty modeling of the deformation part. MHR-Net is optimized with reprojection loss on the basis and the best hypothesis. Furthermore, we design a new Procrustean Residual Loss, which reduces the rigid rotations between similar shapes and further improves the performance. Experiments show that MHR-Net achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction accuracy on Human3.6M, SURREAL and 300-VW datasets.
summary: We propose MHR-Net, a novel method for recovering Non-Rigid Shapes from Motion (NRSfM). MHR-Net aims to find a set of reasonable reconstructions for a 2D view, and it also selects the most likely reconstruction from the set. To deal with the challenging unsupervised generation of non-rigid shapes, we develop a new Deterministic Basis and Stochastic Deformation scheme in MHR-Net. The non-rigid shape is first expressed as the sum of a coarse shape basis and a flexible shape deformation, then multiple hypotheses are generated with uncertainty modeling of the deformation part. MHR-Net is optimized with reprojection loss on the basis and the best hypothesis. Furthermore, we design a new Procrustean Residual Loss, which reduces the rigid rotations between similar shapes and further improves the performance. Experiments show that MHR-Net achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction accuracy on Human3.6M, SURREAL and 300-VW datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 MHR-Net，这是一种从运动中恢复非刚性形状 (NRSfM) 的新方法。 MHR-Net的目标是为2D视图找到一组合理的重建，并且它还从该组中选择最有可能的重建。为了应对具有挑战性的非刚性形状的无监督生成，我们在 MHR-Net 中开发了一种新的确定性基础和随机变形方案。非刚性形状首先表示为粗略形状基础和柔性形状变形之和，然后通过变形部分的不确定性建模生成多个假设。 MHR-Net 在最佳假设的基础上用重投影损失进行了优化。此外，我们设计了新的Procrustean Residual Loss，它减少了相似形状之间的刚性旋转，进一步提高了性能。实验表明，MHR-Net 在 Human3.6M、SURREAL 和 300-VW 数据集上实现了最先进的重建精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MHR-Net的新方法，用于从2D视图中恢复非刚性形状。
AI.motivation: 非刚性形状从运动（NRSfM）是一个具有挑战性的问题，特别是在没有监督的情况下生成非刚性形状时。传统方法难以处理形状变形的不确定性，因此需要一种新的方法来提高重建精度。
AI.method: MHR-Net引入了确定性基和随机变形方案，将非刚性形状表示为粗略形状基和灵活形状变形的总和。通过不确定性建模生成多个假设，并选择最可能的重建。此外，设计了一种新的Procrustean残差损失，以减少相似形状之间的刚性旋转。
AI.result: 实验表明，MHR-Net在Human3.6M、SURREAL和300-VW数据集上实现了最先进的重建精度。
AI.conclusion: MHR-Net通过引入多个假设和不确定性建模，有效提升了非刚性形状的重建精度，为NRSfM问题提供了一种新的解决方案。

authors_text: Jagna Nieuwazny,Karol Nowakowski,Michal Ptaszynski,Fumito Masui
title: Can You Fool AI by Doing a 180? $\unicode{x2013}$ A Case Study on Authorship Analysis of Texts by Arata Osada
title_zh: 你能通过 180 度转弯来愚弄人工智能吗？ $\unicode{x2013}$ Arata Osada 文本作者分析案例研究
comment: ef:Information Processing & Management, Volume 58, Issue 5, 2021, 102644, ISSN 0306-4573
comments: ef:Information Processing & Management, Volume 58, Issue 5, 2021, 102644, ISSN 0306-4573
abstract: This paper is our attempt at answering a twofold question covering the areas of ethics and authorship analysis. Firstly, since the methods used for performing authorship analysis imply that an author can be recognized by the content he or she creates, we were interested in finding out whether it would be possible for an author identification system to correctly attribute works to authors if in the course of years they have undergone a major psychological transition. Secondly, and from the point of view of the evolution of an author's ethical values, we checked what it would mean if the authorship attribution system encounters difficulties in detecting single authorship. We set out to answer those questions through performing a binary authorship analysis task using a text classifier based on a pre-trained transformer model and a baseline method relying on conventional similarity metrics. For the test set, we chose works of Arata Osada, a Japanese educator and specialist in the history of education, with half of them being books written before the World War II and another half in the 1950s, in between which he underwent a transformation in terms of political opinions. As a result, we were able to confirm that in the case of texts authored by Arata Osada in a time span of more than 10 years, while the classification accuracy drops by a large margin and is substantially lower than for texts by other non-fiction writers, confidence scores of the predictions remain at a similar level as in the case of a shorter time span, indicating that the classifier was in many instances tricked into deciding that texts written over a time span of multiple years were actually written by two different people, which in turn leads us to believe that such a change can affect authorship analysis, and that historical events have great impact on a person's ethical outlook as expressed in their writings.
summary: This paper is our attempt at answering a twofold question covering the areas of ethics and authorship analysis. Firstly, since the methods used for performing authorship analysis imply that an author can be recognized by the content he or she creates, we were interested in finding out whether it would be possible for an author identification system to correctly attribute works to authors if in the course of years they have undergone a major psychological transition. Secondly, and from the point of view of the evolution of an author's ethical values, we checked what it would mean if the authorship attribution system encounters difficulties in detecting single authorship. We set out to answer those questions through performing a binary authorship analysis task using a text classifier based on a pre-trained transformer model and a baseline method relying on conventional similarity metrics. For the test set, we chose works of Arata Osada, a Japanese educator and specialist in the history of education, with half of them being books written before the World War II and another half in the 1950s, in between which he underwent a transformation in terms of political opinions. As a result, we were able to confirm that in the case of texts authored by Arata Osada in a time span of more than 10 years, while the classification accuracy drops by a large margin and is substantially lower than for texts by other non-fiction writers, confidence scores of the predictions remain at a similar level as in the case of a shorter time span, indicating that the classifier was in many instances tricked into deciding that texts written over a time span of multiple years were actually written by two different people, which in turn leads us to believe that such a change can affect authorship analysis, and that historical events have great impact on a person's ethical outlook as expressed in their writings.
abstract_zh: 本文试图回答涵盖道德和作者分析领域的双重问题。首先，由于用于进行作者身份分析的方法意味着作者可以通过他或她创作的内容来识别，因此我们有兴趣了解作者识别系统是否有可能在作者经历了重大心理转变的情况下正确地将作品归因于作者。其次，从作者伦理价值观演变的角度来看，如果作者归属系统在检测单一作者时遇到困难，这意味着什么。我们开始通过使用基于预先训练的转换器模型的文本分类器和依赖于传统相似性度量的基线方法来执行二元作者分析任务来回答这些问题。测试集我们选择了日本教育家、教育史专家大田新的著作，其中一半是二战前的著作，另一半是20世纪50年代的著作，其间经历了政治观点的转变。结果，我们能够确认，对于 Arata Osada 在超过 10 年的时间跨度内撰写的文本，虽然分类准确率大幅下降，并且大大低于其他非小说作家的文本，但预测的置信度分数仍保持在与较短时间跨度的情况类似的水平，这表明分类器在许多情况下被欺骗，认为跨度多年的文本实际上是由两个不同的人撰写的，这反过来又使我们相信这种变化会影响作者身份分析，并且历史事件对一个人在其作品中表达的道德观有很大影响。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析日本教育专家小达良太在二战前后不同时期的著作，探讨作者身份分析系统在作者经历重大心理转变时的识别准确性。
AI.motivation: 研究作者身份分析系统的伦理影响，并验证历史事件对作者道德观念演变的体现是否会导致单一本质作者的识别困难。
AI.method: 采用基于预训练Transformer模型的文本分类器及传统相似度度量方法，对小达良太战前与1950年代的著作进行二分类作者身份分析。
AI.result: 分类准确率较其他非虚构作者显著下降，但预测置信度与短期跨度文本相近，模型误判不同时期文本为不同作者所写。
AI.conclusion: 作者心理转变可能影响作者身份分析结果，历史事件对个人道德观的塑造在文本中具有显著体现。

search_text: Can You Fool AI by Doing a 180? $\unicode{x2013}$ A Case Study on Authorship Analysis of Texts by Arata Osada 你能通过 180 度转弯来愚弄人工智能吗？ $\unicode{x2013}$ Arata Osada 文本作者分析案例研究 This paper is our attempt at answering a twofold question covering the areas of ethics and authorship analysis. Firstly, since the methods used for performing authorship analysis imply that an author can be recognized by the content he or she creates, we were interested in finding out whether it would be possible for an author identification system to correctly attribute works to authors if in the course of years they have undergone a major psychological transition. Secondly, and from the point of view of the evolution of an author's ethical values, we checked what it would mean if the authorship attribution system encounters difficulties in detecting single authorship. We set out to answer those questions through performing a binary authorship analysis task using a text classifier based on a pre-trained transformer model and a baseline method relying on conventional similarity metrics. For the test set, we chose works of Arata Osada, a Japanese educator and specialist in the history of education, with half of them being books written before the World War II and another half in the 1950s, in between which he underwent a transformation in terms of political opinions. As a result, we were able to confirm that in the case of texts authored by Arata Osada in a time span of more than 10 years, while the classification accuracy drops by a large margin and is substantially lower than for texts by other non-fiction writers, confidence scores of the predictions remain at a similar level as in the case of a shorter time span, indicating that the classifier was in many instances tricked into deciding that texts written over a time span of multiple years were actually written by two different people, which in turn leads us to believe that such a change can affect authorship analysis, and that historical events have great impact on a person's ethical outlook as expressed in their writings. 本文试图回答涵盖道德和作者分析领域的双重问题。首先，由于用于进行作者身份分析的方法意味着作者可以通过他或她创作的内容来识别，因此我们有兴趣了解作者识别系统是否有可能在作者经历了重大心理转变的情况下正确地将作品归因于作者。其次，从作者伦理价值观演变的角度来看，如果作者归属系统在检测单一作者时遇到困难，这意味着什么。我们开始通过使用基于预先训练的转换器模型的文本分类器和依赖于传统相似性度量的基线方法来执行二元作者分析任务来回答这些问题。测试集我们选择了日本教育家、教育史专家大田新的著作，其中一半是二战前的著作，另一半是20世纪50年代的著作，其间经历了政治观点的转变。结果，我们能够确认，对于 Arata Osada 在超过 10 年的时间跨度内撰写的文本，虽然分类准确率大幅下降，并且大大低于其他非小说作家的文本，但预测的置信度分数仍保持在与较短时间跨度的情况类似的水平，这表明分类器在许多情况下被欺骗，认为跨度多年的文本实际上是由两个不同的人撰写的，这反过来又使我们相信这种变化会影响作者身份分析，并且历史事件对一个人在其作品中表达的道德观有很大影响。 本文通过分析日本教育专家小达良太在二战前后不同时期的著作，探讨作者身份分析系统在作者经历重大心理转变时的识别准确性。 Jagna Nieuwazny,Karol Nowakowski,Michal Ptaszynski,Fumito Masui cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhonghua Wu,Yicheng Wu,Guosheng Lin,Jianfei Cai,Chen Qian
title: Dual Adaptive Transformations for Weakly Supervised Point Cloud Segmentation
title_zh: 弱监督点云分割的双自适应变换
abstract: Weakly supervised point cloud segmentation, i.e. semantically segmenting a point cloud with only a few labeled points in the whole 3D scene, is highly desirable due to the heavy burden of collecting abundant dense annotations for the model training. However, existing methods remain challenging to accurately segment 3D point clouds since limited annotated data may lead to insufficient guidance for label propagation to unlabeled data. Considering the smoothness-based methods have achieved promising progress, in this paper, we advocate applying the consistency constraint under various perturbations to effectively regularize unlabeled 3D points. Specifically, we propose a novel DAT (\textbf{D}ual \textbf{A}daptive \textbf{T}ransformations) model for weakly supervised point cloud segmentation, where the dual adaptive transformations are performed via an adversarial strategy at both point-level and region-level, aiming at enforcing the local and structural smoothness constraints on 3D point clouds. We evaluate our proposed DAT model with two popular backbones on the large-scale S3DIS and ScanNet-V2 datasets. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model can effectively leverage the unlabeled 3D points and achieve significant performance gains on both datasets, setting new state-of-the-art performance for weakly supervised point cloud segmentation.
summary: Weakly supervised point cloud segmentation, i.e. semantically segmenting a point cloud with only a few labeled points in the whole 3D scene, is highly desirable due to the heavy burden of collecting abundant dense annotations for the model training. However, existing methods remain challenging to accurately segment 3D point clouds since limited annotated data may lead to insufficient guidance for label propagation to unlabeled data. Considering the smoothness-based methods have achieved promising progress, in this paper, we advocate applying the consistency constraint under various perturbations to effectively regularize unlabeled 3D points. Specifically, we propose a novel DAT (\textbf{D}ual \textbf{A}daptive \textbf{T}ransformations) model for weakly supervised point cloud segmentation, where the dual adaptive transformations are performed via an adversarial strategy at both point-level and region-level, aiming at enforcing the local and structural smoothness constraints on 3D point clouds. We evaluate our proposed DAT model with two popular backbones on the large-scale S3DIS and ScanNet-V2 datasets. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model can effectively leverage the unlabeled 3D points and achieve significant performance gains on both datasets, setting new state-of-the-art performance for weakly supervised point cloud segmentation.
abstract_zh: 由于为模型训练收集丰富的密集注释的负担很重，因此非常需要弱监督点云分割，即在整个 3D 场景中仅使用几个标记点对点云进行语义分割。然而，现有方法在准确分割 3D 点云方面仍然具有挑战性，因为有限的注释数据可能导致标签传播到未标记数据的指导不足。考虑到基于平滑度的方法已经取得了可喜的进展，在本文中，我们主张在各种扰动下应用一致性约束来有效地正则化未标记的 3D 点。具体来说，我们提出了一种用于弱监督点云分割的新型 DAT（\textbf{D}ual \textbf{A}daptive \textbf{T}transformations）模型，其中通过点级和区域级的对抗策略执行双重自适应变换，旨在对 3D 点云实施局部和结构平滑度约束。我们在大规模 S3DIS 和 ScanNet-V2 数据集上使用两个流行的主干来评估我们提出的 DAT 模型。大量实验表明，我们的模型可以有效地利用未标记的 3D 点，并在两个数据集上实现显着的性能提升，为弱监督点云分割设置新的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DAT的双自适应变换模型，用于解决弱监督点云分割问题，通过利用少量标注点和大量未标注点提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督点云分割方法因标注数据不足导致标签传播效果有限，难以准确分割3D点云。为解决这一问题，本文提出通过多扰动下的一致性约束来增强未标注点的正则化效果。
AI.method: 设计DAT模型，在点级和区域级通过对抗策略执行双自适应变换，强制施加局部和结构平滑性约束，从而提升模型对未标注点的利用效率。
AI.result: 在S3DIS和ScanNet-V2数据集上实验表明，DAT模型显著优于现有方法，在弱监督点云分割任务中达到新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: DAT模型通过双自适应变换有效利用未标注点，为弱监督点云分割提供了新思路，并在多个数据集上验证了其优越性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DAT的双自适应变换模型，用于解决弱监督点云分割问题，通过利用少量标注点和大量未标注点提升分割性能。

We evaluate our proposed DAT model with two popular backbones on the large-scale S3DIS and ScanNet-V2 datasets. authors_text: Motonari Kambara,Komei Sugiura
title: Relational Future Captioning Model for Explaining Likely Collisions in Daily Tasks
title_zh: 用于解释日常任务中可能发生的冲突的关系未来字幕模型
abstract: Domestic service robots that support daily tasks are a promising solution for elderly or disabled people. It is crucial for domestic service robots to explain the collision risk before they perform actions. In this paper, our aim is to generate a caption about a future event. We propose the Relational Future Captioning Model (RFCM), a crossmodal language generation model for the future captioning task. The RFCM has the Relational Self-Attention Encoder to extract the relationships between events more effectively than the conventional self-attention in transformers. We conducted comparison experiments, and the results show the RFCM outperforms a baseline method on two datasets.
summary: Domestic service robots that support daily tasks are a promising solution for elderly or disabled people. It is crucial for domestic service robots to explain the collision risk before they perform actions. In this paper, our aim is to generate a caption about a future event. We propose the Relational Future Captioning Model (RFCM), a crossmodal language generation model for the future captioning task. The RFCM has the Relational Self-Attention Encoder to extract the relationships between events more effectively than the conventional self-attention in transformers. We conducted comparison experiments, and the results show the RFCM outperforms a baseline method on two datasets.
abstract_zh: 支持日常任务的家庭服务机器人对于老年人或残疾人来说是一个有前途的解决方案。对于家政服务机器人来说，在执行动作之前解释碰撞风险至关重要。在本文中，我们的目标是生成有关未来事件的说明。我们提出了关系未来字幕模型（RFCM），这是一种用于未来字幕任务的跨模式语言生成模型。 RFCM 具有关系自注意力编码器，比 Transformer 中的传统自注意力更有效地提取事件之间的关系。我们进行了比较实验，结果表明 RFCM 在两个数据集上优于基线方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种关系未来字幕模型（RFCM），用于生成日常任务中可能碰撞事件的未来解释，以提高家庭服务机器人的安全性。
AI.motivation: 家庭服务机器人需要提前预测并解释执行日常任务时的碰撞风险，以保障用户安全，尤其对老年人和残疾人而言。
AI.method: 提出关系未来字幕模型（RFCM），采用关系自注意力编码器替代传统自注意力机制，增强事件间关系的提取能力，从而生成更准确的未来碰撞风险解释。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上的实验结果表明，RFCM在生成未来碰撞风险解释任务中优于基线方法，验证了模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: RFCM通过改进的关系自注意力机制有效提升了未来事件描述的准确性，为家庭服务机器人提供更可靠的碰撞风险预警，有助于提升其在实际应用中的安全性和可用性。

search_text: Relational Future Captioning Model for Explaining Likely Collisions in Daily Tasks 用于解释日常任务中可能发生的冲突的关系未来字幕模型 Domestic service robots that support daily tasks are a promising solution for elderly or disabled people. It is crucial for domestic service robots to explain the collision risk before they perform actions. In this paper, our aim is to generate a caption about a future event. We propose the Relational Future Captioning Model (RFCM), a crossmodal language generation model for the future captioning task. The RFCM has the Relational Self-Attention Encoder to extract the relationships between events more effectively than the conventional self-attention in transformers. We conducted comparison experiments, and the results show the RFCM outperforms a baseline method on two datasets. 支持日常任务的家庭服务机器人对于老年人或残疾人来说是一个有前途的解决方案。对于家政服务机器人来说，在执行动作之前解释碰撞风险至关重要。在本文中，我们的目标是生成有关未来事件的说明。我们提出了关系未来字幕模型（RFCM），这是一种用于未来字幕任务的跨模式语言生成模型。 RFCM 具有关系自注意力编码器，比 Transformer 中的传统自注意力更有效地提取事件之间的关系。我们进行了比较实验，结果表明 RFCM 在两个数据集上优于基线方法。 提出一种关系未来字幕模型（RFCM），用于生成日常任务中可能碰撞事件的未来解释，以提高家庭服务机器人的安全性。 Motonari Kambara,Komei Sugiura cs.RO,cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Wenhao Ding,Haohong Lin,Bo Li,Ding Zhao
title: Generalizing Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning with Variational Causal Reasoning
title_zh: 用变分因果推理推广目标条件强化学习
abstract: As a pivotal component to attaining generalizable solutions in human intelligence, reasoning provides great potential for reinforcement learning (RL) agents' generalization towards varied goals by summarizing part-to-whole arguments and discovering cause-and-effect relations. However, how to discover and represent causalities remains a huge gap that hinders the development of causal RL. In this paper, we augment Goal-Conditioned RL (GCRL) with Causal Graph (CG), a structure built upon the relation between objects and events. We novelly formulate the GCRL problem into variational likelihood maximization with CG as latent variables. To optimize the derived objective, we propose a framework with theoretical performance guarantees that alternates between two steps: using interventional data to estimate the posterior of CG; using CG to learn generalizable models and interpretable policies. Due to the lack of public benchmarks that verify generalization capability under reasoning, we design nine tasks and then empirically show the effectiveness of the proposed method against five baselines on these tasks. Further theoretical analysis shows that our performance improvement is attributed to the virtuous cycle of causal discovery, transition modeling, and policy training, which aligns with the experimental evidence in extensive ablation studies.
summary: As a pivotal component to attaining generalizable solutions in human intelligence, reasoning provides great potential for reinforcement learning (RL) agents' generalization towards varied goals by summarizing part-to-whole arguments and discovering cause-and-effect relations. However, how to discover and represent causalities remains a huge gap that hinders the development of causal RL. In this paper, we augment Goal-Conditioned RL (GCRL) with Causal Graph (CG), a structure built upon the relation between objects and events. We novelly formulate the GCRL problem into variational likelihood maximization with CG as latent variables. To optimize the derived objective, we propose a framework with theoretical performance guarantees that alternates between two steps: using interventional data to estimate the posterior of CG; using CG to learn generalizable models and interpretable policies. Due to the lack of public benchmarks that verify generalization capability under reasoning, we design nine tasks and then empirically show the effectiveness of the proposed method against five baselines on these tasks. Further theoretical analysis shows that our performance improvement is attributed to the virtuous cycle of causal discovery, transition modeling, and policy training, which aligns with the experimental evidence in extensive ablation studies.
abstract_zh: 作为获得人类智能中可泛化解决方案的关键组成部分，推理通过总结部分到整体的论点并发现因果关系，为强化学习（RL）智能体泛化到不同目标提供了巨大的潜力。然而，如何发现和表示因果关系仍然是阻碍因果强化学习发展的巨大差距。在本文中，我们用因果图（CG）增强了目标条件强化学习（GCRL），因果图是一种建立在对象和事件之间关系之上的结构。我们新颖地将 GCRL 问题表述为以 CG 作为潜变量的变分似然最大化问题。为了优化导出的目标，我们提出了一个具有理论性能保证的框架，该框架在两个步骤之间交替：使用介入数据估计 CG 的后验；使用 CG 学习可推广的模型和可解释的策略。由于缺乏验证推理下泛化能力的公共基准，我们设计了九个任务，然后根据这些任务的五个基准，凭经验证明所提出的方法的有效性。进一步的理论分析表明，我们的绩效改进归因于因果发现、转型建模和政策培训的良性循环，这与广泛的消融研究中的实验证据相一致。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合因果图的变分方法，以增强目标条件强化学习的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 因果推理能帮助RL代理在不同目标上泛化，但如何发现因果关系是因果强化学习的瓶颈。
AI.method: 将GCRL转化为变分似然最大化问题，构建因果图作为潜在变量，并设计交替优化框架估计因果图后验与训练模型。
AI.result: 在九个自定义任务中优于五个基线方法，理论分析表明因果发现、转移建模与策略训练的良性循环是性能提升的关键。
AI.conclusion: 因果图与变分推理的结合有效提升了目标条件强化学习的泛化能力与可解释性。

authors_text: Gopinath Chennupati,Milind Rao,Gurpreet Chadha,Aaron Eakin,Anirudh Raju,Gautam Tiwari,Anit Kumar Sahu,Ariya Rastrow,Jasha Droppo,Andy Oberlin,Buddha Nandanoor,Prahalad Venkataramanan,Zheng Wu,Pankaj Sitpure
title: ILASR: Privacy-Preserving Incremental Learning for Automatic Speech Recognition at Production Scale
title_zh: ILASR：用于生产规模自动语音识别的隐私保护增量学习
abstract: Incremental learning is one paradigm to enable model building and updating at scale with streaming data. For end-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) tasks, the absence of human annotated labels along with the need for privacy preserving policies for model building makes it a daunting challenge. Motivated by these challenges, in this paper we use a cloud based framework for production systems to demonstrate insights from privacy preserving incremental learning for automatic speech recognition (ILASR). By privacy preserving, we mean, usage of ephemeral data which are not human annotated. This system is a step forward for production levelASR models for incremental/continual learning that offers near real-time test-bed for experimentation in the cloud for end-to-end ASR, while adhering to privacy-preserving policies. We show that the proposed system can improve the production models significantly(3%) over a new time period of six months even in the absence of human annotated labels with varying levels of weak supervision and large batch sizes in incremental learning. This improvement is 20% over test sets with new words and phrases in the new time period. We demonstrate the effectiveness of model building in a privacy-preserving incremental fashion for ASR while further exploring the utility of having an effective teacher model and use of large batch sizes.
summary: Incremental learning is one paradigm to enable model building and updating at scale with streaming data. For end-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) tasks, the absence of human annotated labels along with the need for privacy preserving policies for model building makes it a daunting challenge. Motivated by these challenges, in this paper we use a cloud based framework for production systems to demonstrate insights from privacy preserving incremental learning for automatic speech recognition (ILASR). By privacy preserving, we mean, usage of ephemeral data which are not human annotated. This system is a step forward for production levelASR models for incremental/continual learning that offers near real-time test-bed for experimentation in the cloud for end-to-end ASR, while adhering to privacy-preserving policies. We show that the proposed system can improve the production models significantly(3%) over a new time period of six months even in the absence of human annotated labels with varying levels of weak supervision and large batch sizes in incremental learning. This improvement is 20% over test sets with new words and phrases in the new time period. We demonstrate the effectiveness of model building in a privacy-preserving incremental fashion for ASR while further exploring the utility of having an effective teacher model and use of large batch sizes.
abstract_zh: 增量学习是一种利用流数据大规模构建和更新模型的范例。对于端到端自动语音识别（ASR）任务，缺乏人工注释标签以及模型构建所需的隐私保护策略使其成为一项艰巨的挑战。受这些挑战的推动，在本文中，我们使用基于云的生产系统框架来展示自动语音识别（ILASR）的隐私保护增量学习的见解。隐私保护是指使用未经人工注释的临时数据。该系统是用于增量/持续学习的生产级 ASR 模型的一个进步，它为端到端 ASR 的云实验提供近乎实时的测试平台，同时遵守隐私保护政策。我们表明，即使在增量学习中缺乏不同程度的弱监督和大批量大小的人工注释标签的情况下，所提出的系统也可以在六个月的新时间段内显着改进生产模型（3%）。与新时间段内的新单词和短语的测试集相比，这一改进提高了 20%。我们展示了以保护隐私的增量方式构建 ASR 模型的有效性，同时进一步探索有效的教师模型和使用大批量的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种隐私保护的增量学习框架ILASR，用于生产规模的端到端语音识别，利用非人类标注的临时数据进行模型更新。
AI.motivation: 传统增量学习在语音识别中面临数据无标注和隐私保护的双重挑战，需在生产环境中实现模型持续更新且不依赖人工标注数据。
AI.method: 基于云端框架设计隐私保护增量学习系统，使用非标注临时数据，结合教师模型与大批次训练策略，实现生产级ASR模型的持续优化。
AI.result: 在六个月内无人工标注数据的情况下，模型性能提升3%；针对新词汇和短语的测试集提升达20%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架验证了隐私保护下增量学习在ASR中的有效性，证明教师模型与大批次训练对生产环境模型优化的实用价值。

This system is a step forward for production levelASR models for incremental/continual learning that offers near real-time test-bed for experimentation in the cloud for end-to-end ASR, while adhering to privacy-preserving policies. We show that the proposed system can improve the production models significantly(3%) over a new time period of six months even in the absence of human annotated labels with varying levels of weak supervision and large batch sizes in incremental learning. This improvement is 20% over test sets with new words and phrases in the new time period. We demonstrate the effectiveness of model building in a privacy-preserving incremental fashion for ASR while further exploring the utility of having an effective teacher model and use of large batch sizes. 增量学习是一种利用流数据大规模构建和更新模型的范例。对于端到端自动语音识别（ASR）任务，缺乏人工注释标签以及模型构建所需的隐私保护策略使其成为一项艰巨的挑战。受这些挑战的推动，在本文中，我们使用基于云的生产系统框架来展示自动语音识别（ILASR）的隐私保护增量学习的见解。隐私保护是指使用未经人工注释的临时数据。该系统是用于增量/持续学习的生产级 ASR 模型的一个进步，它为端到端 ASR 的云实验提供近乎实时的测试平台，同时遵守隐私保护政策。我们表明，即使在增量学习中缺乏不同程度的弱监督和大批量大小的人工注释标签的情况下，所提出的系统也可以在六个月的新时间段内显着改进生产模型（3%）。与新时间段内的新单词和短语的测试集相比，这一改进提高了 20%。我们展示了以保护隐私的增量方式构建 ASR 模型的有效性，同时进一步探索有效的教师模型和使用大批量的实用性。 本文提出一种隐私保护的增量学习框架ILASR，用于生产规模的端到端语音识别，利用非人类标注的临时数据进行模型更新。 Gopinath Chennupati,Milind Rao,Gurpreet Chadha,Aaron Eakin,Anirudh Raju,Gautam Tiwari,Anit Kumar Sahu,Ariya Rastrow,Jasha Droppo,Andy Oberlin,Buddha Nandanoor,Prahalad Venkataramanan,Zheng Wu,Pankaj Sitpure cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Rakib Hyder,Ken Shao,Boyu Hou,Panos Markopoulos,Ashley Prater-Bennette,M. Salman Asif
title: Incremental Task Learning with Incremental Rank Updates
title_zh: 具有增量排名更新的增量任务学习
abstract: Incremental Task learning (ITL) is a category of continual learning that seeks to train a single network for multiple tasks (one after another), where training data for each task is only available during the training of that task. Neural networks tend to forget older tasks when they are trained for the newer tasks; this property is often known as catastrophic forgetting. To address this issue, ITL methods use episodic memory, parameter regularization, masking and pruning, or extensible network structures. In this paper, we propose a new incremental task learning framework based on low-rank factorization. In particular, we represent the network weights for each layer as a linear combination of several rank-1 matrices. To update the network for a new task, we learn a rank-1 (or low-rank) matrix and add that to the weights of every layer. We also introduce an additional selector vector that assigns different weights to the low-rank matrices learned for the previous tasks. We show that our approach performs better than the current state-of-the-art methods in terms of accuracy and forgetting. Our method also offers better memory efficiency compared to episodic memory- and mask-based approaches. Our code will be available at https://github.com/CSIPlab/task-increment-rank-update.git
summary: Incremental Task learning (ITL) is a category of continual learning that seeks to train a single network for multiple tasks (one after another), where training data for each task is only available during the training of that task. Neural networks tend to forget older tasks when they are trained for the newer tasks; this property is often known as catastrophic forgetting. To address this issue, ITL methods use episodic memory, parameter regularization, masking and pruning, or extensible network structures. In this paper, we propose a new incremental task learning framework based on low-rank factorization. In particular, we represent the network weights for each layer as a linear combination of several rank-1 matrices. To update the network for a new task, we learn a rank-1 (or low-rank) matrix and add that to the weights of every layer. We also introduce an additional selector vector that assigns different weights to the low-rank matrices learned for the previous tasks. We show that our approach performs better than the current state-of-the-art methods in terms of accuracy and forgetting. Our method also offers better memory efficiency compared to episodic memory- and mask-based approaches. Our code will be available at https://github.com/CSIPlab/task-increment-rank-update.git
abstract_zh: 增量任务学习 (ITL) 是持续学习的一类，旨在为多个任务（一个接一个）训练单个网络，其中每个任务的训练数据仅在该任务的训练期间可用。神经网络在接受新任务训练时往往会忘记旧任务；这种特性通常被称为灾难性遗忘。为了解决这个问题，ITL 方法使用情景记忆、参数正则化、屏蔽和修剪或可扩展的网络结构。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于低秩分解的新增量任务学习框架。特别是，我们将每层的网络权重表示为多个 1 阶矩阵的线性组合。为了针对新任务更新网络，我们学习一个 1 阶（或低阶）矩阵，并将其添加到每一层的权重中。我们还引入了一个额外的选择器向量，它将不同的权重分配给为先前任务学习的低秩矩阵。我们表明，我们的方法在准确性和遗忘方面比当前最先进的方法表现更好。与基于情景记忆和基于掩码的方法相比，我们的方法还提供了更好的记忆效率。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/CSIPlab/task-increment-rank-update.git 上提供

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于低秩分解的增量任务学习框架，通过增量秩更新解决连续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 增量任务学习中，神经网络在学习新任务时容易遗忘旧任务，现有方法如经验记忆和参数正则化存在内存效率或性能不足的问题。
AI.method: 将网络权重表示为多个秩-1矩阵的线性组合，为每个新任务学习并添加低秩矩阵，同时引入选择器向量动态分配不同任务的权重。
AI.result: 在准确率和遗忘度指标上优于现有最先进方法，且相比经验记忆和掩码方法具有更高的内存效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过低秩分解有效平衡了模型性能与内存消耗，为增量任务学习提供了新的解决方案。
