authors_text: Yijie Guo,Qiucheng Wu,Honglak Lee
title: Learning Action Translator for Meta Reinforcement Learning on Sparse-Reward Tasks
title_zh: 用于稀疏奖励任务的元强化学习的学习动作翻译器
abstract: Meta reinforcement learning (meta-RL) aims to learn a policy solving a set of training tasks simultaneously and quickly adapting to new tasks. It requires massive amounts of data drawn from training tasks to infer the common structure shared among tasks. Without heavy reward engineering, the sparse rewards in long-horizon tasks exacerbate the problem of sample efficiency in meta-RL. Another challenge in meta-RL is the discrepancy of difficulty level among tasks, which might cause one easy task dominating learning of the shared policy and thus preclude policy adaptation to new tasks. This work introduces a novel objective function to learn an action translator among training tasks. We theoretically verify that the value of the transferred policy with the action translator can be close to the value of the source policy and our objective function (approximately) upper bounds the value difference. We propose to combine the action translator with context-based meta-RL algorithms for better data collection and more efficient exploration during meta-training. Our approach empirically improves the sample efficiency and performance of meta-RL algorithms on sparse-reward tasks.
summary: Meta reinforcement learning (meta-RL) aims to learn a policy solving a set of training tasks simultaneously and quickly adapting to new tasks. It requires massive amounts of data drawn from training tasks to infer the common structure shared among tasks. Without heavy reward engineering, the sparse rewards in long-horizon tasks exacerbate the problem of sample efficiency in meta-RL. Another challenge in meta-RL is the discrepancy of difficulty level among tasks, which might cause one easy task dominating learning of the shared policy and thus preclude policy adaptation to new tasks. This work introduces a novel objective function to learn an action translator among training tasks. We theoretically verify that the value of the transferred policy with the action translator can be close to the value of the source policy and our objective function (approximately) upper bounds the value difference. We propose to combine the action translator with context-based meta-RL algorithms for better data collection and more efficient exploration during meta-training. Our approach empirically improves the sample efficiency and performance of meta-RL algorithms on sparse-reward tasks.
abstract_zh: 元强化学习（meta-RL）旨在学习同时解决一组训练任务并快速适应新任务的策略。它需要从训练任务中提取大量数据来推断任务之间共享的公共结构。如果没有大量的奖励工程，长期任务中的稀疏奖励会加剧元强化学习中的样本效率问题。元强化学习的另一个挑战是任务之间难度水平的差异，这可能会导致一项简单的任务主导共享策略的学习，从而妨碍策略对新任务的适应。这项工作引入了一种新颖的目标函数来学习训练任务中的动作翻译器。我们从理论上验证了带有动作转换器的传输策略的值可以接近源策略的值，并且我们的目标函数（大约）限制了值差异的上限。我们建议将动作翻译器与基于上下文的元强化学习算法相结合，以便在元训练期间更好地收集数据并更有效地探索。我们的方法凭经验提高了元强化学习算法在稀疏奖励任务上的样本效率和性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动作转换器，旨在提升元强化学习在稀疏奖励任务中的样本效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 稀疏奖励任务导致元强化学习样本效率低下，且任务难度差异易使简单任务主导学习，阻碍策略适应新任务。
AI.method: 设计新目标函数学习任务间的动作转换器，并结合上下文感知的元RL算法优化数据收集与探索效率。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著提升了元RL算法在稀疏奖励任务中的样本效率及整体性能。
AI.conclusion: 动作转换器有效缓解了元RL的样本效率与任务适应性问题，为稀疏奖励场景提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Bytasandram Yaswanth Reddy,Shiv Ram Dubey,Rakesh Kumar Sanodiya,Ravi Ranjan Prasad Karn
title: Context Unaware Knowledge Distillation for Image Retrieval
title_zh: 用于图像检索的上下文无意识知识蒸馏
comment: Accepted in International Conference on Computer Vision and Machine Intelligence (CVMI), 2022
comments: Accepted in International Conference on Computer Vision and Machine Intelligence (CVMI), 2022
abstract: Existing data-dependent hashing methods use large backbone networks with millions of parameters and are computationally complex. Existing knowledge distillation methods use logits and other features of the deep (teacher) model and as knowledge for the compact (student) model, which requires the teacher's network to be fine-tuned on the context in parallel with the student model on the context. Training teacher on the target context requires more time and computational resources. In this paper, we propose context unaware knowledge distillation that uses the knowledge of the teacher model without fine-tuning it on the target context. We also propose a new efficient student model architecture for knowledge distillation. The proposed approach follows a two-step process. The first step involves pre-training the student model with the help of context unaware knowledge distillation from the teacher model. The second step involves fine-tuning the student model on the context of image retrieval. In order to show the efficacy of the proposed approach, we compare the retrieval results, no. of parameters and no. of operations of the student models with the teacher models under different retrieval frameworks, including deep cauchy hashing (DCH) and central similarity quantization (CSQ). The experimental results confirm that the proposed approach provides a promising trade-off between the retrieval results and efficiency. The code used in this paper is released publicly at \url{https://github.com/satoru2001/CUKDFIR}.

The experimental results confirm that the proposed approach provides a promising trade-off between the retrieval results and efficiency. The code used in this paper is released publicly at \url{https://github.com/satoru2001/CUKDFIR}.
abstract_zh: 现有的数据相关哈希方法使用具有数百万个参数的大型骨干网络，并且计算复杂。现有的知识蒸馏方法使用深层（教师）模型的逻辑和其他特征作为紧凑（学生）模型的知识，这需要教师网络与学生模型在上下文上并行进行微调。针对目标环境对教师进行培训需要更多的时间和计算资源。在本文中，我们提出了上下文无意识的知识蒸馏，它使用教师模型的知识，而无需在目标上下文上对其进行微调。我们还提出了一种新的高效学生模型架构，用于知识蒸馏。所提出的方法遵循两步过程。第一步涉及借助从教师模型中提取的上下文无意识的知识来预训练学生模型。第二步涉及在图像检索的背景下微调学生模型。为了显示所提出方法的有效性，我们比较了检索结果，没有。参数和编号。学生模型与教师模型在不同检索框架下的操作，包括深度柯西哈希（DCH）和中心相似度量化（CSQ）。实验结果证实，所提出的方法在检索结果和效率之间提供了有希望的权衡。本文使用的代码在 \url{https://github.com/satoru2001/CUKDFIR} 上公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需在目标上下文中微调教师模型的上下文无关知识蒸馏方法，并设计了高效的轻量级学生模型架构，用于图像检索任务。
AI.motivation: 现有数据依赖的哈希方法计算复杂且参数量大，知识蒸馏方法需同时微调教师和学生模型，导致时间和计算资源消耗大。本文旨在无需微调教师模型的前提下实现高效的知识迁移。
AI.method: 采用两步流程：首先通过上下文无关知识蒸馏预训练学生模型，其次在图像检索上下文中微调学生模型；并提出新型高效学生模型架构。
AI.result: 实验表明，与DCH、CSQ等框架相比，该方法在检索性能与效率间取得良好平衡，学生模型参数量和计算量显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效降低了计算成本，同时保持了图像检索性能，为高效哈希模型设计提供了可行方案。

search_text: Context Unaware Knowledge Distillation for Image Retrieval 用于图像检索的上下文无意识知识蒸馏 Existing data-dependent hashing methods use large backbone networks with millions of parameters and are computationally complex. Existing knowledge distillation methods use logits and other features of the deep (teacher) model and as knowledge for the compact (student) model, which requires the teacher's network to be fine-tuned on the context in parallel with the student model on the context. Training teacher on the target context requires more time and computational resources. In this paper, we propose context unaware knowledge distillation that uses the knowledge of the teacher model without fine-tuning it on the target context. We also propose a new efficient student model architecture for knowledge distillation. The proposed approach follows a two-step process. The first step involves pre-training the student model with the help of context unaware knowledge distillation from the teacher model. The second step involves fine-tuning the student model on the context of image retrieval. In order to show the efficacy of the proposed approach, we compare the retrieval results, no. of parameters and no. of operations of the student models with the teacher models under different retrieval frameworks, including deep cauchy hashing (DCH) and central similarity quantization (CSQ). The experimental results confirm that the proposed approach provides a promising trade-off between the retrieval results and efficiency. The code used in this paper is released publicly at \url{https://github.com/satoru2001/CUKDFIR}. 现有的数据相关哈希方法使用具有数百万个参数的大型骨干网络，并且计算复杂。现有的知识蒸馏方法使用深层（教师）模型的逻辑和其他特征作为紧凑（学生）模型的知识，这需要教师网络与学生模型在上下文上并行进行微调。针对目标环境对教师进行培训需要更多的时间和计算资源。在本文中，我们提出了上下文无意识的知识蒸馏，它使用教师模型的知识，而无需在目标上下文上对其进行微调。我们还提出了一种新的高效学生模型架构，用于知识蒸馏。所提出的方法遵循两步过程。第一步涉及借助从教师模型中提取的上下文无意识的知识来预训练学生模型。第二步涉及在图像检索的背景下微调学生模型。为了显示所提出方法的有效性，我们比较了检索结果，没有。参数和编号。学生模型与教师模型在不同检索框架下的操作，包括深度柯西哈希（DCH）和中心相似度量化（CSQ）。实验结果证实，所提出的方法在检索结果和效率之间提供了有希望的权衡。本文使用的代码在 \url{https://github.com/satoru2001/CUKDFIR} 上公开发布。 本文提出了一种无需在目标上下文中微调教师模型的上下文无关知识蒸馏方法，并设计了高效的轻量级学生模型架构，用于图像检索任务。 Bytasandram Yaswanth Reddy,Shiv Ram Dubey,Rakesh Kumar Sanodiya,Ravi Ranjan Prasad Karn cs.CV

authors_text: Thang M. Pham,Seunghyun Yoon,Trung Bui,Anh Nguyen
title: PiC: A Phrase-in-Context Dataset for Phrase Understanding and Semantic Search
title_zh: PiC：用于短语理解和语义搜索的上下文短语数据集
abstract: While contextualized word embeddings have been a de-facto standard, learning contextualized phrase embeddings is less explored and being hindered by the lack of a human-annotated benchmark that tests machine understanding of phrase semantics given a context sentence or paragraph (instead of phrases alone). To fill this gap, we propose PiC -- a dataset of ~28K of noun phrases accompanied by their contextual Wikipedia pages and a suite of three tasks for training and evaluating phrase embeddings. Training on PiC improves ranking models' accuracy and remarkably pushes span-selection (SS) models (i.e., predicting the start and end index of the target phrase) near-human accuracy, which is 95% Exact Match (EM) on semantic search given a query phrase and a passage. Interestingly, we find evidence that such impressive performance is because the SS models learn to better capture the common meaning of a phrase regardless of its actual context. SotA models perform poorly in distinguishing two senses of the same phrase in two contexts (~60% EM) and in estimating the similarity between two different phrases in the same context (~70% EM).
summary: While contextualized word embeddings have been a de-facto standard, learning contextualized phrase embeddings is less explored and being hindered by the lack of a human-annotated benchmark that tests machine understanding of phrase semantics given a context sentence or paragraph (instead of phrases alone). To fill this gap, we propose PiC -- a dataset of ~28K of noun phrases accompanied by their contextual Wikipedia pages and a suite of three tasks for training and evaluating phrase embeddings. Training on PiC improves ranking models' accuracy and remarkably pushes span-selection (SS) models (i.e., predicting the start and end index of the target phrase) near-human accuracy, which is 95% Exact Match (EM) on semantic search given a query phrase and a passage. Interestingly, we find evidence that such impressive performance is because the SS models learn to better capture the common meaning of a phrase regardless of its actual context. SotA models perform poorly in distinguishing two senses of the same phrase in two contexts (~60% EM) and in estimating the similarity between two different phrases in the same context (~70% EM).
abstract_zh: 虽然上下文词嵌入已经成为事实上的标准，但学习上下文短语嵌入的探索较少，并且由于缺乏人工注释的基准来测试机器对给定上下文句子或段落（而不是单独的短语）的短语语义的理解而受到阻碍。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了 PiC——一个包含约 28K 名词短语的数据集，附有上下文维基百科页面以及一套用于训练和评估短语嵌入的三个任务。 PiC 上的训练提高了排名模型的准确性，并显着推动了跨度选择 (SS) 模型（即预测目标短语的开始和结束索引）接近人类的准确性，在给定查询短语和段落的语义搜索上达到 95% 的精确匹配 (EM)。有趣的是，我们发现证据表明，如此令人印象深刻的表现是因为 SS 模型学会了更好地捕捉短语的常见含义，而不管其实际上下文如何。 SotA 模型在区分两个上下文中同一短语的两种含义（~60% EM）以及估计同一上下文中两个不同短语之间的相似性（~70% EM）方面表现不佳。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PiC数据集，用于评估模型在上下文中理解短语语义的能力，并设计了三个任务来训练和评估短语嵌入。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏针对上下文中文本短语语义理解的基准数据集，导致短语嵌入学习进展受限。
AI.method: 构建包含28K个名词短语及其维基百科上下文的PiC数据集，并设计排序、span选择等三个任务进行模型训练与评估。
AI.result: 使用PiC训练的模型在语义搜索任务中达到95%的Exact Match，但区分多义短语和计算上下文短语相似度时表现较弱（60%-70%）。
AI.conclusion: PiC数据集有效推动了短语表示学习，但现有模型仍难以准确捕捉短语在不同上下文中的细微语义差异。

authors_text: Sukmin Yun,Jaehyung Kim,Dongyoon Han,Hwanjun Song,Jung-Woo Ha,Jinwoo Shin
title: Time Is MattEr: Temporal Self-supervision for Video Transformers
title_zh: 时间很重要：视频 Transformer 的时间自我监督
comment: Accepted to ICML 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/alinlab/temporal-selfsupervision
comments: Accepted to ICML 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/alinlab/temporal-selfsupervision
abstract: Understanding temporal dynamics of video is an essential aspect of learning better video representations. Recently, transformer-based architectural designs have been extensively explored for video tasks due to their capability to capture long-term dependency of input sequences. However, we found that these Video Transformers are still biased to learn spatial dynamics rather than temporal ones, and debiasing the spurious correlation is critical for their performance. Based on the observations, we design simple yet effective self-supervised tasks for video models to learn temporal dynamics better. Specifically, for debiasing the spatial bias, our method learns the temporal order of video frames as extra self-supervision and enforces the randomly shuffled frames to have low-confidence outputs. Also, our method learns the temporal flow direction of video tokens among consecutive frames for enhancing the correlation toward temporal dynamics. Under various video action recognition tasks, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our method and its compatibility with state-of-the-art Video Transformers.
summary: Understanding temporal dynamics of video is an essential aspect of learning better video representations. Recently, transformer-based architectural designs have been extensively explored for video tasks due to their capability to capture long-term dependency of input sequences. However, we found that these Video Transformers are still biased to learn spatial dynamics rather than temporal ones, and debiasing the spurious correlation is critical for their performance. Based on the observations, we design simple yet effective self-supervised tasks for video models to learn temporal dynamics better. Specifically, for debiasing the spatial bias, our method learns the temporal order of video frames as extra self-supervision and enforces the randomly shuffled frames to have low-confidence outputs. Also, our method learns the temporal flow direction of video tokens among consecutive frames for enhancing the correlation toward temporal dynamics. Under various video action recognition tasks, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our method and its compatibility with state-of-the-art Video Transformers.
abstract_zh: 了解视频的时间动态是学习更好的视频表示的一个重要方面。最近，基于变压器的架构设计由于能够捕获输入序列的长期依赖性而在视频任务中得到了广泛的探索。然而，我们发现这些视频变压器仍然偏向于学习空间动态而不是时间动态，并且消除虚假相关性对于它们的性能至关重要。根据观察结果，我们为视频模型设计了简单而有效的自监督任务，以更好地学习时间动态。具体来说，为了消除空间偏差，我们的方法学习视频帧的时间顺序作为额外的自我监督，并强制随机打乱的帧具有低置信度输出。此外，我们的方法还学习连续帧之间视频标记的时间流方向，以增强时间动态的相关性。在各种视频动作识别任务下，我们展示了我们方法的有效性及其与最先进的视频变压器的兼容性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种时间自监督方法，通过设计去偏任务帮助视频Transformer更有效地学习时序动态，提升视频动作识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频Transformer模型对空间动态的依赖过强，导致时序动态学习不足，需通过去偏方法提升其时间建模能力。
AI.method: 设计时间顺序学习与时间流方向增强两个自监督任务，通过强制模型区分正确帧序与随机打乱帧序，以及建模连续帧间的时间流，以提升时序建模能力。
AI.result: 在多个视频动作识别任务中验证了方法的有效性，且与先进Video Transformers兼容，提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入时间自监督任务，有效纠正了视频Transformer的空间偏差，证明了时序动态学习的重要性，为视频表示学习提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种时间自监督方法，通过设计去偏任务帮助视频Transformer更有效地学习时序动态，提升视频动作识别性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有视频Transformer模型对空间动态的依赖过强，导致时序动态学习不足，需通过去偏方法提升其时间建模能力。
ai_content.method: 设计时间顺序学习与时间流方向增强两个自监督任务，通过强制模型区分正确帧序与随机打乱帧序，以及建模连续帧间的时间流，以提升时序建模能力。
ai_content.result: 在多个视频动作识别任务中验证了方法的有效性，且与先进Video Transformers兼容，提升性能。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过引入时间自监督任务，有效纠正了视频Transformer的空间偏差，证明了时序动态学习的重要性，为视频表示学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Time Is MattEr: Temporal Self-supervision for Video Transformers 时间很重要：视频 Transformer 的时间自我监督 Understanding temporal dynamics of video is an essential aspect of learning better video representations. Recently, transformer-based architectural designs have been extensively explored for video tasks due to their capability to capture long-term dependency of input sequences. However, we found that these Video Transformers are still biased to learn spatial dynamics rather than temporal ones, and debiasing the spurious correlation is critical for their performance. Based on the observations, we design simple yet effective self-supervised tasks for video models to learn temporal dynamics better. Specifically, for debiasing the spatial bias, our method learns the temporal order of video frames as extra self-supervision and enforces the randomly shuffled frames to have low-confidence outputs. Also, our method learns the temporal flow direction of video tokens among consecutive frames for enhancing the correlation toward temporal dynamics. Under various video action recognition tasks, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our method and its compatibility with state-of-the-art Video Transformers. 了解视频的时间动态是学习更好的视频表示的一个重要方面。最近，基于变压器的架构设计由于能够捕获输入序列的长期依赖性而在视频任务中得到了广泛的探索。然而，我们发现这些视频变压器仍然偏向于学习空间动态而不是时间动态，并且消除虚假相关性对于它们的性能至关重要。根据观察结果，我们为视频模型设计了简单而有效的自监督任务，以更好地学习时间动态。具体来说，为了消除空间偏差，我们的方法学习视频帧的时间顺序作为额外的自我监督，并强制随机打乱的帧具有低置信度输出。此外，我们的方法还学习连续帧之间视频标记的时间流方向，以增强时间动态的相关性。在各种视频动作识别任务下，我们展示了我们方法的有效性及其与最先进的视频变压器的兼容性。 本文提出一种时间自监督方法，通过设计去偏任务帮助视频Transformer更有效地学习时序动态，提升视频动作识别性能。 Sukmin Yun,Jaehyung Kim,Dongyoon Han,Hwanjun Song,Jung-Woo Ha,Jinwoo Shin cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Sumanth Sadu,Shiv Ram Dubey,SR Sreeja
title: Moment Centralization based Gradient Descent Optimizers for Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 基于矩集中的卷积神经网络梯度下降优化器
comment: Accepted in International Conference on Computer Vision and Machine Intelligence (CVMI), 2022
comments: Accepted in International Conference on Computer Vision and Machine Intelligence (CVMI), 2022
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have shown very appealing performance for many computer vision applications. The training of CNNs is generally performed using stochastic gradient descent (SGD) based optimization techniques. The adaptive momentum-based SGD optimizers are the recent trends. However, the existing optimizers are not able to maintain a zero mean in the first-order moment and struggle with optimization. In this paper, we propose a moment centralization-based SGD optimizer for CNNs. Specifically, we impose the zero mean constraints on the first-order moment explicitly. The proposed moment centralization is generic in nature and can be integrated with any of the existing adaptive momentum-based optimizers. The proposed idea is tested with three state-of-the-art optimization techniques, including Adam, Radam, and Adabelief on benchmark CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and TinyImageNet datasets for image classification. The performance of the existing optimizers is generally improved when integrated with the proposed moment centralization. Further, The results of the proposed moment centralization are also better than the existing gradient centralization. The analytical analysis using the toy example shows that the proposed method leads to a shorter and smoother optimization trajectory. The source code is made publicly available at \url{https://github.com/sumanthsadhu/MC-optimizer}.

The proposed moment centralization is generic in nature and can be integrated with any of the existing adaptive momentum-based optimizers. The proposed idea is tested with three state-of-the-art optimization techniques, including Adam, Radam, and Adabelief on benchmark CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and TinyImageNet datasets for image classification. abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在许多计算机视觉应用中表现出了非常吸引人的性能。 CNN 的训练通常使用基于随机梯度下降 (SGD) 的优化技术来执行。基于自适应动量的 SGD 优化器是最近的趋势。然而，现有的优化器无法在一阶矩中保持零均值并且难以优化。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于矩集中的 CNN 优化器 SGD。具体来说，我们明确地对一阶矩施加零均值约束。所提出的矩集中本质上是通用的，可以与任何现有的基于自适应动量的优化器集成。所提出的想法通过三种最先进的优化技术（包括 Adam、Radam 和 Adabelief）在用于图像分类的基准 CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 TinyImageNet 数据集上进行了测试。当与所提出的矩集中集成时，现有优化器的性能通常会得到改善。此外，所提出的矩中心化的结果也优于现有的梯度中心化。使用玩具示例的分析表明，所提出的方法可以带来更短、更平滑的优化轨迹。源代码在 \url{https://github.com/sumanthsadhu/MC-optimizer} 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于矩中心化的梯度下降优化器，用于改进卷积神经网络的训练过程。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应动量SGD优化器无法保持一阶矩的零均值，导致优化效果受限，需通过显式约束提升性能。
AI.method: 在现有优化器（如Adam、Radam、Adabelief）中引入一阶矩的零均值约束，实现通用的矩中心化技术。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10、CIFAR100和TinyImageNet数据集上，集成矩中心化后优化器性能提升，且优于现有梯度中心化方法。
AI.conclusion: 矩中心化方法能有效改善优化轨迹，提升CNN训练效果，且具有通用性和可扩展性。

authors_text: Zhifeng Qiu,Wanxin Zeng,Dahua Liao,Ning Gui
title: A-SFS: Semi-supervised Feature Selection based on Multi-task Self-supervision
title_zh: A-SFS：基于多任务自监督的半监督特征选择
comment: 18 pages, 7 figures, accepted by knowledge-based systems
comments: 18 pages, 7 figures, accepted by knowledge-based systems
abstract: Feature selection is an important process in machine learning. It builds an interpretable and robust model by selecting the features that contribute the most to the prediction target. However, most mature feature selection algorithms, including supervised and semi-supervised, fail to fully exploit the complex potential structure between features. We believe that these structures are very important for the feature selection process, especially when labels are lacking and data is noisy. To this end, we innovatively introduce a deep learning-based self-supervised mechanism into feature selection problems, namely batch-Attention-based Self-supervision Feature Selection(A-SFS). Firstly, a multi-task self-supervised autoencoder is designed to uncover the hidden structure among features with the support of two pretext tasks. Guided by the integrated information from the multi-self-supervised learning model, a batch-attention mechanism is designed to generate feature weights according to batch-based feature selection patterns to alleviate the impacts introduced by a handful of noisy data. This method is compared to 14 major strong benchmarks, including LightGBM and XGBoost. Experimental results show that A-SFS achieves the highest accuracy in most datasets. Furthermore, this design significantly reduces the reliance on labels, with only 1/10 labeled data needed to achieve the same performance as those state of art baselines. Results show that A-SFS is also most robust to the noisy and missing data.
summary: Feature selection is an important process in machine learning. It builds an interpretable and robust model by selecting the features that contribute the most to the prediction target. However, most mature feature selection algorithms, including supervised and semi-supervised, fail to fully exploit the complex potential structure between features. We believe that these structures are very important for the feature selection process, especially when labels are lacking and data is noisy. To this end, we innovatively introduce a deep learning-based self-supervised mechanism into feature selection problems, namely batch-Attention-based Self-supervision Feature Selection(A-SFS). Firstly, a multi-task self-supervised autoencoder is designed to uncover the hidden structure among features with the support of two pretext tasks. Guided by the integrated information from the multi-self-supervised learning model, a batch-attention mechanism is designed to generate feature weights according to batch-based feature selection patterns to alleviate the impacts introduced by a handful of noisy data. This method is compared to 14 major strong benchmarks, including LightGBM and XGBoost. Experimental results show that A-SFS achieves the highest accuracy in most datasets. Furthermore, this design significantly reduces the reliance on labels, with only 1/10 labeled data needed to achieve the same performance as those state of art baselines. Results show that A-SFS is also most robust to the noisy and missing data.
abstract_zh: 特征选择是机器学习中的一个重要过程。它通过选择对预测目标贡献最大的特征来构建可解释且稳健的模型。然而，大多数成熟的特征选择算法，包括监督和半监督，都无法充分利用特征之间复杂的潜在结构。我们认为这些结构对于特征选择过程非常重要，特别是当标签缺乏且数据有噪声时。为此，我们创新性地将基于深度学习的自监督机制引入到特征选择问题中，即基于批量注意的自监督特征选择（A-SFS）。首先，设计了多任务自监督自动编码器，在两个借口任务的支持下揭示特征之间的隐藏结构。在多自监督学习模型的综合信息的指导下，设计了批量注意机制，根据基于批量的特征选择模式生成特征权重，以减轻少量噪声数据带来的影响。该方法与 14 个主要的强基准进行了比较，包括 LightGBM 和 XGBoost。实验结果表明，A-SFS 在大多数数据集中达到了最高的准确率。此外，这种设计显着减少了对标签的依赖，只需 1/10 的标签数据即可实现与现有技术基线相同的性能。结果表明，A-SFS 对于噪声和缺失数据也是最稳健的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多任务自监督的半监督特征选择方法A-SFS，旨在通过挖掘特征间的潜在结构提升模型鲁棒性并减少对标签的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有特征选择算法未能充分挖掘特征间的复杂潜在结构，尤其在标签稀缺和数据噪声环境下表现不足，需引入自监督机制增强特征学习能力。
AI.method: 设计多任务自监督自编码器通过两个预训练任务挖掘特征隐含结构，并结合批量注意力机制生成特征权重，以缓解噪声数据干扰。
AI.result: 在14个基准测试中A-SFS多数数据集准确率最高，仅需1/10标签数据即可达到SOTA基线性能，且对噪声和缺失数据具有显著鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: A-SFS通过自监督学习有效捕捉特征关联，显著降低标签依赖性，在噪声环境下仍能保持优异性能，为半监督特征选择提供新思路。

conclusion: A-SFS通过自监督学习有效捕捉特征关联，显著降低标签依赖性，在噪声环境下仍能保持优异性能，为半监督特征选择提供新思路。
search_text: A-SFS: Semi-supervised Feature Selection based on Multi-task Self-supervision A-SFS：基于多任务自监督的半监督特征选择 Feature selection is an important process in machine learning. It builds an interpretable and robust model by selecting the features that contribute the most to the prediction target. However, most mature feature selection algorithms, including supervised and semi-supervised, fail to fully exploit the complex potential structure between features. We believe that these structures are very important for the feature selection process, especially when labels are lacking and data is noisy. To this end, we innovatively introduce a deep learning-based self-supervised mechanism into feature selection problems, namely batch-Attention-based Self-supervision Feature Selection(A-SFS). Firstly, a multi-task self-supervised autoencoder is designed to uncover the hidden structure among features with the support of two pretext tasks. Guided by the integrated information from the multi-self-supervised learning model, a batch-attention mechanism is designed to generate feature weights according to batch-based feature selection patterns to alleviate the impacts introduced by a handful of noisy data. This method is compared to 14 major strong benchmarks, including LightGBM and XGBoost. Experimental results show that A-SFS achieves the highest accuracy in most datasets. Furthermore, this design significantly reduces the reliance on labels, with only 1/10 labeled data needed to achieve the same performance as those state of art baselines. Results show that A-SFS is also most robust to the noisy and missing data. 特征选择是机器学习中的一个重要过程。它通过选择对预测目标贡献最大的特征来构建可解释且稳健的模型。然而，大多数成熟的特征选择算法，包括监督和半监督，都无法充分利用特征之间复杂的潜在结构。我们认为这些结构对于特征选择过程非常重要，特别是当标签缺乏且数据有噪声时。为此，我们创新性地将基于深度学习的自监督机制引入到特征选择问题中，即基于批量注意的自监督特征选择（A-SFS）。首先，设计了多任务自监督自动编码器，在两个借口任务的支持下揭示特征之间的隐藏结构。在多自监督学习模型的综合信息的指导下，设计了批量注意机制，根据基于批量的特征选择模式生成特征权重，以减轻少量噪声数据带来的影响。该方法与 14 个主要的强基准进行了比较，包括 LightGBM 和 XGBoost。实验结果表明，A-SFS 在大多数数据集中达到了最高的准确率。此外，这种设计显着减少了对标签的依赖，只需 1/10 的标签数据即可实现与现有技术基线相同的性能。结果表明，A-SFS 对于噪声和缺失数据也是最稳健的。 本文提出一种基于多任务自监督的半监督特征选择方法A-SFS，旨在通过挖掘特征间的潜在结构提升模型鲁棒性并减少对标签的依赖。 Zhifeng Qiu,Wanxin Zeng,Dahua Liao,Ning Gui cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Nan Song,Chi Zhang,Guosheng Lin
title: Few-shot Open-set Recognition Using Background as Unknowns
title_zh: 使用背景作为未知数的少样本开集识别
abstract: Few-shot open-set recognition aims to classify both seen and novel images given only limited training data of seen classes. The challenge of this task is that the model is required not only to learn a discriminative classifier to classify the pre-defined classes with few training data but also to reject inputs from unseen classes that never appear at training time. In this paper, we propose to solve the problem from two novel aspects. First, instead of learning the decision boundaries between seen classes, as is done in standard close-set classification, we reserve space for unseen classes, such that images located in these areas are recognized as the unseen classes. Second, to effectively learn such decision boundaries, we propose to utilize the background features from seen classes. As these background regions do not significantly contribute to the decision of close-set classification, it is natural to use them as the pseudo unseen classes for classifier learning. Our extensive experiments show that our proposed method not only outperforms multiple baselines but also sets new state-of-the-art results on three popular benchmarks, namely tieredImageNet, miniImageNet, and Caltech-USCD Birds-200-2011 (CUB).
summary: Few-shot open-set recognition aims to classify both seen and novel images given only limited training data of seen classes. The challenge of this task is that the model is required not only to learn a discriminative classifier to classify the pre-defined classes with few training data but also to reject inputs from unseen classes that never appear at training time. In this paper, we propose to solve the problem from two novel aspects. First, instead of learning the decision boundaries between seen classes, as is done in standard close-set classification, we reserve space for unseen classes, such that images located in these areas are recognized as the unseen classes. Second, to effectively learn such decision boundaries, we propose to utilize the background features from seen classes. As these background regions do not significantly contribute to the decision of close-set classification, it is natural to use them as the pseudo unseen classes for classifier learning. Our extensive experiments show that our proposed method not only outperforms multiple baselines but also sets new state-of-the-art results on three popular benchmarks, namely tieredImageNet, miniImageNet, and Caltech-USCD Birds-200-2011 (CUB).
abstract_zh: 少样本开放集识别旨在仅在已知类别的有限训练数据的情况下对已知图像和新颖图像进行分类。这项任务的挑战在于，模型不仅需要学习判别性分类器来对训练数据很少的预定义类进行分类，而且还需要拒绝来自训练时从未出现的未见类的输入。在本文中，我们建议从两个新颖的方面来解决这个问题。首先，我们不是像标准闭集分类中那样学习已见类别之间的决策边界，而是为未见类别保留空间，以便位于这些区域的图像被识别为未见类别。其次，为了有效地学习此类决策边界，我们建议利用所见类别的背景特征。由于这些背景区域对近集分类的决策没有显着贡献，因此很自然地将它们用作分类器学习的伪未见类。我们广泛的实验表明，我们提出的方法不仅优于多个基线，而且还在三个流行的基准上设置了新的最先进的结果，即 tieredImageNet、miniImageNet 和 Caltech-USCD Birds-200-2011 (CUB)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种少样本开放集识别方法，通过将背景特征作为未知类来提升模型对未见类的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 传统少样本分类方法仅关注已见类的判别性学习，难以有效识别训练中未出现的未知类。本文旨在通过利用背景特征构建开放集决策边界，解决这一挑战。
AI.method: 1) 在分类器中保留未见类的决策空间；2) 利用已见类图像的背景区域特征作为伪未知类，辅助学习开放集判别边界。
AI.result: 在tieredImageNet、miniImageNet和CUB三个基准数据集上均取得优于现有方法的性能，刷新了多项最先进记录。
AI.conclusion: 通过巧妙利用背景特征构建开放集决策机制，本文方法有效提升了少样本场景下对未知类的识别与拒绝能力。

authors_text: Rafael C. Cardoso,Angelo Ferrando,Fabio Papacchini,Mehrnoosh Askarpour,Louise A. Dennis
title: Proceedings of the Second Workshop on Agents and Robots for reliable Engineered Autonomy
title_zh: 第二届可靠工程自治代理和机器人研讨会论文集
abstract: This volume contains the proceedings of the Second Workshop on Agents and Robots for reliable Engineered Autonomy (AREA 2022), co-located with the 31st International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence and the 25th European Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-ECAI 2022). The AREA workshop brings together researchers from autonomous agents, software engineering and robotic communities, as combining knowledge coming from these research areas may lead to innovative approaches that solve complex problems related with the verification and validation of autonomous robotic systems.
summary: This volume contains the proceedings of the Second Workshop on Agents and Robots for reliable Engineered Autonomy (AREA 2022), co-located with the 31st International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence and the 25th European Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-ECAI 2022). The AREA workshop brings together researchers from autonomous agents, software engineering and robotic communities, as combining knowledge coming from these research areas may lead to innovative approaches that solve complex problems related with the verification and validation of autonomous robotic systems.
abstract_zh: 本卷包含第二届可靠工程自治代理和机器人研讨会 (AREA 2022) 的会议记录，该研讨会与第 31 届国际人工智能联合会议和第 25 届欧洲人工智能会议 (IJCAI-ECAI 2022) 同期举行。 AREA 研讨会汇集了来自自主代理、软件工程和机器人社区的研究人员，因为结合来自这些研究领域的知识可能会产生创新方法，解决与自主机器人系统验证和确认相关的复杂问题。

AI.tldr: 本文集收录了第二届AREA 2022研讨会的论文，聚焦自主代理、软件工程与机器人领域，旨在通过跨学科合作解决自主机器人系统的验证与验证问题。
AI.motivation: 自主机器人系统的可靠性验证需要融合自主代理、软件工程及机器人学的多领域知识，跨学科协作可推动创新方法的发展。
AI.method: 通过举办研讨会，汇集来自自主代理、软件工程和机器人领域的研究成果，展示验证与验证技术的最新进展。
AI.result: 收集了多篇关于自主机器人系统验证方法的论文，促进了跨领域学术交流，提出了结合多学科技术的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 跨学科合作是提升自主机器人系统可靠性的关键，未来需进一步推动理论与工程实践的结合。

authors_text: Liu Yang,Keping Yu,Simon X. Yang,Chinmay Chakraborty,Yinzhi Lu,Tan Guo
title: An Intelligent Trust Cloud Management Method for Secure Clustering in 5G enabled Internet of Medical Things
title_zh: 5G医疗物联网中安全集群的智能信任云管理方法
abstract: 5G edge computing enabled Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) is an efficient technology to provide decentralized medical services while Device-to-device (D2D) communication is a promising paradigm for future 5G networks. To assure secure and reliable communication in 5G edge computing and D2D enabled IoMT systems, this paper presents an intelligent trust cloud management method. Firstly, an active training mechanism is proposed to construct the standard trust clouds. Secondly, individual trust clouds of the IoMT devices can be established through fuzzy trust inferring and recommending. Thirdly, a trust classification scheme is proposed to determine whether an IoMT device is malicious. Finally, a trust cloud update mechanism is presented to make the proposed trust management method adaptive and intelligent under an open wireless medium. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed method can effectively address the trust uncertainty issue and improve the detection accuracy of malicious devices.
summary: 5G edge computing enabled Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) is an efficient technology to provide decentralized medical services while Device-to-device (D2D) communication is a promising paradigm for future 5G networks. To assure secure and reliable communication in 5G edge computing and D2D enabled IoMT systems, this paper presents an intelligent trust cloud management method. Firstly, an active training mechanism is proposed to construct the standard trust clouds. Secondly, individual trust clouds of the IoMT devices can be established through fuzzy trust inferring and recommending. Thirdly, a trust classification scheme is proposed to determine whether an IoMT device is malicious. Finally, a trust cloud update mechanism is presented to make the proposed trust management method adaptive and intelligent under an open wireless medium. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed method can effectively address the trust uncertainty issue and improve the detection accuracy of malicious devices.
abstract_zh: 支持 5G 边缘计算的医疗物联网 (IoMT) 是一种提供去中心化医疗服务的高效技术，而设备到设备 (D2D) 通信是未来 5G 网络的一个有前景的范例。为了确保 5G 边缘计算和支持 D2D 的 IoMT 系统中的安全可靠通信，本文提出了一种智能信任云管理方法。首先，提出主动训练机制来构建标准信任云。其次，可以通过模糊信任推断和推荐来建立物联网设备的个体信任云。第三，提出了一种信任分类方案来确定IoMT设备是否是恶意的。最后，提出了一种信任云更新机制，使所提出的信任管理方法在开放无线介质下具有自适应性和智能性。仿真结果表明，该方法能够有效解决信任不确定性问题，提高恶意设备的检测准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种智能信任云管理方法，用于5G支持的医疗物联网（IoMT）中安全聚类，解决设备信任不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 5G边缘计算与D2D通信在IoMT中广泛应用，但开放无线环境下的设备信任管理存在不确定性，需提升恶意设备检测准确性以确保通信安全。
AI.method: 提出主动训练机制构建标准信任云，结合模糊信任推理生成个体信任云，设计信任分类方案识别恶意设备，并通过动态更新机制增强方法适应性。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该方法有效缓解信任不确定性，显著提升恶意设备检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过智能信任云管理，在开放无线环境中实现了高效、自适应的IoMT安全聚类，为医疗物联网通信安全提供新思路。

search_text: An Intelligent Trust Cloud Management Method for Secure Clustering in 5G enabled Internet of Medical Things 5G医疗物联网中安全集群的智能信任云管理方法 5G edge computing enabled Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) is an efficient technology to provide decentralized medical services while Device-to-device (D2D) communication is a promising paradigm for future 5G networks. To assure secure and reliable communication in 5G edge computing and D2D enabled IoMT systems, this paper presents an intelligent trust cloud management method. Firstly, an active training mechanism is proposed to construct the standard trust clouds. Secondly, individual trust clouds of the IoMT devices can be established through fuzzy trust inferring and recommending. Thirdly, a trust classification scheme is proposed to determine whether an IoMT device is malicious. Finally, a trust cloud update mechanism is presented to make the proposed trust management method adaptive and intelligent under an open wireless medium. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed method can effectively address the trust uncertainty issue and improve the detection accuracy of malicious devices. 支持 5G 边缘计算的医疗物联网 (IoMT) 是一种提供去中心化医疗服务的高效技术，而设备到设备 (D2D) 通信是未来 5G 网络的一个有前景的范例。为了确保 5G 边缘计算和支持 D2D 的 IoMT 系统中的安全可靠通信，本文提出了一种智能信任云管理方法。首先，提出主动训练机制来构建标准信任云。其次，可以通过模糊信任推断和推荐来建立物联网设备的个体信任云。第三，提出了一种信任分类方案来确定IoMT设备是否是恶意的。最后，提出了一种信任云更新机制，使所提出的信任管理方法在开放无线介质下具有自适应性和智能性。仿真结果表明，该方法能够有效解决信任不确定性问题，提高恶意设备的检测准确率。 本文提出一种智能信任云管理方法，用于5G支持的医疗物联网（IoMT）中安全聚类，解决设备信任不确定性问题。 Liu Yang,Keping Yu,Simon X. Yang,Chinmay Chakraborty,Yinzhi Lu,Tan Guo cs.NI,cs.AI,eess.SY
